RoboLab 复现与学习记录（RTX 4090）¶

鐩爣锛氬湪楂樹繚鐪熶豢鐪熶腑澶嶇幇 NVIDIA RoboLab锛岄噸鐐硅瀵熼€氱敤鏈哄櫒浜虹瓥鐣ュ湪瑙嗚璇嗗埆銆佺┖闂村叧绯绘帹鐞嗐€佸姝ラ/杩囩▼鍖栨搷浣滀笁涓淮搴︿笂鐨勬硾鍖栬兘鍔涖€?/p>

纭欢瀹氫綅锛歊TX 4090 24GB VRAM 鍙互鍋氬畨瑁呴獙璇併€佸崟浠诲姟 smoke run銆佸皬鎵归噺瀛愰泦璇勬祴锛涘畬鏁?RoboLab-120 鎴栬緝楂?num_envs 骞惰闇€瑕佹洿璋ㄦ厧锛屽畼鏂规帹鑽?48GB+ VRAM銆?/p>

鏈?notebook 鐨勫畾浣?/strong>锛?/p>

  • 鍏堝仛鍙褰曘€佸彲澶嶈窇銆佸彲浜や粯鐨勫鐜板疄楠屽彴璐︺€?/li>
  • 榛樿涓嶆墽琛岄噸鍨嬪畨瑁呭拰浠跨湡鍛戒护锛岄伩鍏嶅湪闈?Ubuntu/闈?4090 鐜璇窇銆?/li>
  • 鎼埌 Ubuntu 22.04+ / RTX 4090 鏈哄櫒鍚庯紝鎶婇厤缃?cell 閲岀殑鎵ц寮€鍏虫敼涓?True锛屾寜闃舵杩愯銆?/li>
  • 鎵€鏈夊懡浠よ緭鍑恒€佹寚鏍囨眹鎬汇€佸浘琛ㄥ拰瀛︿範璁板綍缁熶竴鍐欏埌 robolab_repro_artifacts/銆?/li>

鏉ユ簮杈圭晫锛氭湰 notebook 鍙洿缁曡鏂囥€佸畼缃戙€丟itHub README/docs 涓叕寮€鐨勪俊鎭粍缁囧鐜版祦绋嬶紱鍏蜂綋妯″瀷鏉冮噸銆佺瓥鐣ユ湇鍔＄鍜岃鍙瘉鎸夊疄闄呬娇鐢ㄧ殑妯″瀷鍙﹁璁板綍銆?/p>

0. 官方来源与当前事实核对¶

澶嶇幇鍓嶅厛鍥哄畾鏉ユ簮锛岄伩鍏嶇収鐫€鏃у懡浠よ蛋鍋忋€?/p>

  • 璁烘枃锛?code>arXiv:2604.09860v3锛孯oboLab-120 鍖呭惈 120 涓换鍔★紝瑕嗙洊 visual / procedural / relational 涓変釜鑳藉姏杞淬€?/li>
  • 瀹樼綉锛氬己璋?agentic scene/task generation銆佺粨鏋?dashboard銆丷oboLab benchmark 鍜?sensitivity analysis銆?/li>
  • GitHub README 褰撳墠璇存槑锛氶渶瑕?uv 涓庣郴缁?ffmpeg锛?code>uv sync 浼氳嚜鍔ㄥ畨瑁?Isaac Sim 5.0 鍜?Isaac Lab 2.2.0銆?/li>
  • GitHub README 褰撳墠璇存槑锛氫緷璧栬姹備负 Ubuntu 22.04+銆丳ython 3.11銆丯VIDIA RTX GPU锛涘畼鏂瑰缓璁?48GB+ VRAM锛?090 闇€瑕佸厛闄嶅苟琛屽害銆?/li>
  • GitHub HEAD锛堝噯澶?notebook 鏃讹級锛?code>7d45d74904eade3b578a8eb1f2f9f89bc3d40326銆?/li>

鎵ц绛栫暐淇锛氫富璺嚎涓嶅厛鎵嬪姩 clone/build Isaac Sim銆俁oboLab 鐜板湪鐨勪富瀹夎璺緞鏄?clone RoboLab 鍚庣敤 uv sync 鎷夎捣 Isaac Sim/Lab 渚濊禆銆傚彧鏈夊仛 Isaac Sim 鍐呮牳寮€鍙戞垨瀹樻柟瀹夎澶辫触鏃讹紝鎵嶅崟鐙蛋 Isaac Sim 婧愮爜鏋勫缓璺嚎銆?/p>

In [ ]:
# ===== 1. 瀵煎叆鏍囧噯搴擄細杩欎簺搴撹礋璐ｈ矾寰勩€佹椂闂淬€丣SON銆佺郴缁熶俊鎭拰鍛戒护鎵ц =====
from pathlib import Path  # 鐢?Path 缁熶竴澶勭悊 Windows/Linux 璺緞锛岄伩鍏嶆墜鍐欏瓧绗︿覆鎷艰矾寰勩€?/span>
import datetime as _dt  # 缁欐棩蹇楀拰瀛︿範璁板綍鐢熸垚甯︽棩鏈?鏃跺尯鐨勬椂闂存埑銆?/span>
import json  # 璇诲啓 repro_status銆佽繙绔?summary銆佸懡浠ゆ棩蹇楃瓑缁撴瀯鍖栬瘉鎹€?/span>
import os  # 璇诲彇鐜鍙橀噺锛屼緥濡?ROBOLAB_WORK_ROOT / ROBOLAB_DIR銆?/span>
import platform  # 鍒ゆ柇褰撳墠鏄笉鏄?Linux锛岄伩鍏嶅湪 Windows 涓婅鍚姩 Isaac Sim銆?/span>
import shlex  # 鍦ㄥ睍绀?shell 鍛戒护鏃跺畨鍏ㄥ湴杞箟璺緞鍜屽弬鏁般€?/span>
import subprocess  # 鐪熸鎵ц git銆乽v銆乸ytest銆丷oboLab 鑴氭湰绛夊閮ㄥ懡浠ゃ€?/span>
import sys  # 杈撳嚭褰撳墠 Python 鐗堟湰锛屼究浜庢帓鏌?Python 3.11 瑕佹眰銆?/span>
import time  # 璁＄畻鍛戒护杩愯鑰楁椂銆?/span>

# ===== 2. 瀵煎叆鍙€夊垎鏋愬簱锛氭病鏈夊畨瑁呬篃涓嶈 notebook 涓柇 =====
try:
    import pandas as pd  # 鐢ㄦ潵鎶?episode_results.jsonl 姹囨€绘垚琛ㄦ牸銆?/span>
except Exception:
    pd = None  # pandas 涓嶅瓨鍦ㄦ椂锛屽悗闈㈢殑鍒嗘瀽 cell 浼氶€€鍖栦负鎵撳嵃 JSON銆?/span>

try:
    import matplotlib.pyplot as plt  # 鐢ㄦ潵鐢绘垚鍔熺巼鏌辩姸鍥俱€?/span>
except Exception:
    plt = None  # matplotlib 涓嶅瓨鍦ㄦ椂璺宠繃缁樺浘锛屼笉褰卞搷澶嶇幇璁板綍涓讳綋銆?/span>

try:
    from IPython.display import Markdown, display  # 鍦?Jupyter 閲屾覆鏌?Markdown 琛ㄦ牸銆?/span>
except Exception:
    Markdown = None  # 闈?Jupyter 鐜涓嬫病鏈?Markdown 瀵硅薄鏃朵娇鐢?print銆?/span>
    display = print  # 璁╄剼鏈ā寮忎篃鑳界湅鍒拌緭鍑恒€?/span>

# ===== 3. 瀹氫箟 notebook 鐨勫伐浣滅洰褰曞拰璇佹嵁鐩綍 =====
NOTEBOOK_ROOT = Path.cwd()  # 褰撳墠鎵ц notebook 鐨勭洰褰曪紱寤鸿灏辨槸鏈氦浠樼墿鐩綍銆?/span>
ARTIFACT_DIR = NOTEBOOK_ROOT / "robolab_repro_artifacts"  # 鎵€鏈夋湰鍦拌繍琛岃瘉鎹粺涓€鏀捐繖閲屻€?/span>
WORK_ROOT = Path(os.environ.get("ROBOLAB_WORK_ROOT", NOTEBOOK_ROOT / "robolab_workspace")).expanduser()
# WORK_ROOT 鏄?RoboLab 浠撳簱鐨勭埗鐩綍锛涘彲閫氳繃鐜鍙橀噺鏀瑰埌澶х鐩樸€?/span>
ROBOLAB_DIR = Path(os.environ.get("ROBOLAB_DIR", WORK_ROOT / "RoboLab")).expanduser()
# ROBOLAB_DIR 鏄?RoboLab 浠撳簱鐩綍锛涘鏋滀綘宸茬粡 clone 濂斤紝鍙敤鐜鍙橀噺鎸囧悜瀹冦€?/span>

# ===== 4. 鍒ゆ柇褰撳墠骞冲彴锛屽喅瀹氬摢浜?cell 榛樿鍙互鎵ц =====
IS_LINUX = platform.system().lower() == "linux"  # Isaac Sim/RoboLab 涓绘祦绋嬮渶瑕?Ubuntu/Linux銆?/span>

# ===== 5. 鎵ц寮€鍏筹細榛樿鍙厑璁歌交閲?preflight锛岄噸鍨嬫楠ゅ繀椤绘墜鍔ㄦ墦寮€ =====
EXECUTE_PREFLIGHT = IS_LINUX  # Linux 涓婂厑璁歌窇绯荤粺妫€鏌ワ紱Windows 涓婇粯璁?dry-run銆?/span>
EXECUTE_INSTALL = False  # 鏄惁鐪熺殑 clone/uv sync锛涢粯璁?False 闃叉璇澶т緷璧栥€?/span>
EXECUTE_TESTS = False  # 鏄惁鐪熺殑璺?pytest锛汭saac import 寰堥噸锛屾墍浠ラ粯璁?False銆?/span>
EXECUTE_NO_POLICY_SMOKE = False  # 鏄惁璺戞棤绛栫暐浠跨湡 smoke锛涢渶瑕?GPU/Isaac 鐜銆?/span>
EXECUTE_POLICY_SMOKE = False  # 鏄惁璺?Pi0/Pi05 鍗曚换鍔＄瓥鐣ワ紱闇€瑕?OpenPI server ready銆?/span>
EXECUTE_SUBSET_EVAL = False  # 鏄惁璺戝皬瀛愰泦绛栫暐璇勬祴锛涜€楁椂鏇撮暱锛岄粯璁ゅ叧闂€?/span>

# ===== 6. 4090 淇濆畧鍙傛暟锛氬厛淇濊瘉鑳借窇閫氾紝鍐嶉€愭鎻愰珮骞惰搴?=====
NUM_ENVS_4090_SMOKE = 1  # 4090 棣栨绛栫暐 smoke 鍙紑 1 涓幆澧冿紝闄嶄綆 OOM 椋庨櫓銆?/span>
NUM_ENVS_4090_CAUTIOUS = 2  # 灏忓瓙闆嗚瘎娴嬬殑淇濆畧骞惰搴︼紱纭鏄惧瓨鍚庡啀鎻愰珮銆?/span>
NUM_RUNS = 1  # 姣忎釜浠诲姟鍏堣窇 1 娆★紝鍙獙璇侀摼璺紝涓嶅仛缁熻缁撹銆?/span>
POLICY_NAME = "pi05"  # RoboLab policy runner 浣跨敤鐨勭瓥鐣ュ悕銆?/span>
SMOKE_TASK = "BananaInBowlTask"  # 绗竴鏉￠棴鐜换鍔★紝绠€鍗曘€佷綆鍘嬪姏銆佷究浜庢帓閿欍€?/span>
# SUBSET_TASKS 瑕嗙洊 pick/place銆佽瑷€缁勫悎銆佺┖闂村叧绯汇€侀噸瀹氬悜銆佸爢鍙犱簲绫昏兘鍔涖€?/span>
SUBSET_TASKS = [
    "BananaInBowlTask",  # 璇箟璇嗗埆 + 鍩虹 pick/place銆?/span>
    "RubiksCubeAndBananaTask",  # 澶氱洰鏍?conjunction锛氬悓鏃跺鐞?cube 鍜?banana銆?/span>
    "RubiksCubeLeftOfBowlTask",  # 绌洪棿鍏崇郴锛氬垽鏂?left of bowl銆?/span>
    "ReorientWhiteMugsTask",  # 杩囩▼/閲嶅畾鍚戯細鎶婄櫧鑹叉澂瀛愯浆姝ｃ€?/span>
    "Stack3RubiksCubeTask",  # 澶氭楠ゅ爢鍙狅細瑙傚療闀?horizon 澶辫触妯″紡銆?/span>
]

# ===== 7. Isaac/Kit 杩愯鐜鍙橀噺 =====
OMNI_ENV = {"OMNI_KIT_ACCEPT_EULA": "Y"}  # 闈炰氦浜掕繍琛屾椂鏄惧紡鎺ュ彈 EULA锛岄伩鍏嶅崱鍦ㄦ彁绀虹晫闈€?/span>
ARTIFACT_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)  # 纭繚璇佹嵁鐩綍瀛樺湪銆?/span>

# ===== 8. 鎵撳嵃褰撳墠閰嶇疆锛屾柟渚挎埅鍥?鏃ュ織鐣欐。 =====
print("Notebook root:", NOTEBOOK_ROOT)  # notebook 褰撳墠鎵ц浣嶇疆銆?/span>
print("Artifact dir :", ARTIFACT_DIR)  # 鏈湴璇佹嵁杈撳嚭鐩綍銆?/span>
print("Work root    :", WORK_ROOT)  # RoboLab 宸ヤ綔鍖虹埗鐩綍銆?/span>
print("RoboLab dir  :", ROBOLAB_DIR)  # RoboLab 浠撳簱鐩綍銆?/span>
print("Platform     :", platform.platform())  # OS/鍐呮牳绛夊钩鍙颁俊鎭€?/span>
print("Python       :", sys.version.replace("\n", " "))  # 褰撳墠 Python 瑙ｉ噴鍣ㄧ増鏈€?/span>
In [ ]:
COMMAND_LOG = ARTIFACT_DIR / "command_log.jsonl"

def _now():
    # 鐢熸垚甯︽椂鍖虹殑鏃堕棿鎴筹紝鏂逛究鏈湴鏃ュ織鍜岃繙绔棩蹇楀榻愩€?/span>
    return _dt.datetime.now().astimezone().isoformat(timespec="seconds")

def _append_jsonl(path: Path, record: dict):
    # JSONL 閫傚悎鎸佺画杩藉姞锛沝ry-run 鍜岀湡瀹炴墽琛岀殑鍛戒护閮戒細鐣欎笅璇佹嵁銆?/span>
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")

def run(cmd, *, cwd=None, env=None, execute=True, check=False, timeout=None, label=None):
    # 缁熶竴鐨勫懡浠ゆ墽琛屽叆鍙ｏ細寮€鍏冲叧闂椂鍙褰曡鍒掞紝寮€鍏虫墦寮€鏃舵墽琛屽苟璁板綍璇佹嵁銆?/span>
    cwd_path = Path(cwd).expanduser() if cwd else NOTEBOOK_ROOT
    record = {
        "time": _now(),
        "label": label,
        "cwd": str(cwd_path),
        "cmd": cmd if isinstance(cmd, str) else list(cmd),
        "execute": bool(execute),
    }
    printable = cmd if isinstance(cmd, str) else " ".join(shlex.quote(str(x)) for x in cmd)
    print(f"\n$ cd {cwd_path}")
    print(f"$ {printable}")
    if not execute:
        # dry-run 涔熷啓鍏?command_log.jsonl锛屽悗缁兘瀹¤鈥滃師璁″垝瑕佽窇浠€涔堚€濄€?/span>
        record.update({"status": "dry_run", "returncode": None, "stdout": "", "stderr": ""})
        _append_jsonl(COMMAND_LOG, record)
        print("[dry-run] command recorded only")
        return record

    # 鍚堝苟鍗曟潯鍛戒护闇€瑕佺殑鐜鍙橀噺锛屼緥濡?Isaac/Kit 鐨?EULA 纭鍙橀噺銆?/span>
    run_env = os.environ.copy()
    if env:
        run_env.update(env)
    start = time.time()
    proc = subprocess.run(
        cmd,
        cwd=str(cwd_path),
        env=run_env,
        shell=isinstance(cmd, str),
        text=True,
        capture_output=True,
        timeout=timeout,
    )
    elapsed = round(time.time() - start, 3)
    record.update(
        {
            "status": "completed",
            "returncode": proc.returncode,
            "elapsed_s": elapsed,
            "stdout": proc.stdout[-20000:],
            "stderr": proc.stderr[-20000:],
        }
    )
    _append_jsonl(COMMAND_LOG, record)
    # notebook 閲屽彧鎵撳嵃灏鹃儴锛岄伩鍏嶈緭鍑鸿繃闀匡紱鏇村畬鏁寸殑灏鹃儴淇濆瓨鍦?JSONL 閲屻€?/span>
    if proc.stdout:
        print(proc.stdout[-4000:])
    if proc.stderr:
        print(proc.stderr[-4000:])
    print("returncode:", proc.returncode, "elapsed_s:", elapsed)
    if check and proc.returncode != 0:
        raise RuntimeError(f"Command failed: {printable}")
    return record

def write_status(name: str, data: dict):
    # 鐘舵€?JSON 鏄渶缁?checklist 鐨勬満鍣ㄥ彲璇讳緷鎹紝涓嶅彧闈犱汉鐪肩湅鏃ュ織銆?/span>
    path = ARTIFACT_DIR / f"{name}.json"
    path.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
    print("wrote", path)
    return path

0.00 精讲问题来源与核心内容索引¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_SOURCE_QUESTION_INDEX.md銆傚畠琛ョ殑鏄墍鏈夌簿璁插叡鍚岀己鐨勪竴灞傦細姣忎釜绮捐鍒板簳鍥炵瓟鍝釜闂锛岄棶棰樻潵鑷鏂囧摢涓€鑺傘€佸摢寮犲浘銆佸摢涓?appendix 鎴栧摢娈垫簮鐮侊紝鏉ユ簮閲岀殑鏍稿績鍐呭鏄粈涔堬紝浠ュ強澶嶇幇鏃跺簲璇ヨ惤鍒板摢浜涗唬鐮?璇佹嵁鏂囦欢銆?/p>

精讲问题来源与核心内容索引¶

銆愮豢鑹叉爣璇嗭綔鏍稿績缁撹銆?/strong> 杩欏紶绱㈠紩涓嶆槸鏂扮殑璁烘枃绮捐锛岃€屾槸鎵€鏈夌簿璁茬殑鈥滃嚭澶勫湴鍥锯€濄€傚畠鍥炵瓟锛氭瘡涓簿璁蹭负浠€涔堣璁层€侀棶棰樻潵鑷鏂囧摢涓€鑺?鍝紶鍥?鍝釜 appendix/鍝浠ｇ爜銆佸師濮嬪唴瀹圭殑鏍稿績鏄粈涔堛€佹垜浠湪澶嶇幇閲屽簲璇ユ€庝箞鐢ㄣ€?br> 銆愯摑鑹叉爣璇嗭綔涓昏鏉ユ簮銆?/strong> 璁烘枃 RoboLab arXiv HTML銆侀」鐩〉 NVIDIA RoboLab銆佸畼鏂逛唬鐮?NVlabs/RoboLab銆佹湰鍦拌繙绔?4090 澶嶇幇璇佹嵁 remote_logs/ / remote_outputs/銆?br> 銆愭鑹叉爣璇嗭綔杈圭晫銆?/strong> 涓嬮潰鐨勨€滄潵婧愭牳蹇冨唴瀹光€濇槸鍙函婧愭憳瑕侊紝涓嶆槸璁烘枃鎴栨簮鐮侀€愬瓧鎽樺綍銆傝鏍告煡瀹屾暣涓婁笅鏂囷紝搴旂偣寮€瀵瑰簲璁烘枃鑺傘€乤ppendix 鎴?GitHub 鏂囦欢銆?/p>

鈥滀负浠€涔堣璁?Gaussian/NuRec 绛夊墠娌匡紵鈥?/td> 01銆?2銆?6 瀹冧滑涓嶆槸鏈枃涓绘祦绋嬶紝浣嗗喅瀹氭湭鏉?real-to-sim 鍜岄珮淇濈湡璧勪骇璺嚎

本索引如何维护¶

鏂板鎴栦慨鏀圭簿璁叉椂锛屽簲鍚屾琛ヤ笁浠朵簨锛?/p>

  1. 鍦ㄦ湰鏂囦欢鍔犲叆鈥滈棶棰?-> 鏉ユ簮 -> 鏍稿績鍐呭 -> 浠ｇ爜/澶嶇幇钀界偣鈥濄€?/li>
  2. 鍦?source_manifest.json 鐨?used_for 閲岃褰曞搴旀潵婧愮敤閫斻€?/li>
  3. 鍦?notebook 閲屼繚鐣欎竴涓交閲忛獙璇?cell锛屾鏌ョ簿璁叉槸鍚﹁嚦灏戞湁闂銆佹潵婧愬拰钀界偣涓夌被淇℃伅銆?/li>

杩欐牱鍚庣画涓嶄細鍙墿鈥滆瑙ｅ唴瀹光€濓紝鑰屾槸鑳借拷婧埌璁烘枃銆佷唬鐮佸拰澶嶇幇璇佹嵁銆?/p>

In [ ]:
# ===== 绮捐闂鏉ユ簮绱㈠紩杞婚噺楠岃瘉 =====
# 杩欎釜 cell 涓嶉獙璇佽鏂囩粨璁烘湰韬紝鍙獙璇佹墍鏈夌簿璁叉槸鍚︽湁鍙拷婧叆鍙ｏ細
# question / source / source_content / implementation_anchor 鍥涚被淇℃伅蹇呴』榻愬叏銆?/span>

source_question_index = [
    {"id": "00", "file": "EXPLAIN_00_global_overview.md", "question": "RoboLab 鐨勫叏灞€瀹氫綅鏄粈涔堬紵", "source": "Paper Abstract/Introduction/III/IV + GitHub README", "source_content": "benchmark platform, RoboLab-120, scene/task generation, policy analysis", "implementation_anchor": ["robolab/eval", "robolab/scene_gen", "notebook evidence"]},
    {"id": "01", "file": "EXPLAIN_01_real_to_sim_eval.md", "question": "real-to-sim evaluation 鍦?RoboLab 涓浣曡惤鍦帮紵", "source": "Paper II-B + III-A", "source_content": "scale scene/task generation instead of per-scene video reconstruction", "implementation_anchor": ["assets", "scene_gen", "variation runners"]},
    {"id": "02", "file": "EXPLAIN_02_scene_task_env_generation.md", "question": "scene/task/env 涓夋濡備綍鐢熸垚锛?, "source": "Paper III-A", "source_content": "place objects, define task instruction, instantiate env with robot/policy/variations", "implementation_anchor": ["runtime.py", "task registry", "scene configs"]},
    {"id": "03", "file": "EXPLAIN_03_task_generation_validation.md", "question": "LLM task code 濡備綍楠岃瘉鍜屼慨澶嶏紵", "source": "Paper III-A2 + Appendix D + taskgen skill", "source_content": "syntax/resource/feasibility validation and repair prompt loop", "implementation_anchor": ["skills/robolab-taskgen", "conditionals", "asset validation"]},
    {"id": "04", "file": "EXPLAIN_04_competency_axes_difficulty.md", "question": "鑳藉姏杞村拰闅惧害鍒嗘暟鎬庝箞瀹氫箟锛?, "source": "Paper III-B + Figure 4", "source_content": "visual/procedural/relational axes, multi-label attributes, subtask difficulty", "implementation_anchor": ["task metadata", "subtask_utils.py", "constants.py"]},
    {"id": "05", "file": "EXPLAIN_05_sparc_trajectory_metric.md", "question": "SPARC 涓轰粈涔堣　閲忚建杩瑰钩婊戝害锛?, "source": "Paper III-C Trajectory Metrics", "source_content": "spectral arc length of end-effector speed profile", "implementation_anchor": ["HDF5 trajectory", "analysis/read_results.py"]},
    {"id": "06", "file": "EXPLAIN_06_mnpe_sensitivity_analysis.md", "question": "MNPE 濡備綍瑙ｉ噴鎵板姩鏁忔劅鎬э紵", "source": "Paper III-D + Appendix B", "source_content": "learn posterior over variation parameters conditioned on rollout outcome", "implementation_anchor": ["analysis/sensitivity_analysis/posterior_inference.py", "variation CSV"]},
    {"id": "07", "file": "EXPLAIN_07_baseline_method.md", "question": "Appendix C-C baseline 鍒板簳鏄粈涔堬紵", "source": "Paper Appendix C-C", "source_content": "LLM object selection plus grid/jitter one-pass scene baseline", "implementation_anchor": ["grid baseline toy check", "scene generation comparison"]},
    {"id": "08", "file": "EXPLAIN_08_paper_experiments.md", "question": "璁烘枃瀹為獙鐨勮瘉鎹摼鏄粈涔堬紵", "source": "Paper IV + III-C + Appendix C-D/D", "source_content": "policy benchmark, granular analysis, sensitivity, real-world verification, generation quality", "implementation_anchor": ["runner.py", "results.py", "dashboard", "analysis scripts"]},
    {"id": "09", "file": "EXPLAIN_09_dtge.md", "question": "DTGE 鍏蜂綋璇勪粈涔堬紵", "source": "Paper Appendix D", "source_content": "LLM-as-judge over instruction/code alignment, relation/object/quantifier/clarity/feasibility", "implementation_anchor": ["AST extraction", "judge schema"]},
    {"id": "10", "file": "EXPLAIN_10_prompt_design.md", "question": "scene prompt 涓轰粈涔堣繖鏍峰啓锛?, "source": "Paper Appendix C Stage I + prompt figures", "source_content": "real-world scene principles, JSON-only contract, object catalog, placement types, size limits", "implementation_anchor": ["prompt schema", "catalog injection", "JSON validation"]},
    {"id": "11", "file": "EXPLAIN_11_spatial_physical_solver_feedback.md", "question": "Spatial/Physical/Feedback 鎬庝箞涓茶捣鏉ワ紵", "source": "Paper Appendix C-B + Algorithm 1/Figure 17/Algorithm 2 + source files", "source_content": "2D base pose solving, 3D place-on/place-in, feedback to LLM repair", "implementation_anchor": ["spatial_solver.py", "physical_solver.py", "feedback_system.py"]},
    {"id": "12", "file": "EXPLAIN_12_gaussian_sim_methods.md", "question": "鏈枃鍜?Gaussian/2026 鍓嶆部璺嚎鏈変粈涔堝叧绯伙紵", "source": "Paper real-to-sim discussion + MNPE KDE + NVIDIA sources", "source_content": "RoboLab is not primarily per-scene Gaussian reconstruction; frontier methods are adjacent extensions", "implementation_anchor": ["NuRec/3DGUT/Lyra links", "Isaac Sim route"]},
    {"id": "13", "file": "EXPLAIN_13_remaining_core_topics.md", "question": "璇勬祴渚ц繕鏈夊摢浜涙牳蹇冨唴瀹规病璁查€忥紵", "source": "Paper III-C/IV-B/IV-D/Appendix A/Limitations", "source_content": "success-score gap, language variants, complexity sweeps, event tracking, confidence, real-world correlation", "implementation_anchor": ["episode_results.jsonl", "event log", "dashboard"]},
    {"id": "13b", "file": "EXPLAIN_13_deep_evaluation_evidence_chain.md", "question": "鍗曟潯 rollout 濡備綍鍙樻垚璁烘枃绾х粨璁猴紵", "source": "Paper metrics + event/result schema", "source_content": "video, HDF5, JSONL, event log, dashboard have different evidence roles", "implementation_anchor": ["HDF5", "event JSON", "results.py", "dashboard loader"]},
    {"id": "14", "file": "EXPLAIN_14_core_code_runtime_chain.md", "question": "鐪熷疄绛栫暐璇勬祴 runtime 涓婚摼鏄粈涔堬紵", "source": "GitHub eval runner/episode/base_client/pi0_family/summarize", "source_content": "task selection, episode loop, policy client, summary/result writing", "implementation_anchor": ["runner.py", "episode.py", "base_client.py", "summarize.py"]},
    {"id": "14b", "file": "EXPLAIN_14_deep_runtime_code_chain.md", "question": "澶?env/action chunk/WorldState/EventTracker 鐘舵€佽竟鐣屾槸浠€涔堬紵", "source": "GitHub eval/world/logging/dashboard source files", "source_content": "env_id isolation, action chunk cache, predicate state, sparse failure events, artifact loading", "implementation_anchor": ["WorldState", "EventTracker", "RecorderManager", "dashboard"]},
    {"id": "15", "file": "EXPLAIN_15_reviewer_synthesis.md", "question": "瀹＄浜鸿瑙掓€庝箞鐪嬭繖绡囪鏂囷紵", "source": "Paper full text + Limitations + reproduction evidence", "source_content": "strengths, weaknesses, reproducibility risk, future innovation routes", "implementation_anchor": ["review rubric", "subset protocol", "hardware boundary"]},
    {"id": "16", "file": "EXPLAIN_16_recommended_reading.md", "question": "璇诲畬 RoboLab 鍚庤琛ュ摢浜涙潵婧愶紵", "source": "RoboLab related work + official project/source links", "source_content": "2026-first reading map across policies, benchmarks, assets, real data, world models", "implementation_anchor": ["source-linked reading map"]},
]

required_keys = {"id", "file", "question", "source", "source_content", "implementation_anchor"}
tests = [
    ("index_markdown_exists", (NOTEBOOK_ROOT / "EXPLAIN_SOURCE_QUESTION_INDEX.md").exists()),
    ("covers_all_explain_files", len(source_question_index) >= 19),
    ("every_entry_has_required_keys", all(required_keys.issubset(entry) for entry in source_question_index)),
    ("every_entry_file_exists", all((NOTEBOOK_ROOT / entry["file"]).exists() for entry in source_question_index)),
    ("every_entry_has_nonempty_source_content", all(entry["source_content"] for entry in source_question_index)),
    ("contains_paper_sections_and_code_sources", any("Appendix C" in entry["source"] for entry in source_question_index) and any("GitHub" in entry["source"] for entry in source_question_index)),
    ("contains_reproduction_artifact_anchors", any("HDF5" in " ".join(entry["implementation_anchor"]) for entry in source_question_index)),
]

report = {
    "entries": source_question_index,
    "tests": [{"name": name, "passed": bool(ok)} for name, ok in tests],
    "all_passed": all(ok for _, ok in tests),
    "boundary": "This validates source/question coverage for the lecture index; it does not re-verify paper claims or execute RoboLab.",
}

print(json.dumps(report, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
for name, ok in tests:
    print(f"{name}: {'PASS' if ok else 'FAIL'}")
assert report["all_passed"], tests
write_status("explain_source_question_index_tests", report)

杩欑増绮捐0鐨勬牳蹇冨彉鍖?/strong>锛氬畠涓嶆槸鏇夸唬鍚庨潰鐨?16 涓簿璁诧紝鑰屾槸鍛婅瘔浣犲悗闈㈢殑绮捐鍒嗗埆鍦ㄥ洖绛斿摢绫婚棶棰橈紝浠ュ強澶嶇幇瀹為獙閲屽簲璇ョ敤鍝簺璇佹嵁鍘婚獙璇佽繖浜涢棶棰樸€?

1. 论文为什么要做 RoboLab¶

璁烘枃鐨勮儗鏅槸锛氭満鍣ㄤ汉 foundation policy 宸茬粡瓒婃潵瓒婂己锛屼絾璇勬祴寰堝鏄撳嚭鐜颁袱涓棶棰樸€?/p>

闂 璇翠汉璇濊В閲?/th> RoboLab 鐨勫簲瀵?/th>
璁粌鍩熷拰璇勬祴鍩熷お鍍?/td> 妯″瀷鍙兘鍙槸鐔熸倝 benchmark锛岃€屼笉鏄叿澶囩湡姝ｆ硾鍖栬兘鍔?/td> 鐢ㄧ湡瀹炴暟鎹缁冪殑绛栫暐锛屽湪楂樹繚鐪熶豢鐪熼噷鍋氭柊浠诲姟璇勬祴
鍙湅 success 澶矖 鎴愬姛/澶辫触涓嶈兘瑙ｉ噴閿欏湪鍝噷銆佸姩浣滈『涓嶉『銆佸鐩告満/鍏夌収鏄惁鑴嗗急 杈撳嚭 success銆乻core銆乻ubtask/event銆丼PARC銆乻peed銆乸ath length銆丮NPE 鏁忔劅鎬?/td>
浠诲姟澶潤鎬?/td> 鍥哄畾浠诲姟闆嗗鏄撹鍒风啛锛屼笉鑳介暱鏈熶繚鎸佹寫鎴?/td> 鏀寔浜哄伐鍜?LLM 杈呭姪鐢熸垚鍦烘櫙/浠诲姟
鐪熷疄涓栫晫璇勬祴澶吹 鐪熷疄鏈哄櫒浜鸿窇 120 涓换鍔°€佸涓瓥鐣ャ€佸涓壈鍔ㄦ垚鏈緢楂?/td> 鐢?Isaac Sim / Isaac Lab 鏋勯€犲彲閲嶅銆佸彲鎵归噺杩愯鐨勪豢鐪熻瘎娴?/td>
涓嶈鎶婂畠鐞嗚В鎴?sim2real 璁粌妗嗘灦锛歊oboLab 璁烘枃閲嶇偣鏄瘎浼扮湡瀹炰笘鐣岀瓥鐣ワ紝涓嶆槸涓昏鎷夸豢鐪熸暟鎹幓璁粌绛栫暐銆傚畠鍏冲績鐨勬槸鈥滅湡瀹炵瓥鐣ュ湪浠跨湡鑰冨満閲岀殑琛ㄧ幇鏄惁鑳芥彮绀烘硾鍖栭棶棰樷€濄€?

2. 全局数据流¶

浠庢渶涓婂眰鐪嬶紝涓€娆?RoboLab 璇勬祴澶ф鏄笅闈㈣繖鏉￠摼锛?/p> 

璁烘枃/浠诲姟璁捐
  -> 璧勪骇搴擄細USD/SimReady objects, fixtures, robots, backgrounds
  -> 鍦烘櫙锛氭煇涓?USD scene锛岄噷闈㈡憜濂藉璞″拰鏀拺鍏崇郴
  -> 浠诲姟锛歍ask Python 绫伙紝鍐欒瑷€鎸囦护銆佹垚鍔熸潯浠躲€乻ubtasks
  -> 娉ㄥ唽锛歛uto_env_registrations 鎶?task 鍙樻垚 gym env id
  -> 鐜锛歝reate_env / RobolabEnv / Isaac Lab managers
  -> 绛栫暐锛歅i0/Pi05/GR00T/PaliGemma/ReKep 绛夋帴鍙ｉ€傞厤
  -> episode锛氫豢鐪?step銆乸olicy action銆乪vent tracking銆乺ecorder
  -> 杈撳嚭锛歷ideo, HDF5, event log, episode_results.jsonl
  -> 鍒嗘瀽锛歴uccess/score/axis/difficulty/SPARC/MNPE

瀵瑰鐜版潵璇达紝鏈€閲嶈鐨勬槸姣忎竴灞傞兘瑕佹湁璇佹嵁锛?/p>

灞?/th> 杈撳叆 杈撳嚭 璇佹嵁鏂囦欢
瀹夎灞?/td> RoboLab repo銆?code>uv sync銆両saac Sim/Lab 渚濊禆 Python 鐜鍙鍏?/td> uv_freeze.txt銆佸畨瑁呮棩蹇?/td>
璧勪骇灞?/td> LFS 鍦烘櫙/鐗╀綋/鏈哄櫒浜?鑳屾櫙 鍙姞杞界殑 USD assets 璧勪骇鐩綍澶у皬銆佺己澶辫祫浜ф姤閿?/td>
浠诲姟灞?/td> Task 绫汇€乻cene銆乮nstruction銆乻ubtasks task metadata / env id task_metadata.json銆乼ask py 鏂囦欢
鐜灞?/td> task name銆乺obot銆乧amera銆乿ariation Isaac Lab env env_cfg.json銆両saac 鏃ュ織
绛栫暐灞?/td> observations銆乴anguage prompt action chunk OpenPI server log銆乸olicy timing
episode 灞?/td> actions + simulation steps success/score/events/video/HDF5 episode_results.jsonl銆?code>log_0_env0.json銆?code>run_0.hdf5銆乵p4
鍒嗘瀽灞?/td> 澶氫换鍔?episode records 琛ㄦ牸銆佸浘銆乸osterior summary csv/json銆乶otebook 鍥捐〃
婧愮爜/杈撳叆杈撳嚭璺緞锛氬鐜版椂涓嶈鍙湅缁堢鏈夋病鏈夋姤閿欍€傜湡姝ｇ殑闂幆璇佹嵁鏄?output/<run_id>/.../episode_results.jsonl銆佷换鍔?event log銆丠DF5銆佽棰戯紝浠ュ強 notebook 閲屽悓姝ュ嚭鏉ョ殑 remote_outputs/ 鍜?robolab_repro_artifacts/銆?

2b. 全局架构可以压成四条主线¶

濡傛灉鎶?RoboLab 鍘嬫垚鏈€灏戠殑绯荤粺鍥撅紝瀹冧笉鏄竴鏉＄嚎锛岃€屾槸鍥涙潯骞惰涓荤嚎姹囧悎鍒拌瘎娴嬬粨鏋滐細

鐢熸垚绾匡細scene prompt -> predicates -> spatial/physical solve -> valid scene
浠诲姟绾匡細task template -> Python task -> conditionals/subtasks -> score/success
杩愯绾匡細env -> observation -> policy client/server -> action chunk -> env.step
璇佹嵁绾匡細recorder -> HDF5/video/event log -> episode_results -> dashboard/analysis

杩欏洓鏉＄嚎鍒嗗埆瀵瑰簲鍚庨潰绮捐锛?/p>

涓荤嚎 璐熻矗浠€涔?/th> 瀵瑰簲绮捐
鐢熸垚绾?/td> 璁╁満鏅湡瀹炪€佸彲鏀剧疆銆佸彲鐗╃悊 settle 01銆?2銆?7銆?0銆?1銆?2
浠诲姟绾?/td> 璁╄瑷€鐩爣銆佹垚鍔熸潯浠躲€侀毦搴﹀拰鑳藉姏鏍囩涓€鑷?/td> 03銆?4銆?9
杩愯绾?/td> 璁╃湡瀹炵瓥鐣ヨ兘鍦ㄤ豢鐪熼噷闂幆鎵ц 14銆?4b
璇佹嵁绾?/td> 璁╁崟鏉?rollout 鑳藉彉鎴愬彲鍒嗘瀽缁撴灉 05銆?6銆?8銆?3銆?3b
璇勪环绾?/td> 浠庤鏂囪础鐚€侀闄╁拰鏈潵璺嚎閲嶆柊鐪嬫暣涓郴缁?/td> 15銆?6
鏈€瀹规槗鍑洪敊鐨勫湴鏂?/strong>锛氬洓鏉＄嚎浠讳綍涓€鏉℃柇浜嗭紝鏈€缁堢粨鏋滈兘涓嶈兘鐩存帴瑙ｉ噴鎴愨€滄ā鍨嬭兘鍔涘己/寮扁€濄€備緥濡傝祫浜х己澶辨槸鐢熸垚绾块棶棰橈紝浠诲姟璋撹瘝閿欐槸浠诲姟绾块棶棰橈紝server timeout 鏄繍琛岀嚎闂锛宒ashboard 娌¤鍒?HDF5 鏄瘉鎹嚎闂銆?

3. 代码目录按职责看¶

RoboLab 浠撳簱鍙互鍏堟寜鑱岃矗鍒嗘垚鍗佸潡锛屼笉瑕佷竴涓婃潵骞抽摵璇绘墍鏈夋枃浠讹細

鐩綍/鏂囦欢 璐熻矗浠€涔?/th> 璇ユ€庝箞璇?/th>
robolab/constants.py 鍖呮牴鐩綍銆佽祫浜х洰褰曘€佽緭鍑虹洰褰曘€佽兘鍔涙潈閲嶃€侀毦搴﹂槇鍊?/td> 鍏堢湅璺緞鍜屽叏灞€甯搁噺
assets/ scene/object/fixture/robot/background 绛?USD 璧勪骇 璺戜换鍔℃姤缂鸿祫浜ф椂鍥炲埌杩欓噷
robolab/tasks/benchmark/*.py 姣忎釜 benchmark 浠诲姟鐨勫畾涔?/td> 璇?language銆乻cene銆乼ermination銆乻ubtasks
robolab/tasks/_metadata/ 浠诲姟绱㈠紩鍜?metadata 鎸変换鍔″悕鐪嬭兘鍔涜酱銆侀毦搴︺€乻ubtask 鏁?/td>
robolab/core/task/ 鏉′欢璋撹瘝銆乻ubtask銆乼ask 鍩虹被 璇?success/score 鏄€庝箞璁＄畻鐨?/td>
robolab/core/environments/ 浠庝换鍔″悕鍒涘缓 Isaac Lab env锛屽苟绠＄悊 episode 鐢熷懡鍛ㄦ湡 璇?create_env銆?code>RobolabEnv.step銆乺eset/freeze
robolab/registrations/ 鎶婁换鍔℃敞鍐屾垚 gym env 璇?auto registration 濡備綍缁戝畾 robot/camera/background
robolab/variations/ 鐩告満銆佺伅鍏夈€佽儗鏅瓑鎵板姩閰嶇疆 璇?sensitivity / robustness 瀹為獙
policies/pi0_family/ Pi0/Pi05 policy runner 鍜?client 璇?observation/action 濡備綍鎺?OpenPI
analysis/sensitivity_analysis/ MNPE/NPE 鍚庨獙鍒嗘瀽 璇?CSV -> theta/x -> posterior
闃呰椤哄簭锛氬厛璇?BananaInBowlTask锛屽啀璇?conditionals.py / subtask.py锛屽啀璇?runtime.py:create_env锛屾渶鍚庤 policies/pi0_family/run.py銆傝繖鏍疯兘浠庝竴涓叿浣撲换鍔℃妸鏁存潯閾句覆璧锋潵銆?

4. 一个任务到底“标注”了什么¶

RoboLab 鐨勨€滄爣娉ㄢ€濅笉鏄紶缁熻瑙夋暟鎹泦閭ｇ bounding box 鎴?segmentation mask銆備竴涓?RoboLab task 鐨勬爣娉ㄦ洿鍍忊€滃彲鎵ц浠诲姟瑙勮寖鈥濄€?/p>

浠?BananaInBowlTask 涓轰緥锛屼竴涓换鍔¤嚦灏戝寘鍚細

瀛楁 璇翠汉璇?/th> 浣滅敤
scene 鐢ㄥ摢涓?USD 鍦烘櫙 鍐冲畾妗岄潰銆佺銆侀钑夌瓑瀵硅薄鍦ㄥ摢閲?/td>
contact_object_list 鍝簺瀵硅薄闇€瑕?contact sensor 鎶撳彇銆佺鎾炪€佹帀钀界瓑浜嬩欢渚濊禆瀹?/td>
instruction 缁欑瓥鐣ョ湅鐨勮瑷€浠诲姟 policy 杈撳叆鐨勪竴閮ㄥ垎
terminations 鎴愬姛/澶辫触/瓒呮椂鏉′欢 鍐冲畾 episode 浠€涔堟椂鍊欑粨鏉?/td>
attributes 棰滆壊銆佽涔夈€佺┖闂淬€佸爢鍙犮€侀噸瀹氬悜绛夋爣绛?/td> 鍚庣画鎸夎兘鍔涜酱缁熻
subtasks 鎶婁换鍔℃媶鎴愬彲璇勫垎姝ラ 鐢ㄦ潵绠?partial score 鍜岄敊璇垎鏋?/td>

鎵€浠ワ細

Task = 鍦烘櫙 + 璇█ + 瀵硅薄 + 鎴愬姛鏉′欢 + 瀛愪换鍔¤瘎鍒?+ 鑳藉姏鏍囩
鍏抽敭鍖哄埆锛歊oboLab 涓嶆槸鍏堝綍涓€娈佃棰戝啀浜哄伐鏍囨敞鈥滃摢涓€甯ф垚鍔熲€濄€傚畠鏄厛鎶婁换鍔＄洰鏍囧啓鎴愪唬鐮侀噷鐨勮皳璇嶅拰 subtask锛宔pisode 杩愯鏃惰嚜鍔ㄥ垽鏂簨浠躲€佹垚鍔熸潯浠跺拰鍒嗘暟銆?

杩欎笁涓瘝闈炲父瀹规槗娣凤紝蹇呴』鎷嗗紑锛?/p>

Task 瑕佸畬鎴愪粈涔堢洰鏍囷紝鎬庝箞鍒ゆ垚鍔?/td> 鈥減ut the banana in the bowl鈥?+ object_in_container
Environment 鎶?scene/task/robot/camera/policy/variation 瑁呴厤鎴愯兘 step 鐨勪豢鐪?/td> gym.make(task_env, cfg=env_cfg)

璁烘枃璇寸殑涓夋鏄細

1. 瀹氫綅鍜屽畾鍚戠墿浣擄紝鍒涘缓鍦烘櫙

婧愮爜閲屽搴斾负锛?/p> 

scene/import_scene
  -> Task class
  -> registration / parse_env_cfg / create_env
  -> RobolabEnv
涓嶈鐢ㄢ€滆兘鎵撳紑鍦烘櫙鈥濇浛浠ｂ€滀换鍔″鐜版垚鍔熲€?/strong>锛歎SD 鑳藉姞杞斤紝鍙鏄庤祫浜у拰 stage 鍩烘湰鍙敤锛涗换鍔℃垚鍔熻繕闇€瑕?contact sensor銆乼ermination銆乻ubtask銆乸olicy action銆乺ecorder 閮芥甯搞€?

6. 策略接入层：Pi05 是怎么进来的¶

RoboLab 鑷繁涓嶆妸 OpenPI 鏉冮噸纭紪鐮佽繘浠诲姟閲屻€傚畠璁╀换鍔″拰绛栫暐瑙ｈ€︼細

RoboLab env observation
  -> Pi0/Pi05 client 鎵撳寘鎴?OpenPI 璇锋眰
  -> OpenPI server 鏍规嵁鍥惧儚/鍏宠妭/澶圭埅/璇█杈撳嚭 action chunk
  -> client 鎷?action
  -> env.step(action)

瀵?Pi05 鏉ヨ锛屾垜浠繖娆″叧蹇冪殑鍑犵被杈撳叆鏄細

杈撳叆 鏉ユ簮 浣滅敤
澶栭儴鐩告満鍥?/td> RoboLab camera render 鐪嬫闈㈠拰鐩爣鐗?/td>
鑵曢儴鐩告満鍥?/td> wrist camera render 鐪嬫湯绔檮杩戠粏鑺?/td>
鍏宠妭浣嶇疆 robot state 璁?policy 鐭ラ亾鏈烘鑷傜姸鎬?/td>
澶圭埅鐘舵€?/td> robot state 鎺у埗鎶撳彇/閲婃斁
璇█鎸囦护 Task instruction 鍛婅瘔 policy 褰撳墠鐩爣

杈撳嚭鏄?action chunk锛屼篃灏辨槸涓€娈佃繛缁姩浣溿€俢lient 浼氭寜 open_loop_horizon 鎵ц涓€灏忔锛屽啀閲嶆柊璇锋眰涓嬩竴娈靛姩浣溿€?/p>

鎬庝箞鍒ゆ柇绛栫暐鐪熺殑鎺ヤ笂浜?/strong>锛氬彧鐪?Isaac 鍚姩涓嶅銆傝鐪嬪埌 OpenPI server restored checkpoint銆?000 绔彛鐩戝惉銆乸olicy inference timing銆乪pisode_results 閲屾湁鐪熷疄 policy 瀛楁鍜屽姩浣滃鑷寸殑 success/score銆?

杩欓儴鍒嗗繀椤昏瀹炶瘽锛屼笉鑳芥妸 smoke 褰撳畬鏁?benchmark銆?/p>

no-policy smoke 绱 21 涓换鍔″垵濮嬪寲鍜屾棩蹇楀鍑?/td> 璇佹槑鐜閾捐矾鍙惎鍔紝涓嶄唬琛ㄧ瓥鐣ユ垚鍔熺巼

鍗曚换鍔￠棴鐜?/td> BananaInBowlTask 鎴愬姛 璇佹槑 Pi05 -> RoboLab -> Isaac -> 瑙嗛/HDF5/JSON 閫氫簡
澶嶆潅浠诲姟鎶芥牱 3 涓换鍔★紝1 鎴愬姛 2 澶辫触 鍒濇鐪嬪埌闀挎椂搴?闆嗗悎/閲嶅畾鍚戞洿闅?/td>

杩樻病瀹屾垚锛?/p>

瀹屾暣 RoboLab-120 闇€瑕佹洿澶氳祫浜с€佹洿澶?GPU 鏃堕棿鍜屼弗鏍肩粨鏋滄眹鎬?/td>
姝ｅ紡 MNPE 闇€瑕佸悓涓€浠诲姟/绛栫暐鍦ㄥ缁勬壈鍔ㄥ弬鏁颁笅鐨勫ぇ閲?rollout CSV
RoboChallenge pi / ReKep 瀵规瘮 闇€瑕佺粺涓€浠诲姟銆佹帴鍙ｃ€佺浉鏈恒€佸姩浣滅┖闂淬€佹垚鍔熸潯浠跺悗鎵嶈兘鍏钩姣旇緝
璁烘枃绾ц〃鏍煎鐜?/td> 灏忔牱鏈?smoke 涓嶈兘鍜岃鏂囧畬鏁?benchmark 鐩存帴姣旇緝
缁撴灉鍙ｅ緞锛氱幆澧冩垚鍔熴€佺瓥鐣ユ帴涓娿€佷换鍔℃垚鍔熴€佽鏂囧鐜版槸鍥涗釜灞傜骇銆傚綋鍓嶅凡缁忔湁鐪熷疄 Pi05 鍗曚换鍔℃垚鍔熼棴鐜拰澶嶆潅浠诲姟鎶芥牱锛屼絾杩樹笉鏄畬鏁?RoboLab-120 璁烘枃琛ㄦ牸澶嶇幇銆?

8. 为什么不能一上来跑 120 个任务¶

RoboLab-120 鍏ㄩ噺璇勬祴涓嶆槸涓€鏉″懡浠ゅ氨鑳藉彲淇″畬鎴愶紝鑷冲皯鏈夊洓涓害鏉燂細

  1. 璧勪骇瀹屾暣鎬?/strong>锛氬緢澶氫换鍔′緷璧栦笉鍚?object/material/background LFS 鏂囦欢锛岀己涓€涓氨浼氬湪 Isaac 鍒濆鍖栨椂鎶ラ敊銆?/li>
  2. 4090 鏄惧瓨锛?4GB 鍙互璺戝崟浠诲姟鍜屽皬瀛愰泦锛屼絾澶嶆潅浠诲姟銆侀珮娓呯浉鏈恒€佽棰?HDF5銆乸olicy server 鍚屾椂鍗犺祫婧愭椂寰堝鏄撴帴杩戜笂闄愩€?/li>
  3. 鏃堕棿鎴愭湰锛氬畬鏁?benchmark 鏄嚑鍗?GPU 灏忔椂閲忕骇锛屽け璐ラ噸璺戜篃瑕佹垚鏈€?/li>
  4. 缁熻鍙ｅ緞锛氫腑閫斿け璐ヨ鍖哄垎鐜澶辫触銆佽祫浜уけ璐ャ€佺瓥鐣ュけ璐ャ€乼imeout锛屼笉鑳藉彧鎶婃墍鏈夐潪 0 return code 娣锋垚澶辫触鐜囥€?/li>

姝ｇ‘璺嚎鏄細

鍗曚换鍔￠棴鐜?
  -> 鑳藉姏杞村皬瀛愰泦
  -> 琛ラ綈璧勪骇澶辫触椤?
  -> 姣忕被浠诲姟澶?episode
  -> 杈撳嚭缁熶竴 CSV/JSON
  -> 鍐嶆墿灞?RoboLab-120
4090 绛栫暐锛氬厛 num_envs=1 淇濆畧璺戦€氾紝纭鏄惧瓨銆佽棰戙€丠DF5銆乪pisode_results 绋冲畾鍚庡啀鍔犲苟琛屽害銆備笉瑕佷负浜嗙湅璧锋潵蹇紝鐩存帴鎶婂苟琛屽害鎷夌垎瀵艰嚧鍗婅矾 OOM銆?

9. 全部精讲如何互相连接¶

鐜板湪瀹屾暣瀛︿範鍖呭凡缁忎笉鏄?1-6 鐨勫崟鐐规媶瑙ｏ紝鑰屾槸涓€缁勪粠璁烘枃闂鍒颁唬鐮佸鐜扮殑璺嚎鍥俱€?/p>

灞傜骇 绮捐 瑙ｅ喅鐨勯棶棰?/th> 鍦ㄥ叏灞€閲岀殑浣嶇疆
鏉ユ簮鍏ュ彛 鏉ユ簮绱㈠紩銆佺簿璁? 姣忎釜闂浠庡摢閲屾潵锛屾暣绡囪鏂?浠ｇ爜鎬庝箞涓?/td> 鍏ㄥ眬瀵艰埅
鍦烘櫙涓庝换鍔＄敓鎴?/td> 01銆?2銆?3銆?7銆?0銆?1銆?2 鍦烘櫙浠庡摢閲屾潵銆佷换鍔℃€庝箞鐢熸垚銆乸rompt/solver/baseline/Gaussian 璺嚎濡備綍鐞嗚В 鐢熸垚鍙瘎娴嬬幆澧?/td>
Benchmark 璁捐 04銆?8銆?9 鑳藉姏杞淬€侀毦搴︺€佸疄楠岀煩闃点€佷换鍔＄敓鎴愯川閲忓浣曡瘎浼?/td> 瀹氫箟鑰冮鍜岃琛ㄦ柟寮?/td>
鎸囨爣涓庤瘉鎹?/td> 05銆?6銆?3銆?3b SPARC銆丮NPE銆乻uccess/score銆乪vent銆乨ashboard 濡備綍鍏卞悓瑙ｉ噴绛栫暐琛ㄧ幇 浠?rollout 鍒扮粨璁?/td>
杩愯鏃朵唬鐮?/td> 14銆?4b runner銆?code>episode銆乸olicy client銆乄orldState銆乺ecorder銆乻ummary 濡備綍宸ヤ綔 澶嶇幇鎵ц閾?/td>
璇勫涓庡欢灞?/td> 15銆?6 璁烘枃璐＄尞/椋庨櫓/鏈潵璺嚎锛屼互鍙婂悗缁帹鑽愰槄璇?/td> 鍒ゆ柇浠峰€煎拰涓嬩竴姝?/td>

濡傛灉鍙湅鍏朵腑涓€涓紝浼氬鏄撹瑙ｏ細

鍙湅鏌愪竴鍧?/th> 瀹规槗璇В鎴?/th> 瀹為檯搴旇鏀惧洖鍏ㄥ眬鐞嗚В
鍙湅鍦烘櫙 RoboLab 鏄祫浜у簱 鍦烘櫙鍙槸浠诲姟璇勬祴鐨勭墿鐞嗚浇浣?/td>
鍙湅浠诲姟绫?/td> RoboLab 鏄?hard-coded task list Task 鏄洰鏍囩姸鎬佽鑼冿紝鍙汉宸?LLM 鎵╁睍
鍙湅 success 妯″瀷寮哄急鍙湁浜屽€兼垚鍔熺巼 杩樿鐪?subtask score銆侀敊璇被鍨嬨€佽建杩硅川閲忋€佹晱鎰熸€?/td>
鍙湅 Pi05 鎴愬姛 demo 宸插鐜拌鏂?/td> 鍗曚换鍔℃垚鍔熷彧鏄棴鐜瘉鎹紝涓嶆槸 RoboLab-120
鍙湅 MNPE 鍙互涓嶇敤璺戜换鍔＄洿鎺ュ垎鏋?/td> MNPE 蹇呴』渚濊禆澶ч噺鎵板姩 rollout 鏁版嵁
璇绘硶寤鸿锛氫互鍚庡鏋滆缁х画鍔犵簿璁诧紝涓嶈鍙姞姝ｆ枃瑙ｉ噴銆傚厛鍦?EXPLAIN_SOURCE_QUESTION_INDEX.md 閲岃ˉ鈥滈棶棰樻潵婧愨€濓紝鍐嶅湪鏈簿璁?閲屽垽鏂畠灞炰簬鐢熸垚绾裤€佷换鍔＄嚎銆佽繍琛岀嚎銆佽瘉鎹嚎杩樻槸璇勪环绾裤€?

10. 一次完整复现应该长什么样¶

鎴戝缓璁妸鈥滃畬鏁村鐜扳€濆垎鎴愪簲绾э紝鑰屼笉鏄彧璇粹€滆窇娌¤窇鎴愨€濄€?/p>

绛夌骇 鍚嶇О 閫氳繃鏍囧噯
L0 瀹夎绾?/td> RoboLab / Isaac Sim / Isaac Lab / OpenPI 鍙鍏?/td>
L1 鐜绾?/td> no-policy smoke 鑳藉垱寤?env 骞跺鍑?episode log
L2 绛栫暐绾?/td> Pi05 server 鎺ヤ笂锛宲olicy runner 鑳芥墽琛岀湡瀹炲姩浣?/td>
L3 鍗曚换鍔￠棴鐜?/td> 鍗曚换鍔℃垚鍔燂紝鏈?video/HDF5/event/episode_results
L4 灏忓瓙闆嗚瘎娴?/td> 澶氫换鍔¤鐩?visual/procedural/relational锛屾湁鎴愬姛/澶辫触鍒嗘瀽
L5 璁烘枃绾у鐜?/td> RoboLab-120 鎴栨槑纭瓙闆嗭紝澶氱瓥鐣?澶氭壈鍔?缁熻姹囨€?鍙鏌ヨ瘉鎹?/td>

褰撳墠瀛︿範鍖呭凡缁忓埌 L3锛屽苟鏈?L4 鐨勫垵姝ユ娊鏍疯瘉鎹紱杩樻病鍒?L5銆?/p>

杩欎篃鏄?notebook 鐨勭粨鏋?/strong>锛氬墠闈㈣褰曞畨瑁呭拰璇佹嵁锛屼腑闂磋婧愮爜涓庤鏂囨満鍒讹紝鍚庨潰鏀捐繍琛岀粨鏋溿€佹寚鏍囥€佸彲瑙嗗寲銆佸涔犳棩蹇楀拰鏈€缁?gate銆傝繖鏍锋瘡涓€姝ラ兘鏈夊彲澶嶆煡鏂囦欢锛岃€屼笉鏄彧闈犵粓绔緭鍑恒€?

11. RoboChallenge pi、OpenPI pi05、ReKep 怎么放在同一张图里¶

杩欏嚑涓笢瑗夸笉瑕佹贩鎴愨€滈兘鏄竴涓ā鍨嬧€濄€?/p>

鍚嶇О 鏇村儚浠€涔?/th> 浠€涔堟椂鍊欑敤
RoboLab 璇勬祴妗嗘灦鍜?benchmark 闇€瑕佺粺涓€浠诲姟銆佸満鏅€佹寚鏍囥€佽棰?HDF5 杈撳嚭鏃?/td>
OpenPI pi05 VLA policy checkpoint / server 闇€瑕佸湪 RoboLab 閲岃窇鐪熷疄 learned policy 鏃?/td>
RoboChallenge 鐨?pi 鍙︿竴涓」鐩澧冮噷鐨勭瓥鐣?鎺ュ彛璧勪骇 鍋氬姣斿墠瑕佸厛閫傞厤 observation/action 鍜屾垚鍔熸潯浠?/td>
ReKep 鍋忓熀浜庡叧閿偣/绾︽潫/瑙勫垝鐨勬満鍣ㄤ汉鏂规硶 鍋氣€滃涔犵瓥鐣?vs 缁撴瀯鍖栨柟娉曗€濆姣旀椂

鍏钩瀵规瘮鐨勫墠鎻愶細

鍚屼竴浠诲姟
鍚屼竴鍦烘櫙鎴栧彲璇存槑宸紓鐨勫満鏅?
鍚屼竴鏈哄櫒浜?鍔ㄤ綔绌洪棿鎴栨槑纭€傞厤灞?
鍚屼竴鐩告満/瑙傛祴杈撳叆
鍚屼竴鎴愬姛鏉′欢鍜?subtask score
鍚屼竴 episode 鏁板拰闅忔満绉嶅瓙绛栫暐
鍚屼竴杈撳嚭鏍煎紡

鍚﹀垯缁撴灉鍙兘鍙€滆窇閫氭渚嬧€濓紝涓嶈兘鍙?benchmark 瀵规瘮銆?/p>

12. 最后用一张总图记住¶

涓轰粈涔堣瘎娴?
  -> 鐪熷疄绛栫暐娉涘寲闅撅紝鍙湅 success 涓嶅

璇勬祴浠€涔?
  -> RoboLab-120锛歷isual / procedural / relational
  -> simple / moderate / complex

鍦ㄥ摢閲岃瘎娴?
  -> Isaac Sim + Isaac Lab + USD/SimReady assets

鎬庝箞瀹氫箟浠诲姟
  -> Task = scene + instruction + termination + subtask + attributes

鎬庝箞璺戠瓥鐣?
  -> RoboLab env observation -> policy client/server -> action chunk -> env.step

鎬庝箞鐣欒瘉鎹?
  -> episode_results.jsonl + event log + HDF5 + video + notebook artifacts

鎬庝箞鍒嗘瀽
  -> success / score / subtask / error reason / SPARC / MNPE

褰撳墠鐘舵€?
  -> Pi05 鍗曚换鍔℃垚鍔熼棴鐜凡瀹屾垚锛屽鏉備换鍔℃娊鏍峰凡瀹屾垚锛屽畬鏁?RoboLab-120 灏氭湭鎵ц
涓€鍙ヨ瘽鎬绘嫭锛歊oboLab 鐨勪环鍊间笉鏄€滃仛浜嗕竴涓洿婕備寒鐨勪豢鐪熷満鏅€濓紝鑰屾槸鎶婁换鍔″畾涔夈€佺瓥鐣ユ帴鍙ｃ€佸彲鎺ф壈鍔ㄣ€佺粏绮掑害鎸囨爣鍜屽彲鍥炴斁璇佹嵁缁勭粐鎴愪竴濂楄瘎浼伴€氱敤鏈哄櫒浜虹瓥鐣ユ硾鍖栬兘鍔涚殑瀹為獙绯荤粺銆?
In [ ]:
# ===== 绮捐0锛氬叏灞€鎬昏缁撴瀯杞婚噺楠岃瘉 =====
# 杩欎釜 cell 楠岃瘉绮捐0鏄惁鎵挎媴鈥滃叏灞€鍏ュ彛鈥濊亴璐ｏ細
# 闇€瑕佽鐩栨潵婧愮储寮曘€佸洓鏉′富绾裤€佸鐜板眰绾с€佽瘉鎹枃浠跺拰鍚庣画闃呰璺嚎銆?/span>

global_overview_map = {
    "entry_points": ["EXPLAIN_SOURCE_QUESTION_INDEX.md", "EXPLAIN_00_global_overview.md"],
    "main_threads": {
        "generation": ["scene prompt", "predicates", "spatial/physical solve", "valid scene"],
        "task": ["task template", "Python task", "conditionals/subtasks", "score/success"],
        "runtime": ["env", "observation", "policy client/server", "action chunk", "env.step"],
        "evidence": ["recorder", "HDF5", "video", "event log", "episode_results", "dashboard"],
        "review": ["reviewer synthesis", "recommended reading", "future route"],
    },
    "reproduction_levels": ["L0_install", "L1_environment", "L2_policy", "L3_single_task", "L4_subset", "L5_paper_level"],
    "artifact_contract": ["episode_results.jsonl", "log_0_env0.json", "run_0.hdf5", "mp4", "remote_outputs", "robolab_repro_artifacts"],
    "lecture_groups": {
        "scene_task_generation": ["01", "02", "03", "07", "10", "11", "12"],
        "benchmark_design": ["04", "08", "09"],
        "metrics_evidence": ["05", "06", "13", "13b"],
        "runtime_code": ["14", "14b"],
        "review_extension": ["15", "16"],
    },
}

overview_text = (NOTEBOOK_ROOT / "EXPLAIN_00_global_overview.md").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
tests = [
    ("mentions_source_question_index", "EXPLAIN_SOURCE_QUESTION_INDEX" in overview_text),
    ("mentions_four_main_threads", all(term in overview_text for term in ["鐢熸垚绾?, "浠诲姟绾?, "杩愯绾?, "璇佹嵁绾?])),
    ("mentions_runtime_policy_chain", "policy client/server" in json.dumps(global_overview_map, ensure_ascii=False)),
    ("mentions_artifact_contract", all(term in overview_text for term in ["episode_results.jsonl", "HDF5", "event log"])),
    ("mentions_reproduction_levels", all(level in overview_text for level in ["L0", "L1", "L2", "L3", "L4", "L5"])),
    ("lecture_groups_cover_all_later_lectures", sum(len(v) for v in global_overview_map["lecture_groups"].values()) >= 18),
    ("entry_points_include_source_index_and_overview", set(global_overview_map["entry_points"]) == {"EXPLAIN_SOURCE_QUESTION_INDEX.md", "EXPLAIN_00_global_overview.md"}),
]

report = {
    "global_overview_map": global_overview_map,
    "tests": [{"name": name, "passed": bool(ok)} for name, ok in tests],
    "all_passed": all(ok for _, ok in tests),
    "boundary": "This validates the overview structure only; it does not execute RoboLab or verify paper claims.",
}

print(json.dumps(report, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
for name, ok in tests:
    print(f"{name}: {'PASS' if ok else 'FAIL'}")
assert report["all_passed"], tests
write_status("global_overview_structure_tests", report)

0.1 2026-06-19 远端 RTX 4090 实测进展¶

鏈妭璁板綍涓€娆″凡瀹屾垚鐨勮繙绔?4090 澶嶇幇鎺ㄨ繘锛岃瘉鎹凡鍚屾鍒版湰鐩綍鐨?remote_logs/銆?/p>

宸茬‘璁わ細

  • 杩滅鏈哄櫒锛歎buntu 22.04.4 LTS锛孯TX 4090 24GB锛孨VIDIA driver 580.159.03銆?/li>
  • uv sync 宸插畬鎴愶紝瀹夎鍒?Python 3.11 鐜锛?code>robolab==0.1.0銆?code>isaacsim==5.0.0.0銆?code>isaaclab==2.2.0銆?code>torch==2.7.0+cu128 鍧囧彲瀵煎叆銆?/li>
  • 褰撳墠 GitHub HEAD锛?code>7d45d74904eade3b578a8eb1f2f9f89bc3d40326銆?/li>
  • assets/scenes/銆?code>assets/robots/銆佹牳蹇?assets/fixtures/ 宸叉寜闇€琛ラ綈锛涘畬鏁?RoboLab-120 浠嶉渶瑕佺户缁寜浠诲姟琛ュ叏鏇村 object/material LFS 璧勪骇銆?/li>
  • BananaInBowlTask 鐨?headless smoke 宸插畬鎴?2 step 骞跺鍑?episode log銆傝繖閲岀殑 success: False 鏄┖鍔ㄤ綔/no-policy 杩愯鐨勯鏈熺粨鏋滐紝涓嶄唬琛ㄧ瓥鐣ヨ瘎娴嬪け璐ャ€?/li>
  • 宸叉墿灞曞埌绱 21 涓?no-policy 鍒濆鍖?smoke锛岃鐩栬涔夈€侀鑹层€佺┖闂村叧绯汇€侀『搴忕粍鍚堛€侀噸瀹氬悜銆佸爢鍙犵瓑浠诲姟灞炴€э紱杩欎簺浠嶆槸鐜鍒濆鍖栦笌鏃ュ織瀵煎嚭楠岃瘉锛屼笉鏄瓥鐣ユ垚鍔熺巼銆?/li>
  • README 涓殑 uv run pytest tests/ 鍦ㄥ綋鍓?HEAD 杩斿洖 4锛屽洜涓轰粨搴撴病鏈?tests/ 璺緞锛涜繖搴旇褰曚负 README 涓庝粨搴撳綋鍓嶆枃浠堕潰鐨勪笉涓€鑷淬€?/li>
  • policies/pi0_family/run.py 鏄?Pi0/Pi05 璇勬祴鍏ュ彛锛汷penPI Pi05 pi05_droid_jointpos checkpoint 宸插畬鎴愪笅杞戒笌 26 涓璞″ぇ灏忔牎楠岋紝policy server 宸茬洃鍚?8000銆?/li>
  • 宸插畬鎴愮湡瀹?Pi05 policy 鍗曚换鍔″鐜帮細BananaInBowlTask 1 episode锛?code>success=True锛?code>score=1.0锛?code>episode_step=178锛屽钩鍧?policy inference 84.2 ms銆?/li>
In [ ]:
import re
from textwrap import dedent

# 杩欎簺 JSON summary 鏉ヨ嚜杩滅 RTX 4090 瀹炴祴缁撴灉锛屽凡鍚屾鍒版湰鍦?remote_logs銆?/span>
# notebook 鐩存帴璇诲彇璇佹嵁鏂囦欢锛岄伩鍏嶄緷璧栬亰澶╄褰曟垨杩囨湡鍙ｅご鎻忚堪銆?/span>
REMOTE_LOG_DIR = NOTEBOOK_ROOT / "remote_logs"
REMOTE_SUMMARY_PATH = REMOTE_LOG_DIR / "remote_4090_repro_summary.json"
REMOTE_SUBSET3_SUMMARY_PATH = REMOTE_LOG_DIR / "remote_4090_subset3_summary.json"
REMOTE_POLICY_SUBSET21_SUMMARY_PATH = REMOTE_LOG_DIR / "remote_4090_policy_subset21_summary.json"
REMOTE_POLICY_SUBSET19_SUMMARY_PATH = REMOTE_LOG_DIR / "remote_4090_policy_subset19_summary.json"
REMOTE_POLICY_SUBSET10_SUMMARY_PATH = REMOTE_LOG_DIR / "remote_4090_policy_subset10_summary.json"
# 浼樺厛浣跨敤鏈€鏂扮疮璁?summary锛涙棫 summary 鍙綔涓烘湰鍦版枃浠朵笉瀹屾暣鏃剁殑鍥為€€銆?/span>
REMOTE_POLICY_SUMMARY_CANDIDATES = [
    REMOTE_POLICY_SUBSET21_SUMMARY_PATH,
    REMOTE_POLICY_SUBSET19_SUMMARY_PATH,
    REMOTE_POLICY_SUBSET10_SUMMARY_PATH,
]
REMOTE_POLICY_SUMMARY_PATH = next(
    (path for path in REMOTE_POLICY_SUMMARY_CANDIDATES if path.exists()),
    REMOTE_POLICY_SUBSET10_SUMMARY_PATH,
)
REMOTE_PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_DIR = REMOTE_LOG_DIR / "pi05_policy_smoke_20260620_005711"

if REMOTE_SUMMARY_PATH.exists():
    # 绗竴浠?summary锛氬畨瑁?瀵煎叆楠岃瘉 + BananaInBowlTask 鏃犵瓥鐣?smoke銆?/span>
    remote_summary = json.loads(REMOTE_SUMMARY_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    smoke = remote_summary.get("smoke", {})
    install = remote_summary.get("installation", {})
    assets = remote_summary.get("assets", {})
    host = remote_summary.get("host", {})
    # Isaac 鏃ュ織閲屽彲鑳芥湁 ANSI 棰滆壊鎺у埗鐮侊紝鍐欏叆 Markdown 琛ㄦ牸鍓嶅厛娓呯悊銆?/span>
    clean_success = re.sub(r"\x1b\[[0-9;]*m", "", smoke.get("success_line", ""))
    report = f'''
    ### 杩滅 4090 璇佹嵁鎽樿

    | 椤圭洰 | 缁撴灉 |
    |---|---|
    | Host | `{host.get('hostname')}` |
    | GPU | `{host.get('gpu')}` |
    | Repo HEAD | `{remote_summary.get('repo_head')}` |
    | uv sync | `{install.get('uv_sync_status')}` |
    | pytest tests/ | return code `{install.get('pytest_rc')}`锛屽綋鍓?HEAD 鏃?`tests/` 璺緞 |
    | Scenes assets | `{assets.get('scenes_status')}` / {assets.get('scenes_du')} |
    | Core assets | fixtures `{assets.get('core_assets_status')}` / robots {assets.get('robots_du')} |
    | Smoke task | `{smoke.get('task')}` |
    | Smoke setup/export | setup `{smoke.get('completed_setup')}`锛宔pisode export `{smoke.get('exported_episode')}`锛宼raceback `{smoke.get('traceback_present')}` |
    | Smoke result line | `{clean_success}` |

    璇佹嵁鏂囦欢鐩綍锛歚{REMOTE_LOG_DIR}`
    '''
    display(Markdown(dedent(report).strip()) if Markdown else dedent(report).strip())
else:
    print("remote evidence not found:", REMOTE_SUMMARY_PATH)

if REMOTE_SUBSET3_SUMMARY_PATH.exists():
    # 绗簩浠?summary锛氬湪涓嶆帴绛栫暐鏈嶅姟鐨勬儏鍐典笅楠岃瘉棰濆 3 涓换鍔″彲鍒濆鍖栧拰瀵煎嚭鏃ュ織銆?/span>
    subset_summary = json.loads(REMOTE_SUBSET3_SUMMARY_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    task_rows = "\n".join(
        f"| `{task}` | env_cfg `{info.get('env_cfg_exists')}` | episode log `{info.get('episode_log_exists')}` |"
        for task, info in subset_summary.get("outputs", {}).items()
    )
    subset_report = f'''
    ### 涓変换鍔?no-policy subset smoke

    | 椤圭洰 | 缁撴灉 |
    |---|---|
    | Command | `{subset_summary.get('command')}` |
    | Return code | `{subset_summary.get('status_file_rc')}` |
    | Traceback | `{subset_summary.get('traceback_present')}` |
    | Completed setup count | `{subset_summary.get('completed_setup_count')}` |
    | Episodes exported count | `{subset_summary.get('episodes_exported_count')}` |
    | Boundary | {subset_summary.get('policy_boundary')} |

    | Task | Output |
    |---|---|
    {task_rows}

    娉ㄦ剰锛歚output/run_empty_env/episode_results.jsonl` 鏄疮璁℃枃浠讹紝鍥犳 summary 閲屼細鍚屾椂鍖呭惈姝ゅ墠鐨?`BananaInBowlTask` no-policy smoke銆?/span>
    '''
    display(Markdown(dedent(subset_report).strip()) if Markdown else dedent(subset_report).strip())
else:
    print("subset evidence not found:", REMOTE_SUBSET3_SUMMARY_PATH)

if REMOTE_POLICY_SUMMARY_PATH.exists():
    # 绗笁浠?summary锛氱疮璁?no-policy 浠诲姟 + OpenPI/Pi05 鍑嗗鐘舵€侊紱浼樺厛璇诲彇鏈€鏂扮殑 subset21銆?/span>
    policy_summary = json.loads(REMOTE_POLICY_SUMMARY_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    no_policy = policy_summary.get("no_policy_smoke", {})
    openpi = policy_summary.get("openpi_policy_readiness", {})
    # 鎸変换鍔″悕寤虹珛 metadata 绱㈠紩锛岀敤浜庣粰 episode 缁撴灉琛ュ厖灞炴€у拰闅惧害銆?/span>
    meta_by_task = {
        row.get("task_name"): row
        for row in no_policy.get("task_metadata", [])
        if row.get("task_name")
    }

    def _clean_table_text(value):
        # Markdown 琛ㄦ牸閬囧埌绔栫嚎鎴栨崲琛屼細閿欏垪锛屾墍浠ュ睍绀哄墠鍋氭渶灏忔竻鐞嗐€?/span>
        return str(value or "").replace("|", "/").replace("\n", " ")

    rows = []
    for rec in no_policy.get("records", []):
        # episode_results.jsonl 鏄疮璁℃枃浠讹紝鍥犳閫愭潯娓叉煋锛岄伩鍏嶈浠ヤ负鍙寘鍚湰杞换鍔°€?/span>
        task = rec.get("env_name")
        meta = meta_by_task.get(task, {})
        rows.append(
            "| `{}` | {} | {} | `{}` | {} |".format(
                task,
                _clean_table_text(meta.get("attributes") or "-"),
                _clean_table_text(meta.get("difficulty_label") or "-"),
                rec.get("success"),
                _clean_table_text(rec.get("instruction")),
            )
        )
    task_rows = "\n".join(rows)
    # 鍊欓€変换鍔″彧鏈夊湪 episode_results.jsonl 鐪熷疄鏂板璁板綍涓旀病鏈?Python Traceback 鏃舵墠璁″叆绱鏁般€?/span>
    successful_probe_tasks = ", ".join(
        f"`{task}`" for task in no_policy.get("candidate_probe_successful_tasks", [])
    ) or "-"
    failed_probe_rows = []
    for item in no_policy.get("candidate_probe_failed_tasks", []):
        failed_probe_rows.append(
            "| `{}` | `{}` | {} |".format(
                item.get("task"),
                item.get("records_added"),
                _clean_table_text(item.get("main_error") or "-"),
            )
        )
    failed_probe_table = "\n".join(failed_probe_rows) or "| - | - | - |"
    evidence_name = Path(policy_summary.get("evidence_package", "")).name
    evidence_path = f"remote_logs/{evidence_name}" if evidence_name else "remote_logs/<missing evidence>"
    policy_record_count = no_policy.get("num_records_cumulative")
    # 鍙湁 OpenPI server 鐩戝惉 8000 鍚庯紝鎵嶇畻鍙互寮€濮嬬湡瀹?policy eval銆?/span>
    openpi_state = "ready" if openpi.get("server_port_8000_ready") else "downloading / not ready"
    policy_report = f'''
    ### {policy_record_count} 浠诲姟 no-policy smoke 涓?OpenPI/Pi05 鍑嗗鐘舵€?/span>

    | 椤圭洰 | 缁撴灉 |
    |---|---|
    | no-policy subset10 return code | `{no_policy.get('subset10_status')}` |
    | no-policy subset_more return code | `{no_policy.get('subset_more_status')}` |
    | no-policy cumulative records | `{no_policy.get('num_records_cumulative')}` |
    | counted candidate probes | {successful_probe_tasks} |
    | OpenPI repo HEAD | `{openpi.get('openpi_head')}` |
    | OpenPI client install | `{openpi.get('openpi_client_install_status')}` |
    | OpenPI uv sync | `{openpi.get('openpi_uv_sync_status')}` |
    | OpenPI import/JAX verify | `{openpi.get('openpi_verify_status')}` |
    | Pi05 checkpoint | `{openpi.get('checkpoint_uri')}` |
    | Pi05 download progress | `{openpi.get('last_progress', {}).get('downloaded')}` / `{openpi.get('last_progress', {}).get('total')}` |
    | Pi05 server port 8000 | `{openpi_state}` |
    | Evidence package | `{evidence_path}` |

    | Task | Attributes | Difficulty | no-policy success | Instruction |
    |---|---|---|---|---|
    {task_rows}

    #### 鏈鍏ョ疮璁＄殑鍊欓€変换鍔?/span>

    | Task | records added | 涓昏澶辫触鍘熷洜 |
    |---|---:|---|
    {failed_probe_table}

    杈圭晫锛氫笂琛ㄧ殑 `success=False` 鏉ヨ嚜绌哄姩浣?no-policy run锛屽彧璇佹槑鍦烘櫙銆佷换鍔°€佹棩蹇楀鍑洪摼璺彲璺戯紱鏈鍏ヤ换鍔′富瑕佸崱鍦ㄥ璞?payload/contact reporter 涓嶅畬鏁淬€傜湡瀹?Pi05 policy score 宸插湪涓嬩竴鑺傚崟鐙鍙栦笌灞曠ず銆?/span>
    '''
    display(Markdown(dedent(policy_report).strip()) if Markdown else dedent(policy_report).strip())
else:
    print("policy readiness evidence not found:", REMOTE_POLICY_SUMMARY_PATH)
In [ ]:
# ===== 鐪熷疄 Pi05 policy smoke 缁撴灉 =====
# 杩欎竴娈佃鍙?4090 涓婄湡瀹炶窇杩囩殑 OpenPI Pi05 + RoboLab 缁撴灉锛屼笉鍐嶆槸 no-policy 绌哄姩浣?smoke銆?/span>
PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_SUMMARY_PATH = ARTIFACT_DIR / "pi05_policy_smoke_summary.json"

if REMOTE_PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_DIR.exists():
    # 1. checkpoint_verify 璇佹槑 11.58GiB pi05_droid_jointpos 鏉冮噸鏂囦欢瀹屾暣銆?/span>
    verify_path = REMOTE_PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_DIR / "pi05_droid_jointpos_download_verify.json"
    verify = json.loads(verify_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")) if verify_path.exists() else {}

    # 2. server_log 璇佹槑 OpenPI websocket server 宸插姞杞芥湰鍦?checkpoint 骞剁洃鍚?8000銆?/span>
    server_log_path = REMOTE_PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_DIR / "openpi_pi05_server_local.log"
    server_log = server_log_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace") if server_log_path.exists() else ""
    server_ready = "server listening on 0.0.0.0:8000" in server_log
    checkpoint_restored = "Finished restoring checkpoint" in server_log

    # 3. smoke_status 涓?RoboLab policy runner 鐨勯€€鍑虹爜锛? 琛ㄧず鑴氭湰姝ｅ父瀹屾垚銆?/span>
    status_path = REMOTE_PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_DIR / "robolab_pi05_banana_smoke.status"
    smoke_status = status_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8").strip() if status_path.exists() else "missing"

    # 4. episode_results.jsonl 鏄渶鍏抽敭缁撴灉锛氳繖閲屾墠鏈夌湡瀹?policy 鐨?success/score/timing銆?/span>
    episode_files = sorted(REMOTE_PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_DIR.glob("pi05_banana_smoke_*/episode_results.jsonl"))
    result_rows = []
    for episode_file in episode_files:
        for line in episode_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines():
            if line.strip():
                row = json.loads(line)
                row["_source"] = str(episode_file.relative_to(REMOTE_PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_DIR))
                result_rows.append(row)

    # 5. task 鍐呴儴 event log 瑙ｉ噴涓轰粈涔?episode 鍦?178 step 缁撴潫銆?/span>
    event_log_files = sorted(REMOTE_PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_DIR.glob("pi05_banana_smoke_*/BananaInBowlTask/log_0_env0.json"))
    event_rows = []
    for event_file in event_log_files:
        event_data = json.loads(event_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        for event in event_data.get("events", []):
            event_rows.append(
                {
                    "step": event.get("step"),
                    "name": event.get("name"),
                    "score": event.get("score"),
                    "info": event.get("info"),
                }
            )

    summary = {
        "checkpoint_verify_ok": verify.get("ok"),
        "checkpoint_objects": verify.get("objects"),
        "checkpoint_total_gib": verify.get("total_gib"),
        "server_ready": server_ready,
        "checkpoint_restored": checkpoint_restored,
        "smoke_status": smoke_status,
        "num_episode_records": len(result_rows),
        "episode_records": result_rows,
        "event_rows": event_rows,
        "evidence_dir": str(REMOTE_PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_DIR),
    }
    PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_SUMMARY_PATH.write_text(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")

    if result_rows:
        first = result_rows[0]
        timing = first.get("timing", {})
        metrics = first.get("metrics", {})
        report = f'''
        ### Pi05 鐪熷疄绛栫暐 smoke锛欱ananaInBowlTask

        | 椤圭洰 | 缁撴灉 |
        |---|---|
        | Checkpoint verify | `{verify.get('ok')}`锛宱bjects `{verify.get('objects')}`锛宼otal `{verify.get('total_gib', 0):.3f}` GiB |
        | Checkpoint restored by OpenPI | `{checkpoint_restored}` |
        | OpenPI websocket server | `{server_ready}` |
        | RoboLab runner exit code | `{smoke_status}` |
        | Task | `{first.get('task_name')}` |
        | Policy | `{first.get('policy')}` |
        | Instruction | {first.get('instruction')} |
        | Success | `{first.get('success')}` |
        | Score | `{first.get('score')}` |
        | Episode step | `{first.get('episode_step')}` |
        | Sim duration | `{first.get('duration')}` s |
        | Policy inference avg | `{timing.get('policy_inference_avg_ms')}` ms |
        | Env step avg | `{timing.get('env_step_avg_ms')}` ms |
        | Reason | {first.get('reason')} |
        | Evidence | `{REMOTE_PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_DIR}` |

        缁撹锛氳繖鏉¤褰曞凡缁忚秺杩団€滅幆澧?smoke鈥濊竟鐣岋紝灞炰簬鐪熷疄 VLA/OpenPI policy 閫氳繃 websocket 椹卞姩 RoboLab 鐨勫崟浠诲姟澶嶇幇璇佹嵁銆?/span>
        瀹冧粛鐒跺彧鏄?1 涓换鍔°€? 涓?episode锛屼笉鑳藉鎺ㄤ负 RoboLab-120 瀹屾暣璁烘枃缁撴灉銆?/span>
        '''
        display(Markdown(dedent(report).strip()) if Markdown else dedent(report).strip())

        if pd:
            display(pd.DataFrame(result_rows)[[
                "task_name", "policy", "success", "score", "episode_step", "duration", "reason"
            ]])
            display(pd.DataFrame(event_rows))
        else:
            display(result_rows)
            display(event_rows)

        print("wrote", PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_SUMMARY_PATH)
    else:
        print("Pi05 policy smoke evidence exists, but no episode_results.jsonl record was parsed.")
else:
    print("Pi05 policy smoke evidence not found:", REMOTE_PI05_POLICY_SMOKE_DIR)

0.2 论文核心机制：这篇论文到底要测什么¶

璁烘枃涓嶆槸鍙彁鍑轰竴涓€滆兘璺戜豢鐪熲€濈殑椤圭洰锛岃€屾槸鎻愬嚭涓€涓敤楂樹繚鐪熶豢鐪熷垎鏋愰€氱敤鏈哄櫒浜虹瓥鐣ョ殑 benchmark銆? 璇讳唬鐮佸墠鍏堟姄浣忎簲涓牳蹇冮棶棰橈細

璁烘枃姒傚康 鍚箟 澶嶇幇鏃跺搴旇鐪嬩粈涔?/th>
楂樹繚鐪熻瘎娴嬬幆澧?/td> 璁╃湡瀹炰笘鐣岃缁冪殑绛栫暐鍦ㄩ€肩湡鐨?Isaac/Omniverse 鍦烘櫙閲岃璇勬祴锛岄伩鍏嶅彧鍦ㄨ缁冨悓鍩熼噷鍒烽珮鍒?/td> USD 鍦烘櫙銆佸璞?payload銆佹潗璐?鐩告満/鐏厜銆両saac Lab env 鍒涘缓鏄惁绋冲畾
RoboLab-120 120 涓换鍔★紝涓嶆槸涓€涓?pick-place demo锛涗换鍔℃寜瑙嗚銆佽繃绋嬪寲銆佸叧绯讳笁绫昏兘鍔涜酱鎷嗗垎 task_metadata.json銆佹瘡涓?robolab/tasks/benchmark/*.py 鐨?attributes 鍜?subtasks
浠诲姟鏃犲叧浜庢満鍣ㄤ汉/绛栫暐 浠诲姟鍏堝畾涔夆€滅洰鏍囩姸鎬佲€濓紝杩愯鏃跺啀缁戝畾 robot銆乸olicy銆乧amera銆乿ariation create_env(...) 閲屾妸浠诲姟鍚嶈В鏋愭垚 env config锛屽啀缁?policy runner 浣跨敤
缁嗙矑搴︽寚鏍?/td> 涓嶅彧鐪嬫渶缁?success锛岃繕鐪?normalized/subtask score銆佽瑷€鍙樺寲銆侀敊璇簨浠躲€佽建杩硅川閲?/td> Subtask銆乪vent log銆?code>episode_results.jsonl銆乼rajectory metrics
鏁忔劅鎬у垎鏋?/td> 閫氳繃鍏夌収銆佺浉鏈恒€佽儗鏅€佺墿浣撲綅濮挎壈鍔ㄨ瀵熺瓥鐣ラ瞾妫掓€?/td> policies/pi0_family/run_*_variation.py 鍜?create_env(..., events=...)

鎵€浠ュ綋鍓?notebook 閲岀殑 no-policy smoke 鍙兘璇存槑鈥滅幆澧冨拰浠诲姟閾捐矾鍙惎鍔ㄣ€佸彲瀵煎嚭鏃ュ織鈥濓紝杩樹笉鑳藉洖绛旇鏂囬噷鐨勭瓥鐣ユ硾鍖栭棶棰樸€? 鐪熸瀵归綈璁烘枃锛岄渶瑕佺瓑 Pi05/OpenPI server ready 鍚庤窇 policy episodes锛屽啀鐢ㄥ悓涓€濂?task metadata銆乻ubtask/event銆乼rajectory metric 鍋氬垎鏋愩€?/p>

鍙傝€冩簮锛歛rXiv 璁烘枃 https://arxiv.org/html/2604.09860锛屽挨鍏舵槸 Abstract銆両II RoboLab銆両II-B Benchmark Design銆両II-C Metrics銆両II-D Sensitivity Analysis銆?/p>

0.3 核心源码地图：论文概念如何落到代码¶

涓嬮潰杩欎竴鑺傛槸璇?RoboLab 婧愮爜鐨勪富绾裤€備笉瑕佷粠 100 澶氫釜 task 鏂囦欢骞抽摵鐪嬭捣锛屽厛鎸夆€滃叆鍙?-> 鐜 -> 浠诲姟瀹氫箟 -> 鏉′欢/璇勫垎 -> 瀵煎嚭 -> policy鈥濊繖鏉￠摼璺銆?/p>

In [ ]:
# ===== 璁烘枃姒傚康鍒版簮鐮佹枃浠剁殑闃呰鍦板浘 =====
# 杩欎釜琛ㄤ笉鏄繍琛?RoboLab锛岃€屾槸鎶娾€滆鏂囬噷璁茬殑鏈哄埗鈥濇槧灏勫埌鈥滃簲璇ヨ鍝簺鏍稿績浠ｇ爜鈥濄€?/span>

        "鏍稿績鏂囦欢": "robolab/tasks/_metadata/task_metadata.json",

        "鏍稿績鏂囦欢": "robolab/tasks/benchmark/banana_in_bowl_task.py",

        "鎬庝箞鐞嗚В": "涓€涓?task 鏂囦欢涓嶆槸绛栫暐浠ｇ爜锛岃€屾槸鐩爣鐘舵€佸０鏄庯細鐢ㄥ摢涓満鏅€佸摢浜涘璞￠渶瑕?contact sensor銆佹垚鍔熸潯浠舵槸浠€涔堛€佹媶鎴愬摢浜?subtask銆?,
    },
    {
        "璁烘枃鏈哄埗": "浠庝换鍔″悕鍒涘缓浠跨湡鐜",
        "鏍稿績鏂囦欢": "robolab/core/environments/runtime.py",
        "鍏抽敭瀛楁/鍑芥暟": "create_env, parse_env_cfg, resolve_instruction, merge_events_cfg, gym.make",
        "鎬庝箞鐞嗚В": "杩欓噷鎶?task name 鍙樻垚 Isaac Lab env锛涜瑷€鐗堟湰銆佹壈鍔ㄤ簨浠躲€乸olicy 鍚嶇О閮藉湪杩欎釜闃舵缁戝畾杩涘幓銆?,
    },
    {
        "璁烘枃鏈哄埗": "璇勬祴 episode 鐨勭敓鍛藉懆鏈?,
        "鏍稿績鏂囦欢": "robolab/core/environments/env.py",
        "鍏抽敭瀛楁/鍑芥暟": "RobolabEnv.step, _reset_idx, all_terminated, reset_eval_state",
        "鎬庝箞鐞嗚В": "璇勬祴鏃剁幆澧冧笉搴旇嚜鍔ㄩ噸缃苟涓㈡帀缁撴灉锛汻oboLab 鎶婂凡缁堟 env 鍐荤粨锛岃褰曟垚鍔?澶辫触鍜岀粓姝?step锛屽啀瀵煎嚭 episode銆?,
    },

        "鍏抽敭瀛楁/鍑芥暟": "_extract_observation, _pack_request, _query_server, _unpack_response, open_loop_horizon",
        "鎬庝箞鐞嗚В": "杩欓噷鎶?RoboLab 鐨勭浉鏈哄浘鍍忋€佸叧鑺傜姸鎬併€佸す鐖姸鎬佸拰璇█鎸囦护杞垚 OpenPI server 璇锋眰锛屽啀鎶?action chunk 杩樼粰鐜銆?,
    },
    {
        "璁烘枃鏈哄埗": "缁撴灉姹囨€诲拰閿欒鍒嗘瀽",

        "鍏抽敭瀛楁/鍑芥暟": "init_experiment, update_experiment_results, summarize_experiment_results, summarize_error_reasons",
        "鎬庝箞鐞嗚В": "episode_results.jsonl 鐨勫啓鍏ュ拰姹囨€诲湪杩欓噷锛涘悗缁寜浠诲姟銆佽兘鍔涜酱銆侀敊璇師鍥犵粺璁￠兘渚濊禆瀹冦€?,
    },
    {
        "璁烘枃鏈哄埗": "杞ㄨ抗璐ㄩ噺鎸囨爣",
        "鏍稿績鏂囦欢": "robolab/core/metrics/trajectory_metrics.py",
        "鍏抽敭瀛楁/鍑芥暟": "compute_sparc, compute_ee_path_length, compute_*_isj",
        "鎬庝箞鐞嗚В": "璁烘枃閲岀殑 motion quality/trajectory metric 鍦ㄨ繖閲岃惤鍦帮紱娌℃湁 policy action 鏃惰繖浜涙寚鏍囨病鏈夎鏂囨剰涔夈€?,
    },
]

if pd:
    display(pd.DataFrame(core_code_map))
else:
    display(core_code_map)

# 鍐欏嚭鏈哄櫒鍙鐨勬簮鐮侀槄璇诲湴鍥撅紝浣滀负 notebook 宸茶ˉ瓒虫牳蹇冧唬鐮佽瑙ｇ殑璇佹嵁銆?/span>
core_map_path = ARTIFACT_DIR / "core_code_reading_map.json"
core_map_path.write_text(json.dumps(core_code_map, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
print("wrote", core_map_path)

0.4 一次 no-policy smoke 的真实调用链¶

褰撳墠宸茬粡鍦?4090 涓婅窇閫氱殑 21 涓换鍔★紝璧扮殑鏄笅闈㈣繖鏉￠摼璺細

examples/run_empty.py
  -> AppLauncher 鍚姩 Isaac/Kit
  -> auto_register_droid_envs() 娉ㄥ唽 RoboLab benchmark tasks
  -> get_envs(task=...) 鎶婁换鍔″悕绛涘嚭鏉?
  -> create_env(task_env, device, num_envs, use_fabric)
  -> parse_env_cfg + gym.make(...) 鍒涘缓 Isaac Lab 鐜
  -> run_empty_episode(...) 鎵ц绌哄姩浣?steps
  -> get_all_env_events(...) 鎶撳彇 event/subtask 璁板綍
  -> end_episode(...) 瀵煎嚭 HDF5 / logs
  -> update_experiment_results(...) 杩藉姞 episode_results.jsonl

杩欐潯閾捐矾璇佹槑涓変欢浜嬶細

  • task 娉ㄥ唽鍜?env config 鑳借В鏋愶紱
  • Isaac stage銆乺obot銆乻cene銆乧ontact sensors 鑷冲皯鍦ㄥ凡璁″叆浠诲姟涓婅兘鍒濆鍖栵紱
  • episode 缁撴灉鍜屾棩蹇楄兘钀界洏銆?/li>

瀹冩病鏈夎瘉鏄庝袱浠朵簨锛?/p>

  • policy server 宸茬粡浜х敓鍔ㄤ綔锛?/li>
  • 妯″瀷鍦ㄨ瑙夈€佸叧绯汇€佽繃绋嬪寲浠诲姟涓婃湁鎴愬姛鐜囥€?/li>

0.5 核心代码逐段讲解¶

入口层：examples/run_empty.py¶

杩欎釜鏂囦欢鏄幆澧冪儫娴嬪叆鍙ｃ€傚畠鍏堢敤 AppLauncher 鍚姩 Isaac Sim/Isaac Lab锛屽啀璋冪敤 auto_register_droid_envs() 娉ㄥ唽浠诲姟銆? 濡傛灉浼犱簡 --task锛?code>get_envs(task=args_cli.task) 鍙€夋寚瀹氫换鍔★紱娌℃湁浼?task/tag 鏃朵細鍙栭粯璁や换鍔￠泦鍚堛€? 瀵规瘡涓换鍔★紝瀹冭皟鐢?create_env(...) 寰楀埌 env 鍜?env_cfg锛屽啀鐢?run_empty_episode(...) 鎵ц绌哄姩浣溿€? 鏈€鍚庡畠鎶婃瘡涓?episode 鐨?success銆?code>instruction銆佸彲閫?score/reason 鍐欏叆 episode_results.jsonl銆?/p>

璁板繂鏂瑰紡锛?code>run_empty.py = 鍚姩 Isaac + 鎵句换鍔?+ 寤虹幆澧?+ 绌哄姩浣?+ 鍐欑粨鏋?/code>銆?/p>

环境创建层：robolab/core/environments/runtime.py¶

create_env 鏄换鍔″悕杩涘叆 Isaac 鐨勫叧閿棬鍙ｃ€? 瀹冨厛娓呯┖ stage锛屽啀璋冪敤 parse_env_cfg(scene, ...) 瑙ｆ瀽 task/env config銆? 濡傛灉浠诲姟鏈夊涓瑷€鐗堟湰锛?code>resolve_instruction(...) 浼氭牴鎹?instruction_type 閫夋嫨 default/vague/specific銆? 濡傛灉瑕佸仛 camera/light/background 鎵板姩锛?code>merge_events_cfg(...) 浼氭妸 variation event 鍚堝苟鍒?env config銆? 鏈€鍚?gym.make(scene, cfg=env_cfg).unwrapped 鍒涘缓鐪熸鐨?Isaac Lab env锛屽苟鎶?env_cfg.json 鍐欏埌杈撳嚭鐩綍銆?/p>

璁板繂鏂瑰紡锛?code>create_env = task name -> env_cfg -> Isaac Lab env銆?/p>

任务定义层：robolab/tasks/benchmark/banana_in_bowl_task.py¶

涓€涓换鍔＄被閫氬父鍖呭惈浜斿潡锛?/p>

  • contact_object_list锛氬摢浜涘璞￠渶瑕?contact sensor锛?/li>
  • scene = import_scene(...)锛氬姞杞藉摢涓?USD 鍦烘櫙锛?/li>
  • terminations锛氭垚鍔?瓒呮椂绛夌粓姝㈡潯浠讹紱
  • instruction锛氬悓涓€浠诲姟鐨勫绉嶈瑷€璇存硶锛?/li>
  • subtasks锛氱敤浜?graded score 鍜岄敊璇垎鏋愮殑瀛愪换鍔＄粨鏋勩€?/li>

浠?BananaInBowl 涓轰緥锛屾渶缁堟垚鍔熸潯浠舵槸 object_in_container(object="banana", container="bowl", ...)銆? subtask 浣跨敤 pick_and_place(object=["banana"], container="bowl", score=1.0)锛屼篃灏辨槸鈥滃厛鎶撳埌 banana锛屽啀纭 banana 杩?bowl鈥濄€?/p>

璁板繂鏂瑰紡锛?code>Task = 鍦烘櫙 + 鎸囦护 + 鎴愬姛鏉′欢 + 瀛愪换鍔¤瘎鍒?/code>銆?/p>

条件/评分层：conditionals.py 与 subtask.py¶

璁烘枃寮鸿皟涓嶈兘鍙湅浜屽€?success锛屾墍浠?RoboLab 鎶婁换鍔℃媶鎴?subtask 鍜?event銆? pick_and_place(...) 鏄?composite condition锛屼細灞曞紑鎴愭瘡涓洰鏍囧璞＄殑涓€缁勬潯浠讹紝渚嬪 object_grabbed 鍜?object_in_container銆? Subtask 淇濆瓨鏉′欢缁勩€?code>logical 妯″紡鍜?score锛?code>all 琛ㄧず鍏ㄩ儴瀹屾垚锛?code>any 琛ㄧず浠讳竴瀹屾垚锛?code>choose 琛ㄧず瀹屾垚 K 涓嵆鍙€? 杩欏氨鏄?normalized/subtask score 鑳界畻鍑烘潵鐨勫師鍥犮€?/p>

璁板繂鏂瑰紡锛?code>conditionals = 鍒ゆ柇浜嬪疄锛汼ubtask = 缁欎簨瀹炴帓搴忓拰鎵撳垎銆?/p>

评测 env 层：RobolabEnv¶

RoboLab 缁ф壙 Isaac Lab 鐨?ManagerBasedRLEnv锛屼絾璇勬祴閫昏緫鍜岃缁冪幆澧冧笉鍚屻€? 鍦?_reset_idx 閲岋紝宸茬粓姝?env 涓嶄細绔嬪埢鑷姩 reset锛岃€屾槸鏍囪涓?frozen锛岃褰?success/truncated 鍜岀粓姝?step锛屽苟瑙﹀彂 recorder 瀵煎嚭銆? step 浼氭妸 frozen env 鐨?action 缃浂锛岄伩鍏嶅凡缁撴潫 episode 琚悗缁姩浣滄薄鏌撱€?/p>

璁板繂鏂瑰紡锛?code>RobolabEnv = 涓鸿瘎娴嬪喕缁撶粓灞€銆佷繚鎶よ褰?/code>銆?/p>

policy 层：policies/pi0_family/run.py 与 client.py¶

run.py 璐熻矗瑙ｆ瀽 --policy pi05銆?code>--remote-host銆?code>--remote-port銆?code>--num-envs銆?code>--enable-subtask 绛夊弬鏁般€? 鐪熸鐨勯€氱敤璇勬祴寰幆鍦?robolab/eval/runner.py锛氬垱寤?env锛屽垱寤?policy client锛岃皟鐢?run_episode锛屾渶鍚?summarize_run銆? Pi0DroidJointposClient 鎶?RoboLab observation 杞垚 OpenPI 璇锋眰锛氬閮ㄧ浉鏈哄浘銆佽厱閮ㄧ浉鏈哄浘銆佸叧鑺備綅缃€佸す鐖綅缃拰璇█ prompt銆? server 杩斿洖 action chunk 鍚庯紝client 鎸?open_loop_horizon 鎵ц涓€娈靛姩浣滐紝鍐嶈姹備笅涓€娈点€?/p>

璁板繂鏂瑰紡锛?code>policy runner = RoboLab 鐜寰幆锛沜lient = 瑙傛祴/鍔ㄤ綔鍗忚閫傞厤鍣?/code>銆?/p>

指标层：results.py 与 trajectory_metrics.py¶

results.py 璐熻矗鍐欏叆鍜屾眹鎬?episode_results.jsonl锛岃繕鑳界粺璁￠敊璇師鍥狅紝渚嬪 wrong object銆乷bject bumped銆乼arget dropped銆? trajectory_metrics.py 璁＄畻 EE path length銆丼PARC銆両SJ 绛夎繍鍔ㄨ川閲忔寚鏍囥€? 杩欎簺鎸囨爣鍙湁鍦ㄧ湡瀹?policy 浜х敓鍔ㄤ綔鍚庢墠鏈夋剰涔夛紱no-policy 鐨勭┖鍔ㄤ綔 smoke 涓嶅簲鎷挎潵鍜岃鏂囬噷鐨?policy 琛ㄦ牸姣旇緝銆?/p>

璁板繂鏂瑰紡锛?code>results = 鎴愯触鍜岄敊璇師鍥狅紱metrics = 鍔ㄤ綔杞ㄨ抗璐ㄩ噺銆?/p>

0.6 交流过程中的核心问题与决策记录¶

杩欎竴鑺備笉鏄亰澶╂祦姘磋处锛岃€屾槸澶嶇幇杩囩▼涓弽澶嶆牎鍑嗚繃鐨勨€滃垽鏂彛寰勨€濄€傚悗闈㈢湅缁撴灉鏃惰鎸夎繖浜涜竟鐣岀悊瑙ｃ€?/p>

闂 缁撹 瀵瑰鐜板疄楠岀殑褰卞搷
4090 鑳戒笉鑳借窇 RoboLab锛?/td> 鑳借窇锛屼絾 24GB VRAM 鍙兘淇濆畧璺戝崟浠诲姟鎴栧皬瀛愰泦銆傚鏉備换鍔¤繍琛屾椂鏄惧瓨鎺ヨ繎 22.5GB / 24GB銆?/td> 棣栬疆鍥哄畾 --num-envs 1锛屼笉瑕佺洿鎺ユ媺楂樺苟琛屾暟銆?/td>

pi 鍘熸潵瑁呰繃锛屽拰杩欐涓嬭浇鐨?pi05 鏈変粈涔堝尯鍒紵 RoboChallenge 閲岀殑 pi 鏄彟涓€濂?benchmark/鎺ュ彛璇涓嬬殑绛栫暐鎴栫幆澧冿紱杩欐鐢ㄧ殑鏄?OpenPI pi05_droid_jointpos checkpoint锛岀粡 RoboLab policies/pi0_family/run.py 璋冪敤銆?/td> 鍏钩瀵规瘮鍓嶅繀椤荤粺涓€ observation/action 鍗忚銆佷换鍔°€佺浉鏈恒€佹垚鍔熸潯浠讹紝涓嶈兘鐩存帴鎶婁袱涓粨搴撶殑缁撴灉娣风畻銆?/td>

120 涓换鍔¤涓嶈涓€娆℃€у叏璺戯紵 涓嶅缓璁厛鐩茶窇瀹屾暣 RoboLab-120銆傚畼鏂归噺绾х害鍑犲崄 GPU 灏忔椂锛屼笖褰撳墠 checkout 杩樻湁浠诲姟璧勪骇瀹屾暣鎬ч棶棰樸€?/td> 鍏堟寜鑳藉姏杞存娊鏍凤紝纭璧勪骇銆佹垚鍔熸潯浠跺拰瑙嗛瀵煎嚭绋冲畾锛屽啀鎵╁睍鍒?120銆?/td>

鎵€鏈夆€滅湅杩涘害鈥濈殑绐楀彛搴旇鍦ㄥ摢锛?/td> 缁堢銆丆ursor銆乂NC 閮藉簲鍦?4090 涓婄湅锛涙湰鏈哄彧鍋氬悓姝ュ拰鏁寸悊銆?/td> 鍚庣画涓嶈鍐嶅惎鍔ㄦ湰鏈?terminal 浣滀负鍙鍖栬繘搴︾獥鍙ｃ€?/td>

璁板繂鏂瑰紡锛氬厛鍒嗘竻鍥涗欢浜嬶細鐜鏄惁鍙惎鍔?/code>銆?code>绛栫暐鏄惁鎺ヤ笂銆?code>浠诲姟鏄惁鎴愬姛銆?code>璇佹嵁鏄惁鍙洖鏀?/code>銆傝繖鍥涗欢浜嬬己涓€涓嶅彲锛屼絾涓嶈兘浜掔浉鏇夸唬銆?/p>

0.7 论文精讲：真实场景到模拟场景的评估¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_01_real_to_sim_eval.md锛屽凡缁忔妸璁烘枃閲屸€滅湡瀹炲満鏅埌妯℃嫙鍦烘櫙璇勪及鈥濈殑璇存硶缈昏瘧鎴愪唬鐮佸疄鐜伴摼璺€傞噸鐐圭湅杈撳叆銆佽緭鍑哄拰杈圭晫锛歊oboLab 涓绘祦绋嬩笉鏄€愬満鏅噸寤虹湡瀹炶棰戯紝鑰屾槸鐢ㄨ祫浜у簱銆乁SD 鍦烘櫙銆佺▼搴忓寲甯冨眬銆佷换鍔¤皳璇嶅拰鎵板姩鐭╅樀蹇€熺敓鎴愬彲浜や簰銆佸彲璇勫垎鐨勪豢鐪熻瘎浼板満鏅€?/p>

精讲 1：真实场景到模拟场景的评估，代码怎么实现¶

棰滆壊鏍囪瘑锛氱豢鑹茶〃绀烘牳蹇冪粨璁猴紝钃濊壊琛ㄧず婧愮爜/杈撳叆杈撳嚭璺緞锛屾鑹茶〃绀鸿竟鐣屻€侀闄╁拰瀹规槗璇В鐨勭偣銆?

先说结论¶

璁烘枃杩欐涓嶆槸璇?RoboLab 鑷繁鍦ㄤ富娴佺▼閲屽仛鈥滅湡瀹炶棰?-> 3DGS/NeRF -> 鏁板瓧瀛敓鍦烘櫙鈥濈殑閫愬満鏅噸寤恒€俁oboLab 鐨勬牳蹇冩€濊矾鏇村姟瀹烇細

涓嶉€愪釜鐪熷疄鍦烘櫙鍋氭槀璐典笁缁撮噸寤猴紝鑰屾槸鐢ㄥ凡鏈夌殑楂樿川閲?USD/SimReady 璧勪骇銆丠DR 鑳屾櫙銆佺墿鐞嗗弬鏁般€佺▼搴忓寲鍦烘櫙甯冨眬銆佷换鍔¤皳璇嶅拰鎵板姩鐭╅樀锛屽揩閫熺敓鎴愪竴鎵光€滆冻澶熼€肩湡銆佸彲浜や簰銆佸彲鑷姩璇勫垎鈥濈殑浠跨湡璇勬祴鍦烘櫙銆?/p>

鏍稿績缁撹锛歊oboLab 鐨?real-to-sim 鎬濊矾涓嶆槸鈥滀粠鐪熷疄瑙嗛閫愬満鏅噸寤衡€濓紝鑰屾槸鈥滅敤楂樿川閲忚祫浜у簱 + 绋嬪簭鍖栧竷灞€ + 鐗╃悊妫€鏌?+ 浠诲姟璋撹瘝鈥濆揩閫熺敓鎴愬彲璇勬祴鍦烘櫙銆?

鎵€浠ヤ唬鐮佸疄鐜扮殑閲嶇偣涓嶆槸 video_to_3dgs.py 杩欑被閲嶅缓鑴氭湰锛岃€屾槸涓嬮潰杩欐潯 pipeline锛?/p>

娉ㄦ剰杈圭晫锛氬鏋滃湪浠撳簱閲屾壘涓嶅埌 video_to_3dgs.py 杩欑被鑴氭湰锛屼笉鏄鐜版紡鎺変簡涓绘祦绋嬶紱璁烘枃杩欓噷寮鸿皟鐨勬槸鏇村揩鐨勮祫浜у寲銆佺▼搴忓寲璇勪及璺嚎銆? 
mermaid
flowchart TD
    A["鐪熷疄涓栫晫缁忛獙/浠诲姟鎻忚堪"] --> B["瀵硅薄璧勪骇搴?object_catalog.json"]
    B --> C["鍦烘櫙鐢熸垚: 閫夋嫨瀵硅薄 + 绌洪棿/鐗╃悊 predicates"]
    C --> D["SpatialSolver / PhysicalSolver 瑙ｅ嚭鐗╀綋浣嶅Э"]
    D --> E["鐢熸垚鎴栬鍙?USD/USDA 鍦烘櫙"]
    E --> F["Task 鏂囦欢: 鎸囦护 + 鎴愬姛鏉′欢 + subtask"]
    F --> G["registration: 鎺ユ満鍣ㄤ汉銆佺浉鏈恒€佸姩浣溿€佺伅鍏夈€佽儗鏅?]
    G --> H["Isaac Lab 鐜"]
    H --> I["绛栫暐璇勬祴: 鍥惧儚 + proprio + instruction -> action"]
    I --> J["缁撴灉: success rate / video / HDF5 / event log"]

1. 资产库：用真实物体的 USD 资产替代逐场景重建¶

鏍稿績璺緞锛?/p> 

assets/objects/
assets/objects/object_catalog.json
assets/scenes/
assets/backgrounds/
assets/materials/

浠ｇ爜鍏ュ彛锛?/p> 

robolab/constants.py
婧愮爜鍏ュ彛锛氬厛鐪?robolab/constants.py 鍜?assets/objects/object_catalog.json銆傚墠鑰呭畾涔夌洰褰曪紝鍚庤€呭畾涔夊彲鐢熸垚銆佸彲鏀剧疆銆佸彲楠岃瘉鐨勫璞¤祫浜с€?

鍏抽敭閫昏緫锛?/p>

  • ASSET_DIR = <repo>/assets
  • OBJECT_DIR = assets/objects
  • SCENE_DIR = assets/scenes
  • BACKGROUND_ASSET_DIR = assets/backgrounds
  • OBJECT_CATALOG_PATH = assets/objects/object_catalog.json

object_catalog.json 鏄繖濂楁柟娉曠殑鍩虹銆傛瘡涓璞′笉鍙槸涓€涓悕瀛楋紝杩樺寘鍚細

瀛楁 浣滅敤
name 浠诲姟鍜岃皳璇嶉噷浣跨敤鐨勫璞″悕
usd_path 鐪熷疄鍔犺浇鐨?USD 璧勪骇
class / description 璇箟绫诲埆鍜岃嚜鐒惰瑷€鎻忚堪锛岀敤浜庨€夌墿浣?/td>
dims 鍑犱綍灏哄锛岀敤浜庢斁缃拰纰版挒妫€娴?/td>
mass / friction / restitution 鐗╃悊鍙傛暟锛岀敤浜庡彲浜や簰浠跨湡

渚嬪鎴戜滑璺戠殑 BananaInBowlTask 閲岋細

  • banana 鏉ヨ嚜 assets/objects/ycb/banana.usd
  • bowl 鏉ヨ嚜 assets/objects/ycb/bowl.usd
  • 涓よ€呴兘鏈夊昂瀵搞€佽川閲忋€佹懇鎿︾瓑灞炴€?/li>

璇翠汉璇濓細RoboLab 涓嶆槸姣忔浠庣湡瀹炶棰戦噷閲嶆柊閲嶅缓棣欒晧鍜岀锛岃€屾槸澶嶇敤涓€涓彲鐗╃悊浜や簰鐨勯钑?USD 鍜岀 USD锛屽啀鎶婂畠浠憜鍒版柊鐨勪换鍔″満鏅噷銆?/p>

杩欏氨鏄€滃嚑鍒嗛挓鐢熸垚鍦烘櫙鈥濈殑鍏抽敭锛氱敓鎴?淇敼涓€涓?USDA 鏂囦欢姣旇缁冧竴涓?3DGS 蹇緱澶氥€?/p>

3. 从“真实场景经验”到“可评估仿真”的最小闭环¶

杩欓噷涓嶅啀灞曞紑 SpatialSolver銆?code>PhysicalSolver銆?code>Task 瀛楁鍜?env registration 鐨勭粏鑺傦紝閭ｄ簺鏄簿璁?鐨勬牳蹇冨唴瀹广€傛湰鑺傚彧淇濈暀 real-to-sim 璇勪及闇€瑕佺殑楠ㄦ灦锛?/p>

闃舵 杈撳叆 杈撳嚭 涓轰粈涔堝 real-to-sim 璇勪及閲嶈
璧勪骇鍖?/td> 鐪熷疄鐗╀綋绫诲埆銆佸昂瀵搞€佹潗璐ㄧ粡楠?/td> object_catalog.json + USD 璧勪骇 璁┾€滅湡瀹炵墿浣撯€濆彉鎴愬彲澶嶇敤銆佸彲鐗╃悊浜や簰鐨勬ā鎷熷璞?/td>
鍦烘櫙鍖?/td> 鐗╀綋缁勫悎銆佺┖闂村叧绯汇€佸鍣?鍫嗗彔鍏崇郴 .usda 鍦烘櫙 鐢ㄤ綆鎴愭湰鏂瑰紡鐢熸垚澶ч噺鍙帶鍦烘櫙锛岃€屼笉鏄€愬満鏅噸寤?/td>
浠诲姟鍖?/td> 鐩爣鐘舵€佸拰璇█鎸囦护 Task 绫汇€乻uccess predicate銆乻ubtask 鎶娾€滅湅璧锋潵鍍忊€濆崌绾ф垚鈥滆兘涓嶈兘瀹屾垚浠诲姟鈥?/td>
鐜鍖?/td> 鏈哄櫒浜恒€佺浉鏈恒€佸姩浣滅┖闂淬€佸厜鐓с€佽儗鏅?/td> Isaac Lab/Gym env 璁╁悓涓€浠诲姟鍙绛栫暐鎵归噺鎵ц鍜屽鐜板疄楠?/td>
璇勪及鍖?/td> policy銆乶um_envs銆乶um_runs銆佹壈鍔ㄧ煩闃?/td> success/video/HDF5/log 杈撳嚭鍙瘮杈冪殑鎴愬姛鐜囥€佽€楁椂銆佸け璐ョ被鍨嬪拰瑙嗛璇佹嵁
绔犺妭鍒嗗伐锛氭湰鑺傚彧璁?real-to-sim 璇勪及閾捐矾涓轰粈涔堟垚绔嬶紱scene_gen銆?code>import_scene銆?code>Task銆乺egistration 鐨勪唬鐮佺粏鑺傝 [EXPLAIN_02_scene_task_env_generation.md](./EXPLAIN_02_scene_task_env_generation.md)锛涜嚜鍔ㄧ敓鎴?Task 鍜岄獙璇侀棴鐜 [EXPLAIN_03_task_generation_validation.md](./EXPLAIN_03_task_generation_validation.md)銆?

3.1 这里的“逼真”不是单纯像素相似¶

RoboLab 瀵归€肩湡鐨勮姹傛洿宸ョ▼鍖栵細鍦烘櫙闇€瑕佽冻澶熸敮鎸佺瓥鐣ヨ瘎娴嬶紝鑰屼笉鏄€愬儚绱犲鍒绘煇涓湡瀹炲帹鎴胯棰戙€傛崲鍙ヨ瘽璇达紝璇勪及鍏冲績鐨勬槸锛?/p>

  • 瑙嗚涓婃槸鍚︽湁瓒冲鐪熷疄鐨勭墿浣撱€佺汗鐞嗐€佽儗鏅拰鐩告満瑙嗚锛岃 VLA 妯″瀷浜х敓鍚堢悊鎰熺煡杈撳叆銆?/li>
  • 鍑犱綍涓婃槸鍚︽湁姝ｇ‘鐨勫昂瀵搞€佺浉瀵逛綅缃€佸鍣ㄥ紑鍙ｃ€佸爢鍙犲叧绯汇€?/li>
  • 鐗╃悊涓婃槸鍚﹁兘鎶撳彇銆佹帴瑙︺€佹斁缃€侀噴鏀撅紝鑰屼笉鏄彧鏈夐潤鎬佹覆鏌撱€?/li>
  • 浠诲姟涓婃槸鍚﹁兘鑷姩鍒ゆ柇鎴愬姛/澶辫触锛岃€屼笉鏄潬浜哄伐鐪嬭棰戙€?/li>

杩欎篃鏄负浠€涔?object_catalog.json銆?code>.usda銆乻uccess predicate銆乻ubtask log銆乿ideo/HDF5 杩欎簺涓滆タ姣斿崟绾覆鏌撴埅鍥炬洿閲嶈銆?/p>

3.2 控制变量比单一场景重建更有评测价值¶

閫愬満鏅?3DGS/NeRF 鐨勪紭鍔挎槸鍍忔煇涓€涓湡瀹炲満鏅紝浣嗕唬浠锋槸鎱€侀毦鎵╁睍銆侀毦鑷姩璇勫垎銆俁oboLab 閫夋嫨鍙︿竴鏉¤矾绾匡細

鍚屼竴涓换鍔＄洰鏍?
  脳 澶氫釜鐗╀綋缁勫悎
  脳 澶氫釜绌洪棿鍏崇郴
  脳 澶氫釜鑳屾櫙/鍏夌収/鐩告満鎵板姩
  脳 澶氫釜绛栫暐妯″瀷
  -> 寰楀埌鍙í鍚戞瘮杈冪殑 success rate 鍜屽け璐ユā寮?

杩欏璇勬祴 VLA 娉涘寲鑳藉姏鏇寸洿鎺ワ細鎴戜滑鍙互闂€滄ā鍨嬫槸涓嶆槸鍙湪榛樿鑳屾櫙鑳芥垚鍔熲€濃€滄槸涓嶆槸棰滆壊鎹竴涓嬪氨澶辫触鈥濃€滄槸涓嶆槸澶氱墿浣撶洰鏍囦細鏄捐憲鎺夊垎鈥濓紝鑰屼笉鍙槸闂€滆繖涓覆鏌撳儚涓嶅儚鏌愭鐪熷疄瑙嗛鈥濄€?/p>
