5. 这段论文对应代码的一句话总结¶

璁烘枃璇粹€滅浉姣旈€愬満鏅?3D 閲嶅缓锛孯oboLab 鍑犲垎閽熺敓鎴愬ぇ瑙勬ā閫肩湡鍦烘櫙鍜屼换鍔♀€濓紝浠ｇ爜涓婂搴旂殑涓嶆槸鏌愪竴涓濂囬噸寤鸿剼鏈紝鑰屾槸涓€濂楄瘎浼板伐绋嬶細

  1. 澶嶇敤璧勪骇锛氱敤 object_catalog.json 鍜?USD 璧勪骇鎶婄湡瀹炵墿浣撶粡楠屽彉鎴愬彲澶嶇敤妯℃嫙瀵硅薄銆?/li>
  2. 鎺у埗鍙橀噺锛氱敤鍦烘櫙銆佷换鍔°€佽儗鏅€佸厜鐓с€佺浉鏈虹粍鍚堝嚭鍙帶鎵板姩鐭╅樀銆?/li>
  3. 鑷姩璇勫垎锛氱敤 success predicate 鍜?subtask log 鍒ゆ柇浠诲姟瀹屾垚锛岃€屼笉鏄汉宸ョ湅瑙嗛銆?/li>
  4. 璇佹嵁闂幆锛氱敤 episode_results.jsonl銆丠DF5銆乪vent log銆佽棰戣褰曟瘡娆＄瓥鐣ヨ繍琛屻€?/li>
  5. 妯悜姣旇緝锛氬悓涓€濂椾换鍔″彲鏇挎崲 policy銆佽儗鏅€佺浉鏈哄拰闅惧害锛岀敤鎴愬姛鐜囧拰澶辫触妯″紡姣旇緝娉涘寲鑳藉姏銆?/li>

6. 要记住的边界¶

RoboLab 涓荤嚎涓嶆槸锛?/p> 

鐪熷疄瑙嗛 -> 3DGS/NeRF 閲嶅缓 -> 鍗曚釜鏁板瓧瀛敓鍦烘櫙

RoboLab 涓荤嚎鏄細

鐪熷疄鐗╀綋/鍦烘櫙缁忛獙 -> 鍙鐢?USD 璧勪骇 -> 绋嬪簭鍖?LLM 杈呭姪鐢熸垚鍦烘櫙 -> 浠诲姟瀹氫箟 -> 鎵归噺绛栫暐璇勬祴

鎵€浠ュ畠鐗虹壊浜嗕竴鐐光€滈€愬満鏅儚绱犵骇涓€鑷存€р€濓紝鎹㈡潵锛?/p>

  • 鏇翠綆鐢熸垚鎴愭湰锛?/li>
  • 鏇村鏄撴墿灞曞埌 100+ 浠诲姟锛?/li>
  • 鑳借嚜鍔ㄦ墦鍒嗭紱
  • 鑳界郴缁熸敼鍙樿儗鏅€佸厜鐓с€佺浉鏈恒€佺墿浣撶粍鍚堬紱
  • 鏇撮€傚悎姣旇緝 VLA 绛栫暐鐨勬硾鍖栬兘鍔涖€?/li>

0.8 论文精讲：场景、任务和环境生成¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_02_scene_task_env_generation.md锛屽搴旇鏂囬噷鐨勪笁姝ワ細鍏堝畾浣?瀹氬悜鐗╀綋鐢熸垚鍦烘櫙锛屽啀鎶婄洰鏍囩姸鎬佸啓鎴愯瑷€浠诲姟锛屾渶鍚庨€夋嫨鏈哄櫒浜恒€佺瓥鐣ャ€佹憚鍍忓ご銆佸厜鐓с€佽儗鏅潵瀹炰緥鍖栫幆澧冦€?/p>

精讲 2：场景、任务和环境生成，代码怎么实现¶

棰滆壊鏍囪瘑锛氱豢鑹茶〃绀烘牳蹇冪粨璁猴紝钃濊壊琛ㄧず婧愮爜/杈撳叆杈撳嚭璺緞锛屾鑹茶〃绀鸿竟鐣屻€侀闄╁拰瀹规槗璇В鐨勭偣銆?

先说结论¶

璁烘枃杩欐鍙互鎷嗘垚涓夊眰锛?/p>

  1. 鍒涘缓鍦烘櫙锛氬厛鍐冲畾宸ヤ綔绌洪棿閲屾湁鍝簺鐗╀綋銆佺墿浣撴斁鍦ㄥ摢銆佹湞鍚戞槸浠€涔堬紝鏈€鍚庤惤鎴愪竴涓?USD/USDA 鍦烘櫙鏂囦欢銆?/li>
  2. 瀹氫箟浠诲姟锛氬啀鎶娾€滅洰鏍囩姸鎬佲€濆啓鎴愯瑷€鎸囦护鍜屾垚鍔熸潯浠讹紝渚嬪鈥滈瓟鏂瑰湪纰楀乏杈光€濃€滄墍鏈夌孩鑹茬墿浣撳湪鐏拌壊鐩掑瓙閲屸€濄€?/li>
  3. 瀹炰緥鍖栫幆澧?/strong>锛氭渶鍚庨€夋嫨鏈哄櫒浜恒€佸姩浣滅┖闂淬€佺瓥鐣ヨ娴嬬浉鏈恒€乿iewport 鐩告満銆佺伅鍏夈€佽儗鏅紝鍐嶆敞鍐屾垚 Gym/Isaac Lab 鐜锛屼緵 policy runner 鎵ц銆?/li>

璇翠汉璇濓細鍦烘櫙鏄垶鍙帮紝浠诲姟鏄洰鏍囷紝鐜鏄妸鑸炲彴銆佺洰鏍囥€佹満鍣ㄤ汉鍜屾憚鍍忔満瑁呴厤鎴愪竴娆″彲杩愯瀹為獙銆?/strong>

鏍稿績缁撹锛氳繖涓€鑺傝璁颁綇涓変欢浜嬶細鍦烘櫙璐熻矗鈥滄湁浠€涔堛€佸湪鍝噷鈥濓紝浠诲姟璐熻矗鈥滆杈惧埌浠€涔堢洰鏍団€濓紝鐜璐熻矗鈥滄妸鏈哄櫒浜恒€佺浉鏈恒€佸姩浣滃拰璇勬祴杈撳嚭瑁呴厤璧锋潵鈥濄€? 
mermaid
flowchart TD
    A["瀵硅薄璧勪骇搴?object_catalog.json"] --> B["鍦烘櫙璋撹瘝 JSON"]
    B --> C["SpatialSolver / PhysicalSolver"]
    C --> D["USD/USDA 鍦烘櫙鏂囦欢"]
    D --> E["Task 绫? scene + instruction + terminations + subtasks"]
    E --> F["registration: robot + actions + observations + cameras + lighting + background"]
    F --> G["Gym env id / EnvCfg"]
    G --> H["create_env -> RobolabEnv"]
    H --> I["policy runner: image/proprio/instruction -> action"]
    I --> J["episode_results.jsonl / HDF5 / videos"]

娉ㄦ剰涓€涓竟鐣岋細RoboLab benchmark 杩愯鏃堕€氬父鐩存帴璇诲彇宸茬粡鐢熸垚濂界殑 assets/scenes/*.usda銆?code>robolab/scene_gen/llm_scene_gen/ 鏄€滃浣曠敓鎴愭柊鍦烘櫙鈥濈殑浠ｇ爜鑳藉姏锛涜瘎娴嬫椂涓嶄竴瀹氭瘡娆￠噸鏂扮敓鎴愬満鏅€?/p>

娉ㄦ剰杈圭晫锛氬鐜?benchmark 鏃讹紝涓绘祦绋嬮€氬父鏄鍙栫幇鎴?.usda 鍦烘櫙锛?code>scene_gen 鏇村儚鎵╁睍鍜岀敓鎴愭柊浠诲姟/鏂板満鏅殑鑳藉姏锛屼笉绛変簬姣忔璇勬祴閮藉湪绾跨敓鎴愩€?

1. 场景生成：把物体定位和定向¶

鏍稿績鏂囦欢锛?/p> 

robolab/scene_gen/llm_scene_gen/predicates.py
robolab/scene_gen/llm_scene_gen/spatial_solver.py
robolab/scene_gen/llm_scene_gen/physical_solver.py
skills/robolab-scenegen/SKILL.md
assets/objects/object_catalog.json
assets/scenes/base_empty.usda
assets/scenes/*.usda
robolab/core/scenes/utils.py
婧愮爜鍏ュ彛锛氬満鏅敓鎴愬厛鐪?predicates.py銆?code>spatial_solver.py銆?code>physical_solver.py锛涗换鍔¤閰嶇湅 robolab/tasks/benchmark/*.py锛涚幆澧冩敞鍐岀湅 registrations/ 鍜?core/environments/runtime.py銆?

输入是什么¶

鍦烘櫙鐢熸垚鐨勮緭鍏ヤ笉鏄竴寮犲浘鐗囷紝鑰屾槸缁撴瀯鍖栦俊鎭細

杈撳叆 渚嬪瓙 浣滅敤
瀵硅薄鐩綍 object_catalog.json 鐭ラ亾鏈夊摢浜涚墿浣撱€乁SD 璺緞銆佸昂瀵搞€佽川閲忕瓑
璋撹瘝 JSON left-of, place-on-base, place-in 鎻忚堪鐗╀綋涔嬮棿鐨勭┖闂?鐗╃悊鍏崇郴
宸ヤ綔绌洪棿杈圭晫 table_bounds=(0.25, 0.85, -0.45, 0.45) 闄愬埗鐗╀綋鍙兘鏀惧湪妗岄潰瀹夊叏鍖哄煙
base scene assets/scenes/base_empty.usda 鎻愪緵妗屽瓙銆佸湴闈€佸熀纭€ fixture

predicates.py 瀹氫箟浜嗕袱绫昏皳璇嶏細

绫诲瀷 浠ｇ爜瀵硅薄 瑙ｅ喅浠€涔?/th>
绌洪棿璋撹瘝 SpatialPredicate, PlaceOnBasePredicate, RelativePositionPredicate 妗岄潰 2D 浣嶇疆锛歺銆亂銆亂aw
鐗╃悊璋撹瘝 PhysicalPredicate, PlaceOnPredicate, PlaceInPredicate 3D 鏀剧疆锛歾銆佸爢鍙犮€佸鍣ㄥ唴甯冨眬

鍏稿瀷璋撹瘝 JSON锛?/p> 

{
  "objects": [
    {"name": "bowl"},
    {"name": "banana"},
    {"name": "rubiks_cube"}
  ],
  "predicates": [
    {"type": "place-on-base", "object": "bowl", "x": 0.55, "y": 0.0},
    {"type": "left-of", "object": "rubiks_cube", "reference": "bowl", "distance": 0.18},
    {"type": "place-on-base", "object": "banana", "x": 0.40, "y": -0.20},
    {"type": "random-rot", "object": "banana"}
  ]
}

中间过程¶

浠ｇ爜涓荤嚎锛?/p> 

from robolab.scene_gen.llm_scene_gen import (
    ObjectState,
    PlaceOnBasePredicate,
    parse_predicates_from_dict,
    SpatialSolver,
    PhysicalSolver,
    FeedbackSystem,
)

# 1. 姣忎釜瀵硅薄鍏堝彉鎴?ObjectState銆?/span>
object_states = {
    "bowl": ObjectState(name="bowl"),
    "banana": ObjectState(name="banana"),
    "rubiks_cube": ObjectState(name="rubiks_cube"),
}

# 2. JSON 璋撹瘝鍙樻垚 typed Predicate锛屽苟鎸傚埌瀵瑰簲 object 涓娿€?/span>
for pred_data in llm_result["predicates"]:
    pred = parse_predicates_from_dict(pred_data)
    object_states[pred.target_object].predicates.append(pred)

# 3. 绌洪棿姹傝В鍣ㄨВ x/y/yaw锛屽苟鍋氱鎾炴鏌ャ€?/span>
spatial = SpatialSolver(table_bounds=(0.25, 0.85, -0.45, 0.45))
success, msg = spatial.solve(object_states, object_dims)

# 4. 鐗╃悊姹傝В鍣ㄥ鐞?place-on / place-in / place-anywhere銆?/span>
physical = PhysicalSolver()
success, msg = physical.solve(
    object_states,
    object_dims,
    object_usd_paths,
    "assets/scenes/base_empty.usda",
)

# 5. 璇硶鍙嶉妫€鏌ュ摢浜涚墿浣撹繕缂轰綅缃垨鏈濆悜銆?/span>
feedback = FeedbackSystem.generate_grammar_feedback(object_states)

SpatialSolver.solve() 鐨勬牳蹇冮€昏緫鏄細

  1. 鍏堝鐞?place-on-base锛岀粰鐗╀綋鍒濆妗岄潰鍧愭爣銆?/li>
  2. 鍐嶈凯浠ｅ鐞?left-of/right-of/front-of/back-of銆?/li>
  3. 鍐嶅簲鐢?facing-* 鍜?random-rot銆?/li>
  4. 鏈€鍚庢鏌ョ鎾炲拰妗岄潰杈圭晫锛涘鏋滅墿浣撳お瀵嗭紝浼氭斁鏉?margin 閲嶈瘯銆?/li>

PhysicalSolver.solve() 鐨勬牳蹇冮€昏緫鏄細

  1. 鎶?place-on 鎸夋敮鎾戠墿鍒嗙粍锛屽鐞嗗爢鍙犮€?/li>
  2. 澶勭悊 place-in锛屾妸澶氫釜鐗╀綋鏀捐繘瀹瑰櫒銆?/li>
  3. 澶勭悊 place-anywhere锛岀粰鏈寚瀹氫綅缃殑鐗╀綋鎵惧彲鏀惧尯鍩熴€?/li>
  4. 鍙€夊湴鐢ㄧ墿鐞嗕豢鐪?settle/validate 绋冲畾鎬с€?/li>

输出是什么¶

杈撳嚭鍒嗕袱姝ワ細

  1. 姹傝В缁撴灉锛氭瘡涓墿浣撶殑 x, y, z, yaw, usd_path銆?/li>
  2. USDA 鍦烘櫙鏂囦欢锛氬湪 base_empty.usda 鐨勫熀纭€涓婃彃鍏ョ墿浣?prim銆?/li>

USDA prim 澶ц嚧闀胯繖鏍凤細

def "banana" (
    prepend payload = @../objects/ycb/banana.usd@
)
{
    quatf xformOp:orient = (1, 0, 0, 0)
    float3 xformOp:scale = (1, 1, 1)
    double3 xformOp:translate = (0.40, -0.20, 0.035)
    uniform token[] xformOpOrder = ["xformOp:translate", "xformOp:orient", "xformOp:scale"]
}

宸茬粡鐢熸垚濂界殑鍦烘櫙琚换鍔℃枃浠惰繖鏍疯鍙栵細

from robolab.core.scenes.utils import import_scene

scene = import_scene("banana_bowl.usda", ["banana", "bowl", "table"])

import_scene() 浼氬仛涓変欢浜嬶細

  1. 鍦?assets/scenes/ 涓嬫壘鍒?banana_bowl.usda銆?/li>
  2. 瑙ｆ瀽 USD 閲岀殑 rigid body銆乲inematic body銆乻tatic body銆?/li>
  3. 鍔ㄦ€佺敓鎴愪竴涓?Isaac Lab SceneConfig锛岄噷闈㈡瘡涓墿浣撳彉鎴?RigidObjectCfg 鎴?AssetBaseCfg銆?/li>

2. 任务定义：把目标状态写成语言指令¶

鏍稿績鏂囦欢锛?/p> 

robolab/tasks/benchmark/*.py
robolab/core/task/task.py
robolab/core/task/conditionals.py
robolab/core/task/subtask.py

涓€涓换鍔＄被閫氬父鍖呭惈浜斾欢浜嬶細

瀛楁 渚嬪瓙 浣滅敤
contact_object_list ["banana", "bowl", "table"] 鍝簺鐗╀綋瑕佸惎鐢ㄦ帴瑙︽娴?/td>
scene import_scene("banana_bowl.usda", ...) 浠诲姟浣跨敤鍝釜鍦烘櫙
terminations success = DoneTerm(func=object_in_container, ...) 浠€涔堟椂鍊欐垚鍔熸垨瓒呮椂
instruction default/vague/specific 缁欑瓥鐣ユā鍨嬬殑璇█杈撳叆
subtasks pick_and_place(...) 杩囩▼鍖栬繘搴﹀拰 graded score

示例 A：香蕉放进碗¶

瀵瑰簲鏂囦欢锛?code>robolab/tasks/benchmark/banana_in_bowl_task.py

@configclass
class BananaInBowlTerminations:
    time_out = DoneTerm(func=mdp.time_out, time_out=True)
    success = DoneTerm(
        func=object_in_container,
        params={
            "object": "banana",
            "container": "bowl",
            "gripper_name": "gripper",
            "tolerance": 0.0,
            "require_contact_with": True,
            "require_gripper_detached": True,
        },
    )

@dataclass
class BananaInBowlTask(Task):
    contact_object_list = ["banana", "bowl", "table"]
    scene = import_scene("banana_bowl.usda", contact_object_list)
    terminations = BananaInBowlTerminations
    instruction = {
        "default": "Pick up the banana and place it in the bowl",
        "vague": "Put the fruit in the bowl",
        "specific": "Grasp the yellow banana and place it inside the red bowl on the table",
    }
    episode_length_s = 50
    attributes = ["semantics"]
    subtasks = [
        pick_and_place(object=["banana"], container="bowl", logical="all", score=1.0)
    ]

杩欓噷鐨勨€滅洰鏍囩姸鎬佲€濅笉鏄嚜鐒惰瑷€鏈韩锛岃€屾槸 object_in_container(banana, bowl) 杩欎釜鐗╃悊/鍑犱綍璋撹瘝銆傝瑷€鍙槸缁?VLA 妯″瀷鐪嬬殑 prompt銆?/p>

示例 B：魔方放到碗左边¶

瀵瑰簲鏂囦欢锛?code>robolab/tasks/benchmark/rubiks_cube_left_of_bowl.py

success = DoneTerm(
    func=object_left_of,
    params={
        "object": "rubiks_cube",
        "reference_object": "bowl",
        "frame_of_reference": "robot",
        "mirrored": False,
        "require_gripper_detached": True,
    },
)

instruction = {
    "default": "Put the rubiks cube to the left of the bowl",
    "vague": "Put the cube left of the bowl",
    "specific": "Pick up the rubiks cube and place it on the table to the left side of the bowl",
}

杩欎釜浠诲姟娴嬬殑鏄叧绯绘帹鐞嗭細妯″瀷瑕佽瘑鍒?bowl锛岀悊瑙?left-of锛屽苟鎶?rubiks cube 鏀惧埌姝ｇ‘鐩稿浣嶇疆銆?/p>

示例 C：所有红色物体放进灰色盒子¶

瀵瑰簲鏂囦欢锛?code>robolab/tasks/benchmark/red_items_in_bin.py

success = DoneTerm(
    func=object_in_container,
    params={
        "object": ["mug", "bowl"],
        "container": "grey_bin",
        "logical": "all",
        "require_gripper_detached": True,
    },
)

instruction = {
    "default": "Put all the red things in the grey bin",
    "vague": "Sort items by color",
    "specific": "Identify every red-colored object on the table and place each one into the grey bin",
}

杩欓噷鐨勯毦鐐规槸闆嗗悎鐩爣锛氫笉鏄Щ鍔ㄤ竴涓璞★紝鑰屾槸璇嗗埆鎵€鏈夌孩鑹茬墿浣擄紝骞朵笖 logical="all" 瑕佹眰鍏ㄩ儴瀹屾垚銆?/p>

示例 D：3 个魔方堆叠¶

瀵瑰簲鏂囦欢锛?code>robolab/tasks/benchmark/rubiks_cube_stacking_task.py

success = DoneTerm(
    func=stacked,
    params={
        "objects": ["rubiks_cube", "rubiks_cube_1", "rubiks_cube_2"],
        "order": "None",
    },
)

subtasks = [
    Subtask(
        name="stack_any_2_cubes",
        conditions={
            "cube_0_and_1": partial(stacked, objects=["rubiks_cube", "rubiks_cube_1"], order=None),
            "cube_0_and_2": partial(stacked, objects=["rubiks_cube", "rubiks_cube_2"], order=None),
            "cube_1_and_2": partial(stacked, objects=["rubiks_cube_1", "rubiks_cube_2"], order=None),
        },
        logical="any",
        score=0.5,
    ),
    Subtask(
        name="stack_all_3_cubes",
        conditions=partial(stacked, objects=["rubiks_cube", "rubiks_cube_1", "rubiks_cube_2"], order=None),
        score=0.5,
    ),
]

杩欎釜渚嬪瓙璇存槑 subtasks 涓嶆槸鎽嗚锛氬嵆浣挎渶缁堟病鎴愬姛锛屼篃鑳界煡閬撴ā鍨嬫湁娌℃湁瀹屾垚鈥滀换鎰忎袱涓厛鍫嗚捣鏉モ€濊繖绉嶄腑闂磋繘搴︺€?/p>

3. 环境实例化：选择机器人、策略和场景变化¶

鏍稿績鏂囦欢锛?/p> 

robolab/registrations/droid/auto_env_registrations_jointpos.py
robolab/core/environments/config.py
robolab/core/environments/factory.py
robolab/core/environments/runtime.py
robolab/robots/droid.py
robolab/variations/camera.py
robolab/variations/lighting.py
robolab/variations/backgrounds.py
robolab/eval/runner.py
policies/pi0_family/run.py

注册阶段¶

Pi05 杩欐璧扮殑鏄?DROID joint-position 娉ㄥ唽璺嚎锛?/p> 

from robolab.registrations.droid.auto_env_registrations_jointpos import auto_register_droid_envs

auto_register_droid_envs(
    task_dirs=["benchmark"],
    task=["BananaInBowlTask"],
    randomize_background=False,
)

auto_register_droid_envs() 鍋氫簡杩欎簺浜嬶細

  1. 閫夋嫨鐩告満 preset銆傞粯璁?WRIST_LEFT = [OverShoulderLeftCameraCfg, WristCameraCfg]銆?/li>
  2. 鏍规嵁鐩告満鐢熸垚 image_obs锛屽啀鍔犱笂 proprio_obs 鍜?viewport_cam銆?/li>
  3. 閫夋嫨鏈哄櫒浜猴細DroidCfg锛屽疄闄呮槸 Franka + Robotiq gripper 鐨?USD銆?/li>
  4. 閫夋嫨鍔ㄤ綔绌洪棿锛?code>DroidJointPositionActionCfg銆?/li>
  5. 閫夋嫨鐏厜锛氶粯璁?SphereLightCfg銆?/li>
  6. 閫夋嫨鑳屾櫙锛氶粯璁?HomeOfficeBackgroundCfg锛屼篃鍙殢鏈鸿儗鏅€?/li>
  7. 璋冪敤 auto_discover_and_create_cfgs() 鎵弿 task 鏂囦欢骞舵敞鍐?Gym env銆?/li>

鍏抽敭缁勫悎鍙戠敓鍦?generate_scene_env_cfg()锛?/p> 

bases = [task_class.scene, robot_cfg, InteractiveSceneCfg]

if camera_cfg is not None:
    bases.append(camera_cfg)
if lighting_cfg is not None:
    bases.append(lighting_cfg)
if background_cfg is not None:
    bases.append(background_cfg)

cfg_cls = type(f"{task_class.__name__}SceneEnvCfg", tuple(bases), {})

杩欏氨鏄鏂囬噷鈥滈€夋嫨鏈哄櫒浜恒€佹憚鍍忓ご銆佸厜鐓с€佽儗鏅潵瀹炰緥鍖栫幆澧冣€濈殑浠ｇ爜瀹炵幇锛氬畠涓嶆槸鍐欐涓€涓ぇ绫伙紝鑰屾槸鎶婂涓?config mixin 鍔ㄦ€佹嫾鎴愪竴涓?scene env config銆?/p>

运行阶段¶

鐪熸鍒涘缓鐜鍙戠敓鍦?robolab/core/environments/runtime.py锛?/p> 

env_cfg = parse_env_cfg(
    scene,
    device=device,
    seed=seed,
    num_envs=num_envs,
    env_spacing=env_spacing,
    use_fabric=use_fabric,
    eye=eye,
    lookat=lookat,
)

env_cfg._instruction_variants = env_cfg.instruction
env_cfg.instruction = resolve_instruction(env_cfg.instruction, instruction_type)

if events is not None:
    env_cfg.events = merge_events_cfg(env_cfg.events, events)

env = gym.make(scene, cfg=env_cfg).unwrapped

杈撳叆鏄細

杈撳叆 渚嬪瓙
env name BananaInBowlTask
device cuda:0
num_envs 1
instruction type default, vague, specific
optional events camera pose jitter, reset randomization
policy pi05

杈撳嚭鏄細

杈撳嚭 璇存槑
env 鐪熸鐨?RobolabEnv / Isaac Lab 鐜
env_cfg 瀹屾暣閰嶇疆锛歴cene銆乺obot銆乤ctions銆乷bservations銆乪vents銆乼erminations
env_cfg.json 姣忎釜浠诲姟鐩綍涓嬩繚瀛樹竴浠斤紝鐢ㄤ簬澶嶇幇
杩愯缁撴灉 episode_results.jsonl銆丠DF5銆佷簨浠舵棩蹇椼€佽棰?/td>

policy runner 怎么接上¶

Pi05 鍛戒护鍏ュ彛鏄細

uv run python policies/pi0_family/run.py \
  --policy pi05 \
  --remote-host localhost \
  --remote-port 8000 \
  --task BananaInBowlTask \
  --num-envs 1 \
  --num-runs 1 \
  --video-mode all \
  --headless \
  --device cuda:0

policies/pi0_family/run.py 鐨勯€昏緫鏄細

  1. 鍏堝惎鍔?Isaac Sim AppLauncher銆?/li>
  2. 璋冪敤 auto_register_droid_envs(...) 娉ㄥ唽浠诲姟鐜銆?/li>
  3. 鍒涘缓 Pi0DroidJointposClient 杩炴帴 OpenPI server銆?/li>
  4. 杩涘叆 robolab/eval/runner.py::run_evaluation()銆?/li>
  5. 瀵规瘡涓?task 璋冪敤 create_env()銆?/li>
  6. 姣忎釜 episode 涓墽琛岋細observation + instruction -> policy action -> env.step銆?/li>
  7. 鍐欏嚭缁撴灉鍜岃棰戙€?/li>

4. 额外示例¶

示例 1：只换语言指令难度¶

鍚屼竴涓换鍔″彲浠ョ敤涓嶅悓璇█绮掑害杩愯锛?/p> 

uv run python policies/pi0_family/run.py \
  --policy pi05 \
  --remote-host localhost \
  --remote-port 8000 \
  --task BananaInBowlTask \
  --instruction-type vague \
  --num-envs 1 \
  --num-runs 1 \
  --video-mode all \
  --headless \
  --device cuda:0

鏁堟灉锛氬満鏅拰鎴愬姛鏉′欢涓嶅彉锛屽彧鎶婃ā鍨嬬湅鍒扮殑 instruction 浠?default 鎹㈡垚 vague銆傝繖鏍峰彲浠ュ崟鐙祴璇█妯＄硦搴﹀绛栫暐鐨勫奖鍝嶃€?/p>

示例 2：随机背景，测视觉鲁棒性¶

uv run python policies/pi0_family/run.py \
  --policy pi05 \
  --remote-host localhost \
  --remote-port 8000 \
  --task BananaInBowlTask RedItemsInBinTask \
  --randomize-background \
  --background-seed 42 \
  --num-envs 1 \
  --num-runs 1 \
  --video-mode all \
  --headless \
  --device cuda:0

鏁堟灉锛氭瘡涓?task 娉ㄥ唽鏃朵細鎶戒竴涓潪榛樿 HDR/EXR 鑳屾櫙锛屽苟鍥哄畾鍐欏叆璇?task 鐨?env_cfg銆傝繖閫傚悎姣旇緝鈥滃悓涓€绛栫暐鍦ㄩ粯璁よ儗鏅?vs 闅忔満鑳屾櫙鈥濈殑鎴愬姛鐜囧彉鍖栥€?/p>

示例 3：背景矩阵实验¶

auto_env_registrations_bg_variations.py 浼氫负姣忎釜 (task, background) 缁勫悎娉ㄥ唽涓€涓?env锛?/p> 

from robolab.registrations.droid.auto_env_registrations_bg_variations import (
    auto_register_droid_envs_bg_variations,
)

auto_register_droid_envs_bg_variations(
    tasks=["BananaInBowlTask", "RubiksCubeAndBananaTask"],
    backgrounds=["empty_warehouse.hdr", "billiard_hall.hdr"],
)

瀹冧細褰㈡垚绫讳技锛?/p> 

BananaInBowlTask_bg_empty_warehouse
BananaInBowlTask_bg_billiard_hall
RubiksCubeAndBananaTask_bg_empty_warehouse
RubiksCubeAndBananaTask_bg_billiard_hall

杩欓€傚悎鍋氳鏂囬噷鐨?sensitivity analysis锛屼絾浠诲姟鏁颁箻鑳屾櫙鏁颁細寰堝揩鍙樺ぇ銆?090 涓婂缓璁厛灏忕煩闃甸獙璇併€?/p>

示例 4：自定义任务只需要补哪几块¶

杩欓儴鍒嗕笉鍐嶅睍寮€瀹屾暣 Task 鏂囦欢锛岄伩鍏嶅拰绮捐3閲嶅銆傚彧璁颁綇锛氬亣璁惧凡鏈?assets/scenes/my_banana_bowl.usda锛屼竴涓渶灏忎换鍔″彧闇€瑕佽ˉ榻?6 涓瓧娈点€?/p>

瀛楁 鏈€灏忓唴瀹?/th> 浣滅敤
contact_object_list ["banana", "bowl", "table"] 鍛婅瘔鐜鍝簺瀵硅薄闇€瑕佹帴瑙?鐘舵€佽窡韪?/td>
scene import_scene("my_banana_bowl.usda", contact_object_list) 缁戝畾杩欎釜浠诲姟浣跨敤鍝釜鍦烘櫙
terminations object_in_container(...) 瀹氫箟鎬庢牱绠楁垚鍔?/td>
instruction default / vague / specific 缁?VLA policy 鐨勮瑷€杈撳叆
episode_length_s 渚嬪 50 鎺у埗鏈€闀垮皾璇曟椂闂?/td>
subtasks pick_and_place(...) 璁板綍杩囩▼杩涘害鍜?graded score

鏈€灏忛鏋跺彲浠ョ悊瑙ｆ垚锛?/p> 

class MyBananaTask(Task):
    scene = import_scene("my_banana_bowl.usda", contact_object_list)
    instruction = {...}
    terminations = MyBananaTerminations
    subtasks = [...]
鍒嗗伐鎻愰啋锛氭湰鑺傚彧璇存槑浠诲姟濡備綍鎺ュ叆鐜瑁呴厤锛涘畬鏁?Task 鐢熸垚銆佽娉曢獙璇併€佽祫浜ч獙璇佸拰淇鎻愮ず瑙?[EXPLAIN_03_task_generation_validation.md](./EXPLAIN_03_task_generation_validation.md)銆?

鍏抽敭鐐癸細浠诲姟鏂囦欢涓嶉渶瑕佸啓鏈哄櫒浜哄拰鐩告満銆傛満鍣ㄤ汉銆佸姩浣滅┖闂淬€佽娴嬨€佺浉鏈恒€佺伅鍏夈€佽儗鏅兘鍦ㄦ敞鍐岄樁娈电粺涓€瑁呴厤銆?/p>

5. 跟论文三句话逐句对应¶

璁烘枃琛ㄨ堪 浠ｇ爜瀹炵幇 杈撳叆 杈撳嚭
鍦ㄥ伐浣滅┖闂翠腑瀹氫綅鍜屽畾鍚戠墿浣撴潵鍒涘缓鍦烘櫙 predicates.py + SpatialSolver + PhysicalSolver + USDA 鐢熸垚 object catalog銆佽皳璇?JSON銆乥ase scene solved poses銆?code>*.usda
灏嗕换鍔″畾涔変负鍦烘櫙涓洰鏍囩姸鎬佺殑璇█鎸囦护 tasks/benchmark/*.py + conditionals.py + subtask.py scene 鏂囦欢銆佸璞″悕銆佺洰鏍囪皳璇嶃€乮nstruction variants Task 绫汇€佹垚鍔熸潯浠躲€乻ubtask score
閫氳繃閫夋嫨鏈哄櫒浜恒€佺瓥鐣ヤ互鍙婂満鏅壒寰佸彉鍖栧疄渚嬪寲鐜 auto_env_registrations_jointpos.py + config.py + runtime.py + runner.py Task銆乺obot/action/obs/camera/light/background/policy RobolabEnv銆?code>env_cfg.json銆佽棰戙€丠DF5銆丣SONL

涓€鍙ヨ瘽璁板繂锛?/p> 

Scene = objects + poses + USD
Task = scene + instruction + success predicate + subtasks
Env = task + robot + observations + actions + cameras + light + background + policy runner

0.9 论文精讲：扩展任务生成、验证和自动修复¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_03_task_generation_validation.md锛屽搴旇鏂囬噷鐨?TaskGen 闂幆锛氬厛缁?LLM 鍦烘櫙瀵硅薄銆佽兘鍔涜酱銆佷换鍔＄ず渚嬪拰璋撹瘝搴擄紝璁╁畠鐢熸垚 Task Python 浠ｇ爜锛涘啀鍋氳娉曘€佽祫浜с€佸鍣ㄥ昂瀵哥瓑楠岃瘉锛涘け璐ュ悗鎶婂師濮嬫彁绀恒€佹棤鏁堣緭鍑哄拰閿欒淇℃伅閲嶆柊鎵撳寘缁?LLM 淇銆?/p>

精讲 3：扩展任务生成、验证和自动修复，代码怎么实现¶

棰滆壊鏍囪瘑锛氱豢鑹茶〃绀烘牳蹇冪粨璁猴紝钃濊壊琛ㄧず婧愮爜/杈撳叆杈撳嚭璺緞锛屾鑹茶〃绀鸿竟鐣屻€侀闄╁拰瀹规槗璇В鐨勭偣銆?

先说结论¶

璁烘枃杩欐璁茬殑鏄?TaskGen 鐨勯棴鐜?/strong>锛?/p> 

缁?LLM 瓒冲涓婁笅鏂?
  -> LLM 鐢熸垚 RoboLab Task Python 浠ｇ爜
  -> 妫€鏌?Python 璇硶
  -> 妫€鏌ュ璞?鍦烘櫙/瀹瑰櫒/鐗╃悊鍙鎬?
  -> 澶辫触鏃舵妸鍘熷鎻愮ず銆佹棤鏁堣緭鍑恒€侀敊璇俊鎭墦鍖呮垚淇鎻愮ず
  -> 璁?LLM 閲嶅啓锛屽啀閲嶅楠岃瘉
鏍稿績缁撹锛歍askGen 涓嶆槸鈥滆 LLM 涓€娆″啓瀹屽氨鐩镐俊瀹冣€濓紝鑰屾槸鈥滅敓鎴愪唬鐮?-> 鑷姩楠岃瘉 -> 鎶婇敊璇弽棣堝洖 LLM -> 閲嶅啓鈥濓紝鐩村埌璇硶銆佽祫浜у拰鐗╃悊鍙鎬ч兘杩囧叧銆?

褰撳墠 RoboLab checkout 閲岋紝杩欎釜娴佺▼涓嶆槸涓€涓崟鐙殑 run_taskgen.py 澶ц剼鏈紝鑰屾槸鍒嗘暎鍦ㄥ嚑绫绘枃浠堕噷锛?/p>

鍔熻兘 褰撳墠瀹炵幇浣嶇疆 璇存槑
LLM 浠诲姟鐢熸垚鎻愮ず/妯℃澘 skills/robolab-taskgen/SKILL.md 瀹氫箟璁?LLM 鐢熸垚浠€涔堛€侀棶鐢ㄦ埛浠€涔堛€佽緭鍑轰粈涔?/td>
浠诲姟绀轰緥 skills/robolab-taskgen/references/examples.md 绠€鍗?pick/place銆佸鐗╀綋鎺掑簭銆佹湁搴忓爢鍙?/td>
璋撹瘝搴撹鏄?/td> skills/robolab-taskgen/references/conditionals.md + robolab/core/task/conditionals.py 鎴愬姛鏉′欢銆佺粓姝㈡潯浠躲€乻ubtask 鏉′欢
Python 璇硶/瀵煎叆楠岃瘉 compile(...)銆?code>robolab/core/task/task_utils.py::load_task_from_file 妫€鏌ヤ唬鐮佽兘涓嶈兘浣滀负 Task 绫诲姞杞?/td>
metadata/闅惧害缁熻 robolab/tasks/_utils/generate_task_metadata.py + load_task_info.py 鐢熸垚 task_metadata.json銆丆SV銆丷EADME
鍦烘櫙璧勬簮楠岃瘉 robolab/core/scenes/utils.py::scrape_scene/import_scene 妫€鏌?USD 鍦烘櫙閲屾湁鍝簺瀵硅薄
鍦烘櫙/鐗╃悊鍙嶉 robolab/scene_gen/llm_scene_gen/feedback_system.py 缁?LLM 杩斿洖纰版挒銆佽秺鐣屻€佷笉绋冲畾绛夊弽棣?/td>
浠跨湡 smoke examples/run_empty.py --task <TaskClassName> 鐪熺殑鍚姩 Isaac锛屾鏌ユ敞鍐屽拰杩愯鏄惁閫?/td>
婧愮爜鍏ュ彛锛歍askGen 鍏堢湅 skills/robolab-taskgen/SKILL.md銆?code>references/examples.md銆?code>references/conditionals.md锛涢獙璇侀摼璺啀鐪?task_utils.py::load_task_from_file銆?code>core/scenes/utils.py::scrape_scene/import_scene 鍜?scene_gen/.../feedback_system.py銆?

璇翠汉璇濓細LLM 璐熻矗缂栦唬鐮侊紝RoboLab 璐熻矗鎶婁唬鐮佸彉鎴愬彲杩愯 Task锛涢獙璇佸眰璐熻矗鍛婅瘔 LLM 鍝釜瀵硅薄涓嶅瓨鍦ㄣ€佸摢涓鍣ㄨ涓嶄笅銆佸摢涓皳璇嶅啓閿欎簡銆?/strong>

1. LLM 输入：TaskGen 给模型什么信息¶

璁烘枃璇寸粰 LLM 浜旂被涓婁笅鏂囷紝褰撳墠浠ｇ爜/skill 瀵瑰簲濡備笅锛?/p>

璁烘枃閲岀殑杈撳叆 褰撳墠瀵瑰簲鏉ユ簮 鐢ㄩ€?/th>
鍦烘櫙瀵硅薄鐩綍鍜屽昂瀵稿厓鏁版嵁 assets/objects/object_catalog.json銆?code>assets/scenes/_metadata/scene_metadata.json銆?code>scrape_scene() 鐭ラ亾瀵硅薄鍚嶃€佸昂瀵搞€乁SD 璺緞銆佺墿鐞嗗睘鎬?/td>
浠诲姟缁撴瀯绀轰緥 skills/robolab-taskgen/references/examples.md銆?code>robolab/tasks/benchmark/*.py 璁?LLM 妯′豢 Task 鏂囦欢鏍煎紡
瀛愪换鍔℃垚鍔?缁堟璋撹瘝搴?/td> references/conditionals.md銆?code>conditionals.py 鎶婅嚜鐒惰瑷€鐩爣鏄犲皠鎴?object_in_container 绛夊嚱鏁?/td>
鑳藉姏杞磋瑷€妯℃澘 taskgen skill 鐨?instruction variants銆乤ttributes 鐢熸垚 default/vague/specific 鍜?color/spatial/sorting/stacking 鏍囩
闅惧害鍜岀墿鐞嗗彲琛屾€х害鏉?/td> episode_length_s 瑙勫垯銆?code>compute_difficulty_score銆佸鍣?鍫嗗彔灏哄妫€鏌?/td> 閬垮厤鐢熸垚涓嶅彲鑳藉畬鎴愭垨涓嶅彲璇勪及鐨勪换鍔?/td>

skills/robolab-taskgen/SKILL.md 瀵逛换鍔℃枃浠剁殑瀹氫箟寰堟槑纭細

涓€涓?task 鏄?Python 鏂囦欢锛岄噷闈㈡湁 Task dataclass锛屾妸 USD 鍦烘櫙缁戝畾鍒拌瑷€鎸囦护鍜?termination criteria銆?/p>

瀹冪粰 LLM 鐨勬ā鏉挎牳蹇冩槸锛?/p> 

@configclass
class <TaskName>Terminations:
    time_out = DoneTerm(func=mdp.time_out, time_out=True)
    success = DoneTerm(
        func=<conditional_function>,
        params={<params_dict>},
    )

@dataclass
class <TaskName>Task(Task):
    contact_object_list = [<all_object_names>]
    scene = import_scene("<scene_file>.usda", contact_object_list)
    terminations = <TaskName>Terminations
    instruction = {
        "default": "<clear instruction>",
        "vague": "<ambiguous instruction>",
        "specific": "<detailed instruction>",
    }
    episode_length_s: int = <seconds>
    attributes = [<attribute_tags>]
    subtasks = [<optional_subtasks>]

2. 生成：从能力轴和语言模板到 Task 代码¶

鑷劧璇█鐩爣棣栧厛琚矾鐢卞埌涓€涓皳璇嶅嚱鏁帮細

浠诲姟鎻忚堪 termination 鍑芥暟 subtask 鍐欐硶
鈥淧ut X in Y鈥?/td> object_in_container pick_and_place
鈥淧ut X on Y鈥?/td> object_on_top pick_and_place_on_surface
鈥淢ove X left/right of Y鈥?/td> object_left_of / object_right_of Subtask(partial(...))
鈥淪ort X into bins鈥?/td> object_groups_in_containers 澶氫釜 pick_and_place
鈥淪tack X, Y, Z鈥?/td> stacked 澶氫釜 Subtask(partial(stacked, ...))
鈥淭ake X out of Y鈥?/td> object_outside_of Subtask(partial(...))
鈥淪tand X upright鈥?/td> object_upright Subtask(partial(...))

示例：生成一个颜色分类任务¶

杈撳叆淇℃伅鍙互缁勭粐鎴愯繖鏍凤細

{
  "scene": "rubiks_cube_banana_bowl_mug_bin.usda",
  "objects": ["mug", "bowl", "grey_bin", "banana", "rubiks_cube", "table"],
  "axis": ["visual.color", "relational.sorting"],
  "instruction_template": "Put all the {color} things in the {container}",
  "slots": {
    "color": "red",
    "container": "grey_bin",
    "target_objects": ["mug", "bowl"]
  },
  "difficulty": "moderate",
  "constraints": {
    "all_target_objects_must_fit_container": true,
    "require_gripper_detached": true
  }
}

LLM 搴旇緭鍑虹被浼硷細

@configclass
class RedItemsInBinTerminations:
    time_out = DoneTerm(func=mdp.time_out, time_out=True)
    success = DoneTerm(
        func=object_in_container,
        params={
            "object": ["mug", "bowl"],
            "container": "grey_bin",
            "logical": "all",
            "require_gripper_detached": True,
        },
    )

@dataclass
class RedItemsInBinTask(Task):
    contact_object_list = ["mug", "bowl", "grey_bin", "table", "banana", "rubiks_cube"]
    scene = import_scene("rubiks_cube_banana_bowl_mug_bin.usda", contact_object_list)
    terminations = RedItemsInBinTerminations
    instruction = {
        "default": "Put all the red things in the grey bin",
        "vague": "Sort items by color",
        "specific": "Identify every red-colored object on the table and place each one into the grey bin",
    }
    episode_length_s: int = 60
    attributes = ["color", "sorting"]
    subtasks = [
        pick_and_place(object=["mug", "bowl"], container="grey_bin", logical="all", score=1.0)
    ]

杩欎釜鐢熸垚缁撴灉瀵瑰簲鎴戜滑宸茬粡璺戣繃鐨?RedItemsInBinTask銆傚畠鍦ㄥ鏉備换鍔″疄娴嬮噷澶辫触锛屽け璐ュ師鍥犱笉鏄?Task 浠ｇ爜鏃犳晥锛岃€屾槸绛栫暐娌℃湁鍦?900 姝ュ唴瀹屾垚鎵€鏈夌孩鑹茬墿浣撳叆鐩掋€?/p>

3. 语法验证：先保证 Python 文件能被加载¶

鏈€浣庢垚鏈獙璇佹槸 Python 缂栬瘧锛?/p> 

compile(generated_code, "generated_task.py", "exec")

瀹冭兘鎶擄細

  • 鎷彿娌￠棴鍚堬紱
  • 缂╄繘閿欒锛?/li>
  • 瀛楃涓插紩鍙烽敊璇紱
  • 闈炴硶 Python 璇硶銆?/li>

鏇存帴杩?RoboLab 鐨勯獙璇佹槸鍔犺浇 Task 绫伙細

from robolab.core.task.task_utils import load_task_from_file

task_class = load_task_from_file("generated_task.py", allow_multiple=False)

load_task_from_file() 浼氾細

  1. 鐢?importlib.util.spec_from_file_location 瀵煎叆 Python 鏂囦欢銆?/li>
  2. 鎵弿妯″潡閲屾墍鏈夌被銆?/li>
  3. 鎵惧埌 issubclass(attr, Task) 涓斾笉鏄熀绫?Task 鐨勭被銆?/li>
  4. 娌℃壘鍒板氨鎶?No Task subclass found銆?/li>

鎵€浠ュ畠涓嶅彧鏄娉曟鏌ワ紝杩樿兘鍙戠幇锛?/p>

  • 娌″啓 Task 瀛愮被锛?/li>
  • class 鍚嶅啓閿欙紱
  • import 閿欙紱
  • @dataclass 涓彲鍙橀粯璁ゅ€煎啓娉曞鑷村鍏ュけ璐ャ€?/li>

4. 资源验证：对象是否存在、是否禁用、容器是否装得下¶

璁烘枃閲岃鐨勮祫婧愰獙璇佸寘鍚袱绫伙細

  1. 瀵硅薄寮曠敤楠岃瘉锛氫换鍔′唬鐮侀噷寮曠敤鐨勫璞″繀椤诲瓨鍦ㄤ簬鍦烘櫙瀵硅薄闆嗗悎涓紝涔熶笉鑳借惤鍏ョ鐢ㄩ泦鍚堛€?/li>
  2. 鐗╃悊鍙鎬ч獙璇?/strong>锛氫緥濡傚鍣ㄤ换鍔￠噷锛屽唴閮ㄥ璞¤鑳芥斁杩涘鍣紝骞剁暀鍑?margin銆?/li>

褰撳墠 RoboLab 鎻愪緵浜?scrape_scene() / import_scene() 浠?USD 鍦烘櫙涓彁鍙栧璞★細

from robolab.core.scenes.utils import scrape_scene

scene_info = scrape_scene("assets/scenes/rubiks_cube_banana_bowl_mug_bin.usda")
available_objects = set(scene_info["dynamic_bodies"] + scene_info["kinematic_bodies"] + scene_info["static_bodies"])

import_scene(scene_path, objects_of_interest) 浼氬彧鎶?objects_of_interest 閲岀殑瀵硅薄杞垚 RigidObjectCfg / AssetBaseCfg銆傚鏋滃璞″悕涓嶅湪鍦烘櫙閲岋紝鍚庨潰鍒涘缓 contact sensor 鎴?env 鏃跺氨浼氬け璐ャ€?/p>

璁烘枃鎻愬埌鐨勨€滅鐢ㄩ泦鍚堚€濆拰鈥滃鍣ㄥ昂瀵?margin鈥濆湪褰撳墠 checkout 閲屾病鏈夌湅鍒颁竴涓粺涓€鐨勫叕寮€ TaskValidator 绫伙紱瀹為檯宸ョ▼涓婂彲浠ュ湪 LLM 杈撳嚭钀界洏鍓嶈ˉ涓€涓交閲忛獙璇佸眰锛?/p>

娉ㄦ剰杈圭晫锛氬綋鍓嶅叕寮€ checkout 閲?TaskGen 楠岃瘉鑳藉姏鏄垎鏁ｇ殑锛屼笉鏄竴涓畬鏁村叕寮€鐨?TaskValidator 澶х被銆傝交閲忔祴璇曡兘鎻愬墠鎷︽埅鏄庢樉閿欒锛屼絾涓嶈兘鏇夸唬 Isaac Sim 閲岀殑鐪熷疄娉ㄥ唽銆佹帴瑙︿紶鎰熷櫒鍜岀墿鐞?smoke銆? 
def validate_objects(task_objects, scene_objects, disabled_objects):
    errors = []
    missing = sorted(set(task_objects) - set(scene_objects))
    disabled = sorted(set(task_objects) & set(disabled_objects))
    if missing:
        errors.append(f"Objects not found in scene: {missing}")
    if disabled:
        errors.append(f"Objects are disabled for task generation: {disabled}")
    return errors

def validate_container_fit(objects, container, dims, margin=0.02):
    errors = []
    cx, cy, cz = dims[container]
    usable_x = cx - 2 * margin
    usable_y = cy - 2 * margin
    for obj in objects:
        ox, oy, oz = dims[obj]
        # 淇濆畧妫€鏌ワ細鍏佽鐗╀綋鏃嬭浆锛屽彇杈冪煭杈瑰杈冪煭杈广€佽緝闀胯竟瀵硅緝闀胯竟銆?/span>
        obj_short, obj_long = sorted([ox, oy])
        box_short, box_long = sorted([usable_x, usable_y])
        if obj_short > box_short or obj_long > box_long:
            errors.append(
                f"{obj} ({ox:.2f}x{oy:.2f}) does not fit into {container} "
                f"usable opening ({usable_x:.2f}x{usable_y:.2f}) with margin={margin}"
            )
    return errors

杩欎釜妫€鏌ヤ笉鏇夸唬 Isaac Sim 鐗╃悊楠岃瘉锛屼絾鍙互鎻愬墠鎷︽帀鏄庢樉涓嶅彲鑳界殑浠诲姟銆?/p>

5. 修复提示：把错误反馈给 LLM¶

璁烘枃閲岀殑淇鎻愮ず鍙互鍐欐垚锛?/p> 

Original prompt Q:
<鍘熷浠诲姟鐢熸垚璇锋眰>

Invalid output:
<LLM 涓婁竴娆＄敓鎴愮殑 Python 浠ｇ爜>

Validation errors E:
1. SyntaxError: '(' was never closed
2. Objects not found in scene: ['apple']
3. mug does not fit into small_box with margin=0.02

Please revise the RoboLab task. Requirements:
- Keep the same scene unless the error says the scene is invalid.
- Use only objects that exist in the scene and are not disabled.
- For container tasks, choose target objects that physically fit.
- Return one complete Python task file only.

杩欎釜寰幆鍜?scene_gen 閲岀殑 FeedbackSystem 鎬濊矾涓€鑷达細澶辫触鏃朵笉瑕佸彧璇粹€滀笉琛屸€濓紝瑕佸憡璇?LLM 鍏蜂綋鍝釜璋撹瘝銆佸摢涓璞°€佸摢涓昂瀵告垨鍝璇硶閿欎簡銆?/p>

6. 完整闭环伪代码¶

def taskgen_loop(prompt, scene_objects, object_dims, disabled_objects, max_rounds=3):
    q = build_initial_prompt(
        prompt=prompt,
        scene_objects=scene_objects,
        object_dims=object_dims,
        examples=TASK_EXAMPLES,
        conditionals=CONDITIONAL_LIBRARY,
        axis_templates=CAPABILITY_AXIS_TEMPLATES,
        constraints=PHYSICAL_CONSTRAINTS,
    )

    last_output = None
    last_errors = []

    for round_idx in range(max_rounds):
        generated_code = llm(q)
        errors = []

        errors += validate_python_syntax(generated_code)
        if not errors:
            spec = extract_task_spec(generated_code)
            errors += validate_objects(
                task_objects=spec.contact_object_list,
                scene_objects=scene_objects,
                disabled_objects=disabled_objects,
            )
            errors += validate_conditionals(spec)
            errors += validate_container_fit_from_spec(spec, object_dims)

        if not errors:
            return generated_code

        last_output = generated_code
        last_errors = errors
        q = build_repair_prompt(
            original_prompt=prompt,
            invalid_output=last_output,
            errors=last_errors,
        )

    raise RuntimeError(f"Task generation failed after {max_rounds} rounds: {last_errors}")

7. 和 RoboLab 当前代码逐步对应¶

璁烘枃姝ラ 褰撳墠浠ｇ爜/鍙ˉ楠岃瘉
鐢熸垚浠诲姟浠ｇ爜 skills/robolab-taskgen/SKILL.md 鐨勬ā鏉?+ examples + conditionals
楠岃瘉浠ｇ爜璇硶 compile(...)锛屼互鍙?task_utils.load_task_from_file()
楠岃瘉鍦烘櫙璧勬簮閫夋嫨 scrape_scene() / import_scene() + contact_object_list 瀵规瘮
楠岃瘉瀹瑰櫒灏哄 鍙熀浜?object_catalog.json / scene metadata 鐨?dims 澧炲姞 margin 妫€鏌?/td>
鐢熸垚浠诲姟 metadata generate_task_metadata.py銆?code>load_task_info.py
浠跨湡 smoke examples/run_empty.py --task <TaskClassName>
澶辫触鍙嶉淇 FeedbackSystem 鎬濊矾 + repair prompt

8. 额外测试用例设计¶

涓嬮潰杩欎簺娴嬭瘯涓嶉渶瑕佸惎鍔?Isaac Sim锛岄€傚悎鏀惧湪 notebook 閲屽揩閫熻窇锛岀敤鏉ラ獙璇?TaskGen 鐢熸垚鍓嶅悗鐨勨€滆交閲?gate鈥濓細

娴嬭瘯 杈撳叆 鏈熸湜
test_valid_spec_passes banana銆乥owl銆乼able 閮藉湪 scene锛宐anana 鑳芥斁杩?bowl 0 涓敊璇?/td>
test_syntax_error_fails 灏戜竴涓彸鎷彿鐨?Python 浠ｇ爜 杩斿洖 SyntaxError
test_missing_object_fails task 寮曠敤 apple锛宻cene 娌℃湁 apple 杩斿洖 missing object
test_disabled_object_fails task 寮曠敤 knife锛岀鐢ㄩ泦鍚堝惈 knife 杩斿洖 disabled object
test_container_too_small_fails large_box 鏀捐繘 small_bowl 杩斿洖 does not fit
test_repair_prompt_contains_context Q銆佹棤鏁堜唬鐮併€侀敊璇?E 淇鎻愮ず鍖呭惈涓夎€?/td>

杩欎簺娴嬭瘯楠岃瘉鐨勬槸 TaskGen 鐨勫墠缃川閲忛棬锛屼笉鏄渶缁堟満鍣ㄤ汉绛栫暐鎴愬姛鐜囥€傜湡姝ｈ璇佹槑浠诲姟鍙繍琛岋紝杩樿璺?examples/run_empty.py --task <TaskClassName>銆?/p>

In [ ]:
# ===== 绮捐3锛歍askGen 杞婚噺楠岃瘉娴嬭瘯 =====
# 杩欑粍娴嬭瘯涓嶅惎鍔?Isaac Sim锛屽彧楠岃瘉璁烘枃 TaskGen 闂幆閲岀殑鍓嶇疆妫€鏌ラ€昏緫锛?/span>
# 1. Python 浠ｇ爜璇硶鏄惁鏈夋晥锛?/span>
# 2. 浠诲姟寮曠敤鐨勫璞℃槸鍚﹀瓨鍦ㄤ簬鍦烘櫙涓紱
# 3. 鏄惁璇敤浜嗙鐢ㄥ璞★紱
# 4. 瀹瑰櫒浠诲姟閲岀洰鏍囩墿浣撴槸鍚﹁兘鏀捐繘瀹瑰櫒锛屽苟鐣欏嚭 margin锛?/span>
# 5. 澶辫触鏃舵槸鍚﹁兘鏋勯€犲寘鍚?Q / invalid output / E 鐨勪慨澶嶆彁绀恒€?/span>

def validate_python_syntax(code_text: str) -> list[str]:
    '''妫€鏌?LLM 鐢熸垚鐨勪换鍔℃枃浠舵槸鍚﹁嚦灏戞槸鍚堟硶 Python 浠ｇ爜銆?''
    try:
        compile(code_text, "generated_task.py", "exec")
        return []
    except SyntaxError as exc:
        return [f"SyntaxError: {exc.msg} at line {exc.lineno}"]


def validate_objects(task_objects, scene_objects, disabled_objects):
    '''妫€鏌ヤ换鍔′腑寮曠敤鐨勫璞℃槸鍚﹀瓨鍦ㄤ簬鍦烘櫙涓紝骞朵笖涓嶅湪绂佺敤闆嗗悎閲屻€?''
    errors = []
    missing = sorted(set(task_objects) - set(scene_objects))
    disabled = sorted(set(task_objects) & set(disabled_objects))
    if missing:
        errors.append(f"Objects not found in scene: {missing}")
    if disabled:
        errors.append(f"Objects are disabled for task generation: {disabled}")
    return errors


def validate_container_fit(objects, container, dims, margin=0.02):
    '''淇濆畧妫€鏌ュ鍣ㄤ换鍔℃槸鍚︾墿鐞嗗彲琛岋細鐩爣鐗╀綋骞抽潰灏哄瑕佸皬浜庡鍣ㄥ彲鐢ㄥ紑鍙ｃ€?''
    errors = []
    if container not in dims:
        return [f"Container not found in dims: {container}"]
    cx, cy, _ = dims[container]
    usable_x = cx - 2 * margin
    usable_y = cy - 2 * margin
    for obj in objects:
        if obj not in dims:
            errors.append(f"Object dim missing: {obj}")
            continue
        ox, oy, _ = dims[obj]
        # 鍏佽鐗╀綋鍦ㄦ闈㈠钩闈㈡棆杞紝鎵€浠ョ煭杈瑰鐭竟銆侀暱杈瑰闀胯竟銆?/span>
        obj_short, obj_long = sorted([ox, oy])
        box_short, box_long = sorted([usable_x, usable_y])
        if obj_short > box_short or obj_long > box_long:
            errors.append(
                f"{obj} ({ox:.2f}x{oy:.2f}) does not fit into {container} "
                f"usable opening ({usable_x:.2f}x{usable_y:.2f}) with margin={margin}"
            )
    return errors


def build_repair_prompt(original_prompt, invalid_output, errors):
    '''鎶婇獙璇佸け璐ヤ俊鎭暣鐞嗘垚缁?LLM 鐨勪慨澶嶆彁绀猴紝瀵瑰簲璁烘枃閲岀殑 Q + invalid output + E銆?''
    return "\n".join(
        [
            "Original prompt Q:",
            original_prompt.strip(),
            "",
            "Invalid output:",
            invalid_output.strip(),
            "",
            "Validation errors E:",
            *[f"{idx + 1}. {err}" for idx, err in enumerate(errors)],
            "",
            "Please revise the RoboLab task. Return one complete Python task file only.",
        ]
    )


VALID_CODE = "from dataclasses import dataclass\n@dataclass\nclass DummyTask:\n    pass\n"
BAD_CODE = "def broken_task(\n    return 1\n"

SCENE_OBJECTS = {
    "banana",
    "bowl",
    "table",
    "grey_bin",
    "mug",
    "rubiks_cube",
    "knife",
    "large_box",
    "small_bowl",
}
DISABLED_OBJECTS = {"knife"}
DIMS = {
    "banana": (0.18, 0.04, 0.04),
    "bowl": (0.24, 0.24, 0.11),
    "grey_bin": (0.36, 0.28, 0.16),
    "mug": (0.08, 0.08, 0.10),
    "large_box": (0.30, 0.22, 0.12),
    "small_bowl": (0.18, 0.18, 0.08),
}

taskgen_tests = []
taskgen_tests.append(
    (
        "valid_spec_passes",
        validate_python_syntax(VALID_CODE) == []
        and validate_objects(["banana", "bowl"], SCENE_OBJECTS, DISABLED_OBJECTS) == []
        and validate_container_fit(["banana"], "bowl", DIMS) == [],
    )
)
taskgen_tests.append(
    ("syntax_error_fails", any("SyntaxError" in err for err in validate_python_syntax(BAD_CODE)))
)
taskgen_tests.append(
    ("missing_object_fails", any("apple" in err for err in validate_objects(["apple"], SCENE_OBJECTS, DISABLED_OBJECTS)))
)
taskgen_tests.append(
    ("disabled_object_fails", any("knife" in err for err in validate_objects(["knife"], SCENE_OBJECTS, DISABLED_OBJECTS)))
)
taskgen_tests.append(
    ("container_too_small_fails", any("does not fit" in err for err in validate_container_fit(["large_box"], "small_bowl", DIMS)))
)

repair_prompt = build_repair_prompt(
    "Generate a RoboLab sorting task.",
    BAD_CODE,
    validate_python_syntax(BAD_CODE),
)
taskgen_tests.append(
    (
        "repair_prompt_contains_context",
        all(
            required in repair_prompt
            for required in ["Original prompt Q", "Invalid output", "Validation errors E", "SyntaxError"]
        ),
    )
)

for test_name, ok in taskgen_tests:
    print(f"{test_name}: {'PASS' if ok else 'FAIL'}")

assert all(ok for _, ok in taskgen_tests), taskgen_tests
write_status(
    "taskgen_lightweight_validation_tests",
    {
        "all_passed": all(ok for _, ok in taskgen_tests),
        "tests": [{"name": name, "passed": ok} for name, ok in taskgen_tests],
        "boundary": "This is a lightweight pre-Isaac validation test; it does not replace full simulation smoke.",
    },
)

0.10 论文精讲：能力轴、任务属性、子任务和难度分数¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_04_competency_axes_difficulty.md锛屽搴旇鏂?III-B Benchmark Design锛歷isual / procedural / relational 涓夋潯鑳藉姏杞淬€佸鏍囩浠诲姟灞炴€с€乻ubtask 骞惰浜嬩欢锛屼互鍙?difficulty_score = num_subtasks + max(w) 鐨勯毦搴﹀垎鏁般€?/p>

精讲 4：能力轴、任务属性、子任务和难度分数，代码怎么实现¶

棰滆壊鏍囪瘑锛氱豢鑹茶〃绀烘牳蹇冪粨璁猴紝钃濊壊琛ㄧず婧愮爜/杈撳叆杈撳嚭璺緞锛屾鑹茶〃绀鸿竟鐣屻€侀闄╁拰瀹规槗璇В鐨勭偣銆?

先说结论¶

璁烘枃杩欎竴娈佃鐨勬槸 RoboLab-120 鐨勨€滀换鍔＄粍缁囨柟寮忊€濓細瀹冧笉鍙槸鍒?120 涓换鍔★紝鐒跺悗鐪嬫€讳綋鎴愬姛鐜囷紝鑰屾槸缁欐瘡涓换鍔¤创涓婁竴涓垨澶氫釜灞炴€ф爣绛撅紝鍐嶆妸杩欎簺鏍囩褰掑埌涓夋潯鑳藉姏杞达細

鑳藉姏杞?/th> 鍏虫敞浠€涔?/th> 鍏稿瀷灞炴€?/th>
Visual 妯″瀷鑳戒笉鑳借瘑鍒鑹层€佽涔夈€佸ぇ灏忥紝骞舵妸鎰熺煡灞炴€х敤浜庢帹鐞?/td> color, semantics, size
Procedural 妯″瀷鑳戒笉鑳芥墽琛屽甫鍔ㄤ綔瀵煎悜鎺ㄧ悊鐨勪换鍔★紝渚嬪鍙緵鎬с€侀噸瀹氬悜銆佸爢鍙犮€佸垎绫?/td> affordance, reorientation, stacking, sorting
Relational 妯″瀷鑳戒笉鑳界悊瑙ｅ瀵硅薄璇█銆佽鏁板拰绌洪棿鍏崇郴 conjunction, counting, spatial
鏍稿績缁撹锛歊oboLab 鐨勪换鍔′笉鏄崟鏍囩鍒嗙被銆備竴涓换鍔″彲浠ュ悓鏃舵槸 visual + procedural锛屼緥濡?RedItemsInBinTask 鍚屾椂鑰冮鑹茶瘑鍒拰澶氬璞″垎绫伙紱闅惧害涔熶笉鏄墜鍐欎富瑙傜瓑绾э紝鑰屾槸鐢?num_subtasks + max(skill_weight) 璁＄畻鍑烘潵銆?

杩欓儴鍒嗗搴斾唬鐮佷富绾挎槸锛?/p> 

Task.attributes
  -> BENCHMARK_TASK_CATEGORIES / SKILL_WEIGHTS
  -> Task.subtasks
  -> count_subtasks()
  -> compute_difficulty_score()
  -> task_metadata.json / task_table.csv / README.md
  -> 缁撴灉鍒嗘瀽鎸?visual/procedural/relational/simple/moderate/complex 鍒嗙粍

1. 能力轴：不是互斥分类，而是多标签诊断¶

璁烘枃璇翠换浣曞崟涓换鍔￠兘寰堥毦鈥滃彧璇勪及涓€涓睘鎬р€濄€備唬鐮侀噷瀵瑰簲鐨勬槸 Task.attributes锛?/p> 

@dataclass
class BananaInBowlTask(Task):
    attributes = ["semantics"]

@dataclass
class RedItemsInBinTask(Task):
    attributes = ["color", "sorting"]

@dataclass
class RubiksCubeLeftOfBowlTask(Task):
    attributes = ["spatial"]

@dataclass
class Stack3RubiksCubeTask(Task):
    attributes = ["stacking"]

杩欎簺灞炴€у啀鐢?robolab/constants.py 鏄犲皠鍒拌兘鍔涜酱锛?/p> 

BENCHMARK_TASK_CATEGORIES = {
    "size": "visual",
    "color": "visual",
    "semantics": "visual",
    "spatial": "relational",
    "conjunction": "relational",
    "counting": "relational",
    "stacking": "procedural",
    "sorting": "procedural",
    "reorientation": "procedural",
    "affordance": "procedural",
}
婧愮爜鍏ュ彛锛氬睘鎬у啓鍦?robolab/tasks/benchmark/*.py 鐨?Task.attributes锛涜兘鍔涜酱鏄犲皠鍦?robolab/constants.py::BENCHMARK_TASK_CATEGORIES锛沵etadata 姹囨€诲湪 robolab/tasks/_utils/load_task_info.py銆?

璇翠汉璇濓細attributes 鏄换鍔＄殑鈥滆瘖鏂爣绛锯€濄€傚畠鍛婅瘔鎴戜滑涓€娆″け璐ユ洿鍙兘鏆撮湶鍝被鑳藉姏鐭澘锛氳瘑鍒敊棰滆壊銆佺┖闂村叧绯荤悊瑙ｉ敊銆佽繕鏄姩浣滃簭鍒?鍫嗗彔鑳藉姏涓嶈冻銆?/p>

2. Visual 能力：从“看见对象”到“用属性推理”¶

Visual 涓嶆槸鍙湅鍥惧儚璇嗗埆锛岃€屾槸鐪嬬瓥鐣ヨ兘涓嶈兘鎶婅瑙夊睘鎬ф帴鍒扮洰鏍囨帹鐞嗕笂銆?/p>

灞炴€?/th> 浠诲姟鍦ㄩ棶浠€涔?/th> 澶辫触鏃堕€氬父璇存槑浠€涔?/th>
semantics 杩欐槸棣欒晧銆佺銆佹澂瀛愯繕鏄瓟鏂?/td> 璇箟璇嗗埆鎴栬瑷€ grounding 鍑洪敊
color 鍝簺涓滆タ鏄孩鑹?钃濊壊/鎸囧畾棰滆壊 棰滆壊璇嗗埆銆侀鑹插拰瀵硅薄缁戝畾鍑洪敊
size 澶у皬鏄惁婊¤冻鐩爣 灏哄鍒ゆ柇銆侀伄鎸′笅鍑犱綍鐞嗚В涓嶈冻

渚嬪瓙锛?/p> 

RedItemsInBinTask.attributes = ["color", "sorting"]
instruction = "Put all the red things in the grey bin"
success = object_in_container(object=["mug", "bowl"], container="grey_bin", logical="all")

杩欎釜浠诲姟涓嶆槸鍗曠函鈥滅湅鍒扮孩鑹测€濆氨瀹屼簡銆傜瓥鐣ヨ繕瑕侊細

  1. 鍦ㄥ浘鍍忛噷鎵惧嚭鎵€鏈夌孩鑹茬洰鏍囥€?/li>
  2. 鎶婄孩鑹插睘鎬х粦瀹氬埌鍏蜂綋瀵硅薄瀹炰緥锛屼緥濡?mug 鍜?bowl銆?/li>
  3. 蹇界暐闈炵孩鑹插共鎵扮墿锛屼緥濡?banana銆乺ubiks cube銆?/li>
  4. 鎶婄洰鏍囧璞￠€愪釜鏀捐繘鍚屼竴涓鍣ㄣ€?/li>

鎵€浠ュ畠鍚屾椂鑰?visual 鍜?procedural銆?/p>

3. Procedural 能力：不只是知道目标，还要会执行动作链¶

Procedural 璇勪及鈥滃姩浣滃鍚戞帹鐞嗏€濄€傚畠鍏虫敞妯″瀷鏄惁鐭ラ亾鎬庢牱鍒╃敤鐗╀綋鍙緵鎬с€佹€庢牱閲嶅畾鍚戙€佹€庢牱鍫嗗彔鎴栧垎绫汇€?/p>

灞炴€?/th> 鍏稿瀷鐩爣 鍔ㄤ綔闅剧偣
affordance 浣跨敤瀵硅薄鐨勫彲渚涙€э紝渚嬪鍙斁鍏ャ€佸彲鏀拺銆佸彲鎶撳彇閮ㄤ綅 涓嶅彧鏄瘑鍒璞★紝杩樿鐞嗚В瀵硅薄鑳芥€庝箞琚搷浣?/td>
reorientation 鎶婃澂瀛愩€佸鍣ㄣ€佺墿浣撹浆姝ｆ垨杞埌鐗瑰畾鏂瑰悜 鎶撳彇濮挎€佸拰閲婃斁濮挎€侀兘鏇撮毦
stacking 鎶婂涓墿浣撳爢璧锋潵 鎺ヨЕ銆佺ǔ瀹氭€у拰涓棿鐘舵€佽姹傞珮
sorting 鎸夐鑹?绫诲埆/鐩爣瀹瑰櫒鍒嗛厤澶氫釜瀵硅薄 澶氳疆 pick-place锛岀洰鏍囬泦鍚堝鏄撴紡鎴栭敊

浠?Stack3RubiksCubeTask 涓轰緥锛?/p> 

attributes = ["stacking"]
subtasks = [
    Subtask(name="stack_any_2_cubes", logical="any", score=0.5),
    Subtask(name="stack_all_3_cubes", score=0.5),
]

绗竴闃舵鐢?logical="any"锛氫换鎰忎袱涓?cube 鍏堝爢璧锋潵閮界畻闃舵杩涘睍銆傜浜岄樁娈靛啀瑕佹眰涓変釜 cube 閮藉爢鎴愬銆傝繖鏍峰仛鐨勫ソ澶勬槸锛氬嵆浣挎渶缁堝け璐ワ紝涔熻兘鐭ラ亾绛栫暐鏄惁宸茬粡瀹屾垚浜嗛儴鍒嗚繃绋嬨€?/p>

鏍稿績鏈哄埗锛歴uccess predicate 鍙垽鏂粓鐐癸紝subtasks 璁板綍杩囩▼銆俁oboLab 鐢?subtask 璁╁け璐ユ湁灞傛锛氭槸娌℃姄鍒般€佹姄閿欏璞°€佹斁閿欎綅缃紝杩樻槸瀹屾垚浜嗗墠鍗婃浣嗛暱鏃跺簭宕╀簡銆?

4. Relational 能力：语言连接词、多对象和空间结构¶

Relational 璇勪及绛栫暐鏄惁鐞嗚В鍦烘櫙缁撴瀯鍜屽瀵硅薄璇█銆?/p>

灞炴€?/th> 鍏稿瀷鎸囦护 鍏抽敭闅剧偣
conjunction 鈥滄妸 X 鍜?Y 鏀惧埌 Z鈥?/td> 闇€瑕佸悓鏃舵弧瓒冲涓璞＄洰鏍?/td>
counting 鈥滄斁涓や釜/涓変釜瀵硅薄鈥?/td> 闇€瑕佽鏁板拰鍋滄鏉′欢
spatial 鈥滄妸 X 鏀惧埌 Y 宸﹁竟/鍙宠竟/鍓嶉潰鈥?/td> 闇€瑕佹妸璇█绌洪棿鍏崇郴鏄犲皠鍒版満鍣ㄤ汉/鍦烘櫙鍧愭爣

浠?RubiksCubeLeftOfBowlTask 涓轰緥锛?/p> 

attributes = ["spatial"]
success = object_left_of(
    object="rubiks_cube",
    reference_object="bowl",
    frame_of_reference="robot",
)

杩欓噷绛栫暐涓嶄粎瑕佹姄璧烽瓟鏂癸紝杩樿鍒ゆ柇鈥渓eft of bowl鈥濆湪鏈哄櫒浜哄弬鑰冪郴涓嬫槸浠€涔堟柟鍚戙€傜┖闂村叧绯讳换鍔＄粡甯稿け璐ュ湪涓や釜鍦版柟锛?/p>

  • 璇█鐞嗚В瀵逛簡锛屼絾鏀剧疆鏂瑰悜鍙嶄簡銆?/li>
  • 鏂瑰悜瀵逛簡锛屼絾璺濈/鎺ヨЕ/閲婃斁鐘舵€佹病鏈夋弧瓒虫垚鍔熻皳璇嶃€?/li>

5. Subtask：顺序阶段里可以包含并行事件¶

璁烘枃閲岀殑渚嬪瓙鏄細

Put the apple and orange on the plate, then put the banana in the bowl

瀹冨彲浠ユ媶鎴愶細

Stage 1: PickPlace(apple) 鍜?PickPlace(orange) 骞惰灞炰簬鍚屼竴闃舵
Stage 2: PickPlace(banana)

RoboLab 浠ｇ爜閲岀敤 Subtask 琛ㄨ揪杩欎釜缁撴瀯锛?/p> 

Subtask(
    conditions={
        "apple": [grasp, hover, drop, done],
        "orange": [grasp, hover, drop, done],
    },
    logical="all",
)

Subtask 閲屾湁涓や釜灞傛锛?/p>

灞傛 浠ｇ爜缁撴瀯 鍚箟
椤哄簭闃舵 subtasks = [stage1, stage2, ...] 鍓嶅悗闃舵缁勬垚 task horizon
骞惰缁?/td> conditions={"apple": ..., "orange": ...} 鍚屼竴闃舵鍐呭涓璞￠兘瑕?浠婚€?閫?K 涓畬鎴?/td>

logical 鍐冲畾骞惰缁勬€庝箞璁℃暟锛?/p>

logical 璁℃暟閫昏緫 渚嬪瓙
all 鎵€鏈夊璞＄粍閮借瀹屾垚 apple 鍜?orange 閮借鏀惧埌 plate
any 浠绘剰涓€涓璞＄粍瀹屾垚鍗冲彲 涓変釜 cube 閲屼换鎰忎袱涓厛褰㈡垚涓€缁勫爢鍙?/td>
choose 瀹屾垚 K 涓璞＄粍鍗冲彲 浠?5 涓墿浣撻噷閫?2 涓弧瓒崇洰鏍?/td>

6. 难度分数：任务长度 + 最难能力权重¶

璁烘枃鍏紡鍙互鍐欐垚锛?/p> 

difficulty_score = num_subtasks + max(w)

鍏朵腑 w 琛ㄧず浠诲姟灞炴€ч噷鏈€闅剧殑鑳藉姏瑕佹眰銆傚綋鍓嶄唬鐮侀噷鐨勬潈閲嶅湪 robolab/constants.py锛?/p> 

SKILL_WEIGHTS = {
    "color": 0,
    "semantics": 0,
    "size": 0,
    "conjunction": 0,
    "vague": 0,
    "spatial": 1,
    "counting": 2,
    "sorting": 2,
    "stacking": 2,
    "affordance": 2,
    "reorientation": 3,
}
DIFFICULTY_THRESHOLDS = (2, 4)

闅惧害鏍囩锛?/p>

鍒嗘暟 鏍囩
<= 2 simple
3-4 moderate
>= 5 complex

璁＄畻浣嶇疆鍦?robolab/core/task/subtask_utils.py锛?/p> 

def compute_difficulty_score(num_subtasks, attributes):
    non_diff = [a for a in attributes if a not in ("simple", "moderate", "complex")]
    skill_weight = max((SKILL_WEIGHTS.get(a, 0) for a in non_diff), default=0)
    score = num_subtasks + skill_weight
    ...
娉ㄦ剰杈圭晫锛氶毦搴﹀垎鏁版槸浠诲姟璁捐灞傞潰鐨勭矖绮掑害浼拌锛屼笉绛変簬鏌愪釜 policy 鐨勭湡瀹炲け璐ユ鐜囥€傛垜浠凡缁忓疄娴嬭繃 Stack3RubiksCubeTask 鎴愬姛銆?code>RedItemsInBinTask 澶辫触锛岃鏄庣瓥鐣ヨ〃鐜拌繕浼氬彈鍒扮墿浣撳Э鎬併€佹姄鍙栬川閲忋€佹ā鍨嬪亸濂藉拰 rollout 闀垮害褰卞搷銆?

count_subtasks(subtasks)

robolab/tasks/_metadata/task_metadata.json
robolab/tasks/_metadata/task_table.csv
robolab/tasks/README.md

杩欎簺鏂囦欢灏辨槸鍚庣画鎸夎兘鍔涜酱銆佸睘鎬у拰闅惧害绛夌骇鍋氱粨鏋滃垎鏋愮殑鍩虹銆?/p>

8. 用几个任务算一遍¶

浠诲姟 attributes subtask 璁℃暟鐩磋 max(w) score label
BananaInBowlTask ["semantics"] 1 涓?pick-place 0 1 simple
RubiksCubeLeftOfBowlTask ["spatial"] 1 涓┖闂存斁缃?/td> 1 2 simple
RedItemsInBinTask ["color", "sorting"] 2 涓璞￠兘瑕佸叆绠?/td> 2 4 moderate
Stack3RubiksCubeTask ["stacking"] 浠绘剰涓ゅ潡鍏堝爢 + 涓夊潡鍏ㄥ爢 2 4 moderate
澶嶆潅閲嶅畾鍚戦暱浠诲姟 ["reorientation", ...] 澶氶樁娈靛姩浣滈摼 3 閫氬父 >=5 complex

璇翠汉璇濓細num_subtasks 琛￠噺鈥滀换鍔℃湁澶氶暱鈥濓紝max(w) 琛￠噺鈥滄渶闅炬帹鐞?鐏靛阀瑕佹眰鏄粈涔堚€濄€備袱鑰呯浉鍔狅紝灏辨槸 RoboLab 缁欑敤鎴峰揩閫熸壂缁撴灉鐢ㄧ殑 difficulty label銆?/p>

9. 分析结果时该怎么看¶

涓嶈鍙湅鎬讳綋 success rate銆傛洿鏈変环鍊肩殑鍒囨硶鏄細

  1. 鎸夎兘鍔涜酱鐪?/strong>锛歷isual / procedural / relational 鍝潯杞存帀鍒嗘渶澶с€?/li>
  2. 鎸夌粏绮掑害灞炴€х湅锛氭槸 color 宸紝杩樻槸 spatial 宸紝杩樻槸 stacking 宸€?/li>
  3. 鎸夐毦搴︾湅锛歴imple 鏄惁鎺ヨ繎楗卞拰锛宮oderate 鏄惁寮€濮嬫帀锛宑omplex 鏄惁鍑犱箮澶辫触銆?/li>
  4. 鎸?subtask 鐪?/strong>锛氬け璐ュ彂鐢熷湪 grasp銆乭over銆乨rop銆乨one 鍝釜闃舵銆?/li>
  5. 鎸夊満鏅瀯鎴愮湅锛氱墿浣撴暟閲忋€佸共鎵扮墿銆佸鍣ㄥぇ灏忋€佽儗鏅?鍏夌収鏄惁鏀瑰彉鎴愬姛鐜囥€?/li>
涓€鍙ヨ瘽璁板繂锛氳兘鍔涜酱鍥炵瓟鈥滄ā鍨嬪急鍦ㄥ摢绫昏兘鍔涒€濓紝subtask 鍥炵瓟鈥滃け璐ュ崱鍦ㄥ摢涓€姝モ€濓紝difficulty 鍥炵瓟鈥滆繖涓换鍔¤璁′笂鏈夊闅锯€濓紝涓夎€呭悎璧锋潵鎵嶆瘮鍗曚釜 success rate 鏇存湁瑙ｉ噴鍔涖€?
In [ ]:
# ===== 绮捐4锛氳兘鍔涜酱鍜岄毦搴﹀垎鏁拌交閲忛獙璇?=====
# 杩欑粍娴嬭瘯澶嶅埢 RoboLab 婧愮爜涓殑鏍稿績璁＄畻锛?/span>
# difficulty_score = num_subtasks + max(skill_weight(attributes))
# label: simple <= 2, moderate <= 4, complex > 4

SKILL_WEIGHTS_LIGHT = {
    "color": 0,
    "semantics": 0,
    "size": 0,
    "conjunction": 0,
    "vague": 0,
    "spatial": 1,
    "counting": 2,
    "sorting": 2,
    "stacking": 2,
    "affordance": 2,
    "reorientation": 3,
}
CATEGORY_MAP_LIGHT = {
    "size": "visual",
    "color": "visual",
    "semantics": "visual",
    "spatial": "relational",
    "conjunction": "relational",
    "counting": "relational",
    "stacking": "procedural",
    "sorting": "procedural",
    "reorientation": "procedural",
    "affordance": "procedural",
}

def difficulty_score_light(num_subtasks: int, attributes: list[str]):
    non_difficulty_attrs = [a for a in attributes if a not in {"simple", "moderate", "complex"}]
    hardest_weight = max((SKILL_WEIGHTS_LIGHT.get(attr, 0) for attr in non_difficulty_attrs), default=0)
    score = num_subtasks + hardest_weight
    if score <= 2:
        label = "simple"
    elif score <= 4:
        label = "moderate"
    else:
        label = "complex"
    return score, label

def capability_axes_light(attributes: list[str]):
    return sorted({CATEGORY_MAP_LIGHT[attr] for attr in attributes if attr in CATEGORY_MAP_LIGHT})

# num_subtasks 杩欓噷鎸?subtask_utils.count_subtasks 鐨勭洿瑙夊鍒伙細
# logical=all 璁″叏閮ㄥ璞＄粍锛宭ogical=any 璁?1锛宭ogical=choose 璁?K銆?/span>
benchmark_examples = [
    {
        "task": "BananaInBowlTask",
        "attributes": ["semantics"],
        "num_subtasks": 1,
        "expected_axes": ["visual"],
        "expected_score": 1,
        "expected_label": "simple",
    },
    {
        "task": "RubiksCubeLeftOfBowlTask",
        "attributes": ["spatial"],
        "num_subtasks": 1,
        "expected_axes": ["relational"],
        "expected_score": 2,
        "expected_label": "simple",
    },
    {
        "task": "RedItemsInBinTask",
        "attributes": ["color", "sorting"],
        "num_subtasks": 2,
        "expected_axes": ["procedural", "visual"],
        "expected_score": 4,
        "expected_label": "moderate",
    },
    {
        "task": "Stack3RubiksCubeTask",
        "attributes": ["stacking"],
        "num_subtasks": 2,
        "expected_axes": ["procedural"],
        "expected_score": 4,
        "expected_label": "moderate",
    },
    {
        "task": "LongReorientationExample",
        "attributes": ["reorientation"],
        "num_subtasks": 3,
        "expected_axes": ["procedural"],
        "expected_score": 6,
        "expected_label": "complex",
    },
]

competency_tests = []
rows = []
for example in benchmark_examples:
    score, label = difficulty_score_light(example["num_subtasks"], example["attributes"])
    axes = capability_axes_light(example["attributes"])
    ok = (
        score == example["expected_score"]
        and label == example["expected_label"]
        and axes == example["expected_axes"]
    )
    competency_tests.append((example["task"], ok))
    rows.append(
        {
            "task": example["task"],
            "attributes": example["attributes"],
            "axes": axes,
            "num_subtasks": example["num_subtasks"],
            "score": score,
            "label": label,
            "passed": ok,
        }
    )

for row in rows:
    print(
        f"{row['task']}: axes={row['axes']} "
        f"num_subtasks={row['num_subtasks']} score={row['score']} label={row['label']} "
        f"{'PASS' if row['passed'] else 'FAIL'}"
    )

assert all(ok for _, ok in competency_tests), competency_tests
write_status(
    "competency_difficulty_lightweight_tests",
    {
        "all_passed": all(ok for _, ok in competency_tests),
        "rows": rows,
        "boundary": "This validates the metadata/difficulty formula; it does not measure policy success probability.",
    },
)

0.11 论文精讲：SPARC 轨迹平滑度指标¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_05_sparc_trajectory_metric.md锛屽搴旇鏂?III-C Trajectory Metrics锛歋PARC 鐢ㄦ湯绔墽琛屽櫒閫熷害璋辩殑寮ч暱琛￠噺鍔ㄤ綔骞虫粦搴︼紝鍊艰秺鎺ヨ繎 0 瓒婂钩婊戯紝瓒婅礋琛ㄧず閫熷害棰戣氨瓒婂鏉傘€佸姩浣滆秺鎶栥€?/p>

精讲 5：SPARC 轨迹平滑度指标，代码怎么实现¶

棰滆壊鏍囪瘑锛氱豢鑹茶〃绀烘牳蹇冪粨璁猴紝钃濊壊琛ㄧず婧愮爜/杈撳叆杈撳嚭璺緞锛屾鑹茶〃绀鸿竟鐣屻€侀闄╁拰瀹规槗璇В鐨勭偣銆?

先说结论¶

SPARC 鍏ㄧО鏄?Spectral Arc Length锛岃鏂囨妸瀹冩斁鍦?III-C Metrics for Evaluation -> Trajectory Metrics銆傚畠涓嶆槸浠诲姟鎴愬姛鐜囷紝涔熶笉鏄?subtask score锛岃€屾槸涓€涓繛缁建杩硅川閲忔寚鏍囷紝鐢ㄦ潵琛￠噺鏈鎵ц鍣ㄨ繍鍔ㄦ槸鍚﹀钩婊戙€?/p>

鏍稿績缁撹锛歊oboLab 鐢?SPARC 鐪嬧€滅瓥鐣ュ姩浣滄槸涓嶆槸椤衡€濄€傛垚鍔熺巼鍥炵瓟鈥滄湁娌℃湁瀹屾垚鈥濓紝score 鍥炵瓟鈥滃畬鎴愬埌鍝竴姝モ€濓紝SPARC 鍥炵瓟鈥滆繍鍔ㄨ繃绋嬫槸涓嶆槸骞虫粦銆佹湁鏃犳姈鍔ㄢ€濄€傝鏂囬噷璇达細瓒婂钩婊戠殑杩愬姩锛孲PARC 瓒婃帴杩?0锛涜秺鎶栥€侀鐜囨垚鍒嗚秺澶嶆潅锛孲PARC 瓒婅礋銆?

鍦?RoboLab 閲岋紝SPARC 鐨勪唬鐮侀摼璺槸锛?/p> 

run_*.hdf5
  -> ee_pose/position 鎴?ee_pose/linear_velocity
  -> speed = ||velocity||
  -> FFT 寰楀埌褰掍竴鍖栭€熷害棰戣氨
  -> 鍙繚鐣?adaptive cutoff 浠ュ唴鐨勯鐜?
  -> 璁＄畻棰戣氨鏇茬嚎寮ч暱
  -> SPARC = - arc_length
  -> episode_metrics.json 閲岀殑 ee_sparc / joint_sparc_mean

1. SPARC 在论文里解决什么问题¶

RoboLab 涓嶆槸鍙湅浜屽€?success锛屽洜涓轰袱涓瓥鐣ラ兘鎴愬姛鏃讹紝鍔ㄤ綔璐ㄩ噺鍙兘宸緢澶氾細

鐜拌薄 success 鑳界湅鍑烘潵鍚?/th> SPARC 鑳芥彁渚涗粈涔?/th>
涓€璺『婊戞姄鍙栧苟鏀句笅 鑳界湅鍒版垚鍔?/td> SPARC 鎺ヨ繎 0锛岃〃绀洪璋辩畝鍗曘€佽繍鍔ㄥ钩婊?/td>
鎶栧姩銆佹潵鍥炶瘯鎺紝鏈€鍚庝篃鎴愬姛 鍙兘鐪嬪埌鎴愬姛 SPARC 鏇磋礋锛岃鏄庤繍鍔ㄩ璋辨洿澶嶆潅
娌″畬鎴愶紝浣嗕腑闂村姩浣滃緢绋冲畾 success 鍙粰澶辫触 SPARC 鍙崟鐙弽鏄犺繍鍔ㄨ川閲?/td>
鍘熷湴涓嶅姩鎴栧嚑涔庝笉鍔?/td> success 澶辫触 SPARC 搴旇璋ㄦ厧澶勭悊锛屾簮鐮佺敤 motion gate 杩斿洖 NaN

璁烘枃鍘熸剰鏄細success rate 寰堥噸瑕侊紝浣嗕笉鑳借В閲婄瓥鐣ョ殑杩愬姩鏁堢巼銆佸钩婊戝害鍜屾渶浼樻€с€係PARC銆乪nd-effector speed銆乸ath length 杩欎簺杞ㄨ抗鎸囨爣涓€璧疯ˉ涓婁簡鈥滄€庝箞鍔ㄢ€濈殑淇℃伅銆?/p>

2. 公式说人话¶

璁烘枃鎻忚堪鐨勬槸锛氬厛鍙栨湯绔墽琛屽櫒閫熷害鏇茬嚎锛屽啀鐪嬭繖鏉￠€熷害鏇茬嚎鍦ㄩ鍩熼噷鐨勫舰鐘躲€?/p> 

浣嶇疆 p(t)
  -> 閫熷害 v(t)
  -> 閫熺巼 s(t) = ||v(t)||
  -> Fourier magnitude spectrum V(蠅)
  -> normalize V(蠅)
  -> 鍦?cutoff 棰戠巼鍐呰绠楅璋辨洸绾垮姬闀?
  -> SPARC = -寮ч暱

涓轰粈涔堥璋辫兘琛￠噺骞虫粦锛?/p>

  • 骞虫粦杩愬姩鐨勯€熷害鏇茬嚎閫氬父鍙樺寲鎱紝棰戣氨闆嗕腑鍦ㄤ綆棰戯紝棰戣氨鏇茬嚎姣旇緝鐭€?/li>
  • 鎶栧姩杩愬姩浼氬紩鍏ラ珮棰戞垚鍒嗭紝棰戣氨鏇茬嚎鏇存洸鎶樸€佹洿闀裤€?/li>
  • RoboLab 杩斿洖璐熷姬闀匡紝鎵€浠ュ姬闀胯秺澶э紝SPARC 瓒婅礋銆?/li>
鏂瑰悜涓嶈璇诲弽锛歊oboLab 璁烘枃鏂囨湰璇粹€渟moother motions yield values closer to zero, jerkier trajectories produce more negative values鈥濄€傚綋鍓?checkout 鐨?compute_sparc() docstring 鍓嶅崐娈垫湁涓€鍙モ€淢ore negative values indicate smoother movements鈥濆鏄撹瀵硷紱瀹為檯浠ｇ爜 sparc = -arc_length銆佸嚱鏁板悗鍗婃娉ㄩ噴鍜岃鏂囦竴鑷达細瓒婃帴杩?0 瓒婂钩婊戯紝瓒婅礋瓒婁笉骞虫粦銆?

3. 源码入口¶

婧愮爜鍏ュ彛锛歋PARC 鏍稿績璁＄畻鍦?robolab/core/metrics/trajectory_metrics.py::compute_sparc锛涗粠 HDF5 璇昏建杩瑰苟鍐欏叆 episode metrics 鐨勫叆鍙ｅ湪 robolab/core/metrics/compute_metrics.py::compute_episode_metrics 鍜?compute_experiment_metrics銆?

鏍稿績鍑芥暟锛?/p> 

def compute_sparc(
    speed,
    dt,
    padlevel=4,
    fc=10.0,
    amplitude_threshold=0.05,
    min_speed=1e-6,
):
    if len(speed) < 2 or np.max(np.abs(speed)) < min_speed:
        return float("nan")

    nfft = int(2 ** np.ceil(np.log2(N)) * padlevel)
    speed_fft = np.fft.rfft(speed, n=nfft)
    freq = np.fft.rfftfreq(nfft, d=dt)

    magnitude = np.abs(speed_fft)
    magnitude = magnitude / magnitude.max()

    above_threshold = magnitude >= amplitude_threshold
    fc_adaptive = min(freq[last_idx], fc)

    freq_mask = freq <= fc_adaptive
    d_magnitude = np.diff(magnitude_sel)
    d_freq = np.diff(freq_sel)
    arc_length = np.sum(np.sqrt((d_freq / fc_adaptive) ** 2 + d_magnitude**2))

    sparc = -arc_length

鍏抽敭鍙傛暟锛?/p>

鍙傛暟 榛樿鍊?/th> 浣滅敤
dt 鐢?env_cfg.json 鎴栭粯璁?1/15 閲囨牱鏃堕棿闂撮殧
padlevel 4 FFT 闆跺～鍏咃紝鎻愰珮棰戣氨閲囨牱瀵嗗害
fc 10.0 Hz 鏈€澶?cutoff 棰戠巼
amplitude_threshold 0.05 adaptive cutoff 闃堝€硷紝鍙繚鐣欐湁鎰忎箟棰戞
min_speed 1e-6 motion gate锛屽嚑涔庝笉鍔ㄦ椂杩斿洖 NaN

4. 从 HDF5 到 ee_sparc¶

compute_metrics.py 璐熻矗鎶婂疄楠岃緭鍑哄彉鎴愯建杩规寚鏍囷細

data = load_demo_data(run_0.hdf5, demo_key)
ee_position = data["ee_position"]
ee_velocity = data.get("ee_linear_velocity")

if has_ee_velocity:
    metrics["ee_sparc"] = compute_ee_sparc_from_velocity(ee_velocity, dt)
else:
    metrics["ee_sparc"] = compute_ee_sparc_from_position(ee_position, dt)

HDF5 杈撳叆瀛楁锛?/p>

瀛楁 鐢ㄩ€?/th>
actions 璁＄畻 joint tracking RMSE
states/articulation/robot/joint_position 鍏宠妭鐘舵€?/td>
states/articulation/robot/joint_velocity joint SPARC / joint ISJ
ee_pose/position 鏈鎵ц鍣ㄤ綅缃€乸ath length銆佷綅缃樊鍒嗛€熷害
ee_pose/linear_velocity 濡傛灉瀛樺湪锛屼紭鍏堢敤浜?EE SPARC 鍜?EE ISJ

杈撳嚭瀛楁锛?/p>

5. SPARC 和其他指标的区别¶

鎸囨爣 鐪嬩粈涔?/th> 浠€涔堟椂鍊欐湁鐢?/th>
success 鏄惁杈炬垚鏈€缁堢洰鏍?/td> 鏈€鍩虹浠诲姟瀹屾垚鐜?/td>
normalized score subtask 杩涘害 澶辫触浣嗘湁閮ㄥ垎杩涘睍鏃?/td>
SPARC 閫熷害棰戣氨骞虫粦搴?/td> 姣旇緝鍔ㄤ綔鏄惁鎶栧姩銆佹槸鍚﹂『婊?/td>
ISJ jerk 鐨勭Н鍒嗗钩鏂?/td> 瀵瑰姞閫熷害鍙樺寲鏇存晱鎰?/td>
path length 鏈璺緞闀垮害 鏄惁缁曡繙銆佹槸鍚︽晥鐜囦綆
speed mean/max 鍔ㄤ綔蹇參 璇勪及鏄惁杩囧揩銆佸仠婊炴垨鍔ㄤ綔婵€杩?/td>

SPARC 涓嶅簲璇ュ崟鐙В閲婄瓥鐣ュソ鍧忋€備竴涓瓥鐣ュ彲鑳?SPARC 寰堝ソ浣嗘病瀹屾垚浠诲姟锛屼篃鍙兘鎴愬姛浣嗗姩浣滃緢鎶栥€傚洜姝?RoboLab 鎶婂畠鍜?success銆乻core銆乸ath length銆乻peed 涓€璧风湅銆?/p>

6. 为什么用 adaptive cutoff¶

棰戣氨灏鹃儴鍙兘鏈夊櫔澹般€傚鏋滃浐瀹氱湅寰堥珮棰戯紝鍣０浼氭妸 arc length 鎷夊ぇ锛屽鑷?SPARC 杩囧害鎯╃綒銆傚洜姝ゆ簮鐮佷細锛?/p>

  1. 璁＄畻閫熷害棰戣氨骞呭€笺€?/li>
  2. 褰掍竴鍖栧埌鏈€澶у箙鍊间负 1銆?/li>
  3. 鎵惧埌骞呭€间粛楂樹簬 amplitude_threshold=0.05 鐨勬渶楂橀鐜囥€?/li>
  4. 鐢?min(杩欎釜棰戠巼, fc) 浣滀负瀹為檯 cutoff銆?/li>

璇翠汉璇濓細鍙绠椻€滈璋遍噷鐪熺殑鏈夎兘閲忊€濈殑閭ｆ鏇茬嚎锛屽拷鐣ュ悗闈㈠嚑涔庡叏鏄櫔澹扮殑闀垮熬銆?/p>

7. 实际结果里怎么读¶

鍦ㄨ鏂囪〃鏍间腑锛孲PARC 鍜?success/score 涓€璧峰嚭鐜般€傝娉曞缓璁細

  1. 鍏堢湅 success锛氫换鍔℃槸鍚﹀畬鎴愩€?/li>
  2. 鍐嶇湅 score锛氬け璐ユ椂鏄惁鏈夐儴鍒?subtask 杩涘睍銆?/li>
  3. 鍐嶇湅 SPARC锛氬姩浣滄槸鍚﹀钩婊戙€?/li>
  4. 鍐嶇湅 path length / speed锛氬姩浣滄槸鍚︾粫杩滄垨寮傚父蹇參銆?/li>
涓€鍙ヨ瘽璁板繂锛歴uccess 鐪嬬粨鏋滐紝score 鐪嬭繘搴︼紝SPARC 鐪嬪姩浣滆川閲忋€係PARC 瓒婃帴杩?0 瓒婂钩婊戯紝瓒婅礋璇存槑閫熷害棰戣氨瓒婂鏉傘€佸姩浣滆秺鎶栥€?

鎴戜滑宸茬粡鏈夊畬鏁村鐜拌緭鍑猴細

鐞嗚涓婂彲浠ュ run_0.hdf5 鍐嶈窇锛?/p> 

from robolab.core.metrics import compute_experiment_metrics

compute_experiment_metrics(output_dir, overwrite=True)

鐒跺悗璇诲彇 episode_metrics.json 涓殑 ee_sparc銆傝繖涓€姝ヤ笉鏀瑰彉浠跨湡缁撴灉锛屽彧鏄绾垮垎鏋愯建杩硅川閲忋€?/p>

娉ㄦ剰杈圭晫锛歋PARC 渚濊禆閲囨牱鐜?dt銆侀€熷害鏄惁鐪熷疄璁板綍銆佽建杩规槸鍚﹁冻澶熼暱銆佹槸鍚﹀嚑涔庨潤姝€傛簮鐮侀噷瀵归潤姝㈣建杩硅繑鍥?NaN锛屽悗缁眹鎬绘椂搴旇繃婊わ紝鑰屼笉鏄妸 NaN 褰撴垚 0 鎴栨垚鍔熷钩婊戙€?
In [ ]:
# ===== 绮捐5锛歋PARC 杞婚噺楠岃瘉 =====
# 杩欑粍娴嬭瘯澶嶅埢 RoboLab trajectory_metrics.py::compute_sparc 鐨勬牳蹇冮€昏緫锛?/span>
# 1. 骞虫粦閫熷害鏇茬嚎鐨?SPARC 搴旇鏇存帴杩?0锛?/span>
# 2. 鎶栧姩閫熷害鏇茬嚎鍖呭惈鏇村楂橀鎴愬垎锛孲PARC 搴旇鏇磋礋锛?/span>
# 3. 闈欐杞ㄨ抗閫氳繃 motion gate 杩斿洖 NaN锛岄伩鍏嶆妸鈥滄病鍔ㄢ€濊鍒ゆ垚鈥滃緢骞虫粦鈥濄€?/span>

import math
import numpy as np

def compute_sparc_light(
    speed,
    dt,
    padlevel=4,
    fc=10.0,
    amplitude_threshold=0.05,
    min_speed=1e-6,
):
    speed = np.asarray(speed, dtype=np.float64)
    if len(speed) < 2 or np.max(np.abs(speed)) < min_speed:
        return float("nan")

    n_samples = len(speed)
    nfft = int(2 ** np.ceil(np.log2(n_samples)) * padlevel)
    speed_fft = np.fft.rfft(speed, n=nfft)
    freq = np.fft.rfftfreq(nfft, d=dt)

    magnitude = np.abs(speed_fft)
    magnitude = magnitude / magnitude.max() if magnitude.max() > 0 else magnitude

    above_threshold = magnitude >= amplitude_threshold
    if np.any(above_threshold):
        last_idx = np.max(np.where(above_threshold)[0])
        fc_adaptive = min(freq[last_idx], fc)
    else:
        fc_adaptive = fc

    if fc_adaptive <= 0:
        return float("nan")

    freq_mask = freq <= fc_adaptive
    freq_sel = freq[freq_mask]
    magnitude_sel = magnitude[freq_mask]
    if len(freq_sel) < 2:
        return 0.0

    d_magnitude = np.diff(magnitude_sel)
    d_freq = np.diff(freq_sel)
    arc_length_elements = np.sqrt((d_freq / fc_adaptive) ** 2 + d_magnitude**2)
    return -float(np.sum(arc_length_elements))

dt = 1.0 / 100.0
t = np.arange(0.0, 2.0, dt)

# 骞虫粦閫熷害锛氬崟涓綆棰戞寮﹁捣浼忥紝棰戣氨闆嗕腑銆?/span>
smooth_speed = 0.5 + 0.2 * np.sin(2 * np.pi * 0.5 * t)

# 鎶栧姩閫熷害锛氬湪鍚屾牱浣庨瓒嬪娍涓婂彔鍔犳槑鏄鹃珮棰戞尟鑽★紝棰戣氨鏇撮暱鏇村鏉傘€?/span>
jerky_speed = smooth_speed + 0.08 * np.sin(2 * np.pi * 8.0 * t)

# 闈欐閫熷害锛氭簮鐮佸簲閫氳繃 motion gate 杩斿洖 NaN銆?/span>
stationary_speed = np.zeros_like(t)

smooth_sparc = compute_sparc_light(smooth_speed, dt)
jerky_sparc = compute_sparc_light(jerky_speed, dt)
stationary_sparc = compute_sparc_light(stationary_speed, dt)

sparc_tests = [
    ("smooth_is_closer_to_zero", smooth_sparc > jerky_sparc),
    ("jerky_is_more_negative", jerky_sparc < smooth_sparc),
    ("stationary_returns_nan", math.isnan(stationary_sparc)),
]

print(f"smooth_sparc={smooth_sparc:.4f}")
print(f"jerky_sparc={jerky_sparc:.4f}")
print(f"stationary_sparc={stationary_sparc}")
for name, ok in sparc_tests:
    print(f"{name}: {'PASS' if ok else 'FAIL'}")

assert all(ok for _, ok in sparc_tests), sparc_tests
write_status(
    "sparc_lightweight_tests",
    {
        "all_passed": all(ok for _, ok in sparc_tests),
        "smooth_sparc": smooth_sparc,
        "jerky_sparc": jerky_sparc,
        "stationary_sparc_is_nan": math.isnan(stationary_sparc),
        "tests": [{"name": name, "passed": ok} for name, ok in sparc_tests],
        "boundary": "This validates SPARC direction and motion gate on synthetic speed profiles; real runs should compute metrics from HDF5.",
    },
)

0.12 论文精讲：MNPE 敏感性分析¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_06_mnpe_sensitivity_analysis.md锛屽搴旇鏂?III-D Sensitivity Analysis 鍜?Appendix B锛歁NPE 鐢?rollout 鍚庣殑鎵板姩璇勬祴鏁版嵁瀛︿範 p(theta | x)锛屼篃灏辨槸鈥滅粰瀹氭垚鍔?澶辫触缁撴灉锛屽摢浜涚浉鏈恒€佸厜鐓с€佹潗璐ㄣ€佺墿浣撲綅濮垮弬鏁版渶鍙兘瀵艰嚧杩欎釜缁撴灉鈥濄€?/p>

精讲 6：MNPE 敏感性分析，代码怎么实现¶

棰滆壊鏍囪瘑锛氱豢鑹茶〃绀烘牳蹇冪粨璁猴紝钃濊壊琛ㄧず婧愮爜/杈撳叆杈撳嚭璺緞锛屾鑹茶〃绀鸿竟鐣屻€侀闄╁拰瀹规槗璇В鐨勭偣銆?

先说结论¶

MNPE 鍏ㄧО鏄?Mixed Neural Posterior Estimation銆傝鏂囨妸瀹冩斁鍦?III-D Sensitivity Analysis 鍜?Appendix B Details of MNPE Sensitivity Analysis銆傚畠涓嶆槸鏈哄櫒浜虹瓥鐣ワ紝涔熶笉鏄柊鐨勪换鍔℃垚鍔熺巼锛岃€屾槸 rollout 涔嬪悗鐨勪竴绉嶈瘖鏂伐鍏凤細鐢ㄥ凡缁忛噰闆嗗埌鐨勪豢鐪熻瘎娴嬫暟鎹紝鍙嶈繃鏉ヤ及璁♀€滀粈涔堢幆澧冨弬鏁版渶鍙兘瀵瑰簲鎴愬姛/澶辫触鈥濄€?/p>

鏍稿績缁撹锛氭櫘閫氳瘎娴嬮棶鐨勬槸鈥滅粰瀹氱浉鏈恒€佸厜鐓с€佺墿浣撲綅缃紝绛栫暐鑳戒笉鑳芥垚鍔熲€濓紱MNPE 闂殑鏄弽鍚戦棶棰橈細鈥滃鏋滄垜鍙湅鍒颁簡鎴愬姛鎴栧け璐ワ紝鍝簺鐩告満鍋忕Щ銆佸厜鐓с€佹闈㈡潗璐ㄣ€佺墿浣撳垵濮嬩綅濮挎渶鍙兘瀵艰嚧杩欎釜缁撴灉鈥濄€傛墍浠ュ畠閫傚悎鎵剧瓥鐣ヨ剢寮辩偣锛岃€屼笉鏄浛浠?policy rollout銆?

鍦?RoboLab 閲岋紝MNPE 鐨勪唬鐮侀摼璺彲浠ョ悊瑙ｆ垚锛?/p> 

鎵板姩璇勬祴鑴氭湰
  -> 杩愯鍚屼竴浠诲姟鍦ㄥ缁?camera/background/table/object pose 鍙樺寲涓嬬殑 episodes
  -> 姹囨€绘垚 CSV锛屾瘡琛屽寘鍚弬鏁?theta 涓庤娴?x
  -> posterior_inference.py 璇诲彇 CSV
  -> prepare_data_for_mnpe() 鏁寸悊鍙傛暟鍒楀拰瑙傛祴鍒?
  -> 鏈夌鏁ｅ弬鏁版椂鐢?MNPE锛屽彧鏈夎繛缁弬鏁版椂閫€鍥?NPE
  -> append_simulations(theta, x).train()
  -> build_posterior()
  -> 缁欏畾 x_o = success=1 鎴?success=0 閲囨牱 p(theta | x_o)
  -> 杈撳嚭鍧囧€笺€?5% credible interval銆佺被鍒鐜囧拰鍥?

1. MNPE 在论文里解决什么问题¶

RoboLab 宸茬粡鑳借緭鍑?success銆乻core銆丼PARC銆乸ath length 绛夋寚鏍囷紝浣嗚繖浜涙寚鏍囧洖绛旂殑鏄€滅粨鏋滄€庝箞鏍封€濄€傛晱鎰熸€у垎鏋愭兂缁х画杩介棶锛?/p>

闂 鏅€?success 琛ㄨ兘鍥炵瓟鍚?/th> MNPE 鑳借ˉ浠€涔?/th>
鐩告満杞诲井绉诲姩浼氫笉浼氳绛栫暐宕?/td> 鍙兘鐪嬪埌鏌愪簺璁剧疆涓嬫垚鍔?澶辫触 浼拌鎴愬姛鏍锋湰瀵瑰簲鐨勭浉鏈哄亸绉诲垎甯?/td>
澶辫触鏄惁闆嗕腑鍦ㄦ煇绫诲厜鐓?妗岄潰鏉愯川 闇€瑕佷汉宸ュ垎缁勫姣?/td> 杈撳嚭姣忎釜绂绘暎绫诲埆鍦?posterior 閲岀殑姒傜巼
鐗╀綋鍒濆浣嶅Э绂诲弬鑰冧綅缃杩滄椂鏇村鏄撳け璐?/td> 闇€瑕佽嚜宸辩敾鍒嗙鏇茬嚎 杈撳嚭杩炵画鍙傛暟鐨勫潎鍊煎拰 95% credible interval
绛栫暐鍒板簳鏄鏌愪釜鍙傛暟鏁忔劅锛岃繕鏄暣浣撻兘涓嶇ǔ 鍗曚釜鍧囧€奸毦鍒ゆ柇 鐪?posterior 鏄獎鑰岄泦涓紝杩樻槸瀹借€屾帴杩?prior

璁烘枃閲岀殑鍒ゆ柇閫昏緫寰堢洿鎺ワ細濡傛灉 p(theta | success=1) 绱х揣闆嗕腑鍦ㄥ弬鑰冮厤缃檮杩戯紝璇存槑绛栫暐鍙湁鍦ㄥ弬鏁版帴杩戦粯璁ゅ€兼椂鎵嶅鏄撴垚鍔燂紝涔熷氨鏄杩欎釜鍙傛暟鏁忔劅锛涘鏋?posterior 寰堝锛岃鏄庢垚鍔熶笉渚濊禆鏌愪釜寰堢獎鐨勫弬鏁拌寖鍥达紝椴佹鎬ф洿寮恒€?/p>

涓嶈鎶?MNPE 璇绘垚鍥犳灉璇佹槑锛氬畠缁欑殑鏄€滃湪宸叉湁瀹為獙鍒嗗竷涓嬶紝鍙傛暟鍜岀粨鏋滅殑鍚庨獙鍏宠仈鈥濄€傚鏋滈噰鏍锋暟鎹お灏戙€佷换鍔″お灏戙€佹垨鑰呮煇浜涘弬鏁扮粍鍚堟牴鏈病璺戣繃锛孧NPE 鍙兘鍙嶆槧宸叉湁鏁版嵁锛屼笉浼氳嚜鍔ㄨ瘉鏄庣湡瀹炰笘鐣屽洜鏋溿€?

2. 输入输出说清楚¶

MNPE 鐨勮緭鍏ユ湁涓ょ被锛?/p>

鍚嶇О 绗﹀彿 鍦ㄤ唬鐮侀噷鏄粈涔?/th> 渚嬪瓙
鍙傛暟 theta param_columns 鏁寸悊鍑虹殑寮犻噺 external_cam_initial_pose_distance銆?code>wrist_cam_initial_pose_distance銆?code>lighting_intensity銆?code>table_material
瑙傛祴 x obs_columns 鏁寸悊鍑虹殑寮犻噺 success銆?code>success_rate銆?code>task_duration銆?code>score

杈撳嚭鏄?posterior锛?/p> 

p(theta | x_o)

杩欓噷鐨?x_o 鏄煡璇㈡潯浠讹紝渚嬪锛?/p> 

x_o = [success=1.0]  -> 浠€涔堝弬鏁版渶鍙兘瀵瑰簲鎴愬姛

RoboLab 鑴氭湰鏈€缁堜細杈撳嚭锛?/p>

杈撳嚭 鍚箟
continuous mean 杩炵画鍙傛暟鍦?posterior 閲岀殑骞冲潎鍊?/td>

ESS importance sampling 鍚庣殑鏈夋晥鏍锋湰閲忥紝澶綆璇存槑绾犲亸涓嶇ǔ
婧愮爜鍏ュ彛锛氭牳蹇冭剼鏈槸 analysis/sensitivity_analysis/posterior_inference.py锛涗娇鐢ㄨ鏄庡湪 analysis/sensitivity_analysis/README_posterior_inference.md锛涗骇鐢熸壈鍔ㄦ暟鎹殑鍏ュ彛鍖呮嫭 policies/pi0_family/run_camera_pose_variation.py銆?code>run_background_variation.py銆?code>run_table_variation.py锛屽簳灞傛壈鍔ㄩ厤缃湪 robolab/variations/camera.py銆?code>backgrounds.py銆?code>lighting.py銆?

3. 扰动数据从哪里来¶

MNPE 涓嶈兘鍑┖鍒嗘瀽锛屽繀椤诲厛鏈変竴鎵瑰甫鎵板姩鍙傛暟鐨?rollout 鏁版嵁銆俁oboLab 閲屽父瑙佹潵婧愭湁涓夌被锛?/p> 

run_camera_pose_variation.py
  -> 瀵?external camera / wrist camera 鍋?reset-time pose perturbation
  -> 杈撳嚭姣忎釜 task + camera variation 鐨?episode result

run_background_variation.py
  -> 鎶婂悓涓€浠诲姟娉ㄥ唽鎴愬涓?background variation env
  -> 杈撳嚭涓嶅悓 HDR/EXR 鑳屾櫙涓嬬殑 episode result

run_table_variation.py
  -> 杩愯涓嶅悓 table material
  -> episode_results.jsonl 閲岄澶栬褰?table_material

杩欎簺鑴氭湰鐨勫叡鍚岀偣鏄細瀹冧滑涓嶆槸鍙窇涓€涓粯璁ょ幆澧冿紝鑰屾槸绯荤粺鍖栨壂涓€缁勭幆澧冨彉鍖栥€傚悗澶勭悊鏃跺啀鎶婄粨鏋滄眹鎬绘垚 CSV锛岃姣忎竴琛岄暱寰楀儚杩欐牱锛?/p> 

policy, env_name, experiment_name,
external_cam_initial_pose, wrist_cam_initial_pose,
lighting_intensity, table_material,
success, score, task_duration

鐒跺悗 posterior_inference.py --use-real-data --csv-file ... 鎵嶈兘鎶婅繖浜涘垪鍙樻垚 MNPE 鐨勮缁冩暟鎹€?/p>

4. prepare_data_for_mnpe() 做了什么¶

杩欎竴姝ユ槸鏁存潯閾捐矾鏈€瀹规槗浣庝及鐨勯儴鍒嗐€侻NPE 鏈韩鍙璇嗘暟鍊煎紶閲忥紝鐪熷疄 CSV 閲屽嵈娣风潃瀛楃涓层€佸竷灏斿€笺€佺被鍒拰浣嶅Э瀛楃涓诧紝鎵€浠ヨ剼鏈厛鍋氭暟鎹竻娲椼€?/p>

婧愮爜绛変环閫昏緫锛?/p> 

df = read_csv(csv_file)
df = filter_by_policy_task_experiment(df)

theta_columns = continuous_columns + categorical_columns
theta_df = df[theta_columns]
obs_df = df[obs_columns]

theta_df = encode_categories(theta_df)
theta_df = normalize_continuous_to_0_1(theta_df)
obs_df = convert_success_bool_to_0_1(obs_df)

theta = torch.tensor(theta_df.values)
x = torch.tensor(obs_df.values)
prior = create_uniform_prior(...)

閲嶇偣鏈夊洓涓細

  1. 杩囨护瀹為獙鑼冨洿锛氬彲浠ュ彧鐪嬫煇涓?policy銆佹煇涓?task銆佹煇涓?experiment锛岄伩鍏嶆妸涓嶅悓闂娣峰湪涓€璧枫€?/li>
  2. 杩炵画鍙傛暟鏀惧墠闈紝绂绘暎鍙傛暟鏀惧悗闈?/strong>锛氳繖鏄剼鏈 MNPE 鐨勭害鏉燂紝鏂逛究鍖哄垎 normalizing flow 鍜?categorical distribution銆?/li>
  3. 杩炵画鍙傛暟褰掍竴鍖栧埌 [0, 1]锛氱浉鏈鸿窛绂汇€佺墿浣撲綅濮胯窛绂汇€佽搴︾瓑閲忕翰涓嶅悓锛屽厛褰掍竴鍖栬兘璁╃缁忕綉缁滄洿瀹规槗璁粌銆?/li>
  4. 绂绘暎鍙傛暟缂栫爜鎴愭暣鏁?/strong>锛氫緥濡傛闈㈡潗璐ㄣ€佸厜鐓у己搴︽。浣嶃€佽儗鏅被鍒紝鏈€缁堝彉鎴?0, 1, 2...銆?/li>
鎬庝箞璁?/strong>锛?code>theta 鏄€滄垜鍔ㄤ簡鍝簺鏃嬮挳鈥濓紝x 鏄€滅瓥鐣ユ渶鍚庤〃鐜板浣曗€濄€侻NPE 瀛︾殑鏄€滅湅鍒拌〃鐜颁互鍚庯紝鍝簺鏃嬮挳浣嶇疆鏈€鍙兘鈥濄€?

5. 位姿参数怎么变成一个数¶

璁烘枃閲屾妸 camera pose / object pose 褰撴垚 SE(3) 浣嶅Э銆備綅濮挎湰鏉ユ槸 7 缁达細浣嶇疆 x,y,z 鍔犲洓鍏冩暟 qw,qx,qy,qz銆備负浜嗗仛鏁忔劅鎬у垎鏋愶紝浠ｇ爜浼氭妸浣嶅Э杞垚鈥滅鍙傝€冧綅濮垮杩溾€濈殑杩炵画鍙傛暟銆?/p>

璇翠汉璇濓細

pose_distance =
  骞崇Щ璺濈
  + beta * 鏃嬭浆 geodesic distance

鍏朵腑锛?/p>

  • 骞崇Щ璺濈鐪嬬浉鏈烘垨鐗╀綋浣嶇疆鍋忎簡澶氬皯绫炽€?/li>
  • 鏃嬭浆璺濈鐪嬪洓鍏冩暟鏂瑰悜鍋忎簡澶氬皯寮у害銆?/li>
  • beta 鎺у埗鈥滄棆杞亸宸€濆湪鎬昏窛绂婚噷鍗犲澶ф潈閲嶃€?/li>

README 閲岀粰浜嗕袱涓吀鍨嬬浉鏈哄垪锛?/p> 

external_cam_initial_pose -> external_cam_initial_pose_distance
wrist_cam_initial_pose    -> wrist_cam_initial_pose_distance

濡傛灉鍙垎鏋愮墿浣撳垵濮嬩綅缃紝鑴氭湰涔熸敮鎸佹妸绫讳技 banana_initial_pose銆?code>bowl_initial_pose 鐨勫瓧绗︿覆瑙ｆ瀽鎴愬埌鍘熺偣鐨勬姘忚窛绂汇€?/p>

璺濈鏄帇缂╄〃绀?/strong>锛氭妸 7DoF 浣嶅Э鍘嬫垚涓€涓窛绂伙紝渚夸簬璁粌鍜屽彲瑙嗗寲锛屼絾浼氫涪鎺夆€滃線宸﹀亸鈥濆拰鈥滃線鍙冲亸鈥濈殑鏂瑰悜淇℃伅銆傚鏋滆鍒嗘瀽鏂瑰悜鎬э紝搴旇鎶婁綅濮挎媶鎴愬涓弬鏁帮紝鑰屼笉鏄彧鐢ㄨ窛绂汇€?

6. 训练和推理的核心代码¶

RoboLab 鑴氭湰鐨勬牳蹇冭缁冮€昏緫鍙互鍘嬬缉鎴愪笅闈㈠嚑姝ワ細

if num_categorical > 0:
    inference = MNPE(device=device)
else:
    inference = NPE(device=device)

inference.append_simulations(theta, x)
density_estimator = inference.train(max_num_epochs=max_epochs)
posterior = inference.build_posterior(density_estimator, prior=target_prior)
samples = posterior.sample((num_samples,), x=x_o)

杩欓噷鏈変竴涓鏄撹瑙ｇ殑鐐癸細

璁烘枃鍙?MNPE锛屼絾浠ｇ爜涓嶆€绘槸璋冪敤 MNPE锛氬綋鍙傛暟閲屾湁妗岄潰鏉愯川銆佸厜鐓ф。浣嶃€佽儗鏅被鍒繖绫荤鏁ｅ垪鏃讹紝鑴氭湰鐢?sbi.inference.MNPE銆傚鏋滃彧鏈夌浉鏈鸿窛绂汇€佺墿浣撹窛绂昏繖绫昏繛缁弬鏁帮紝鑴氭湰浼氱敤 NPE銆傝繖涓嶆槸缁曞紑璁烘枃锛岃€屾槸鍚屼竴绫?posterior estimation 鍦ㄧ函杩炵画鍦烘櫙涓嬬殑鍚堥€傚疄鐜般€?

璁粌鐩爣鏄绁炵粡缃戠粶瀛︿範 p(theta | x)銆傝缁冨畬鎴愬悗锛屾垜浠笉鍐嶉棶鈥滆繖涓?theta 浼氫笉浼氭垚鍔熲€濓紝鑰屾槸缁欎竴涓娴?x_o锛?/p> 

success = 1.0

鍐嶄粠 posterior 閲岄噰鏍峰緢澶氱粍 theta銆傝繖浜涙牱鏈氨鏄€滃湪妯″瀷鐪嬫潵锛屾渶鑳借В閲婃垚鍔熺殑鐜鍙傛暟鍒嗗竷鈥濄€?/p>

7. Importance sampling 为什么存在¶

璁烘枃寮鸿皟浣跨敤 uniform prior锛屾槸涓轰簡璁╁垎鏋愪笉瑕佸厛楠屽亸鍚戞煇涓弬鏁板尯鍩熴€備絾鐪熷疄璇勬祴鏁版嵁缁忓父涓嶆槸鍧囧寑閲囨牱鐨勶細姣斿 70% 閮藉湪榛樿鍏夌収锛屽彧鏈夊皯閲忔瀬鏆楀厜鐓э紱鎴栬€呮煇涓儗鏅窇寰楀緢澶氾紝鍙︿竴涓儗鏅窇寰楀皯銆?/p>

浠ｇ爜閲岀殑 correction 鎬濊矾鏄細

鐩爣锛氭兂瑕?uniform prior 涓嬬殑 posterior
鐜板疄锛氳缁冩暟鎹潵鑷笉鍧囧寑 empirical proposal
鍋氭硶锛氱粰 posterior samples 涔?importance weight
鏉冮噸锛歵arget prior probability / empirical proposal probability

杈撳嚭閲岀殑 ESS锛屼篃灏辨槸 Effective Sample Size锛岀敤鏉ユ彁閱掕繖涓籂鍋忔槸鍚﹀彲闈狅細

ESS 鐘舵€?/th> 瑙ｈ
楂?/td> 鏁版嵁瑕嗙洊鍜岀洰鏍?prior 姣旇緝鍖归厤锛岄噸鍔犳潈杈冪ǔ
涓?/td> 鍙互鐪嬭秼鍔匡紝浣嗗埆杩囧害瑙ｉ噴缁嗚妭
寰堜綆 璇存槑浣犺窇鐨勬暟鎹お鍋忥紝搴旇琛ラ噰鏍凤紝鑰屼笉鏄浉淇℃紓浜浘
浣?ESS 鏄暟鎹棶棰橈紝涓嶆槸鐢诲浘闂锛氬鏋滄煇浜涘弬鏁板尯鍩熸病鏈?rollout锛屽悗楠岀籂鍋忓彧鑳介潬寰堝皯鐨勬牱鏈‖鎾戯紝缁撹浼氬緢鑴嗐€?

8. 结果怎么读¶

鍋囪鎴戜滑鏌ヨ锛?/p> 

obs_columns = ["success"]
obs_values = [1.0]

鐪嬪埌涓嬮潰鍑犵缁撴灉鏃跺簲璇ヨ繖鏍风悊瑙ｏ細

posterior 褰㈢姸 璇翠汉璇濊В閲?/th>
external_cam_distance 鍧囧€煎緢灏忥紝95% CI 寰堢獎 鎴愬姛澶у鍙戠敓鍦ㄧ浉鏈烘帴杩戦粯璁や綅缃椂锛岀瓥鐣ュ澶栭儴鐩告満鍋忕Щ鏁忔劅
wrist_cam_distance CI 寰堝 鑵曢儴鐩告満鍋忕Щ瀵规垚鍔熷奖鍝嶆病閭ｄ箞闆嗕腑锛屽彲鑳芥洿椴佹
table_material=wood 姒傜巼杩滈珮浜庡叾浠栨潗璐?/td> 鎴愬姛鏇村父鍜屾煇涓闈㈡潗璐ㄥ叧鑱旓紝鍙兘鏈夌汗鐞?鍙嶅厜/瀵规瘮搴﹀奖鍝?/td>

success=1 鍜?success=0 鐨?posterior 宸笉澶?/td> 杩欎釜鍙傛暟鍙兘涓嶆槸涓昏澶辫触鍥犵礌锛屾垨鑰呮暟鎹噺涓嶈冻

9. 和本次 4090 复现的关系¶

鎴戜滑鐩墠宸茬粡瀹屾垚锛?/p>

  • 涓€鏉?Pi05 + BananaInBowlTask 瀹屾暣鎴愬姛闂幆銆?/li>
  • 涓変釜澶嶆潅浠诲姟鎶芥牱锛屽叾涓?1 涓垚鍔熴€? 涓け璐ャ€?/li>
  • 瑙嗛銆丠DF5銆乪vent log銆乪pisode_results.jsonl 宸插悓姝ャ€?/li>

杩欒繕涓嶅鏀拺姝ｅ紡 MNPE 鏁忔劅鎬у垎鏋愩€傚師鍥犳槸 MNPE 闇€瑕佸悓涓€浠诲姟/鍚屼竴绛栫暐鍦ㄥ緢澶氭壈鍔ㄥ弬鏁扮粍鍚堜笅鐨勭粨鏋滐紝鑷冲皯瑕佸舰鎴愬彲璁粌鐨?theta, x 鏁版嵁琛ㄣ€傚綋鍓嶅嚑鏉″鐜版洿閫傚悎浣滀负鈥渞ollout 閾捐矾閫氫簡鈥濈殑璇佹嵁锛岃€屼笉鏄?posterior inference 鐨勭粺璁¤瘉鎹€?/p>

涓嬩竴姝ュ鏋滆鐪熺殑璺?MNPE锛屾纭『搴忔槸锛?/p> 

1. 閫変竴涓换鍔★紝渚嬪 BananaInBowlTask
2. 鍥哄畾涓€涓瓥鐣ワ紝渚嬪 pi05_droid_jointpos
3. 璺?camera pose variation / lighting variation / table variation
4. 姹囨€绘瘡涓?episode 鐨勫弬鏁板垪鍜?success/score/duration
5. 鐢?posterior_inference.py 鏌ヨ success=1 鍜?success=0
6. 姣旇緝 posterior 鏄惁闆嗕腑鍦ㄦ煇浜涘弬鏁板尯鍩?
鏈€灏忓彲琛屽疄楠?/strong>锛氬厛涓嶈涓?RoboLab-120銆傚厛鐢ㄤ竴涓换鍔°€佷竴涓瓥鐣ャ€佷袱绫绘壈鍔紝姣忕被 20-50 涓?episode锛岀‘璁?CSV 鍜?posterior 鍥捐兘璺戦€氾紝鍐嶆墿灞曞埌澶氫换鍔°€?

10. 额外示例：一个轻量 MNPE 思维实验¶

涓轰簡璁?notebook 涓嶄緷璧?sbi 涔熻兘楠岃瘉 MNPE 鐨勭洿瑙夛紝鎴戜滑鍙互鐢ㄤ竴涓交閲忚礉鍙舵柉閲嶅姞鏉冩祴璇曪細

鍏堝潎鍖€閲囨牱 camera_offset in [0, 1]
鍐嶈瀹?success probability 闅?camera_offset 澧炲ぇ鑰屼笅闄?
鐒跺悗鍙瀵?success=1
鏈€鍚庣湅 posterior 閲岀殑 camera_offset 鏄惁姣?prior 鏇撮潬杩?0

濡傛灉娴嬭瘯缁撴灉鏄剧ず锛?/p> 

prior camera mean      鈮?0.50
posterior success mean < 0.50
posterior success CI   鏇村亸鍚戝皬鍋忕Щ
good_lighting posterior probability > prior probability

杩欒鏄庘€滄垚鍔熲€濈‘瀹炴妸鍙傛暟鍒嗗竷寰€鏇村弸濂界殑鍖哄煙鎷変簡杩囧幓锛屼篃灏辨槸 MNPE 鍦ㄨ鏂囬噷瑕佽〃杈剧殑鏍稿績鐩磋銆?/p>

濡傛灉鎴戜滑鎶?success probability 璁炬垚鍜?camera_offset 鏃犲叧锛宲osterior 搴旇鎺ヨ繎 prior銆傝繖瀵瑰簲鈥滅瓥鐣ュ杩欎釜鍙傛暟涓嶆晱鎰燂紝鎴栬€呮暟鎹病鏈夋樉绀哄嚭杩欎釜鍙傛暟鐨勫奖鍝嶁€濄€?/p>

11. 本节最重要的边界¶

  • MNPE 鏄绾垮垎鏋愶紝涓嶅湪姣忎竴姝ユ満鍣ㄤ汉鎺у埗寰幆閲岃繍琛屻€?/li>
  • MNPE 渚濊禆鎵板姩璇勬祴鏁版嵁锛屼笉鑳界敤 3-5 鏉?episode 灏变笅缁撹銆?/li>
  • posterior 闆嗕腑璇存槑鈥滄垚鍔熸牱鏈叧鑱斿埌鏌愪釜鍙傛暟鍖哄煙鈥濓紝涓嶇瓑浠蜂簬涓ユ牸鍥犳灉銆?/li>
  • 璁烘枃閲岀殑 MNPE 妗嗘灦鏀寔娣峰悎杩炵画/绂绘暎鍙傛暟锛汻oboLab 浠ｇ爜鍦ㄧ函杩炵画鍙傛暟鏃朵細鑷姩閫€鍥?NPE銆?/li>
  • 濡傛灉瀹為獙鏁版嵁鐨勯噰鏍峰垎甯冨緢鍋忥紝蹇呴』鍏虫敞 importance sampling 鍜?ESS銆?/li>
  • 瀵?4090 鏉ヨ锛孧NPE 鏈韩閫氬父涓嶆槸鏄惧瓨鐡堕锛涚湡姝ｈ€楁椂鑰楁樉瀛樼殑鏄墠闈㈢殑 Isaac Sim + VLA rollout 鏁版嵁閲囬泦銆?/li>

12. 一句话总结¶

鏍稿績缁撹锛歊oboLab 鐨?MNPE 鏁忔劅鎬у垎鏋愶紝鏄妸鈥滆窇瀹屽緢澶氬甫鎵板姩鐨?episode鈥濅箣鍚庡緱鍒扮殑琛ㄦ牸鏁版嵁锛屽彉鎴?p(鐜鍙傛暟 | 鎴愬姛鎴栧け璐?銆傚畠鐨勪环鍊兼槸瀹氫綅绛栫暐瀵圭浉鏈恒€佸厜鐓с€佹潗璐ㄣ€佺墿浣撲綅濮跨瓑鍥犵礌鐨勮剢寮辨€э紝鑰屼笉鏄啀缁欎竴涓畝鍗曞钩鍧囧垎銆?
In [ ]:
# ===== 绮捐6锛歁NPE 杞婚噺楠岃瘉 =====
# 杩欎釜娴嬭瘯涓嶄緷璧?sbi锛屼篃涓嶅亣瑁呮浛浠ｇ湡姝ｇ殑 MNPE銆?/span>
# 瀹冨彧楠岃瘉璁烘枃閲屾渶鏍稿績鐨?posterior 鐩磋锛?/span>
#   prior: camera_offset 鍦?[0, 1] 涓婂潎鍖€閲囨牱锛?/span>
#   likelihood: camera_offset 瓒婂ぇ锛宻uccess probability 瓒婁綆锛?/span>
#   posterior p(theta | success=1) 搴旇鏇村亸鍚戝皬 camera_offset銆?/span>

import numpy as np

rng = np.random.default_rng(260409860)
n = 20000

# theta 鐨勪袱涓淮搴︼細涓€涓繛缁壈鍔紝涓€涓鏁ｅ厜鐓х被鍒€?/span>
camera_offset = rng.uniform(0.0, 1.0, size=n)
lighting_category = rng.integers(0, 3, size=n)  # 0=dim, 1=normal, 2=bright
lighting_bonus = np.array([-1.0, 1.2, 0.0])[lighting_category]

def sigmoid(z):
    return 1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-z))

# 鍚堟垚涓€涓€滅瓥鐣ュ鐩告満鍋忕Щ鏁忔劅鈥濈殑涓栫晫锛?/span>
# 鐩告満瓒婂亸绂诲弬鑰冧綅濮匡紝鎴愬姛姒傜巼瓒婁綆锛涙甯稿厜鐓ф垚鍔熸鐜囨洿楂樸€?/span>
success_likelihood = sigmoid(2.0 - 5.0 * camera_offset + lighting_bonus)
posterior_weights = success_likelihood / success_likelihood.sum()

def weighted_quantile(values, quantiles, weights):
    order = np.argsort(values)
    sorted_values = values[order]
    sorted_weights = weights[order]
    cdf = np.cumsum(sorted_weights)
    cdf = cdf / cdf[-1]
    return np.interp(quantiles, cdf, sorted_values)

prior_camera_mean = float(camera_offset.mean())
posterior_camera_mean = float(np.sum(camera_offset * posterior_weights))
uniform_weights = np.full(n, 1.0 / n)
prior_camera_ci = weighted_quantile(
    camera_offset,
    np.array([0.025, 0.975]),
    uniform_weights,
).tolist()
posterior_camera_ci = weighted_quantile(
    camera_offset,
    np.array([0.025, 0.975]),
    posterior_weights,
).tolist()

prior_lighting_probs = np.bincount(lighting_category, minlength=3) / n
posterior_lighting_probs = np.array([
    posterior_weights[lighting_category == i].sum()
    for i in range(3)
])

# 瀵圭収缁勶細濡傛灉 success 鍜?camera_offset 鏃犲叧锛宲osterior 搴旇鍩烘湰绛変簬 prior銆?/span>
flat_likelihood = np.full(n, 0.45)
flat_weights = flat_likelihood / flat_likelihood.sum()
flat_camera_mean = float(np.sum(camera_offset * flat_weights))
flat_camera_ci = weighted_quantile(
    camera_offset,
    np.array([0.025, 0.975]),
    flat_weights,
).tolist()

mnpe_tests = [
    ("success_posterior_moves_camera_toward_reference", posterior_camera_mean < prior_camera_mean - 0.12),
    ("success_posterior_has_lower_upper_ci", posterior_camera_ci[1] < prior_camera_ci[1] - 0.05),
    ("normal_lighting_more_likely_given_success", posterior_lighting_probs[1] > prior_lighting_probs[1] + 0.12),
    ("uninformative_likelihood_keeps_prior_mean", abs(flat_camera_mean - prior_camera_mean) < 1e-12),
    ("uninformative_likelihood_keeps_prior_ci", np.max(np.abs(np.array(flat_camera_ci) - np.array(prior_camera_ci))) < 1e-12),
]

print(f"prior_camera_mean={prior_camera_mean:.3f}")
print(f"posterior_camera_mean_given_success={posterior_camera_mean:.3f}")
print(f"prior_camera_95ci={[round(x, 3) for x in prior_camera_ci]}")
print(f"posterior_camera_95ci_given_success={[round(x, 3) for x in posterior_camera_ci]}")
print(f"prior_lighting_probs={[round(float(x), 3) for x in prior_lighting_probs]}")
print(f"posterior_lighting_probs_given_success={[round(float(x), 3) for x in posterior_lighting_probs]}")
for name, ok in mnpe_tests:
    print(f"{name}: {'PASS' if ok else 'FAIL'}")

assert all(ok for _, ok in mnpe_tests), mnpe_tests
write_status(
    "mnpe_lightweight_tests",
    {
        "all_passed": all(ok for _, ok in mnpe_tests),
        "prior_camera_mean": prior_camera_mean,
        "posterior_camera_mean_given_success": posterior_camera_mean,
        "prior_camera_95ci": prior_camera_ci,
        "posterior_camera_95ci_given_success": posterior_camera_ci,
        "prior_lighting_probs": prior_lighting_probs.tolist(),
        "posterior_lighting_probs_given_success": posterior_lighting_probs.tolist(),
        "flat_likelihood_camera_mean": flat_camera_mean,
        "flat_likelihood_camera_95ci": flat_camera_ci,
        "tests": [{"name": name, "passed": bool(ok)} for name, ok in mnpe_tests],
        "boundary": "This validates posterior-conditioning intuition on synthetic data; real RoboLab MNPE requires variation rollout CSV and sbi.",
    },
)

0.13 论文精讲：Baseline 场景生成方法¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_07_baseline_method.md锛屽搴旇鏂?Appendix C-C Baseline Method锛歜aseline 鏄?scene generation 瀵圭収鏂规硶锛屼笉鏄瓥鐣?baseline銆傚畠鐢?LLM 閫夌墿浣撳拰缃戞牸甯冨眬锛屽啀鎶婂璞℃寜 cell 椤哄簭鎽嗘斁骞?jitter锛屼竴娆?pass 鍚庡仛鐗╃悊 settle锛涘畠鑳戒繚璇佸熀鏈垎鏁ｏ紝浣嗙己灏?place-in銆?code>place-on銆?code>cluster-around 鍜屽け璐ュ弽棣堜慨澶嶃€?/p>

精讲 7：Baseline 方法，论文里的对照场景生成怎么实现¶

棰滆壊鏍囪瘑锛氱豢鑹茶〃绀烘牳蹇冪粨璁猴紝钃濊壊琛ㄧず婧愮爜/杈撳叆杈撳嚭璺緞锛屾鑹茶〃绀鸿竟鐣屻€侀闄╁拰瀹规槗璇В鐨勭偣銆?

先说结论¶

璁烘枃 Appendix C-C 鐨?Baseline Method 鎸囩殑鏄€滃満鏅敓鎴?baseline鈥濓紝涓嶆槸 Pi05銆丟R00T銆丳aliGemma 杩欎簺绛栫暐 baseline銆傚畠鏄嬁鏉ュ拰 RoboLab 鑷繁鐨勫眰绾у紡 scene generation 鏂规硶瀵规瘮鐨勩€?/p>

鏍稿績缁撹锛歜aseline 鏄竴绉嶆爣鍑?domain randomization 椋庢牸鐨勫崟娆″竷灞€鏂规硶锛歀LM 鍏堥€変竴鎵瑰璞★紝鍐嶇粰鍑轰竴涓闈㈢綉鏍硷紱绠楁硶鎶婃闈㈠垏鎴?rows x columns 涓?cell锛屾妸瀵硅薄鎸夐『搴忓杩?cell锛屽苟鍦?cell 鍐呴殢鏈?jitter銆傚畠鑳戒繚璇佸熀鏈棿闅旓紝浣嗕笉浼氱敓鎴愨€滄斁杩涘鍣ㄢ€濃€滃爢鍙犲湪鏀拺鐗╀笂鈥濃€滃洿缁?anchor 鑱氱被鈥濊繖浜涙湁璇箟缁撴瀯鐨勭湡瀹炲満鏅€?

涓€鍙ヨ瘽璁颁綇锛?/p> 

baseline = 閫夌墿浣?+ 缃戞牸鍒嗘牸 + cell 鍐呴殢鏈烘姈鍔?+ 鍥哄畾瀹夊叏楂樺害 + 涓€娆＄墿鐞?settle
RoboLab ours = 璇箟璋撹瘝 + 鍑犱綍绾︽潫姹傝В + 鐗╃悊绾︽潫姹傝В + 澶辫触鍙嶉淇

1. Baseline 在论文里解决什么问题¶

璁烘枃鍋?scene generation 鏃讹紝闇€瑕佽瘉鏄庤嚜宸辩殑灞傜骇寮忔柟娉曚笉鏄€滅湅璧锋潵澶嶆潅浣嗘病蹇呰鈥濄€傛墍浠ュ畠璁捐浜嗕竴涓己浣嗙畝鍗曠殑瀵圭収缁勶細

鏂规硶 浣滅敤
Baseline 浠ｈ〃甯歌 domain randomization / grid random placement锛氬璞¤兘鍒嗘暎鎽嗗湪妗岄潰涓?/td>
Ours 浠ｈ〃 RoboLab 鐨勫眰绾у紡璇箟鍦烘櫙鐢熸垚锛氬璞℃湁瀹瑰櫒銆佹敮鎾戙€佽仛绫汇€佺浉瀵逛綅缃拰鐗╃悊妫€鏌?/td>

杩欎釜 baseline 涓嶆槸涓轰簡璺?policy 璇勬祴锛岃€屾槸涓轰簡鍥炵瓟锛?/p> 

濡傛灉鍙敤缃戞牸闅忔満鎽嗘斁锛岀敓鎴愬満鏅川閲忚兘涓嶈兘鎺ヨ繎 RoboLab 鐨勫眰绾у紡鍦烘櫙锛?

璁烘枃缁撹鏄笉鑳姐€俠aseline 鍙互鎽嗗紑鐗╀綋锛屼絾鍦ㄨ瑙夌湡瀹炴劅銆佸姛鑳芥€с€佸竷灞€姝ｇ‘鎬с€佸畬鏁存€у拰 GPT preference 涓婇兘鏄庢樉寮变簬灞傜骇寮忔柟娉曘€?/p>

2. Baseline 的输入输出¶

Baseline 杈撳叆锛?/p>

杈撳叆 鍚箟
theme 鍦烘櫙涓婚锛屼緥濡?kitchen counter銆乥athroom counter銆乧lassroom supplies
object catalog 鍙€夊璞″拰灏哄
target object count 甯屾湜鍦烘櫙閲屾斁澶氬皯鐗╀綋
rows, columns LLM 寤鸿鐨勬闈㈢綉鏍煎昂瀵?/td>
table bounds 妗岄潰鑼冨洿锛屼緥濡?X/Y 杈圭晫
jitter range cell 鍐呴殢鏈哄亸绉昏寖鍥?/td>

Baseline 杈撳嚭锛?/p>

杈撳嚭 鍚箟
object list LLM 閫夊嚭鏉ョ殑瀵硅薄
(x, y, z, yaw) 姣忎釜鐗╀綋鍦ㄦ闈笂鐨勪綅缃€侀珮搴﹀拰鏈濆悜
settled scene 鐗╃悊浠跨湡 settle 鍚庣殑鍦烘櫙

浠ｇ爜灞傞潰鍙互鎶借薄鎴愶細

objects = llm_select_objects(theme, catalog, target_count)
rows, cols = llm_suggest_grid(objects, table_size)
cells = split_table_into_grid(table_bounds, rows, cols)

for object, cell in zip(objects, cells):
    x = cell.center_x + uniform(-jitter_x, jitter_x)
    y = cell.center_y + uniform(-jitter_y, jitter_y)
    z = safe_height(object)
    yaw = random_yaw()
    place_on_table(object, x, y, z, yaw)

simulate_under_gravity()

瀹冧笉鏄竴涓€滄晠鎰忓緢宸€濈殑 strawman銆傚畠鍚堢悊鐨勫湴鏂瑰湪浜庯細

鎵€浠ュ畠鍙互浠ｈ〃涓€绫诲父瑙佸仛娉曪細

鍙璁╃墿浣撳湪妗岄潰涓婇殢鏈轰笖涓嶉噸鍙狅紝灏卞彲浠ュ仛澶ц妯¤瘎娴嬨€?

RoboLab 璁烘枃瑕佸弽椹崇殑姝ｆ槸杩欎釜鍋囪锛氱湡瀹炰换鍔¤瘎娴嬮渶瑕佺殑涓嶅彧鏄€滅墿浣撲笉閲嶅彔鈥濓紝杩橀渶瑕佽涔夊拰鍔熻兘缁撴瀯銆?/p>

6. 源码对应：主方法怎么落地¶

铏界劧 baseline 鑷韩娌℃湁鍦ㄥ綋鍓?checkout 閲屼綔涓轰富鑴氭湰鏆撮湶锛屼絾涓绘柟娉曠殑鏍稿績妯″潡寰堟竻妤氥€?/p>

predicates.py¶

杩欓噷瀹氫箟 scene generation 鐨勮皳璇嶇被鍨嬶細

Spatial predicates:
  left-of / right-of / front-of / back-of
  place-on-base
  align-left / align-right / align-center
  facing-left / random-rot

Physical predicates:
  place-on
  place-in
  place-anywhere

璇翠汉璇濓細杩欑浉褰撲簬缁?LLM 涓€涓€滃満鏅娉曗€濄€侺LM 涓嶇洿鎺ヨ緭鍑轰贡涓冨叓绯熺殑鍧愭爣锛岃€屾槸杈撳嚭鈥滆嫻鏋滄斁杩涚閲屸€濃€滃嫼瀛愭斁鍦ㄧ洏瀛愪笂鈥濃€滄澂瀛愬湪纰楀乏杈光€濊繖绉嶅彲姹傝В缁撴瀯銆?/p>

place-on:

杩欐鏄?baseline 缂哄皯鐨勮兘鍔涳細baseline 鎵€鏈夌墿浣撻兘鍙槸妗岄潰涓婄殑鐙珛 item锛屼富鏂规硶鍙互鐢熸垚鈥滃鍣ㄩ噷鏈変笢瑗库€濃€滄敮鎾戠墿涓婃湁涓滆タ鈥濃€滃瘑闆嗙墿鍝佸爢鈥濈殑鍦烘櫙銆?/p>

feedback_system.py¶

澶辫触鍚庝細鐢熸垚鍙嶉锛屼緥濡傦細

SOLVER FAILURE:
  collisions detected
  objects out of bounds
  increase distance or reposition

PHYSICS VALIDATION FAILURE:
  object moved too much after simulation
  increase support_ratio
  place unstable objects inside containers

璁烘枃鍥?17 閲岀殑淇鎻愮ず锛屽氨鏄妸 solver/physics 鐨勯敊璇秷鎭墦鍖呭洖 LLM锛岃瀹冧笅涓€杞敼鍦烘櫙璁″垝銆?/p>

8. 为什么 baseline 对 RoboLab-120 不够¶

RoboLab-120 鐨勪换鍔′笉鏄彧鐪嬧€滄涓婃湁鍝簺鐗╀綋鈥濓紝杩樼湅锛?/p>

  • 瑙嗚灞炴€э細棰滆壊銆佽涔夈€佸ぇ灏忋€?/li>

  • 杩囩▼鎺ㄧ悊锛歛ffordance銆乺eorientation銆乻tacking銆?/li>
  • 澶氭楠わ細鍏?A 鍐?B銆?/li>

濡傛灉鍦烘櫙鍙槸缃戞牸鍖栭殢鏈烘憜鏀撅紝寰堝浠诲姟寰堥毦鑷劧鎴愮珛锛?/p>

浠诲姟闇€姹?/th> baseline 闂
鈥滄妸纰楅噷鐨勮嫻鏋滄嬁鍑烘潵鈥?/td> baseline 鍒濆鐘舵€佹病鏈?place-in

鈥滄妸宸﹁竟鐨勭孩鐗╀綋鏀捐繘绠卞瓙鈥?/td> cell 浣嶇疆鍙兘鏈?left/right锛屼絾涓嶆槸璇箟瑙勫垝鍑烘潵鐨勫満鏅叧绯?/td>
鈥滄妸涓変釜 cube 鍙犺捣鏉モ€?/td> baseline 涓嶇敓鎴愮ǔ瀹氬爢鍙犵粨鏋?/td>
鈥滄暣鐞嗕竴鍫嗘潅涔辨煖鍙扮墿鍝佲€?/td> grid 鎺掑垪涓嶅儚鐪熷疄鏉備贡鍦烘櫙

鎵€浠?baseline 鍙互浣滀负瀵圭収锛屼絾涓嶈兘浣滀负楂樿川閲忎换鍔＄敓鎴愮殑涓昏矾寰勩€?/p>

9. 本次 notebook 的轻量测试要验证什么¶

鎴戜滑涓嶉渶瑕佸湪鏈満閲嶈窇 Isaac 娓叉煋锛屼篃鑳介獙璇?baseline 鐨勭粨鏋勫眬闄愩€傝交閲忔祴璇曞仛涓変欢浜嬶細

  1. 鐢?grid_baseline_layout() 澶嶅埢璁烘枃 baseline锛氬璞℃寜 grid cell 椤哄簭鎽嗘斁锛宑ell 鍐?jitter銆?/li>
  2. 鐢ㄤ竴涓?hierarchical_layout_example() 琛ㄧず涓绘柟娉曡兘琛ㄨ揪鐨勭粨鏋勶細place-in銆?code>place-on銆?code>cluster-around銆?/li>
  3. 妫€鏌?baseline 鑳藉仛鍒板熀鏈垎绂伙紝浣嗕笉鑳借〃杈惧鍣?鏀拺/鑱氱被鍏崇郴銆?/li>

棰勬湡缁撹锛?/p> 

baseline_min_distance_ok = True
baseline_semantic_relations_supported = False
hierarchical_relations_supported = True
baseline_top_level_slots > hierarchical_top_level_slots

杩欏搴旇鏂囬噷鐨勫樊寮傦細baseline 涓嶆槸涓嶈兘鎽嗕笢瑗匡紝鑰屾槸鍙兘鎽嗏€滃钩闈㈡暎鐐光€濓紱RoboLab 涓绘柟娉曡兘鐢熸垚鈥滄湁鍔熻兘缁撴瀯鐨勫満鏅€濄€?/p>

10. 一句话总结¶

鏍稿績缁撹锛欰ppendix C-C 鐨?baseline 鏄€滅綉鏍奸殢鏈烘憜鏀?+ 涓€娆＄墿鐞?settle鈥濈殑鍦烘櫙鐢熸垚瀵圭収銆傚畠鑳戒繚璇佺墿浣撳熀鏈垎寮€锛屽嵈涓嶈兘鐢熸垚瀹瑰櫒銆佹敮鎾戙€佸爢鍙犮€佽仛绫诲拰鍙慨澶嶇殑璇箟缁撴瀯锛汻oboLab 涓绘柟娉曠湡姝ｅ鍑烘潵鐨勬槸璋撹瘝琛ㄨ揪銆佸嚑浣?鐗╃悊姹傝В鍜屽け璐ュ弽棣堥棴鐜€?
In [ ]:
# ===== 绮捐7锛欱aseline scene generation 杞婚噺楠岃瘉 =====
# 杩欎釜娴嬭瘯澶嶅埢璁烘枃 Appendix C-C 鐨勬牳蹇冨樊寮傦細
# - baseline: grid cell + jitter + all objects on table
# - hierarchical/ours: explicit semantic relations such as place-in/place-on/cluster-around

import math
import numpy as np

def grid_baseline_layout(objects, rows, cols, table_bounds=(0.25, 0.85, -0.40, 0.40), jitter_ratio=0.18, seed=7):
    # 鍗曟 grid+jitter baseline锛氭瘡涓?object 鍗犱竴涓闈?cell锛屼笉琛ㄨ揪瀹瑰櫒/鏀拺鍏崇郴銆?/span>
    if len(objects) > rows * cols:
        raise ValueError("grid has fewer cells than objects")

    rng = np.random.default_rng(seed)
    x_min, x_max, y_min, y_max = table_bounds
    cell_w = (x_max - x_min) / cols
    cell_h = (y_max - y_min) / rows

    placements = []
    for index, obj in enumerate(objects):
        row = index // cols
        col = index % cols
        cx = x_min + (col + 0.5) * cell_w
        cy = y_min + (row + 0.5) * cell_h
        x = cx + rng.uniform(-jitter_ratio * cell_w, jitter_ratio * cell_w)
        y = cy + rng.uniform(-jitter_ratio * cell_h, jitter_ratio * cell_h)
        placements.append(
            {
                "object": obj,
                "type": "on-table",
                "x": float(x),
                "y": float(y),
                "z_policy": "safe_height",
                "yaw": float(rng.uniform(-math.pi, math.pi)),
            }
        )
    return placements

def hierarchical_layout_example():
    # 妯℃嫙 RoboLab 涓绘柟娉曡兘琛ㄨ揪鐨勮涔夎皳璇嶇粨鏋勩€?/span>
    return [
        {"object": "bowl", "type": "anchor", "x": 0.52, "y": 0.02},
        {"object": "plate", "type": "anchor", "x": 0.70, "y": -0.16},
        {"object": "banana", "type": "place-in", "container": "bowl"},
        {"object": "apple", "type": "place-in", "container": "bowl"},
        {"object": "spoon", "type": "place-on", "support": "plate"},
        {"object": "mug", "type": "cluster-around", "anchor": "bowl", "radius": 0.13},
    ]

objects = ["bowl", "plate", "banana", "apple", "spoon", "mug"]
baseline = grid_baseline_layout(objects, rows=2, cols=3)
hierarchical = hierarchical_layout_example()

def min_pair_distance(placements):
    coords = np.array([[p["x"], p["y"]] for p in placements], dtype=float)
    best = float("inf")
    for i in range(len(coords)):
        for j in range(i + 1, len(coords)):
            best = min(best, float(np.linalg.norm(coords[i] - coords[j])))
    return best

baseline_min_distance = min_pair_distance(baseline)
baseline_relation_types = {p["type"] for p in baseline}
hierarchical_relation_types = {p["type"] for p in hierarchical}

baseline_top_level_slots = sum(1 for p in baseline if p["type"] == "on-table")
hierarchical_top_level_slots = sum(1 for p in hierarchical if p["type"] in {"anchor", "cluster-around"})

baseline_tests = [
    ("baseline_keeps_basic_separation", baseline_min_distance > 0.12),
    ("baseline_all_objects_are_flat_table_items", baseline_relation_types == {"on-table"}),
    ("hierarchical_expresses_containment", "place-in" in hierarchical_relation_types),
    ("hierarchical_expresses_support", "place-on" in hierarchical_relation_types),
    ("hierarchical_expresses_cluster", "cluster-around" in hierarchical_relation_types),
    ("hierarchical_uses_fewer_top_level_table_slots", hierarchical_top_level_slots < baseline_top_level_slots),
]

print(f"baseline_min_distance={baseline_min_distance:.3f} m")
print(f"baseline_relation_types={sorted(baseline_relation_types)}")
print(f"hierarchical_relation_types={sorted(hierarchical_relation_types)}")
print(f"baseline_top_level_slots={baseline_top_level_slots}")
print(f"hierarchical_top_level_slots={hierarchical_top_level_slots}")
for name, ok in baseline_tests:
    print(f"{name}: {'PASS' if ok else 'FAIL'}")

assert all(ok for _, ok in baseline_tests), baseline_tests
write_status(
    "baseline_method_lightweight_tests",
    {
        "all_passed": all(ok for _, ok in baseline_tests),
        "baseline_min_distance": baseline_min_distance,
        "baseline_relation_types": sorted(baseline_relation_types),
        "hierarchical_relation_types": sorted(hierarchical_relation_types),
        "baseline_top_level_slots": baseline_top_level_slots,
        "hierarchical_top_level_slots": hierarchical_top_level_slots,
        "baseline_example": baseline,
        "hierarchical_example": hierarchical,
        "tests": [{"name": name, "passed": bool(ok)} for name, ok in baseline_tests],
        "boundary": "This validates the structural difference between grid+jitter baseline and predicate-based scene generation; it does not render or physics-settle a USD scene.",
    },
)

0.14 论文精讲：论文实验总览与 Algorithm 1¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_08_paper_experiments.md锛屽搴旇鏂囦腑鐨勫疄楠屼綋绯伙細RoboLab-120 绛栫暐璇勬祴銆佺粏绮掑害鑳藉姏鍒嗘瀽銆佹壈鍔ㄦ晱鎰熸€с€佺湡瀹炰笘鐣岀浉鍏虫€с€佸満鏅敓鎴愯川閲忋€佷换鍔＄敓鎴愯川閲忥紝浠ュ強浣犳埅鍥鹃噷鐨?Algorithm 1 Spatial Constraint Solver銆傛湰娆″凡鍔犳繁涓衡€滃疄楠屽湴鍥?+ 璇佹嵁閾锯€濓細琛ュ厖 success/score/event/trajectory 鐨勮亴璐ｅ樊寮傘€佷富琛ㄨ兘鍔涚敾鍍忚娉曘€佸満鏅敓鎴愯川閲忚〃鍜?task generation judge 鍏淮銆佷互鍙?4090 涓婂彲鎵垮彈鐨勫皬璁烘枃鐭╅樀銆?/p>

精讲 8：论文实验总览与 Algorithm 1 空间约束求解器¶

銆愮豢鑹叉爣璇嗭綔鏍稿績缁撹銆?/strong> 璁烘枃閲岀殑鈥滃疄楠屸€濅笉鏄崟涓€璺戝垎锛岃€屾槸涓€缁勪簰鐩告敮鎾戠殑楠岃瘉锛氱瓥鐣ヨ瘎娴嬨€佺粏绮掑害鍒嗘瀽銆佹壈鍔ㄦ晱鎰熸€с€佺湡瀹炰笘鐣岀浉鍏虫€с€佸満鏅敓鎴愯川閲忋€佷换鍔＄敓鎴愯川閲忋€?br> 銆愯摑鑹叉爣璇嗭綔婧愮爜璺緞銆?/strong> 杩欎簺瀹為獙鍒嗗埆钀藉湪 policies/pi0_family/銆?code>robolab/eval/銆?code>robolab/core/logging/銆?code>analysis/銆?code>robolab/scene_gen/銆?code>skills/robolab-taskgen/ 绛夋ā鍧椼€?br> 銆愭鑹叉爣璇嗭綔瀹规槗璇В銆?/strong> Algorithm 1 涓嶆槸绛栫暐璇勬祴绠楁硶锛屼篃涓嶆槸瀹屾暣 3D 鐗╃悊鏀剧疆绠楁硶锛涘畠涓昏瑙ｅ喅鈥滄闈㈠熀纭€瀵硅薄鐨?2D 甯冨眬绾︽潫鈥濓紝鍚庣画鐨?place-in銆?code>place-on 绛?3D 鎺ヨЕ鍏崇郴杩樿浜ょ粰鐗╃悊姹傝В/settle銆?/p>

先说结论¶

璁烘枃瀹為獙鍙互鎸?6 鏉′富绾跨悊瑙ｏ細

瀹為獙涓荤嚎 瀹冨洖绛旂殑闂 涓昏杈撳叆 涓昏杈撳嚭 浠ｇ爜/鏂囦欢鍏ュ彛

缁嗙矑搴﹁兘鍔涘垎鏋?/td> 澶辫触鍒板簳鏉ヨ嚜瑙嗚銆佺┖闂村叧绯汇€侀暱鏃跺簭杩樻槸绋嬪簭鎿嶄綔 episode 缁撴灉 + task metadata 鎸夊睘鎬?闅惧害/瀵硅薄鏁?瀛愪换鍔℃暟鍒嗙粍鐨勬垚鍔熺巼 analysis/read_results.py銆?code>robolab/core/logging/results.py
鎵板姩鏁忔劅鎬у疄楠?/td> 鍏夌収銆佽儗鏅€佹闈㈢汗鐞嗐€佺浉鏈恒€佺墿浣撳垵濮嬩綅缃彉鍖栦細涓嶄細璁╃瓥鐣ュ穿 variation rollout CSV / episode 缁撴灉 鍚勬壈鍔ㄤ笅鎴愬姛鐜囥€丮NPE 鍚庨獙鏁忔劅鎬?/td> policies/pi0_family/run_*_variation.py銆?code>analysis/sensitivity_analysis/
鐪熷疄涓栫晫鐩稿叧鎬ч獙璇?/td> RoboLab 浠跨湡璇勬祴鎺掑悕鏄惁鍜岀湡瀹炴満鍣ㄤ汉 arena 鎺掑悕涓€鑷?/td> RoboLab score + RoboArena/Elo 绫荤湡瀹炶瘎娴嬬粨鏋?/td> Spearman/Pearson 鐩稿叧鎬?/td> 璁烘枃瀹為獙鍒嗘瀽鑴氭湰鍙ｅ緞锛岀粨鏋滀笉绛変簬鍗曚换鍔＄湡瀹為儴缃?/td>
鍦烘櫙鐢熸垚璐ㄩ噺瀹為獙 涓绘柟娉曠敓鎴愮殑鍦烘櫙鏄惁姣?baseline 鏇寸湡瀹炪€佹洿瀹屾暣銆佹洿鍙瘎娴?/td> LLM 鐢熸垚鐨勫満鏅€佹覆鏌撳浘銆乂QA/GPT judge VQA score銆丟PT preference銆丷eal/Func/Lay/Compl/Qual robolab/scene_gen/llm_scene_gen/

深挖 0：论文实验真正想证明的不是一个分数，而是一条证据链¶

杩欑瘒璁烘枃鐨勫疄楠屼綋绯诲彲浠ユ寜鈥滀粠鍙敤鍦烘櫙鍒板彲淇＄粨璁衡€濈殑璇佹嵁閾剧悊瑙ｏ細

鍦烘櫙鐢熸垚璐ㄩ噺
  -> 浠诲姟鐢熸垚璐ㄩ噺
  -> 绛栫暐 rollout 璇佹嵁
  -> success / score / trajectory / event 缁熻
  -> 鎸夎兘鍔涜酱鍜岄毦搴﹀垎缁?
  -> 鎵板姩鏁忔劅鎬?
  -> 鐪熷疄涓栫晫鐩稿叧鎬?

姣忎竴灞傚洖绛斾竴涓笉鍚岀殑闂锛?/p>

灞?/th> 鏍稿績闂 濡傛灉杩欎竴灞備笉杩囧叧锛屼細姹℃煋浠€涔?/th>
鍦烘櫙鐢熸垚 鍦烘櫙鏄惁鐪熷疄銆佸悎鐞嗐€佺墿鐞嗗彲鐢?/td> 鍚庣画绛栫暐澶辫触鍙兘鍙槸鍦烘櫙鍨冨溇
浠诲姟鐢熸垚 鎸囦护鍜屾垚鍔熸潯浠舵槸鍚︿竴鑷淬€佸彲鎵ц success/score 澶卞幓璇箟鍙俊搴?/td>
rollout 璁板綍 瑙傛祴銆佸姩浣溿€佷簨浠躲€佽棰戞槸鍚﹀彲杩芥函 鏃犳硶澶嶆煡妯″瀷鍒板簳鎬庝箞澶辫触
鎸囨爣缁熻 鎴愬姛鐜囥€乻core銆佽建杩硅川閲忔槸鍚﹀尯鍒嗘竻妤?/td> 骞冲潎鎴愬姛鐜囦細鎺╃洊閮ㄥ垎瀹屾垚鍜屽潖鍔ㄤ綔
鍒嗙粍鍒嗘瀽 鑳藉姏杞淬€侀毦搴︺€佷换鍔￠暱搴︽槸鍚︽媶寮€鐪?/td> 鏃犳硶瀹氫綅瑙嗚/鍏崇郴/绋嬪簭鍝被鑳藉姏寮?/td>
鎵板姩鏁忔劅鎬?/td> 鍏夌収銆佽儗鏅€佺浉鏈恒€佷綅濮垮彉鍖栨槸鍚﹀奖鍝嶇瓥鐣?/td> 鏃犳硶鍒ゆ柇妯″瀷鏄惁鍙槸纰板阀閫傞厤鏌愪釜璁剧疆
鐪熷疄鐩稿叧鎬?/td> 浠跨湡鎺掑悕鏄惁鍜岀湡瀹炴満鍣ㄤ汉璇勬祴鍚屽悜 鏃犳硶璇存槑浠跨湡 benchmark 瀵圭湡瀹炶瘎浼版湁鐢?/td>

銆愮豢鑹叉爣璇嗭綔鏍稿績缁撹銆?/strong>

RoboLab 鐨勫疄楠岃璁′笉鏄€滆窇 120 涓换鍔″緱鍒颁竴涓帓琛屾鈥濄€傛洿鍑嗙‘鍦拌锛屽畠鏄湪璇佹槑锛氳繖涓?benchmark 浜х敓鐨勫け璐ャ€佽秼鍔裤€佹晱鎰熷洜绱犲拰鐪熷疄涓栫晫鎺掑簭鏈夎冻澶熺殑淇℃伅閲忥紝鑳藉府鍔╁垎鏋?task-generalist policy 鐨勬硾鍖栬兘鍔涖€?/p>

深挖 1：实验矩阵怎么读，别把所有结果混成一个平均数¶

璁烘枃閲岃嚦灏戞湁鍥涗釜缁村害浼氫簰鐩镐氦鍙夛細

缁村害 渚嬪瓙 璇荤粨鏋滄椂瑕侀棶
policy Pi0 / Pi0.5 / GR00T 绛?/td> 鍝釜妯″瀷鏁翠綋鏇村己锛屾槸鍚﹀彧鏄煇绫讳换鍔″己

实验 2：按能力轴、难度和任务结构做细粒度分析¶

璁烘枃涓嶅彧鎶ュ钩鍧囨垚鍔熺巼锛屽洜涓哄钩鍧囨暟浼氭帺鐩栧け璐ュ師鍥犮€俁oboLab 浼氭妸浠诲姟鎸夊涓淮搴︽媶寮€锛?/p>

鑳藉姏杞?/td> visual銆乸rocedural銆乺elational 涓夌被鑳藉姏鏄惁琛ㄧ幇涓嶅悓

濡傛灉涓€涓ā鍨嬪湪 easy 浠诲姟涓婃垚鍔燂紝浣嗗湪 hard 浠诲姟涓婂ぇ骞呬笅闄嶏紝閫氬父璇存槑涓嶆槸鈥滅湅涓嶈鐗╀綋鈥濓紝鑰屾槸闀?horizon銆佸璞′繚鎸併€侀樁娈靛垏鎹㈡垨鎭㈠鑳藉姏涓嶈冻銆?br> 濡傛灉 visual 灞炴€т笅闄嶆槑鏄撅紝閲嶇偣鐪嬮鑹?璇箟璇嗗埆锛涘鏋?relational 涓嬮檷鏄庢樉锛岄噸鐐圭湅宸﹀彸銆佸墠鍚庛€佸鍣ㄣ€佸苟鍒?鎴?璁℃暟绛夎瑷€缁撴瀯銆?/p>

实验 3：扰动敏感性和 MNPE¶

鎵板姩瀹為獙闂殑鏄細妯″瀷鏄笉鏄彧浼氬湪鈥滃垰濂借繖寮犳瀛愩€佸垰濂借繖涓浉鏈恒€佸垰濂借繖涓厜鐓р€濅笅鎴愬姛銆?/p>

璁烘枃閲屽叧蹇冪殑鎵板姩鍖呮嫭锛?/p>

鎵板姩绫诲瀷 绀轰緥
鍏夌収 棰滆壊銆侀槾褰便€佹槒鏆椼€佽繃鏇?/td>
瑙嗚鑳屾櫙 HDR/鑳屾櫙銆佹闈㈢汗鐞?/td>
鐗╀綋鍒濆浣嶇疆 10 cm / 20 cm / 30 cm 绾у埆闅忔満鎵板姩
鐩告満浣嶅Э 澶栭儴鐩告満銆佽厱閮ㄧ浉鏈虹殑浣嶅Э鍙樺寲

鏅€氬仛娉曟槸閫愪釜鎵板姩鐪嬫垚鍔熺巼銆侻NPE 鏇磋繘涓€姝ワ細鎶婃壈鍔ㄥ弬鏁板綋鎴愬彉閲忥紝瑙傚療鈥滄垚鍔?episode 鐨勫弬鏁板悗楠屽垎甯冣€濆拰鈥滃師濮嬮噰鏍峰垎甯冣€濆樊澶氬皯銆?/p>

璇翠汉璇濓細
