        "input": ["camera_data", "lidar_data"],
        "output": ["OpenUSD_scene", "interactive_gaussian_rendering"],
        "why_relevant": "鎶婄湡瀹炴暟鎹噸寤烘垚 Isaac/Omniverse 鍙敤鐨勭缁忛噸寤哄満鏅€?,
        "read_focus": ["NCore data standard", "USD scene", "gRPC rendering", "Isaac Sim integration"],
    },
    "3dgut_3dgrt": {
        "status": "research_to_tooling",
        "url": "https://research.nvidia.com/labs/toronto-ai/3DGUT/",
        "source_title": "NVIDIA Research 3DGUT",
        "input": ["3D_Gaussians"],
        "output": ["nonlinear_camera_rendering", "rolling_shutter", "secondary_rays"],
        "why_relevant": "璁╅珮鏂覆鏌撴敮鎸佸鏉傜浉鏈哄拰鍙嶅皠/鎶樺皠绛?secondary rays銆?,
        "read_focus": ["nonlinear camera projections", "rolling shutter", "reflections/refractions", "3DGRT alignment"],
    },
    "isaac_sim_6_nurec": {
        "status": "2026_early_developer_release",
        "url": "https://forums.developer.nvidia.com/t/announcement-isaac-sim-6-0-early-developer-release-for-gtc26/363709",
        "source_title": "Isaac Sim 6.0 Early Developer Release for GTC'26",
        "input": ["NuRec_3DGS_scene"],
        "output": ["Fabric_Scene_Delegate_integration"],
        "why_relevant": "鎶?NuRec/3DGS 鏇寸洿鎺ュ湴鏀捐繘 Isaac Sim 宸ョ▼鏍堛€?,
        "read_focus": ["NuRec 3DGS libraries", "Fabric Scene Delegate", "PhysX/Newton", "Warp-based Core API"],
    },
    "lyra_2": {
        "status": "2026_generative_world_model",
        "url": "https://research.nvidia.com/labs/toronto-ai/lyra/",
        "source_title": "NVIDIA Research Lyra",
        "input": ["text", "single_image", "video"],
        "output": ["3DGS_world", "explorable_long_horizon_world"],
        "why_relevant": "浠庣敓鎴愬紡杈撳叆浜х敓 3DGS 涓栫晫锛岄€傚悎鏈潵蹇€熸瀯閫犱豢鐪熷満鏅€?,
        "read_focus": ["3DGS decoder", "text/image/video-to-3D", "Isaac Sim import", "dynamic 3D/4D scenes"],
    },
    "physically_embodied_gaussians": {
        "status": "adjacent_frontier_research",
        "url": "https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/building-robotic-mental-models-with-nvidia-warp-and-gaussian-splatting/",
        "source_title": "NVIDIA Blog: Building Robotic Mental Models with NVIDIA Warp and Gaussian Splatting",
        "input": ["few_camera_views", "robot_priors", "interaction_feedback"],
        "output": ["particles_plus_3D_Gaussians_live_world_model"],
        "why_relevant": "鎶婅瑙夐珮鏂拰鐗╃悊绮掑瓙缁戝畾锛岃鏈哄櫒浜鸿竟鐪嬭竟鏇存柊鐗╃悊涓栫晫妯″瀷銆?,
        "read_focus": ["particles + Gaussians dual representation", "differentiable rendering", "NVIDIA Warp", "gsplat"],
    },
    "marble_isaac_nurec_workflow": {
        "status": "integration_workflow",
        "url": "https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/simulate-robotic-environments-faster-with-nvidia-isaac-sim-and-world-labs-marble/",
        "source_title": "NVIDIA Blog: Simulate Robotic Environments Faster with NVIDIA Isaac Sim and World Labs Marble",
        "input": ["Gaussian_splat_PLY", "collider_GLB"],
        "output": ["USDZ_or_Isaac_Sim_scene"],
        "why_relevant": "宸ョ▼涓婂睍绀轰簡 photoreal splat 涓?collider mesh 蹇呴』瀵归綈銆?,
        "read_focus": ["Gaussian splat PLY", "collider GLB", "PLY-to-USDZ", "Gaussian/collider alignment"],
    },
}

nvidia_frontier_link_map = {
    name: {
        "source_title": record["source_title"],
        "url": record["url"],
        "read_focus": record["read_focus"],
    }
    for name, record in nvidia_frontiers_2026.items()
}

def classify_gaussian_method(name, record):
    # 鎶娾€滈珮鏂€濇寜鑱岃矗鎷嗗紑锛岄槻姝㈡妸瑙嗚琛ㄧず銆佺鎾炲嚑浣曘€佺粺璁?KDE 娣蜂负涓€璋堛€?/span>
    if record["role"] == "visual_rendering":
        return "瑙嗚灞?
    if record["role"] in {"physical_collision", "manipulable_objects", "mechanical_properties"}:
        return "鐗╃悊/鍑犱綍灞?
    if record["role"] == "statistical_density_estimation":
        return "缁熻鍒嗘瀽灞?
    return "鍏朵粬"

layer_map = {
    name: classify_gaussian_method(name, record)
    for name, record in robolab_gaussian_stack.items()
}

gaussian_method_tests = [
    (
        "paper_has_visual_splat_and_physics_mesh",
        robolab_gaussian_stack["gaussian_splat_background"]["direct_in_paper"]
        and robolab_gaussian_stack["collision_mesh_for_splat"]["direct_in_paper"],
    ),
    (
        "gaussian_splat_not_claimed_as_physics",
        robolab_gaussian_stack["gaussian_splat_background"]["physics_contact"] is False,
    ),
    (
        "collision_mesh_is_contact_layer",
        robolab_gaussian_stack["collision_mesh_for_splat"]["physics_contact"] is True,
    ),
    (
        "foreground_mesh_is_manipulation_layer",
        robolab_gaussian_stack["mesh_foreground_objects"]["role"] == "manipulable_objects",
    ),
    (
        "vomp_is_mechanical_not_rendering",
        robolab_gaussian_stack["vomp_mass_density"]["role"] == "mechanical_properties",
    ),
    (
        "mnpe_kde_is_statistical_not_3dgs",
        layer_map["mnpe_gaussian_kde"] == "缁熻鍒嗘瀽灞?,
    ),
    (
        "frontiers_cover_nurec_3dgut_lyra",
        all(key in nvidia_frontiers_2026 for key in ["omniverse_nurec", "3dgut_3dgrt", "lyra_2"]),
    ),
    (
        "each_frontier_has_url",
        all(record["url"].startswith("https://") for record in nvidia_frontiers_2026.values()),
    ),
    (
        "each_frontier_has_read_focus",
        all(record["read_focus"] for record in nvidia_frontiers_2026.values()),
    ),
    (
        "frontier_link_map_includes_marble_workflow",
        "marble_isaac_nurec_workflow" in nvidia_frontier_link_map,
    ),
    (
        "each_frontier_has_input_and_output",
        all(record["input"] and record["output"] for record in nvidia_frontiers_2026.values()),
    ),
    (
        "isaac_sim_6_marked_as_2026_integration",
        nvidia_frontiers_2026["isaac_sim_6_nurec"]["status"] == "2026_early_developer_release",
    ),
    (
        "not_all_frontiers_claimed_as_robolab_direct_use",
        nvidia_frontiers_2026["physically_embodied_gaussians"]["status"] == "adjacent_frontier_research",
    ),
]

report = {
    "robolab_gaussian_stack": robolab_gaussian_stack,
    "layer_map": layer_map,
    "nvidia_frontiers_2026": nvidia_frontiers_2026,
    "nvidia_frontier_link_map": nvidia_frontier_link_map,
    "tests": [{"name": name, "passed": bool(ok)} for name, ok in gaussian_method_tests],
    "all_passed": all(ok for _, ok in gaussian_method_tests),
    "boundary": "This is a source-grounded conceptual test. It does not run NuRec/3DGS rendering or Isaac Sim physics.",
}

print(json.dumps(report, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
for name, ok in gaussian_method_tests:
    print(f"{name}: {'PASS' if ok else 'FAIL'}")

assert report["all_passed"], gaussian_method_tests
write_status("gaussian_sim_methods_lightweight_tests", report)

0.19 论文精讲：剩余核心内容与评测证据链¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_13_remaining_core_topics.md銆傚畠涓嶆槸閲嶅鍓嶉潰鐨?scene/task/solver/MNPE/Gaussian锛岃€屾槸琛ヨ鏂囬噷杩樻病绯荤粺璁查€忕殑璇勬祴渚ф牳蹇冿細瀹為獙鍗忚銆?code>success 涓?score 鐨勫尯鍒€佽瑷€鍙樹綋銆佸鏉傚害 sweep銆佷簨浠惰拷韪€佺湡瀹炰笘鐣岀浉鍏虫€с€佺粺璁＄疆淇″拰闄愬埗杈圭晫銆?/p>

精讲 13：对照论文后还没讲透的核心内容¶

銆愮豢鑹叉爣璇嗭綔鏍稿績缁撹銆?/strong> 鍓?12 璁插凡缁忚鐩栦簡 RoboLab 鐨勭敓鎴愰摼璺€佷换鍔＄粨鏋勩€佽兘鍔涜酱銆丼PARC銆丮NPE銆乥aseline銆丏TGE銆乸rompt銆乻olver銆丟aussian 璺嚎銆傚墿涓嬫渶鍊煎緱琛ョ殑涓€鍧椾笉鏄€滃啀璁蹭竴涓畻娉曗€濓紝鑰屾槸璁烘枃濡備綍鎶婁竴娆℃満鍣ㄤ汉 rollout 鍙樻垚鍙俊璇勬祴璇佹嵁锛氬疄楠屽崗璁€佷弗鏍兼垚鍔熺巼涓庨儴鍒嗗垎鏁般€佽瑷€鍙樹綋銆侀敊璇簨浠躲€佺湡瀹炰笘鐣岀浉鍏虫€с€佺粺璁＄疆淇″拰闄愬埗杈圭晫銆?/p>

銆愯摑鑹叉爣璇嗭綔婧愮爜/杈撳叆杈撳嚭璺緞銆?/strong> 杩欓儴鍒嗕富瑕佸搴旇鏂?III-C Metrics銆両V Experiments銆両V-D Real-World Verification銆乂 Limitations锛屼互鍙?RoboLab docs 閲岀殑 analysis/read_results.py銆?code>docs/data.md銆?code>docs/event_tracking.md銆?code>docs/dashboard.md銆?code>docs/subtask.md銆?/p>

銆愭鑹叉爣璇嗭綔瀹规槗璇В銆?/strong> 瑙嗛濂界湅涓嶇瓑浜庡鐜版垚鍔燂紱鍗曚换鍔℃垚鍔熶笉绛変簬 RoboLab-120锛?code>success=True 涓嶇瓑浜庢ā鍨嬪畬鍏ㄦ噦浠诲姟锛?code>score>0 鎵嶈兘鍛婅瘔鎴戜滑妯″瀷鍦ㄥ摢浜涗腑闂存楠ゅ凡缁忎細浜嗐€佸湪鍝噷澶辫触銆?/p>

先做覆盖差分¶

璁烘枃鏍稿績鐐?/th> 鍓嶉潰鏄惁宸茶 杩樼己浠€涔?/th>
scene/task/env generation 宸茶锛岀簿璁?1-3銆?0-11 涓嶉噸澶?/td>
competency axes/difficulty 宸茶锛岀簿璁?4 涓嶉噸澶?/td>
SPARC trajectory metrics 宸茶锛岀簿璁?5 涓嶉噸澶?/td>
MNPE sensitivity 宸茶锛岀簿璁?6 涓嶉噸澶?/td>
scene generation baseline / DTGE / prompt 宸茶锛岀簿璁?7銆?銆?0 涓嶉噸澶?/td>
Gaussian Splat + Mesh / NuRec 宸茶锛岀簿璁?12 涓嶉噸澶?/td>
evaluation protocol 寮辫 闇€瑕佹槑纭緭鍏ャ€佽緭鍑恒€乪pisode 鏁般€乸olicy/robot/action/camera 缁戝畾
success vs score 寮辫 闇€瑕佽В閲婁负浠€涔堣鏂囧己璋?score/success gap
language variations 寮辫 闇€瑕佽В閲?vague/default/specific 涓轰粈涔堟槸娉涘寲娴嬭瘯
event tracking / failure taxonomy 寮辫 闇€瑕佽В閲?wrong object銆乨rop銆乭it table 绛変簨浠舵€庝箞甯姪璇婃柇
real-world verification 寮辫 闇€瑕佽В閲?RoboArena 鐩稿叧鎬ф槸浠€涔堛€佷笉鏄粈涔?/td>
statistical confidence / dashboard 寮辫 闇€瑕佽В閲?95% CI銆丅eta interval銆丼tudent-t銆佺粨鏋滆仛鍚?/td>
limitations 寮辫 闇€瑕佽娓呮鍝簺浠诲姟 RoboLab 鏆傛椂涓嶆搮闀胯瘎浼?/td>

1. 实验协议：RoboLab 真正测的是什么¶

璁烘枃鐨勫疄楠岃缃笉鏄€滄墦寮€涓€涓豢鐪燂紝鐪嬬湅鏈哄櫒浜鸿兘涓嶈兘鍔ㄢ€濄€傚畠鏇村儚涓€涓爣鍑嗗寲娴嬭瘎琛細

task + scene + instruction variant
  + robot embodiment
  + policy client/server
  + camera/action/observation config
  + controlled variations
  + repeated episodes
  -> episode_results + videos + HDF5 + event logs + metrics

璁烘枃 IV-A 鐨勫叧閿俊鎭細

  • 绛栫暐鏄幇瀹炴暟鎹缁冨嚭鏉ョ殑 task-generalist policy锛岃€屼笉鏄湪 RoboLab 浠诲姟閲屼笓闂ㄨ缁冪殑 policy銆?/li>
  • action space 鏄?Franka 7-DOF joint positions + 1-DOF binary gripper command銆?/li>
  • 鐜鐢?office-like background 鍜?natural lighting锛岃厱閮ㄧ浉鏈轰笌澶栭儴鐩告満灏介噺璐磋繎 DROID 鐪熷疄鏈哄櫒浜鸿缃€?/li>
  • 姣忎釜浠诲姟閲嶅杩愯澶氫釜 episode锛岃鏂囬噷姣忎釜浠诲姟鏄?10 episodes銆?/li>

璇翠汉璇濓細

RoboLab 鐨勯噸鐐规槸鎶婄湡瀹炴満鍣ㄤ汉绛栫暐鎷垮埌涓€涓珮淇濈湡銆佸彲鎺с€佸彲閲嶅鐨勪豢鐪熻€冭瘯鍦洪噷锛岀湅瀹冩槸鍚︾湡鐨勬硾鍖栵紝鑰屼笉鏄妯″瀷鎻愬墠閫傚簲杩欎釜浠跨湡鍣ㄣ€?/p>

输入输出¶

灞?/th> 杈撳叆 杈撳嚭 涓轰粈涔堥噸瑕?/th>
task scene銆乮nstruction銆乼ermination銆乻ubtasks銆乤ttributes env config 鍐冲畾瑕佽€冧粈涔?/td>
policy observation images銆乸roprio銆乮nstruction robot action 鍐冲畾妯″瀷濡備綍琛屽姩
robot/env action銆乸hysics銆乧amera銆乧ontact next observation銆乪vents 鍐冲畾 rollout 杩囩▼
logging per-step state銆乪vents銆乻ubtask status HDF5銆丣SONL銆乿ideos 鍐冲畾鍙В閲婅瘉鎹?/td>
analysis episode_results銆丠DF5銆乪vent logs success銆乻core銆丆I銆亀rong object銆丼PARC 鍐冲畾璁烘枃琛ㄦ牸

2. Success 和 Score 的区别：论文最容易被低估的一点¶

璁烘枃 IV-B 鏄庣‘寮鸿皟锛氭垚鍔熺巼鏄渶缁堟槸鍚﹀畬鎴愪换鍔★紝score 琛ㄧず杩囩▼涓槸鍚﹀畬鎴愪簡閮ㄥ垎閲岀▼纰戙€傝繖涓樊寮傞潪甯稿叧閿€?/p>

渚嬪涓€涓换鍔★細

Put the cube and the banana in the bowl

鍙互鎷嗘垚锛?/p> 

cube: grab -> hover/above bowl -> drop -> in bowl
banana: grab -> hover/above bowl -> drop -> in bowl

濡傛灉妯″瀷鍙妸 banana 鏀捐繘 bowl锛屼絾 cube 娌″畬鎴愶細

success = False
score   > 0

杩欎笉鏄€滃け璐ュ氨娌′环鍊尖€濄€傚畠璇存槑妯″瀷鍙兘宸茬粡鎺屾彙浜嗭細

  • 璇█閲岀殑涓€閮ㄥ垎鐩爣銆?/li>
  • 鏌愪釜瀵硅薄鐨勮瘑鍒€?/li>
  • 鎶撳彇/鎼繍/鏀剧疆涓殑閮ㄥ垎鍔ㄤ綔銆?/li>

浣嗗畠杩樻病鎺屾彙锛?/p>

  • 澶氬璞＄粍鍚堛€?/li>
  • 椤哄簭瑙勫垝銆?/li>
  • 鍏ㄩ儴鐩爣鐨勭粓姝㈡潯浠躲€?/li>

銆愮豢鑹叉爣璇嗭綔鏍稿績鐩磋銆?/strong>

success 鍥炵瓟鈥滄渶鍚庢湁娌℃湁鍋氬畬鈥濓紱score 鍥炵瓟鈥滃仛鍒颁簡鍝竴姝モ€濄€俁oboLab 鐨勫垎鏋愪环鍊间富瑕佹潵鑷浜屼釜闂銆?/p>

3. Language Variations：为什么 vague/default/specific 很重要¶

璁烘枃 III-C 鍜?IV-B 閮藉己璋?instruction variation銆俁oboLab 鍚屼竴涓簳灞備换鍔″彲浠ユ湁涓嶅悓璇█鐗堟湰锛?/p>

绫诲瀷 渚嬪瓙 鑰冧粈涔?/th>
default Put the cube and the banana in the bowl 鏍囧噯浠诲姟鐞嗚В
vague Put everything in the bowl 鎶借薄璇█鍒扮洰鏍囬泦鍚?/td>
specific Pick up the rubiks cube and the yellow banana and place both inside the bowl 缁嗙矑搴﹀璞＄粦瀹?/td>

璁烘枃瑙傚療鍒帮細鎸囦护瓒婃娊璞★紝寰堝妯″瀷鎴愬姛鐜囦細鏄庢樉涓嬮檷銆?br> 杩欒鏄庢ā鍨嬪彲鑳戒笉鏄湪鐞嗚В鈥滅洰鏍囩姸鎬佲€濓紝鑰屾槸鍦ㄤ緷璧栬缁冧腑甯歌鐨勮瑷€妯℃澘銆?/p>

璇翠汉璇濓細

鐪熸噦浠诲姟鐨勬満鍣ㄤ汉锛屼笉搴旇鍥犱负鈥滄妸棣欒晧鏀捐繘纰楅噷鈥濆拰鈥滄妸榛勮壊姘存灉鏀捐繘纰楅噷鈥濈殑璇存硶涓嶅悓锛屽氨瀹屽叏鎹竴绉嶈涓恒€?/p>

鎴戜滑鍚庣画澶嶇幇濡傛灉瑕侀潬杩戣鏂囷紝涓嶈兘鍙窇 default instruction锛岃嚦灏戣璺戯細

python analysis/read_results.py <run> --by-instruction-type

鍚﹀垯鐪嬩笉鍒拌瑷€娉涘寲杩欎竴灞傘€?/p>

4. 三条复杂度 sweep：不是能力轴，而是诊断轴¶

鍓嶉潰绮捐 4 宸茬粡璁蹭簡 visual/procedural/relational 鑳藉姏杞淬€傝鏂?IV-B 杩樻湁鍙︿竴缁勫疄楠岃酱锛?/p>

璇婃柇杞?/th> 鎬庝箞鍙?/th> 瑙傚療浠€涔?/th>
instruction specificity vague/default/specific 璇█鎶借薄绋嬪害褰卞搷
scene complexity 澧炲姞妗岄潰鍙鐗╀綋鏁伴噺 瑙嗚 clutter 鍜岀洰鏍囪瘑鍒ǔ瀹氭€?/td>
task horizon 澧炲姞 subtasks/澶氭闀垮害 澶氭楠よ鍒掑拰闀挎湡鎵ц绋冲畾鎬?/td>

杩欎笁鏉¤酱涓嶆槸閲嶆柊瀹氫箟浠诲姟绫诲埆锛岃€屾槸鎶婂悓涓€绫讳换鍔℃斁杩涗笉鍚屽帇鍔涙祴璇曢噷銆?/p>

渚嬪锛?/p> 

鍚屼竴涓?pick-place 鑳藉姏
  -> 鎸囦护鍙?vague
  -> 妗岄潰澶氬嚑涓共鎵扮墿
  -> 浠庝竴涓墿浣撳彉鎴愬涓墿浣?

濡傛灉鍙湅鎬绘垚鍔熺巼锛屽緢闅剧煡閬撴ā鍨嬫槸鈥滅湅閿欎簡瀵硅薄鈥濃€滄病鍚噦璇█鈥濊繕鏄€滈暱鏃跺簭鎵ц宕╀簡鈥濄€?br> 杩欎笁鏉?sweep 灏辨槸鎶婂け璐ュ師鍥犳媶寮€銆?/p>

5. Event Tracking：为什么 Figure 3 比成功率更有用¶

璁烘枃 Figure 3 灞曠ず浜嗗嚑绫诲け璐ワ細

  • 鎶撲簡閿欒瀵硅薄銆?/li>
  • 澶棭鏀炬墜锛岀洰鏍囨病杩涘鍣ㄣ€?/li>
  • 鍏堥噸瀹氬悜浜嗘棤鍏冲璞°€?/li>
  • 澶氭灏濊瘯閿欒瀵硅薄銆?/li>

RoboLab docs 鐨?event tracking 涔熷搴旇繖浜涜瘖鏂簨浠讹紝渚嬪锛?/p>

  • WRONG_OBJECT_GRABBED
  • TARGET_OBJECT_DROPPED
  • GRIPPER_HIT_TABLE
  • OBJECT_MOVED
  • OBJECT_OUT_OF_SCENE
  • OBJECT_TIPPED_OVER
  • MULTIPLE_OBJECTS_GRABBED

璇翠汉璇濓細

鎴愬姛鐜囧憡璇変綘鈥滆€冧簡澶氬皯鍒嗏€濓紱浜嬩欢鏃ュ織鍛婅瘔浣犫€滈敊棰橀敊鍦ㄥ摢閲屸€濄€?/p>

输入输出¶

input:
  per-step world state
  gripper contact state
  target object list
  object poses and movement thresholds

output:
  event log JSON
  wrong-object counts
  dropped-object counts
  object-moved/tipped/out-of-scene counts

杩欎篃瑙ｉ噴浜嗕负浠€涔堟垜浠鐜版椂瑕佷繚瀛橈細

  • log_0_env0.json
  • episode_results.jsonl
  • run_0.hdf5
  • 瑙嗛

瑙嗛鏄粰浜虹湅锛宔vent/HDF5/JSON 鏄粰缁熻鍜岃鏂囪〃鏍肩敤銆?/p>

6. Real-World Verification：RoboLab 能不能代表真实世界¶

璁烘枃 IV-D 鍋氫簡涓€浠堕噸瑕佷絾瀹规槗琚璇荤殑浜嬶細瀹冩妸 RoboLab-120 涓婄殑绛栫暐鎴愬姛鐜囧拰 RoboArena 鐪熷疄鏈哄櫒浜?benchmark 鐨?Elo 鎺掑悕鍋氱浉鍏虫€ф瘮杈冦€?/p>

杩欓噷閲嶇偣鏄細

  • RoboLab 杈撳嚭 success rate銆?/li>
  • RoboArena 杈撳嚭 Elo score銆?/li>
  • 涓よ€呭崟浣嶄笉涓€鏍枫€?/li>
  • 鍥犳 Spearman rank correlation 鏇村悎閫傦紝鍥犱负瀹冪湅鐨勬槸绛栫暐鎺掑悕鏄惁涓€鑷淬€?/li>

璇翠汉璇濓細

RoboLab 涓嶆槸澹扮О鈥滀豢鐪熷垎鏁扮瓑浜庣湡瀹炲垎鏁扳€濓紝鑰屾槸璇粹€滃湪杩欎簺绛栫暐涓婏紝浠跨湡鎺掑簭鍜岀湡瀹炴帓搴忔湁涓€鑷存€э紝鎵€浠ュ畠鍙互浣滀负鐪熷疄璇勬祴鐨勬湁鐢?proxy鈥濄€?/p>

杈圭晫涔熻璁叉竻妤氾細

  • 杩欎笉鏄换鍔＄骇鍒€愰」涓€鑷存€ц瘉鏄庛€?/li>
  • 杩欎笉鏄?motion-level 琛屼负涓€鑷存€ц瘉鏄庛€?/li>
  • 杩欎笉鏄鎵€鏈夌湡瀹炰笘鐣?failure 閮借兘鍦ㄤ豢鐪熼噷澶嶇幇銆?/li>
  • 鏍锋湰绛栫暐鏁伴噺鏈夐檺锛岃鏂囦篃鎶婃洿娣辩殑鐩稿叧鎬у垎鏋愮暀缁?future work銆?/li>

7. 统计置信和 Dashboard：为什么不能只看一条视频¶

璁烘枃鍜岄」鐩?docs 閮藉己璋冪粨鏋滃垎鏋愶細

  • 姣忎釜浠诲姟鏈夊 episode銆?/li>
  • episode_results.jsonl 鏄仛鍚堜富鏁版嵁銆?/li>
  • HDF5 瀛樿建杩广€佸姩浣溿€佺姸鎬併€乻ubtask 绛夌粏鑺傘€?/li>
  • dashboard 鍜?analysis 鑴氭湰鎸変换鍔°€佸睘鎬с€侀毦搴︺€佸満鏅€亀rong objects銆乮nstruction type 鑱氬悎銆?/li>
  • dashboard 涓?success rate 浣跨敤 Beta credible interval锛宻core 浣跨敤 Student-t 鍖洪棿銆?/li>

鎴戜滑澶嶇幇鏃跺鏋滃彧缁欎竴鏉¤棰戯紝鍙兘璇存槑锛?/p> 

杩欐潯 episode 鍙戠敓杩?

杩樹笉鑳借鏄庯細

杩欎釜绛栫暐鍦ㄨ繖涓换鍔℃棌涓婄ǔ瀹氭湁鏁?

銆愭鑹叉爣璇嗭綔澶嶇幇杈圭晫銆?/strong>

鎴戜滑褰撳墠宸茬粡鏈?Pi05 鍗曚换鍔℃垚鍔熼棴鐜拰 3 涓鏉備换鍔℃娊鏍凤紝浣嗚繖浠嶇劧涓嶆槸瀹屾暣 RoboLab-120锛屼篃涓嶆槸璁烘枃绾х粺璁＄粨鏋溿€?/p>

8. Appendix A 里还有两个细节值得记¶

8.1 Statistical significance¶

璁烘枃 Appendix A-A 璁ㄨ缁熻鏄捐憲鎬с€傝繖閲岀殑瑕佺偣涓嶆槸鏌愪釜鍗曠嫭鍏紡锛岃€屾槸璇勬祴蹇呴』鏈?episode 鏁板拰缃俊鍖洪棿銆?br> 瀵规垜浠潵璇达紝鏈€瀹炵敤鐨勫師鍒欐槸锛?/p> 

涓嶈鐢?1 episode 鐨?success=True 鎺ㄥ鏁翠綋鑳藉姏銆?
鑷冲皯鎸変换鍔￠噸澶嶏紝鍐嶆寜灞炴€?闅惧害/璇█鍙樹綋鑱氬悎銆?

8.2 Anomalous long-horizon success¶

Appendix A-D 杩樿В閲婁簡涓€涓湅浼煎弽甯哥殑鐜拌薄锛氭煇浜涢暱 horizon 浠诲姟鍙嶈€岃〃鐜版洿濂姐€?br> 璁烘枃鐨勮В璇绘槸锛岃繖鍙兘涓嶆槸妯″瀷绐佺劧浼氫簡闀夸换鍔★紝鑰屾槸鐗瑰畾浠诲姟鐨勭粨鏋勩€佸璞″垎甯冩垨鐩爣鐘舵€佽瀹冩洿瀹规槗瑙﹀彂閮ㄥ垎鎴愬姛銆?/p>

璇翠汉璇濓細

涓嶈鐪嬪埌鈥滈暱浠诲姟鎴愬姛鐜囨洿楂樷€濆氨绔嬪埢涓嬬粨璁鸿妯″瀷鏇存搮闀块暱鏃跺簭銆傝鍥炲ご鐪嬪叿浣撲换鍔°€佸璞″拰 subtask 缁撴瀯銆?/p>

9. Limitations：论文自己承认哪些事还没解决¶

璁烘枃 V Limitations 璇村緱寰堢洿鎺ワ紝RoboLab 鐩墠涓昏鏄細

  • rigid-body tabletop scenes銆?/li>
  • 妗岄潰鎿嶄綔銆?/li>
  • 鍙敤璋撹瘝鎻忚堪鐨勭洰鏍囩姸鎬併€?/li>

杩樹笉鍏呭垎瑕嗙洊锛?/p>

  • cloth銆乧ables銆乥ags 绛?deformable objects銆?/li>
  • 闇€瑕佺簿缁嗗姏鎺х殑 contact-rich skills銆?/li>
  • 澶嶆潅鎽╂摝銆侀『搴旀€ф帴瑙︺€佷綆灞傛帶鍒朵换鍔°€?/li>
  • open-ended ambiguous long-horizon tasks锛屾瘮濡?鈥渃lean up all the laundry鈥濄€?/li>
  • 娈嬩綑瑙嗚鍒嗗竷鍋忕Щ銆?/li>

杩欏鎴戜滑澶嶇幇寰堥噸瑕併€傚洜涓哄綋涓€涓换鍔″け璐ユ椂锛屽厛鍒ゆ柇瀹冨睘浜庡摢绫伙細

澶辫触绫诲瀷 璇ヤ笉璇ユ€?RoboLab
璧勪骇缂哄け銆佺幆澧冨惎鍔ㄥけ璐?/td> 澶嶇幇鐜闂
妯″瀷鎶撻敊瀵硅薄 policy/generalization 闂
妯″瀷鍋氫簡涓€鍗婁絾鏈畬鎴?/td> score/subtask 璇婃柇闂
cloth/cable/force-control 澶辫触 RoboLab 褰撳墠鑳藉姏杈圭晫
鍗曚换鍔¤棰戞垚鍔熶絾缁熻涓嶈冻 璇佹嵁瑙勬ā闂

10. 和我们当前复现记录怎么接起来¶

鎴戜滑鐜板湪宸茬粡瀹屾垚锛?/p>

  • BananaInBowlTask Pi05 鎴愬姛闂幆銆?/li>
  • 涓変釜澶嶆潅浠诲姟鎶芥牱銆?/li>
  • no-policy 鍒濆鍖?smoke銆?/li>
  • 瑙嗛銆丠DF5銆丣SON銆乪vent log 鍚屾銆?/li>
  • notebook 閲屽鐢熸垚銆乻olver銆乸rompt銆乵etrics銆丮NPE銆丟aussian 鐨勮В閲娿€?/li>

濡傛灉瑕佹洿鎺ヨ繎璁烘枃绾у鐜帮紝涓嬩竴姝ュ簲璇ユ寜杩欎釜椤哄簭锛?/p>

  1. 鍚屼竴涓换鍔¤窇 default/vague/specific锛岀湅璇█鍙樹綋銆?/li>
  2. 鍚屼竴涓换鍔¤窇 object pose / camera pose / lighting / background sweep锛屾帴 MNPE銆?/li>
  3. 澶嶆潅浠诲姟鑷冲皯鎸夊睘鎬у垎缁勶紝涓嶅彧鎸戝嚑涓棰戙€?/li>
  4. 鐢?analysis/read_results.py --by-attributes --by-difficulty --by-instruction-type --by-wrong-objects 杈撳嚭琛ㄣ€?/li>
  5. 濡傛灉鎺?RoboChallenge/ReKep/OpenPI 澶氱瓥鐣ワ紝鍐嶅仛 per-policy rank 瀵规瘮銆?/li>

小结¶

鍓嶉潰 12 璁插洖绛斾簡锛?/p> 

RoboLab 鎬庝箞鐢熸垚浠诲姟銆佹€庝箞寤哄満鏅€佹€庝箞鍒ゆ垚鍔熴€佹€庝箞鍒嗘瀽杞ㄨ抗/鏁忔劅鎬с€?

绮捐 13 琛ョ殑鏄細

RoboLab 鎬庝箞鎶?rollout 鍙樻垚鍙俊瀹為獙缁撹銆?

鏈€閲嶈鐨勮娉曪細

success: 鏈€缁堟槸鍚﹀仛瀹?
score: 鍋氬埌浜嗗摢涓€姝?
language variation: 鏄惁鐪熸噦浠诲姟璇箟
event tracking: 閿欏湪浠€涔堣涓?
complexity sweep: 鍝鍘嬪姏瀵艰嚧澶辫触
CI/dashboard: 缁撴灉鏄惁鏈夌粺璁″彲淇″害
real-world verification: 浠跨湡鎺掑簭鏄惁鎺ヨ繎鐪熷疄鎺掑簭
limitations: 鍝簺闂涓嶆槸杩欎釜 benchmark 褰撳墠鎿呴暱鍥炵瓟鐨?

# 杩欎釜 cell 鎶娾€滆繕鏈夊摢浜涜鏂囨牳蹇冨唴瀹规病璁查€忊€濆彉鎴愪竴浠藉彲妫€鏌?coverage map銆?/span>
# 瀹冧笉鏇夸唬璁烘枃瀹為獙锛屽彧楠岃瘉 notebook 鏂板绔犺妭纭疄瑕嗙洊璇勬祴璇佹嵁閾剧殑鍏抽敭鑺傜偣銆?/span>

import json
from math import sqrt

remaining_core_topics = {
    "evaluation_protocol": {
        "paper_section": "IV-A Experiment Setup",
        "input": ["task", "scene", "instruction", "robot", "policy", "camera_config", "variation_seed"],
        "output": ["episode_results", "HDF5", "videos", "event_logs"],
        "why": "瀹氫箟浠€涔堟墠绠楄鏂囩骇 rollout锛岃€屼笉鏄崟涓ソ鐪嬬殑浠跨湡瑙嗛銆?,
        "covered_in_explain13": True,
    },
    "success_vs_score_gap": {
        "paper_section": "III-C Metrics / IV-B Task Results",
        "input": ["subtask_state", "termination_state"],
        "output": ["strict_success", "partial_score"],
        "why": "success 鐪嬫渶缁堝畬鎴愶紝score 鐪嬩腑闂磋兘鍔涳紱浜岃€呭樊璺濇毚闇叉ā鍨嬮儴鍒嗙悊瑙ｃ€?,
        "covered_in_explain13": True,
    },
    "language_variations": {
        "paper_section": "III-C Language Variations / IV-B instruction specificity",
        "input": ["default_instruction", "vague_instruction", "specific_instruction"],
        "output": ["success_by_instruction_type"],
        "why": "楠岃瘉绛栫暐鏄惁鐞嗚В鐩爣鐘舵€侊紝鑰屼笉鏄彧璁颁綇鍥哄畾璇█妯℃澘銆?,
        "covered_in_explain13": True,
    },
    "complexity_sweeps": {
        "paper_section": "IV-B instruction specificity / scene complexity / task horizon",
        "input": ["instruction_specificity", "visible_object_count", "subtask_count"],
        "output": ["performance_degradation_curve"],
        "why": "瀹氫綅澶辫触鏉ヨ嚜璇█鎶借薄銆佽瑙夊共鎵拌繕鏄暱鏃跺簭瑙勫垝銆?,
        "covered_in_explain13": True,
    },
    "event_tracking_failures": {
        "paper_section": "Figure 3 and docs/event_tracking.md",
        "input": ["world_state", "contact_state", "target_object_list"],
        "output": ["wrong_object", "dropped_target", "hit_table", "object_moved"],
        "why": "鎶婂け璐ヤ粠涓€涓?False 鎷嗘垚鍙瘖鏂殑琛屼负閿欒銆?,
        "covered_in_explain13": True,
    },
    "real_world_verification": {
        "paper_section": "IV-D Real-World Verification",
        "input": ["robolab_success_rate_by_policy", "roboarena_elo_by_policy"],
        "output": ["rank_correlation", "proxy_interpretation"],
        "why": "瑙ｉ噴 RoboLab 涓轰粈涔堝彲浠ヤ綔涓虹湡瀹炶瘎娴?proxy锛屼絾涓嶆槸閫愪换鍔＄瓑浠疯瘉鏄庛€?,
        "covered_in_explain13": True,
    },
    "statistical_confidence_dashboard": {
        "paper_section": "Appendix A-A and dashboard docs",
        "input": ["episode_results_jsonl", "score_samples", "success_samples"],
        "output": ["CI", "dashboard_tables", "analysis_csv"],
        "why": "闃叉鐢ㄤ竴鏉?episode 瑙嗛鏇夸唬澶?episode 缁熻缁撹銆?,
        "covered_in_explain13": True,
    },
    "limitations_boundary": {
        "paper_section": "V Limitations",
        "input": ["task_type", "object_physics", "instruction_ambiguity"],
        "output": ["benchmark_scope_judgment"],
        "why": "鍖哄垎绛栫暐澶辫触銆佺幆澧冨け璐ュ拰 benchmark 褰撳墠涓嶆搮闀垮洖绛旂殑闂銆?,
        "covered_in_explain13": True,
    },
}

def strict_success(final_state):
    # 璁烘枃閲岀殑 success 鏄渶缁堢姸鎬佹槸鍚︽弧瓒?termination锛屼笉鍏冲績涓€斿仛鍒板灏戙€?/span>
    return bool(final_state.get("termination_success", False))

def partial_score(group_progress):
    # 鏁欏鐗?score锛氭瘡涓璞℃湁 4 姝ワ紝杩斿洖骞冲潎瀹屾垚姣斾緥銆?/span>
    return sum(done / total for done, total in group_progress.values()) / len(group_progress)

def spearman_rank(xs, ys):
    # 绠€鍖?Spearman锛氳緭鍏ユ棤骞跺垪鍚嶆鏃讹紝璁＄畻涓や釜鎺掑簭鐨?Pearson銆?/span>
    x_rank = {item: rank for rank, item in enumerate(sorted(xs, key=xs.get), start=1)}
    y_rank = {item: rank for rank, item in enumerate(sorted(ys, key=ys.get), start=1)}
    common = list(x_rank)
    xr = [x_rank[k] for k in common]
    yr = [y_rank[k] for k in common]
    mean_x = sum(xr) / len(xr)
    mean_y = sum(yr) / len(yr)
    cov = sum((a - mean_x) * (b - mean_y) for a, b in zip(xr, yr))
    var_x = sum((a - mean_x) ** 2 for a in xr)
    var_y = sum((b - mean_y) ** 2 for b in yr)
    return cov / sqrt(var_x * var_y)

def route_failure_case(case):
    # 鎶婂け璐ュ綊鍥犲埌澶嶇幇闂銆佺瓥鐣ラ棶棰樸€佽瘉鎹妯￠棶棰樻垨 benchmark 杈圭晫銆?/span>
    if case.get("asset_missing") or case.get("env_crash"):
        return "澶嶇幇鐜闂"
    if case.get("deformable") or case.get("force_control"):
        return "RoboLab 褰撳墠杈圭晫"
    if case.get("single_episode_only"):
        return "璇佹嵁瑙勬ā涓嶈冻"
    if case.get("wrong_object") or case.get("dropped_target"):
        return "绛栫暐娉涘寲/鎵ц闂"
    return "闇€瑕佹煡鐪?event/HDF5/video"

score_example = {
    "banana": (4, 4),
    "rubiks_cube": (1, 4),
}
strict_example = strict_success({"termination_success": False})
score_value = partial_score(score_example)

robolab_policy_rank = {"pi05": 0.28, "pi0": 0.155, "groot": 0.072, "paligemma": 0.034}
roboarena_policy_rank = {"pi05": 1300, "pi0": 1200, "groot": 1100, "paligemma": 1000}
rank_corr = spearman_rank(robolab_policy_rank, roboarena_policy_rank)

explain13_tests = [
    ("all_remaining_topics_marked_covered", all(topic["covered_in_explain13"] for topic in remaining_core_topics.values())),
    ("each_topic_has_input_output_why", all(topic["input"] and topic["output"] and topic["why"] for topic in remaining_core_topics.values())),
    ("success_can_be_false_while_score_positive", strict_example is False and 0.0 < score_value < 1.0),
    ("language_variations_include_three_types", set(remaining_core_topics["language_variations"]["input"]) == {"default_instruction", "vague_instruction", "specific_instruction"}),
    ("complexity_sweeps_cover_three_axes", set(remaining_core_topics["complexity_sweeps"]["input"]) == {"instruction_specificity", "visible_object_count", "subtask_count"}),
    ("event_tracking_covers_wrong_and_dropped", {"wrong_object", "dropped_target"}.issubset(set(remaining_core_topics["event_tracking_failures"]["output"]))),
    ("real_world_proxy_uses_rank_correlation", remaining_core_topics["real_world_verification"]["output"][0] == "rank_correlation" and rank_corr > 0.99),
    ("limitation_router_detects_deformable_boundary", route_failure_case({"deformable": True}) == "RoboLab 褰撳墠杈圭晫"),
    ("limitation_router_detects_single_episode_gap", route_failure_case({"single_episode_only": True}) == "璇佹嵁瑙勬ā涓嶈冻"),
    ("environment_failure_not_confused_with_policy_failure", route_failure_case({"asset_missing": True}) == "澶嶇幇鐜闂"),
]

report = {
    "remaining_core_topics": remaining_core_topics,
    "score_example": {
        "group_progress": score_example,
        "strict_success": strict_example,
        "partial_score": score_value,
        "interpretation": "妯″瀷鍋氬畬 banana 浣?cube 鍙畬鎴愭姄鍙栵紝鎵€浠ユ渶缁堝け璐ヤ絾鏈夐儴鍒嗗垎鏁般€?,
    },
    "rank_correlation_example": {
        "robolab_policy_rank": robolab_policy_rank,
        "roboarena_policy_rank": roboarena_policy_rank,
        "spearman": rank_corr,
        "boundary": "Toy ranking example for explaining proxy interpretation, not a fresh RoboArena result.",
    },
    "failure_routing_examples": {
        "asset_missing": route_failure_case({"asset_missing": True}),
        "deformable": route_failure_case({"deformable": True}),
        "single_episode": route_failure_case({"single_episode_only": True}),
        "wrong_object": route_failure_case({"wrong_object": True}),
    },
    "tests": [{"name": name, "passed": bool(ok)} for name, ok in explain13_tests],
    "all_passed": all(ok for _, ok in explain13_tests),
    "boundary": "This coverage check validates the explanation map. It does not rerun RoboLab-120 or compute new policy statistics.",
}

print(json.dumps(report, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
for name, ok in explain13_tests:
    print(f"{name}: {'PASS' if ok else 'FAIL'}")

assert report["all_passed"], explain13_tests
write_status("remaining_core_topics_lightweight_tests", report)

0.19b 论文精讲：精讲13补充，评测证据链深挖¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_13_deep_evaluation_evidence_chain.md銆傚畠鎶婄簿璁?3浠庘€滆鐩栫洰褰曗€濊ˉ鎴愨€滆瘉鎹摼娣辨寲鈥濓細璁烘枃绾?episode 鏍锋湰鍗曚綅銆?code>success/score 鐨勬暟瀛︾洿瑙夈€乪vent tracking 鐨勮緭鍏ヨ緭鍑恒€佽瑷€鍙樹綋涓庡鏉傚害 sweep 鐨勪氦鍙夎瘖鏂€佺粺璁＄疆淇°€乨ashboard銆丷oboArena 鐪熷疄涓栫晫鐩稿叧鎬э紝浠ュ強 4090 涓婃洿鎺ヨ繎璁烘枃鍙ｅ緞鐨勫皬鐭╅樀搴旇鎬庝箞璁捐銆?/p>

銆愯摑鑹叉爣璇嗭綔婧愬ご鑼冨洿銆?/strong> 杩欑珷涓昏瀵瑰簲 RoboLab 璁烘枃 III-C Metrics銆両V Experiments銆両V-D Real-World Verification銆乂 Limitations銆丄ppendix A-A/A-C/A-D锛屼互鍙婇」鐩枃妗?docs/data.md銆?code>docs/event_tracking.md銆?code>docs/subtask.md銆?code>docs/dashboard.md銆傝鏂?HTML 鐗堟湰涓?arXiv:2604.09860v3锛屾棩鏈?2026-05-14銆?/p>

銆愭鑹叉爣璇嗭綔鏈€瀹规槗韪╁潙銆?/strong> 鈥滄垜鐪嬪埌瑙嗛鎴愬姛浜嗏€濆彧鑳借瘉鏄庨偅鏉?episode 鍙戠敓杩囷紱鈥滄煇浠诲姟鎴愬姛鐜?1/1鈥濅笉鑳借瘉鏄庤浠诲姟绋冲畾锛涒€渟uccess=False鈥濅篃涓嶈兘璇佹槑妯″瀷瀹屽叏涓嶄細锛屽洜涓?score 鍜?event log 鍙兘鏄剧ず瀹冨畬鎴愪簡閲嶈瀛愮洰鏍囥€?/p>

0. 这章到底补什么¶

鍓嶉潰 0-12 璁插凡缁忚鐩栦簡鐢熸垚閾捐矾銆佽兘鍔涜酱銆丼PARC銆丮NPE銆乸rompt銆乻olver銆丟aussian銆傜簿璁?13 鐨勬繁灞傚唴瀹逛笉鏄啀琛ヤ竴涓畻娉曪紝鑰屾槸琛ヤ竴鏉″疄楠岄€昏緫锛?/p> 

涓€娆?policy rollout
  -> 閫愭璁板綍涓栫晫鐘舵€併€佸姩浣溿€佷簨浠躲€佸瓙浠诲姟杩涘害
  -> 寰楀埌 success / score / event counts / trajectory metrics
  -> 鎸変换鍔°€佽兘鍔涜酱銆侀毦搴︺€佽瑷€鍙樹綋銆佹壈鍔ㄧ淮搴﹁仛鍚?
  -> 缁欏嚭缃俊鍖洪棿銆佸姣旇〃銆佸鏉傚害鏇茬嚎銆佺湡瀹炰笘鐣屾帓搴忕浉鍏虫€?
  -> 鎵嶈兘璇粹€滆繖涓瓥鐣ュ湪 RoboLab 涓婃湁浠€涔堟硾鍖栬兘鍔涘拰澶辫触妯″紡鈥?

濡傛灉鎶婅繖鏉￠摼鏂紑锛屽氨浼氬嚭鐜板嚑绉嶈璇伙細

璇 瀹為檯搴旇鎬庝箞鍒ゆ柇
瑙嗛閲屾斁杩涘幓浜嗭紝鎵€浠ユā鍨嬫垚鍔?/td> 杩樿鐪?episode_results.jsonl 鐨?success 鍜?termination 鏉′欢
success=False锛屾墍浠ュ畬鍏ㄥけ璐?/td> 杩樿鐪?normalized score銆乻ubtask 鐘舵€佸拰澶辫触浜嬩欢
鏌愪换鍔?1/1 鎴愬姛锛屾墍浠ヨ繖涓换鍔′細浜?/td> 鍗曚换鍔″崟 episode 鍙槸 smoke锛屼笉鏄粺璁¤瘎娴?/td>
浠跨湡鎴愬姛鐜囬珮锛屾墍浠ョ湡瀹炴満鍣ㄤ汉涓€瀹氬己 璁烘枃鐪嬬殑鏄笌鐪熷疄 benchmark 鐨勭瓥鐣ユ帓搴忕浉鍏虫€э紝涓嶆槸閫愪换鍔＄瓑浠?/td>
澶嶆潅浠诲姟澶辫触锛屾墍浠ユā鍨嬩笉浼氶暱绋?/td> 闇€瑕佸尯鍒嗗璞¤瘑鍒€佺┖闂村叧绯汇€佸彲渚涙€с€佸姩浣滄墽琛屻€佷簨浠朵腑鏂拰浠诲姟缁撴瀯鍋忓樊

1. 论文级样本单位：到底什么叫一个 episode¶

RoboLab 閲岀殑鏈€灏忚瘎娴嬪崟浣嶄笉鏄€滀换鍔″悕鈥濓紝鑰屾槸涓€鏉＄粦瀹氫簡瀹屾暣涓婁笅鏂囩殑 episode锛?/p> 

episode_id =
  task_id
  + scene_id
  + instruction_variant
  + policy_id
  + robot_id
  + camera_config
  + action_space_config
  + variation_seed
  + run_seed

璇翠汉璇濓細
鍚屼竴涓?BananaInBowlTask锛屽鏋滄崲浜嗘寚浠よ娉曘€佹崲浜嗙浉鏈恒€佹崲浜嗗厜鐓с€佹崲浜嗗璞″垵濮嬩綅濮匡紝鎴栬€呮崲浜嗙瓥鐣ワ紝灏变笉鏄悓涓€鏉¤瘎娴嬫牱鏈€傚畠浠簲璇ヨ鍒嗗紑璁板綍锛屽啀鎸夌淮搴﹁仛鍚堛€?/p>

输入输出¶

闃舵 杈撳叆 杈撳嚭 濡傛灉缂哄け浼氭€庢牱
浠诲姟瀹氫箟 scene銆乷bjects銆乮nstruction銆乻ubtasks銆乼ermination env/task config 涓嶇煡閬撴ā鍨嬭瑕佹眰鍋氫粈涔?/td>
绛栫暐璋冪敤 RGB銆乺obot state銆佽瑷€鎸囦护銆佸巻鍙插姩浣?/td> action chunk / joint command / gripper command 鏃犳硶澶嶇洏绛栫暐瀹為檯鐪嬪埌浜嗕粈涔?/td>
浠跨湡姝ヨ繘 action銆佺墿鐞嗙姸鎬併€佺浉鏈恒€佺鎾?/td> next observation銆乷bject poses銆乧ontacts 鏃犳硶鍒ゆ柇閿欒鏉ヨ嚜绛栫暐杩樻槸鐗╃悊
浜嬩欢杩借釜 world state銆佺洰鏍囧璞°€佹帴瑙︾姸鎬?/td> wrong object銆乨rop銆乭it table 绛変簨浠?/td> False 鍙樻垚榛戠洅澶辫触
缁撴灉鑱氬悎 success銆乻core銆乪vents銆乼rajectory dashboard / CSV / JSON summary 鏃犳硶褰㈡垚璁烘枃琛ㄦ牸

鎵€浠ユ垜浠鐜版椂淇濆瓨杩欎簺鏂囦欢涓嶆槸鈥滀华寮忔劅鈥濓紝鑰屾槸璇佹嵁鍒嗗伐锛?/p>

鏂囦欢 缁欒皝鐪?/th> 涓昏鍥炵瓟
video.mp4 / viewport 瑙嗛 浜?/td> 鐩磋鐪嬫ā鍨嬭涓?/td>
episode_results.jsonl 缁熻鑴氭湰 鎴愬姛鐜囥€佸垎鏁般€佷换鍔″睘鎬ц仛鍚?/td>
run_*.hdf5 娣卞害澶嶇洏 鍥惧儚銆佸姩浣溿€佺姸鎬併€乻ubtask 杞ㄨ抗
log_*.json / event log 澶辫触璇婃柇 閿欐嬁銆佹帀钀姐€佺鎾炪€佺Щ鍔ㄣ€佽秺鐣?/td>
dashboard 鐮旂┒鑰?姹囨姤 鎸夎兘鍔涜酱銆侀毦搴︺€佽瑷€銆佹壈鍔ㄦ眹鎬?/td>

2. success 和 score：不是两个名字，而是两种科学问题¶

璁烘枃 III-C 閲岀殑 normalized score 鍜?IV-B / Appendix A-C 鐨?score 鏇茬嚎锛屾槸 RoboLab 鏈€鍏抽敭鐨勮瘎娴嬭璁′箣涓€銆?/p>

2.1 success 问的是最终状态¶

success = task.termination_condition(world_state)

瀹冨彧鍥炵瓟锛?/p> 

鏈€鍚庣洰鏍囩姸鎬佹槸鍚︽弧瓒筹紵

渚嬪锛?/p> 

鎶婅嫻鏋滃拰姗欏瓙鏀捐繘纰楅噷

濡傛灉鑻规灉杩涗簡纰楋紝姗欏瓙娌¤繘锛?/p> 

success = False

杩欑鍚堜弗鏍间换鍔″畾涔夛紝浣嗕俊鎭噺寰堜綆銆?/p>

2.2 score 问的是过程里学会了多少¶

涓€涓?pick-place 瀛愪换鍔″彲浠ユ媶鎴愬苟琛屼簨浠舵垨閲岀▼纰戯細

target object identified
  -> grasped
  -> lifted / moved toward goal
  -> released near goal
  -> final relation satisfied

鏁欏鐗堝彲浠ュ啓鎴愶細

score = mean(completed_milestones(object_i) / total_milestones(object_i))

濡傛灉棣欒晧 4/4 瀹屾垚锛屾柟鍧?1/4 瀹屾垚锛?/p> 

success = False
score = (4/4 + 1/4) / 2 = 0.625

杩欒鏄庢ā鍨嬩笉鏄畬鍏ㄤ笉浼氾紝瀹冭嚦灏戝畬鎴愪簡閮ㄥ垎瀵硅薄鐨勮瘑鍒€佹姄鍙栨垨鎼繍銆?/p>

2.3 为什么 complex 任务里 success-score gap 特别重要¶

璁烘枃 Appendix A-C 寮鸿皟锛氬鏉備换鍔?strict success 鎺夊緱寰堝帀瀹筹紝浣?score 浠嶄繚鐣欎簡涓嶅皯閮ㄥ垎杩涘睍銆?br> 杩欏彞璇濈殑鍚箟鏄細

澶嶆潅浠诲姟澶辫触锛屽苟涓嶇瓑浜庢瘡涓瓙鑳藉姏閮藉け璐ャ€?

瑕佹妸澶嶆潅浠诲姟澶辫触鎷嗘垚锛?/p>

鍙兘鍘熷洜 success score event log
瀹屽叏涓嶅姩 False 鎺ヨ繎 0 鏃犳湁鏁堟姄鍙?/td>
鎶撳浣嗘病鏀惧噯 False 涓瓑 dropped / misplaced
瀹屾垚涓€鍗婂璞?/td> False 涓珮 missing remaining targets
鍋氶敊瀵硅薄 False 鍙兘涓瓑 wrong object
鏈€缁堝叏閮ㄥ畬鎴?/td> True 楂?/td> 鍙兘浠嶆湁涓€旈敊璇?/td>

銆愮豢鑹叉爣璇嗭綔鏍稿績璁版硶銆?/strong> success 鏄粓灞€鍒ゅ垎锛?code>score 鏄繃绋嬪墫闈€俁oboLab 鐪熸鏈夊垎鏋愪环鍊肩殑鏄妸浜岃€呬竴璧风湅銆?/p>

3. Event tracking：把失败从 “False” 变成错误类型¶

璁烘枃 Figure 3 寰堥噸瑕侊紝鍥犱负瀹冩病鏈夊彧灞曠ず鎴愬姛/澶辫触锛岃€屾槸灞曠ず妯″瀷鎵ц涓殑鍏蜂綋閿欒锛?/p>

  • 杩囨棭鏉炬墜锛岀洰鏍囨病杩涘鍣ㄣ€?/li>
  • 鎶撲簡閿欒瀵硅薄銆?/li>
  • 鍏堥噸瀹氬悜浜嗘棤鍏冲璞°€?/li>
  • 澶氭灏濊瘯閿欒瀵硅薄銆?/li>

RoboLab 鐨?event tracking 閫昏緫灏辨槸鎶婅繖浜涘彲瑙傚療琛屼负鍙樻垚鍙粺璁′簨浠躲€?/p>

3.1 事件检测需要什么输入¶

world_state:
  object poses
  object velocities
  object semantic labels
  gripper pose
  gripper contact
  target object set
  workspace bounds

浜嬩欢涓嶆槸鍑棰戜富瑙傚垽鏂紝鑰屾槸浠庣姸鎬佸彉鍖栭噷鎺ㄥ嚭鏉ワ細

gripper contacts non-target object
  -> WRONG_OBJECT_GRABBED

target object z suddenly decreases after grasp
  -> TARGET_OBJECT_DROPPED

gripper collision with table while moving
  -> GRIPPER_HIT_TABLE

object pose changes beyond threshold without being intended
  -> OBJECT_MOVED

object leaves workspace bounds
  -> OBJECT_OUT_OF_SCENE

3.2 事件日志怎么用于诊断¶

浜嬩欢妯″紡 鏇村彲鑳借鏄庝粈涔?/th> 鍚庣画璇ョ湅浠€涔?/th>
wrong object 寰堝 瑙嗚/璇箟/璇█缁戝畾澶辫触 object labels銆乧amera view銆乮nstruction specificity
dropped target 寰堝 鎶撳彇銆乬ripper 鍚庡鐞嗐€侀噴鏀炬椂鏈哄け璐?/td> action chunk銆乬ripper threshold銆丒EF trajectory
hit table 寰堝 杩愬姩杞ㄨ抗涓嶅悎鐞嗘垨鐩告満/鍔ㄤ綔灏哄害閿?/td> SPARC銆乻peed銆乯oint limits銆佹帶鍒堕鐜?/td>
object moved/tipped 寰堝 鐗╃悊鎺ヨЕ鎴栧満鏅嫢鎸?/td> asset collision銆乵ass/friction銆乮nitial placement
out of scene 绛栫暐澶辨帶鎴栫墿鐞嗗紓甯?/td> safety bounds銆乤ction clipping銆乸olicy server output

3.3 视频和 event log 的分工¶

瑙嗛閫傚悎鍋氬畾鎬цВ閲婏紝姣斿鈥滄ā鍨嬬湅璧锋潵鐘硅鲍鈥濄€?br> event log 閫傚悎鍋氱粺璁″垽鏂紝姣斿鈥滈敊璇璞℃姄鍙栫巼鍦?vague instruction 涓嬩笂鍗団€濄€?/p>

鐪熸鐨勮瘎娴嬫眹鎶ュ簲璇ュ悓鏃舵湁锛?/p> 

瑙嗛鎴浘/鐗囨
  + event counts
  + success/score
  + 杞ㄨ抗璐ㄩ噺
  + 浠诲姟灞炴€?

4. Instruction variation：语言泛化不是换一句话那么简单¶

RoboLab 鐨?language variation 涓嶅彧鏄?prompt 澶氭牱鍖栵紝瀹冩槸鍦ㄦ祴璇曟ā鍨嬫槸鍚︽妸璇█鏄犲皠鍒扮洰鏍囩姸鎬併€?/p>

4.1 三种指令的含义¶

鎸囦护绫诲瀷 渚嬪瓙 妯″瀷闇€瑕佸仛浠€涔?/th>
specific Put the yellow banana into the bowl 缁戝畾鏄惧紡灞炴€у拰瀵硅薄
default Put the banana into the bowl 鎸夊父瑙勫璞″悕鎵ц
vague Put the fruit into the bowl 浠庣被鍒?涓婁笅鏂囨帹鏂洰鏍囬泦鍚?/td>

vague 闅惧湪鍝噷锛?/p> 

璇█娌℃湁鐩存帴缁欏璞″疄渚嬪悕
  -> 妯″瀷瑕佽瘑鍒被鍒?
  -> 鍦ㄥ満鏅腑缁戝畾姝ｇ‘瀵硅薄
  -> 鎺掗櫎鏃犲叧浣嗙浉浼煎璞?
  -> 鎵ц鐩爣鍏崇郴

4.2 为什么语言变体要和事件日志一起看¶

鍙湅 success锛?/p> 

vague success rate 涓嬮檷

浣犱笉鐭ラ亾鍘熷洜銆?br> 缁撳悎 event log 鍚庯紝鍙互鎷嗘垚锛?/p>

涓嬮檷鍘熷洜 鍙瀵熶俊鍙?/th>
涓嶇煡閬?鈥渇ruit鈥?鎸囧摢浜涘璞?/td> wrong object / no grasp
鐩爣闆嗗悎涓嶅畬鏁?/td> partial score 楂樹絾 success 浣?/td>
鎶撳浣嗘斁閿?/td> target dropped / wrong relation
鎸囦护杩囬暱瀵艰嚧鍔ㄤ綔寤惰繜 timeout / low progress

杩欏氨鏄负浠€涔?notebook 鍚庣画濡傛灉瑕佸仛璁烘枃绾у鐜帮紝涓嶈兘鍙浐瀹?default instruction銆?/p>

5. Complexity sweep：三条压力轴怎么读¶

璁烘枃 IV-B 閲岀殑 complexity sweep 鍖呭惈锛?/p> 

instruction specificity
scene complexity
task horizon

瀹冧滑涓嶆槸鏂扮殑鑳藉姏杞达紝鑰屾槸鍘嬪姏娴嬭瘯杞淬€?/p>

5.1 instruction specificity¶

鑰冪殑鏄瑷€缁戝畾锛?/p> 

specific -> default -> vague

濡傛灉 vague 涓嬮檷鏄庢樉锛岃鏄庢ā鍨嬪彲鑳戒緷璧栨ā鏉胯瑷€锛岃€屼笉鏄湡姝ｅ舰鎴愮洰鏍囩姸鎬併€?/p>

5.2 scene complexity¶

鑰冪殑鏄瑙?clutter 鍜岀洰鏍囬€夋嫨锛?/p> 

visible objects 灏?
  -> 鐩爣鏇存樉鐪?
visible objects 澶?
  -> 骞叉壈鐗╂洿澶?
  -> 閿欐嬁姒傜巼涓婂崌

杩欓噷鏈€濂介厤鍚堬細

wrong_object count
target_object_visibility
camera pose
object semantic category

鍚﹀垯鈥滃鏉傚満鏅け璐モ€濅粛鐒跺お绮椼€?/p>

5.3 task horizon¶

鑰冪殑鏄姝ラ鎸佺画鎵ц锛?/p> 

subtask_count 澧炲姞
  -> 姣忎竴姝ラ兘鍙兘澶辫触
  -> 绱Н澶辫触姒傜巼涓婂崌

濡傛灉姣忎釜瀛愪换鍔℃垚鍔熸鐜囨槸 p锛岀矖鐣ュ湴锛?/p> 

full_success 鈮?p^N

褰?p=0.8锛?/p>

瀛愪换鍔℃暟 鐞嗘兂鍖?full success
1 0.80
3 0.512
5 0.328
7 0.210

杩欒鏄庨暱浠诲姟鎴愬姛鐜囦綆涓嶄竴瀹氭剰鍛崇潃鈥滈暱绋嬫帹鐞嗗叏閿欌€濓紝涔熷彲鑳芥槸姣忎竴姝ラ兘鏈夊皬姒傜巼鎵ц璇樊锛屾渶鍚庤繛涔樻斁澶с€?/p>

璁烘枃鎸囧嚭鏌愪釜 7-subtask bin 鏈夋垚鍔熺巼鍥炲崌锛屼絾鍘熷洜鍙兘鏄 bin 琚粨鏋勭畝鍗曘€侀噸澶?pick-place 鐨勪换鍔′富瀵笺€?br> 杩欐彁閱掓垜浠細

task horizon 鏁板瓧鏈韩涓嶇瓑浜庡洜鏋滈暱绋嬫帹鐞嗛毦搴︺€?

鐪熸闅剧殑鏄細

  • 鍚庝竴姝ヤ緷璧栧墠涓€姝ョ粨鏋溿€?/li>
  • 鐩爣鐘舵€佷細鏀瑰彉鍙緵鎬с€?/li>

6. 统计置信：为什么 10 episode 仍然很粗¶

璁烘枃 Appendix A-A 璇村緱寰堟槑纭細鍥犱负浠跨湡鍜岀瓥鐣ラ兘鏈夐殢鏈烘€э紝姣忎釜 task/policy 瑕佽窇澶?episode銆傝鏂?benchmark 姣忎釜浠诲姟鏄?N=10锛屼絾浣滆€呬篃鎻愰啋锛屽崟浠诲姟灞傞潰鐨勭疆淇″尯闂翠粛鐒跺緢瀹姐€?/p>

6.1 二项成功率的直觉¶

濡傛灉鏌愪换鍔?10 娆￠噷鎴愬姛 5 娆★細

success_rate = 50%

浣嗚繖涓嶄唬琛ㄧ湡瀹炴垚鍔熸鐜囩簿纭瓑浜?50%銆傚洜涓烘牱鏈お灏戯紝95% 鍖洪棿浼氬緢瀹姐€?/p>

璁烘枃缁欏嚭鐨勭洿瑙夋槸锛?/p> 

N=10 鏃讹紝p鈮?.5 闄勮繎鍗曚换鍔?95% CI 鍗婂绾?30%
N=100 鏃讹紝p鈮?.5 闄勮繎鍗婂绾?10%

璇翠汉璇濓細

10 娆¤瘎娴嬮€傚悎鐪嬫€讳綋瓒嬪娍锛屼笉閫傚悎瀵瑰崟涓换鍔″仛寰堢粏鐨勫己缁撹銆? 娆¤瘎娴嬪彧閫傚悎 smoke銆?/p>

6.2 为什么 aggregate 更可信¶

RoboLab-120 鑱氬悎鏃讹紝鏈夊緢澶氫换鍔″拰 episode锛?/p> 

effective_samples = tasks * episodes_per_task

鎬讳綋 success rate / score 浼氭瘮鍗曚换鍔℃洿绋冲畾銆?br> 浣嗚繖涔熸湁浠ｄ环锛氳仛鍚堜細鎺╃洊鐗瑰畾绫诲埆鐨勫け璐ャ€?/p>

鎵€浠ヨ鏂囧悓鏃剁湅锛?/p> 

overall
  + difficulty
  + competency axis
  + task category
  + instruction specificity
  + scene complexity
  + task horizon

7. Dashboard：不是展示页，而是评测数据库视图¶

RoboLab dashboard 鐨勪环鍊间笉鏄€滃ソ鐪嬧€濓紝鑰屾槸鎶婂簳灞傝瘉鎹寜鐮旂┒闂鍒囧紑銆?/p>

7.1 Dashboard 应该服务的问题¶

闂 搴旇鑱氬悎浠€涔?/th>
鍝釜绛栫暐鎬讳綋鏈€寮?/td> policy -> success/score
鍝被浠诲姟鏈€闅?/td> task category / competency axis
鏄惁鍙細绠€鍗曚换鍔?/td> difficulty level
鏄惁璇█娉涘寲宸?/td> instruction type
鏄惁鐪嬮敊瀵硅薄 wrong object counts
鏄惁鍔ㄤ綔杞ㄨ抗宸?/td> SPARC / speed
鏄惁瀵规壈鍔ㄦ晱鎰?/td> camera / lighting / object pose variation

episode_results.jsonl 閫傚悎鑱氬悎銆?br> HDF5 閫傚悎娣辨寲鍗曟潯杞ㄨ抗銆?/p>

鐞嗘兂 workflow锛?/p> 

dashboard 鍙戠幇锛氭煇绛栫暐 spatial tasks score 浣?

  -> 鐪?event counts锛歸rong object 杩樻槸 dropped target

8. Real-world verification：相关性到底说明什么¶

璁烘枃 IV-D 鎶?RoboLab 缁撴灉鍜?RoboArena 鐪熷疄涓栫晫璇勬祴鍋氭瘮杈冦€傝繖閲岄潪甯稿鏄撹璇汇€?/p>

8.1 它不是说仿真分数等于真实分数¶

涓や釜 benchmark 鐨勮緭鍑轰笉鏄悓涓€绉嶄笢瑗匡細

RoboLab: success rate / score in simulation
RoboArena: real-world pairwise ranking / Elo

鎵€浠ユ瘮杈冮噸鐐逛笉鏄暟鍊肩浉绛夛紝鑰屾槸鎺掑簭鏄惁涓€鑷达細

policy A > policy B > policy C

杩欏氨鏄负浠€涔?rank correlation 姣旂洿鎺ユ瘮杈冨垎鏁版洿鍚堢悊銆?/p>

8.2 它能支持什么结论¶

鍙互鏀寔锛?/p> 

RoboLab 鍦ㄤ竴瀹氱瓥鐣ラ泦鍚堜笂鑳界粰鍑哄拰鐪熷疄璇勬祴鐩歌繎鐨勬帓搴忎俊鍙枫€?

涓嶈兘鏀寔锛?/p> 

RoboLab 姣忎釜浠诲姟閮界瓑浠蜂簬鐪熷疄涓栫晫銆?
RoboLab success rate 鍙互鐩存帴鎹㈢畻鎴愮湡瀹炴垚鍔熺巼銆?
RoboLab 瑕嗙洊鎵€鏈夌湡瀹炴満鍣ㄤ汉澶辫触妯″紡銆?

8.3 我们复现时怎么用这个结论¶

鎴戜滑褰撳墠鍗曚换鍔?Pi05 鎴愬姛涓嶈兘鐢ㄦ潵璇佹槑鐪熷疄鐩稿叧鎬с€?br> 浣嗗畠鍙互浣滀负绗竴姝ワ細

鍏堣瘉鏄?pipeline 鑳借窇閫?
  -> 鍐嶈窇澶氫釜浠诲姟/绛栫暐
  -> 鍐嶆瘮杈冪瓥鐣ユ帓搴?
  -> 鏈€鍚庢墠璋?proxy validity

9. Limitations：哪些失败不应该强行归因给策略¶

璁烘枃 V Limitations 璇存槑 RoboLab 褰撳墠涓昏闈㈠悜 rigid-body tabletop manipulation銆傝繖涓竟鐣屽繀椤诲啓杩涘鐜版姤鍛娿€?/p>

9.1 当前擅长的问题¶

  • 妗岄潰鍒氫綋瀵硅薄銆?/li>
  • pick-place銆乧ontainment銆乻tacking銆乺eorientation銆?/li>
  • 瑙嗚灞炴€э細棰滆壊銆佽涔夈€佸昂瀵搞€?/li>
  • 绌洪棿鍏崇郴锛歭eft/right/inside/on/near 绛夈€?/li>
  • 绋嬪簭鑳藉姏锛氬彲渚涙€с€侀噸瀹氬悜銆佸爢鍙犮€?/li>

9.2 当前不充分覆盖的问题¶

  • deformable objects锛氬竷鏂欍€佺嚎缂嗐€佽瀛愩€?/li>
  • contact-rich skills锛氭彃鎷斻€佹棆鎷с€佺簿缁嗗姏鎺с€?/li>
  • open-ended household chores锛氫緥濡?鈥滄暣鐞嗘埧闂粹€濄€?/li>
  • 寮哄洜鏋滈暱绋嬩换鍔★細鍚庝竴姝ヤ緷璧栧墠涓€姝ュ垱閫犵殑鐘舵€併€?/li>
  • 鐪熷疄鏈哄櫒浜轰腑鐨勭‖浠惰宸€佷紶鎰熷櫒鍣０銆佺綉缁滃欢杩熴€佹帶鍒跺櫒宸紓銆?/li>

9.3 失败归因表¶

鐜拌薄 棣栧厛褰掑洜 涓嬩竴姝ユ鏌?/th>
Isaac 鍚姩澶辫触 鐜/渚濊禆 driver銆両saac Sim銆乤ssets銆乭eadless
LFS 鎸囬拡瀵艰嚧鎵句笉鍒?USD 璧勪骇涓嬭浇 git-lfs銆乤sset path銆佹枃浠跺ぇ灏?/td>
绌哄姩浣滀篃鑳藉垵濮嬪寲 鐜 smoke 鎴愬姛 涓嶈兘绠楃瓥鐣ユ垚鍔?/td>
Pi05 鎶撻敊瀵硅薄 绛栫暐瑙嗚/璇箟娉涘寲 event wrong object銆乧amera view
Pi05 鎶撳浣嗘帀钀?/td> 鎺у埗/鎶撳彇/鍔ㄤ綔鍚庡鐞?/td> gripper銆乤ction chunk銆乺elease timing
浠诲姟闇€瑕佸竷鏂?绾跨紗 benchmark 杈圭晫 涓嶅簲鎷?RoboLab 褰撳墠缁撴灉杩囧害澶栨帹
鍙湁 1 鏉℃垚鍔熻棰?/td> 璇佹嵁瑙勬ā涓嶈冻 澧炲姞 episode銆佸仛 CI

10. 给 4090 复现的实际实验矩阵¶

4090 涓嶉€傚悎涓€涓婃潵璺戝畬鏁?RoboLab-120锛屼絾鍙互鍋氫竴涓綆鎴愭湰銆佽鏂囧彛寰勬洿鎺ヨ繎鐨勫皬鐭╅樀銆?/p>

10.1 第一版：12-task subset¶

绫诲埆 浠诲姟鏁?/th> 姣忎换鍔?episode 鐩爣
visual 4 3 棰滆壊/璇箟/灏哄
relational 4 3 绌洪棿鍏崇郴/璁℃暟/杩炴帴璇?/td>

鎬婚噺锛?/p> 

12 tasks * 3 episodes = 36 episodes

涓€涓悎鏍肩殑 RoboLab 澶嶇幇鎶ュ憡搴旇閬垮厤鍐欙細

鍦?RTX 4090 涓婏紝鎴戜滑瀹屾垚浜?Pi05 + RoboLab 鐨勫崟浠诲姟闂幆銆?

12. 一句话总图¶

mermaid
flowchart LR
    A["Task / Scene / Instruction"] --> B["Policy Rollout"]

    F --> G["Success"]

    I --> K
    J --> K
    K --> L["Policy Comparison"]

璁颁綇杩欐潯閾撅細

瑙嗛鏄瘉鎹叆鍙ｏ紝涓嶆槸缁撹鏈韩銆?
success 鏄粓灞€锛宻core 鏄繃绋嬶紝event 鏄敊鍥狅紝CI 鏄彲淇″害锛宺ank correlation 鏄拰鐪熷疄涓栫晫鐨勮繛鎺ャ€?

13. 这章对应到我们已经产出的文件¶

澶嶇幇鏂囦欢 瀵瑰簲杩欑珷鍝竴鍧?/th>
COMPLETE_REPRO_pi05_banana_20260620.md 鍗曚换鍔￠棴鐜瘉鎹紝浣嗕笉鏄粺璁＄粨璁?/td>
COMPLEX_TASKS_pi05_20260620.md 澶嶆潅浠诲姟鎶芥牱锛岄€傚悎鎺?score/event 瑙ｉ噴

鍚庣画濡傛灉瑕佹妸杩欑珷鐪熸钀藉湴锛屽簲璇ユ柊澧炰竴涓嚜鍔ㄦ姤鍛婏細

  + task metadata
  + video paths
  -> failure_report.md

姣忔潯澶辫触鑷姩杈撳嚭锛?/p> 

浠诲姟鍚?
鑳藉姏杞?
璇█鍙樹綋
success / score
澶辫触浜嬩欢 Top-K
瀵瑰簲瑙嗛
鍙兘褰掑洜
涓嬩竴姝ュ疄楠?

杩欎細鎶?RoboLab 浠庘€滆窇鍑烘潵浜嗏€濇帹杩涘埌鈥滃彲浠ュ垎鏋愮瓥鐣ヨ兘鍔涒€濄€?/p>

In [ ]:
# ===== 绮捐13琛ュ厖锛氳瘎娴嬭瘉鎹摼娣辨寲杞婚噺楠岃瘉 =====
# 杩欎釜 cell 涓嶈窇 RoboLab锛屽彧鎶婅ˉ鍏呯珷閲岀殑鍏抽敭姒傚康鍋氭垚鍙鏌?schema銆?/span>

import json
from math import sqrt

episode_identity_fields = [
    "task_id",
    "scene_id",
    "instruction_variant",
    "policy_id",
    "robot_id",
    "camera_config",
    "action_space_config",
    "variation_seed",
    "run_seed",
]

evidence_chain = {
    "video": "human_inspection",
    "episode_results_jsonl": "aggregate_success_score",
    "hdf5": "state_action_image_replay",
    "event_log": "failure_taxonomy",
    "dashboard": "policy_task_axis_comparison",
}

def normalized_score(progress_by_object):
    return sum(done / total for done, total in progress_by_object.values()) / len(progress_by_object)

def binomial_ci_half_width(p, n):
    # 鏁欏鐢ㄨ繎浼硷細1.96 * sqrt(p(1-p)/n)銆傝鏂囬噷寮鸿皟 N=10 鍗曚换鍔?CI 浠嶅緢瀹姐€?/span>
    return 1.96 * sqrt(p * (1 - p) / n)

def full_success_from_step_success(p_step, n_subtasks):
    return p_step ** n_subtasks

def classify_failure_signal(events, task_meta):
    if task_meta.get("asset_missing") or task_meta.get("env_crash"):
        return "repro_environment"
    if task_meta.get("deformable") or task_meta.get("force_control"):
        return "benchmark_boundary"
    if events.get("wrong_object", 0) > 0:
        return "visual_language_binding"
    if events.get("dropped_target", 0) > 0:
        return "grasp_or_release_control"
    if events.get("hit_table", 0) > 0:
        return "trajectory_or_action_scale"
    return "needs_video_hdf5_review"

reproduction_matrices = {
    "subset_12_tasks": {
        "tasks": 12,
        "episodes_per_task": 3,
        "purpose": "balanced visual/procedural/relational smoke beyond a single video",
    },
    "language_variation": {
        "tasks": 3,
        "variants": ["default", "vague", "specific"],
        "episodes_per_variant": 3,
        "purpose": "separate language binding failure from motion failure",
    },
    "small_sensitivity": {
        "tasks": 2,
        "axes": ["camera_pose", "lighting", "object_pose"],
        "levels": ["baseline", "mild", "strong"],
        "purpose": "prepare structured data for MNPE/sensitivity analysis",
    },
}

score_case = {"banana": (4, 4), "cube": (1, 4)}
score_value = normalized_score(score_case)
ci_n10 = binomial_ci_half_width(0.5, 10)
ci_n100 = binomial_ci_half_width(0.5, 100)
long_horizon_curve = {
    n: full_success_from_step_success(0.8, n)
    for n in [1, 3, 5, 7]
}

deep_tests = [
    ("episode_identity_has_full_context", len(episode_identity_fields) >= 9 and "instruction_variant" in episode_identity_fields),
    ("evidence_chain_has_video_hdf5_event_dashboard", {"video", "hdf5", "event_log", "dashboard"}.issubset(evidence_chain)),
    ("score_can_capture_partial_progress", 0 < score_value < 1),
    ("ci_gets_tighter_with_more_episodes", ci_n100 < ci_n10),
    ("long_horizon_success_decays_with_subtasks", long_horizon_curve[7] < long_horizon_curve[3] < long_horizon_curve[1]),
    ("wrong_object_routes_to_visual_language_binding", classify_failure_signal({"wrong_object": 2}, {}) == "visual_language_binding"),
    ("dropped_target_routes_to_control", classify_failure_signal({"dropped_target": 1}, {}) == "grasp_or_release_control"),
    ("deformable_routes_to_benchmark_boundary", classify_failure_signal({}, {"deformable": True}) == "benchmark_boundary"),
    ("language_matrix_has_three_variants", set(reproduction_matrices["language_variation"]["variants"]) == {"default", "vague", "specific"}),
    ("sensitivity_matrix_has_three_axes", set(reproduction_matrices["small_sensitivity"]["axes"]) == {"camera_pose", "lighting", "object_pose"}),
]

report = {
    "episode_identity_fields": episode_identity_fields,
    "evidence_chain": evidence_chain,
    "score_case": {
        "progress_by_object": score_case,
        "normalized_score": score_value,
        "interpretation": "success=False can still have meaningful partial score.",
    },
    "ci_half_width_demo": {
        "n10_at_p05": ci_n10,
        "n100_at_p05": ci_n100,
        "interpretation": "single-task N=10 is coarse; N=100 is materially tighter.",
    },
    "long_horizon_curve_demo": long_horizon_curve,
    "failure_routing": {
        "wrong_object": classify_failure_signal({"wrong_object": 2}, {}),
        "dropped_target": classify_failure_signal({"dropped_target": 1}, {}),
        "deformable": classify_failure_signal({}, {"deformable": True}),
    },
    "reproduction_matrices": reproduction_matrices,
    "tests": [{"name": name, "passed": bool(ok)} for name, ok in deep_tests],
    "all_passed": all(ok for _, ok in deep_tests),
    "boundary": "Conceptual validation only. It does not rerun RoboLab-120, RoboArena, or MNPE.",
}

print(json.dumps(report, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
for name, ok in deep_tests:
    print(f"{name}: {'PASS' if ok else 'FAIL'}")

assert report["all_passed"], deep_tests
write_status("remaining_core_topics_deep_lightweight_tests", report)

0.20 代码精讲：policy rollout 到证据链¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_14_core_code_runtime_chain.md銆傚畠琛ョ殑鏄墠闈㈣繕娌＄郴缁熻閫忕殑婧愮爜涓诲共锛?code>runner.py 濡備綍璋冨害浠诲姟锛?code>episode.py 濡備綍閫愭鎵ц policy锛?code>InferenceClient / Pi0DroidJointposClient 濡備綍鎶婅娴嬭浆鎴愭ā鍨嬭姹傦紝WorldState / EventTracker / RecorderManager / summarize_run / dashboard loader 濡備綍鎶?rollout 鍙樻垚鍙垎鏋愯瘉鎹€?/p>

精讲 14：还没讲透的核心代码 - policy rollout 到证据链¶

銆愮豢鑹叉爣璇嗭綔鏍稿績缁撹銆?/strong> 鍓嶉潰璁蹭簡寰堝鈥滀换鍔℃€庝箞鐢熸垚銆佹垚鍔熸€庝箞瀹氫箟銆佽鏂囨€庝箞璇勬祴鈥濄€備絾鐪熸澶嶇幇鏃舵渶甯稿嚭闂鐨勬槸鍙︿竴鏉￠摼璺細runner.py 閫変换鍔″拰鍒涘缓杈撳嚭鐩綍锛?code>episode.py 姣忎竴姝ヨ皟鐢?policy锛屽啀 env.step锛?code>InferenceClient 鎶婅娴嬭浆鎴愭ā鍨嬭姹傦紝WorldState/conditionals/EventTracker 鍒ゆ柇鍙戠敓浜嗕粈涔堬紝RecorderManager/summarize/results/dashboard 鎶婅繃绋嬪啓鎴?HDF5銆丣SON銆佽棰戝拰琛ㄦ牸銆?/p>

銆愯摑鑹叉爣璇嗭綔婧愮爜璺緞銆?/strong> 杩欒妭鍩轰簬杩滅 4090 婧愮爜蹇収 7d45d74904eade3b578a8eb1f2f9f89bc3d40326锛?code>robolab/eval/runner.py銆?code>robolab/eval/episode.py銆?code>robolab/eval/base_client.py銆?code>policies/pi0_family/client.py銆?code>robolab/eval/summarize.py銆?code>robolab/core/world/world_state.py銆?code>robolab/core/task/event_tracker.py銆?code>robolab/core/logging/recorder_manager.py銆?code>robolab/core/logging/results.py銆?code>dashboard/loaders/local.py銆?/p>

銆愭鑹叉爣璇嗭綔瀹规槗璇В銆?/strong> policies/pi0_family/run.py 涓嶆槸鈥滄ā鍨嬫湰浣撯€濄€傚畠鍙槸 RoboLab 渚х殑 runner/client锛汷penPI 妯″瀷閫氬父鍦ㄥ彟涓€涓?server 杩涚▼閲岋紝RoboLab 閫氳繃 websocket 璇锋眰鍔ㄤ綔銆?/p>

先说还缺哪块代码¶

鍓嶉潰绮捐宸茬粡瑕嗙洊锛?/p>

  • Task 瀹氫箟锛歴cene銆乮nstruction銆乼ermination銆乻ubtasks銆?/li>
  • Scene/Task generation锛歱rompt銆乻olver銆乸hysical placement銆乿alidation銆?/li>
  • Metrics锛歋PARC銆丮NPE銆乨ifficulty銆丏TGE銆?/li>
  • Evidence interpretation锛歴uccess/score銆乪vent銆丆I銆佺湡瀹炰笘鐣岀浉鍏虫€с€?/li>

浣嗚繕娌＄郴缁熻閫忥細

涓€涓?policy-controlled episode 鍒板簳鎬庝箞璺戣捣鏉ワ紵
瑙傛祴鎬庝箞杩涙ā鍨嬶紵
鍔ㄤ綔鎬庝箞鍥炲埌浠跨湡锛?
澶?env 骞惰鏃舵€庝箞閬垮厤涓插姩浣滐紵
瑙嗛/HDF5/JSON/event log 鏄皝鍐欑殑锛?
dashboard 涓轰粈涔堣兘璇诲埌缁撴灉锛?

杩欏氨鏄湰鑺傝琛ョ殑鏍稿績浠ｇ爜銆?/p>

1. 总调用链¶

鎶婄湡瀹?policy eval 鍘嬫垚涓€寮犲浘锛?/p> 

mermaid
flowchart TD
    A["policies/pi0_family/run.py<br/>瑙ｆ瀽 pi05 鍙傛暟锛屽惎鍔?Isaac App"] --> B["robolab/eval/runner.py<br/>閫夋嫨 task/tag锛屽垱寤?output 鐩綍"]
    B --> C["create_env(..., policy=pi05)<br/>缁戝畾 task + robot + camera + action + recorder"]
    B --> D["client_factory(args)<br/>鍒涘缓 Pi0DroidJointposClient"]
    C --> E["robolab/eval/episode.py::run_episode"]
    D --> E
    E --> F["obs -> InferenceClient.infer(obs, instruction, env_id)"]
    F --> G["Pi05 client<br/>extract obs / pack request / websocket / unpack actions"]
    G --> H["env.step(actions)"]
    H --> I["RobolabEnv + Recorder + WorldState"]
    I --> J["conditionals/subtask/event_tracker"]
    I --> K["HDF5 / videos / per-env event JSON"]
    E --> L["summarize_run"]
    L --> M["episode_results.jsonl"]
    M --> N["analysis/read_results.py & dashboard/loaders/local.py"]

璇翠汉璇濓細

runner.py 绠♀€滆窇鍝簺棰樷€濓紝episode.py 绠♀€滄瘡涓€姝ユ€庝箞鎺ㄨ繘鈥濓紝client.py 绠♀€滄€庝箞闂ā鍨嬭鍔ㄤ綔鈥濓紝WorldState/conditionals/event_tracker 绠♀€滃彂鐢熶簡浠€涔堚€濓紝recorder/summarize/results/dashboard 绠♀€滆瘉鎹€庝箞钀界洏鍜屽睍绀衡€濄€?/p>

2. runner.py：不是跑一步，而是跑整场考试¶

鏍稿績鍑芥暟锛?/p> 

add_common_eval_args(parser)
run_evaluation(args, policy, client_factory)

输入¶

  • --task / --tag / 榛樿鍏ㄤ换鍔°€?/li>
  • --num-envs锛氬苟琛岀幆澧冩暟銆?/li>
  • --num-runs锛氭瘡涓?task 椤哄簭璺戝嚑鎵广€?/li>
  • --instruction-type锛?code>default/vague/specific 绛夎瑷€鍙樹綋銆?/li>
  • --enable-subtask锛氭槸鍚﹁褰?subtask 杩涘害銆?/li>
  • --video-mode锛氫繚瀛?sensor/viewport 瑙嗛銆?/li>
  • --output-folder-name锛氭寚瀹氭棫鐩綍鍙画璺戙€?/li>
  • --num-episodes-adaptive 涓?--ci-pp-width锛氭寜鎴愬姛鐜囩疆淇″尯闂磋嚜閫傚簲琛?episode銆?/li>

输出¶

output/<timestamp>_<policy>/
  episode_results.jsonl
  <TaskName>/
    env_cfg.json
    run_0.hdf5
    log_0_env0.json
    *.mp4

代码关键点¶

run_evaluation() 鍋氳繖鍑犱欢浜嬶細

  1. 鏍规嵁 policy 鍜屾椂闂存埑鍒涘缓杈撳嚭鐩綍銆?/li>
  2. 鏍规嵁 task/tag 鎵句换鍔″垪琛ㄣ€?/li>
  3. 璋?init_experiment() 鍒涘缓鎴栧姞杞?episode_results.jsonl銆?/li>
  4. 姣忎釜 task 璋?create_env()銆?/li>
  5. 姣忎釜 task 鍒涘缓涓€娆?policy client銆?/li>
  6. 姣忎釜 run 璋?run_episode()銆?/li>
  7. 璋?summarize_run() 鎶婅繖鎵圭粨鏋滆拷鍔犲埌 JSONL銆?/li>
  8. 鏈€鍚?summarize_experiment_results() 鎵撳嵃鎬昏〃銆?/li>

銆愮豢鑹叉爣璇嗭綔璋冭瘯鐩磋銆?/strong>

濡傛灉浣犲彂鐜版煇涓换鍔℃病璺戯紝鍏堢湅 runner.py 杩欎竴灞傦細鏄笉鏄?--task/--tag 绛涢€夐敊浜嗭紵鏄笉鏄?episode_results.jsonl 閲屽凡缁忔湁璁板綍瀵艰嚧缁窇璺宠繃锛熸槸涓嶆槸 num_envs 杩囧ぇ OOM锛?/p>

3. episode.py：真正的闭环在这里¶

鏍稿績鍑芥暟锛?/p> 

run_episode(env, env_cfg, episode, client, headless, save_videos, video_mode)

每一步做什么¶

reset env
setup HDF5 file and video writers
for step in max_steps:
    for each active env:
        action = client.infer(obs, instruction, env_id)
    obs, reward, term, trunc, info = env.step(actions)
    subtask_status.append(get_all_env_subtask_infos(env))
    write video frames
    if env.all_terminated:
        break
release videos
client.reset()
return env_results, subtask_status, timing

关键设计¶

璁捐 浣滅敤
clients = [client] * env.num_envs 鍚屼竴涓繛鎺ユ湇鍔″涓苟琛岀幆澧?/td>
env.active_env_ids 鍙粰鏈粓姝?env 璇锋眰鍔ㄤ綔
frozen env action 涓?0 宸茬粨鏉熺殑鐜涓嶅啀缁х画姹℃煋杞ㄨ抗
set_hdf5_file(f"run_{episode}.hdf5") 姣忎釜 run 涓€涓?HDF5
set_episode_index(env_id) HDF5 閲岀敤 demo_<env_id> 瀵归綈骞惰 env
TimingStats 鍒嗗紑璁板綍 policy/env/video 鐨勮€楁椂
client.reset() 娓呯┖ action chunk锛岄伩鍏嶄笅涓€ episode 鎵ц鏃у姩浣?/td>

銆愭鑹叉爣璇嗭綔甯歌鍧戙€?/strong>

濡傛灉 OpenPI 涓€娆¤繑鍥?15 姝?action chunk锛?code>client.infer() 涓嶆槸姣忎釜 sim step 閮界湡鐨勮姹?server銆傚畠浼氬厛娑堣垂缂撳瓨鍔ㄤ綔锛岀紦瀛樿€楀敖鍚庢墠閲嶆柊鍙?websocket 璇锋眰銆傛墍浠ュ钩鍧?inference time 鍜?sim step 鏁颁笉鏄竴鍥炰簨銆?/p>

4. InferenceClient：所有策略接入的最小合同¶

鎶借薄绫诲湪锛?/p> 

robolab/eval/base_client.py

瀹冭姹傜瓥鐣ュ疄鐜?4 涓?hook锛?/p>

hook 杈撳叆 杈撳嚭 鑱岃矗
_extract_observation(raw_obs, env_id) RoboLab 鍘熷 obs flat numpy dict 浠?batched tensor 閲屽彇涓€涓?env 鐨勫浘鍍?鍏宠妭
_pack_request(extracted_obs, instruction) flat obs + 璇█ server request 鏀规垚妯″瀷鏈嶅姟绔渶瑕佺殑 key/schema
_query_server(request) request response 璇锋眰妯″瀷鏈嶅姟
_unpack_response(response) response action chunk 鎷垮嚭鍔ㄤ綔鏁扮粍

鐖剁被 infer() 鎶婂畠浠覆璧锋潵锛?/p> 

extract -> needs_refresh? -> pack -> query -> unpack -> postprocess -> cache -> next_action

为什么这层很关键¶

RoboLab 鏀寔涓嶅悓 policy锛屼笉鍙兘鎶?Pi0/Pi05/GR00T/ReKep 鍏ㄥ啓姝诲湪 evaluator 閲屻€?br> 鎵€浠ュ畠鍙姹傛瘡涓?policy 鎻愪緵鍚屼竴涓帴鍙ｏ細

obs + instruction -> action

杩欎篃鏄垜浠互鍚庢帴 RoboChallenge 鎴?ReKep 鐨勫叆鍙ｃ€?/p>

5. Pi0DroidJointposClient：OpenPI/Pi05 的适配层¶

鏂囦欢锛?/p> 

policies/pi0_family/client.py

瀹冨仛鐨勪簨鎯呭緢鍏蜂綋锛?/p>

输入¶

鏉ヨ嚜 RoboLab 鐨?observation锛?/p> 

raw_obs["image_obs"]["over_shoulder_left_camera"][env_id]
raw_obs["image_obs"]["wrist_cam"][env_id]
raw_obs["proprio_obs"]["arm_joint_pos"][env_id]
raw_obs["proprio_obs"]["gripper_pos"][env_id]

发给 OpenPI 的 request¶

observation/exterior_image_1_left
observation/wrist_image_left
observation/joint_position
observation/gripper_position
prompt

娉ㄦ剰杩欎簺 key 涓嶆槸闅忎究璧风殑锛屽畠浠鍖归厤 DROID checkpoint 鐨勮缁?schema銆?/p>

输出¶

OpenPI server 杩斿洖锛?/p> 

response["actions"] -> numpy action chunk

Pi05 榛樿 open_loop_horizon = 15銆?br> 鏈€鍚庝竴缁?gripper 浼氫簩鍊煎寲锛?/p> 

chunk[..., -1] = chunk[..., -1] > 0.5

璇翠汉璇濓細

杩欏眰鏄€滅炕璇戝畼鈥濓細RoboLab 鐨勮瀵熸牸寮忕炕璇戞垚 OpenPI 鍚緱鎳傜殑璇锋眰锛屽啀鎶?OpenPI 鐨勫姩浣滅炕璇戝洖 RoboLab action space銆?/p>

6. RobolabEnv.step 与 frozen env：为什么并行评测不会乱¶

鏂囦欢锛?/p> 

robolab/core/environments/env.py

鍓嶉潰绮捐娌℃湁娣卞叆杩欏潡銆傚畠鐨勫叧閿槸锛氳瘎娴嬪拰 RL 璁粌涓嶄竴鏍枫€?/p>

璁粌鏃朵竴涓?env 缁撴潫鍙互绔嬪埢 reset銆?br> 璇勬祴鏃朵笉鑳借繖涔堝仛锛屽洜涓烘垜浠繕瑕侊細

  • 鐭ラ亾瀹冨湪鍝竴姝ユ垚鍔?澶辫触銆?/li>
  • 瀵煎嚭杩欎竴鏉?episode 鐨?HDF5銆?/li>
  • 鍐欎簨浠舵棩蹇椼€?/li>
  • 涓嶈宸茬粨鏉?env 缁х画鎺ユ敹鍔ㄤ綔銆?/li>

鎵€浠?RoboLab 鐢細

active_env_ids
_frozen_envs
all_terminated
reset_eval_state()

鏉ョ鐞嗗苟琛岀幆澧冦€?br> 杩欏氨鏄负浠€涔?episode.py 姣忔鍙 active_env_ids 璇锋眰鍔ㄤ綔銆?/p>

7. WorldState：谓词函数不直接到处翻 Isaac 数据¶

鏂囦欢锛?/p> 

robolab/core/world/world_state.py

瀹冩槸浠跨湡鏌ヨ缁熶竴鍏ュ彛锛屾彁渚涳細

  • entities / objects / articulations / extras銆?/li>
  • pose銆乿elocity銆乫rame pose銆?/li>
  • dimensions銆丄ABB銆乥box銆乧entroid銆?/li>
  • robot joint state銆?/li>
  • contact force / in contact銆?/li>

为什么要有这一层¶

濡傛灉 object_in_container()銆?code>object_left_of()銆?code>object_grabbed() 姣忎釜鍑芥暟閮借嚜宸辫 Isaac/Usd/ContactSensor锛屼唬鐮佷細闈炲父涔憋紝涔熷緢闅炬壒閲忓鐞?num_envs銆?/p>

WorldState 鎶婅繖浜涚粺涓€璧锋潵锛?/p> 

conditionals.py -> get_world(env) -> geometry/contact/pose query

两个重要缓存¶

缂撳瓨 鐢ㄩ€?/th>
_local_geometry_cache 鏈湴 bbox/dimensions 闈欐€佷笉鍙橈紝閬垮厤姣?step 閲嶇畻 USD 鍑犱綍
_predicate_state 椤哄簭璋撹瘝闇€瑕佽法 step 璁板繂锛屼緥濡傚厛鍚庡叧绯汇€佹槸鍚︽浘缁忔斁鍏ヨ繃

銆愮豢鑹叉爣璇嗭綔璋冭瘯鐩磋銆?/strong>

濡傛灉瑙嗛閲屽璞＄湅璧锋潵宸茬粡杩涚锛屼絾 success=False锛岄噸鐐规煡 WorldState + conditionals.py锛歜box銆乧ontact銆乼olerance銆乬ripper detached銆乧ontainer relation 鏄惁鍜岃倝鐪煎垽鏂竴鑷淬€?/p>

8. EventTracker：失败不是一个 False，而是一串行为事件¶

鏂囦欢锛?/p> 

robolab/core/task/event_tracker.py

瀹冭拷韪細

  • wrong object grabbed銆?/li>
  • gripper hit table銆?/li>
  • gripper fully closed but no grasp銆?/li>
  • non-target object moved/bumped銆?/li>
  • object out of scene銆?/li>
  • object tipped over銆?/li>
  • target object dropped銆?/li>
  • gripper hit non-target object銆?/li>
  • multiple objects grabbed銆?/li>

输入¶

env
per_env_intended target object set
frozen_mask
ignore_objects
upright_objects

输出¶

[(info_string, StatusCode, env_mask), ...]

env_mask 寰堥噸瑕侊細瀹冨憡璇変綘杩欎釜浜嬩欢鍙戠敓鍦ㄥ摢浜涘苟琛?env 涓娿€?/p>

璇翠汉璇濓細

EventTracker 鏄け璐ヨ瘖鏂櫒銆傚畠璁╂垜浠煡閬撴ā鍨嬫槸娌″姩銆佹姄閿欍€佹挒妗屻€佹彁鍓嶆斁鎵嬶紝杩樻槸鎶婃棤鍏崇墿浣撴挒椋炪€?/p>

鏂囦欢锛?/p> 

robolab/core/logging/recorder_manager.py

瀹冩墿灞?Isaac Lab 鐨?recorder锛岄噸鐐规槸锛?/p>

  • 姣忎釜 env 鏈夌嫭绔?EpisodeData銆?/li>

  • 闀?episode 鏀寔 streaming flush锛岄檷浣庡唴瀛樺帇鍔涖€?/li>

杩欒В閲婁簡涓轰粈涔堢粨鏋滅粨鏋勯€氬父鏄細

TaskName/
  run_0.hdf5

    /data/demo_1/...

  log_0_env1.json

銆愭鑹叉爣璇嗭綔甯歌鍧戙€?/strong>

濡傛灉 HDF5 涓虹┖锛屼笉涓€瀹氭槸 policy 娌¤窇锛涗篃鍙兘鏄?recorder 娌″垵濮嬪寲銆佹病鏈夎皟鐢?set_hdf5_file銆乪nv 娌℃垚鍔?export銆佹垨鑰?episode 鍦ㄥ鍑哄墠寮傚父閫€鍑恒€?/p>

10. summarize_run 与 results.py：把过程折叠成一行 JSONL¶

鏂囦欢锛?/p> 

robolab/eval/summarize.py
robolab/core/logging/results.py

run_episode() 杩斿洖鐨勬槸杩囩▼鏁版嵁锛涜鏂囪〃鏍奸渶瑕佺殑鏄?episode 绾ф憳瑕併€?br> summarize_run() 鍋氭姌鍙狅細

  1. 璇诲彇 final subtask info銆?/li>
  2. 鎵惧埌 run_<idx>.hdf5銆?/li>
  3. 浠?recorder 鍙栧嚭 per-env events銆?/li>
  4. 鍐?log_<run>_env<id>.json銆?/li>
  5. 浠?HDF5 璇?demo_<env_id>銆?/li>
  6. 璁＄畻 trajectory metrics銆?/li>
  7. 璇诲彇 final score銆?/li>
  8. build run_summary銆?/li>
  9. update_experiment_results() append 鍒?episode_results.jsonl銆?/li>

episode_results.jsonl 鏄悗缁?analysis/dashboard 鐨勪富璐︽湰銆?br> 娌℃湁瀹冿紝瑙嗛鍜?HDF5 浠嶇劧鏈変环鍊硷紝浣嗚鏂囩骇鑱氬悎浼氭柇銆?/p>

11. dashboard/loaders/local.py：结果为什么能在网页里看¶

Dashboard 涓嶉噸鏂拌窇 Isaac锛屼篃涓?import 浠诲姟浠ｇ爜銆傚畠璇绘枃浠讹細

episode_results.jsonl
task folder
HDF5
videos
event logs

鏍稿績璁捐锛?/p>

  • episode_results.jsonl 鏄?canonical source銆?/li>
  • HDF5 鏄惁鏈?episode 鐢ㄨ交閲忔鏌ャ€?/li>
  • loader 鐢?mtime 鍋?cache key锛屾枃浠跺彉浜嗗氨鍒锋柊銆?/li>
  • success rate 鐢?Beta credible interval銆?/li>
  • score 鐢?Student-t CI銆?/li>

璇翠汉璇濓細

Dashboard 鏄绾胯瘉鎹煡鐪嬪櫒锛屼笉鏄豢鐪熻繍琛屽櫒銆傚畠鐨勫彲闈犳€у彇鍐充簬鍓嶉潰 runner/summarize 鏄惁鎶婅瘉鎹啓瀹屾暣銆?/p>

12. 按故障反查代码¶

鐜拌薄 浼樺厛鐪嬪摢閲?/th> 鍘熷洜
鍛戒护鍚姩鍚庢病璺戠洰鏍囦换鍔?/td> runner.py task/tag 绛涢€夈€佺画璺戣烦杩?/td> 浠诲姟鍒楄〃鎴?JSONL 宸叉湁璁板綍
OpenPI server 宸插紑浣嗗姩浣滀笉瀵?/td> Pi0DroidJointposClient._pack_request key/schema/image resize/璇█ prompt 涓嶅尮閰?/td>
澶?env 琛屼负涓蹭簡 InferenceClient._chunks/_counters 鏄惁鎸?env_id 鍒嗗紑 action chunk 缂撳瓨姹℃煋
瑙嗛閲屾垚鍔熶絾 success=False conditionals.py + WorldState contact/tolerance/detached/bbox 鍒ゆ柇鍜岃倝鐪间笉鍚?/td>
閿欒鍘熷洜涓虹┖ EventTracker + recorder event export event 娌¤Е鍙戞垨娌″啓鍏?per-env log
HDF5 绌?/td> RobolabRecorderManager file handler銆乪pisode index銆乪xport 鏃舵満
JSONL 娌℃柊澧?/td> summarize_run + update_experiment_results episode summary 娌?build 鎴?append
Dashboard 鐪嬩笉鍒扮粨鏋?/td> dashboard/loaders/local.py 璺緞銆乵time cache銆佺己 JSONL/HDF5/videos

13. 复现时最重要的代码心智模型¶

璁颁綇涓嬮潰杩欎釜鍒嗗眰锛?/p> 

runner:        閫変换鍔°€佸缓杈撳嚭鐩綍銆佺画璺戙€佹壒閲忚皟搴?
episode:       姣忎竴姝?obs -> client -> action -> env.step
client:        鎶?RoboLab obs 缈昏瘧鎴?policy server 璇锋眰
env/world:     浠跨湡鐘舵€併€佸嚑浣曘€佹帴瑙︺€佹垚鍔熸潯浠?
event:         鎶婂け璐ユ媶鎴愬彲瑙ｉ噴浜嬩欢
recorder:      鍐?HDF5 鍜岃棰?
summarize:     鎶樺彔鎴?episode_results.jsonl
dashboard:     绂荤嚎璇诲彇璇佹嵁骞跺睍绀虹粺璁?

濡傛灉鍚庣画浣犺鎺?RoboChallenge 鐨?pi 鎴?ReKep锛屾渶璇ユ敼鐨勬槸锛?/p>

  • policy client锛氳娴?schema銆佸姩浣?schema銆佽繛鎺ユ柟寮忋€?/li>
  • runner 鍙傛暟锛歱olicy 鍚嶇О銆佹ā鍨嬫湇鍔″湴鍧€銆佷换鍔″瓙闆嗐€?/li>
  • 缁撴灉鍒嗘瀽锛氬悓涓€濂?episode_results.jsonl 鑱氬悎锛屼笉瑕佹敼鎺変富璇佹嵁鏍煎紡銆?/li>

小结¶

绮捐14琛ョ殑鏄唬鐮佽繍琛屼富骞诧細

浠诲姟涓嶆槸鐩存帴琚ā鍨嬭В鍐崇殑銆?
浠诲姟鍏堣 runner 閫変腑锛?
琚?create_env 瑁呮垚鍙繍琛岀幆澧冿紝
琚?episode loop 鎸?step 鎺ㄨ繘锛?
琚?client 杞垚妯″瀷璇锋眰锛?
琚?WorldState/conditionals/event 鍒ゆ柇琛屼负锛?
琚?recorder/summarize 鍐欐垚璇佹嵁锛?
鏈€鍚庢墠琚?analysis/dashboard 鍙樻垚璁烘枃琛ㄦ牸銆?

杩欐潯閾捐矾姣斿崟涓ā鍨嬭皟鐢ㄦ洿閲嶈銆傚洜涓哄鐜板け璐ユ椂锛岄棶棰樺彲鑳藉湪妯″瀷銆佽娴嬨€佸姩浣溿€佷豢鐪熴€佽皳璇嶃€佽褰曘€佹眹鎬汇€佸睍绀轰换鎰忎竴灞傘€?/p>

In [ ]:
# ===== 绮捐14锛氭牳蹇冧唬鐮佽繍琛岄摼璺交閲忛獙璇?=====
# 杩欎釜 cell 涓嶅惎鍔?Isaac锛屼篃涓嶈繛 OpenPI server銆?/span>
# 瀹冩妸婧愮爜涓诲共鎷嗘垚鍙鏌ョ殑鑺傜偣涓庢帴鍙ｏ紝楠岃瘉 runner -> episode -> client -> env/world
# -> event -> recorder -> summarize -> dashboard 杩欐潯璇佹嵁閾惧畬鏁撮棴鍚堛€?/span>

import json

runtime_code_chain = [
    {
        "stage": "runner",
        "files": ["robolab/eval/runner.py", "policies/pi0_family/run.py"],
        "core_functions": ["add_common_eval_args", "run_evaluation", "client_factory"],
        "input": ["task_or_tag", "num_envs", "num_runs", "instruction_type", "video_mode", "policy_name"],
        "output": ["output_dir", "task_envs", "episode_results_jsonl", "env_cfg"],
        "failure_hint": "浠诲姟娌¤窇銆佺画璺戣烦杩囥€乶um_envs OOM銆佽緭鍑虹洰褰曚笉瀵癸紝浼樺厛鏌ヨ繖閲屻€?,
    },
    {
        "stage": "episode_loop",
        "files": ["robolab/eval/episode.py"],
        "core_functions": ["run_episode", "TimingStats"],
        "input": ["env", "env_cfg", "episode_index", "InferenceClient", "video_mode"],
        "output": ["env_results", "subtask_status", "timing", "videos", "run_hdf5"],
        "failure_hint": "鍔ㄤ綔娌¤繘 env銆佽棰戜笉鍐欍€佸凡缁堟 env 杩樺湪鍔紝浼樺厛鏌ヨ繖閲屻€?,
    },
    {
        "stage": "inference_client_contract",
        "files": ["robolab/eval/base_client.py"],
        "core_functions": ["infer", "_extract_observation", "_pack_request", "_query_server", "_unpack_response", "_postprocess_chunk"],
        "input": ["raw_obs", "instruction", "env_id"],
        "output": ["action", "viz"],
        "failure_hint": "鎺ユ柊妯″瀷/鏂版満鍣ㄤ汉鏃讹紝鍏堢‘璁よ繖浜斾釜 hook 鐨勮緭鍏ヨ緭鍑恒€?,
    },
    {
        "stage": "pi05_client_adapter",
        "files": ["policies/pi0_family/client.py"],
        "core_functions": ["Pi0DroidJointposClient", "_extract_observation", "_pack_request", "_infer_with_retry", "_postprocess_chunk"],
        "input": ["over_shoulder_left_camera", "wrist_cam", "arm_joint_pos", "gripper_pos", "prompt"],
        "output": ["openpi_request", "action_chunk", "binary_gripper_action"],
        "failure_hint": "server 杩炰笂浣嗗姩浣滄€紝閲嶇偣鏌?OpenPI request key銆佸浘鍍?resize銆乤ction horizon銆乬ripper 浜屽€煎寲銆?,
    },
    {
        "stage": "env_world_conditionals",
        "files": ["robolab/core/environments/env.py", "robolab/core/world/world_state.py", "robolab/core/task/conditionals.py"],
        "core_functions": ["RobolabEnv.step", "get_world", "WorldState", "object_in_container", "object_grabbed"],
        "input": ["actions", "scene_entities", "contact_sensors", "object_poses"],
        "output": ["termination_state", "subtask_state", "spatial_relations", "contact_relations"],
        "failure_hint": "瑙嗛鐪嬬潃鎴愬姛浣?success=False锛岄噸鐐规煡 WorldState銆乧ontact銆乥box銆乼olerance銆乨etached 鏉′欢銆?,
    },
    {
        "stage": "event_tracking",
        "files": ["robolab/core/task/event_tracker.py"],
        "core_functions": ["EventTracker", "check_events", "reset_envs"],
        "input": ["per_env_intended_targets", "frozen_mask", "world_state"],
        "output": ["wrong_object", "target_dropped", "hit_table", "object_moved", "env_mask"],
        "failure_hint": "澶辫触鍘熷洜绌烘垨涓嶅噯锛屾煡 event tracker 鏄惁瑙﹀彂鍜?recorder 鏄惁瀵煎嚭浜嬩欢銆?,
    },
    {
        "stage": "recording",
        "files": ["robolab/core/logging/recorder_manager.py", "robolab/core/logging/streaming_hdf5_handler.py"],
        "core_functions": ["RobolabRecorderManager", "set_hdf5_file", "set_episode_index", "flush_buffer"],
        "input": ["per_step_state", "actions", "obs", "env_ids"],
        "output": ["run_0.hdf5", "demo_0", "demo_1"],
        "failure_hint": "HDF5 绌恒€乨emo 缂哄け銆侀暱 episode 鍐呭瓨娑紝浼樺厛鏌?recorder manager銆?,
    },
    {
        "stage": "summarize_results",
        "files": ["robolab/eval/summarize.py", "robolab/core/logging/results.py"],
        "core_functions": ["summarize_run", "build_run_summary", "update_experiment_results", "summarize_experiment_results"],
        "input": ["env_results", "events", "HDF5", "env_cfg", "timing"],
        "output": ["log_0_env0.json", "episode_results.jsonl", "trajectory_metrics", "score"],
        "failure_hint": "瑙嗛/HDF5 鏈変簡浣?JSONL 娌℃柊澧烇紝鏌?summarize_run 鍜?update_experiment_results銆?,
    },
    {
        "stage": "dashboard_loader",
        "files": ["dashboard/loaders/local.py"],
        "core_functions": ["_cached_load_episodes", "_sr_beta_ci", "_score_ci", "EpisodeRow", "TaskSummary"],
        "input": ["episode_results.jsonl", "task_folders", "HDF5", "videos", "logs"],
        "output": ["dashboard_rows", "success_rate_CI", "score_CI", "video_links"],
        "failure_hint": "Dashboard 鐪嬩笉鍒扮粨鏋滐紝鏌ヨ矾寰勩€乵time cache銆丣SONL/HDF5/video 鏄惁榻愬叏銆?,
    },
]

stage_order = [item["stage"] for item in runtime_code_chain]

def route_runtime_issue(symptom):
    # 鏁欏鐗堟晠闅滆矾鐢憋紝鐢ㄦ潵鎶婂鐜伴棶棰樺揩閫熷畾浣嶅埌浠ｇ爜灞傘€?/span>
    text = symptom.lower()
    if "task" in text or "skip" in text or "oom" in text:
        return "runner"
    if "server" in text or "request" in text or "action horizon" in text or "gripper" in text:
        return "pi05_client_adapter"
    if "success=false" in text or "condition" in text or "contact" in text:
        return "env_world_conditionals"
    if "wrong object" in text or "dropped" in text or "hit table" in text:
        return "event_tracking"
    if "hdf5" in text or "demo" in text:
        return "recording"
    if "jsonl" in text or "summary" in text:
        return "summarize_results"
    if "dashboard" in text or "ci" in text:
        return "dashboard_loader"
    return "episode_loop"

expected_contract_hooks = {
    "_extract_observation",
    "_pack_request",
    "_query_server",
    "_unpack_response",
    "_postprocess_chunk",
}
client_hooks = set(runtime_code_chain[2]["core_functions"])

code_chain_tests = [
    ("chain_starts_with_runner", stage_order[0] == "runner"),
    ("chain_ends_with_dashboard_loader", stage_order[-1] == "dashboard_loader"),
    ("episode_loop_between_runner_and_client", stage_order.index("runner") < stage_order.index("episode_loop") < stage_order.index("inference_client_contract")),
    ("client_contract_has_required_hooks", expected_contract_hooks.issubset(client_hooks)),
    ("pi05_client_exposes_droid_observation_keys", {"over_shoulder_left_camera", "wrist_cam", "arm_joint_pos", "gripper_pos", "prompt"}.issubset(set(runtime_code_chain[3]["input"]))),
    ("world_layer_outputs_conditions", {"termination_state", "subtask_state", "contact_relations"}.issubset(set(runtime_code_chain[4]["output"]))),
    ("event_layer_outputs_failure_taxonomy", {"wrong_object", "target_dropped", "hit_table"}.issubset(set(runtime_code_chain[5]["output"]))),
    ("recording_layer_outputs_hdf5_demos", {"run_0.hdf5", "demo_0"}.issubset(set(runtime_code_chain[6]["output"]))),
    ("summarize_layer_outputs_jsonl", "episode_results.jsonl" in runtime_code_chain[7]["output"]),
    ("issue_router_maps_hdf5_to_recording", route_runtime_issue("HDF5 demo_0 is empty") == "recording"),
    ("issue_router_maps_success_false_to_world", route_runtime_issue("video success but success=False contact mismatch") == "env_world_conditionals"),
    ("issue_router_maps_server_to_client", route_runtime_issue("OpenPI server request action horizon wrong") == "pi05_client_adapter"),
]

report = {
    "runtime_code_chain": runtime_code_chain,
    "stage_order": stage_order,
    "issue_routing_examples": {
        "hdf5_empty": route_runtime_issue("HDF5 demo_0 is empty"),
        "success_false": route_runtime_issue("video success but success=False contact mismatch"),
        "server_request": route_runtime_issue("OpenPI server request action horizon wrong"),
        "dashboard_missing": route_runtime_issue("dashboard cannot find CI rows"),
    },
    "tests": [{"name": name, "passed": bool(ok)} for name, ok in code_chain_tests],
    "all_passed": all(ok for _, ok in code_chain_tests),
    "boundary": "This validates the source-code mental model only. It does not import Isaac Sim or call a policy server.",
}

print(json.dumps(report, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
for name, ok in code_chain_tests:
    print(f"{name}: {'PASS' if ok else 'FAIL'}")

assert report["all_passed"], code_chain_tests
write_status("core_code_runtime_chain_lightweight_tests", report)

0.20b 代码精讲：精讲14补充，核心运行时代码深挖¶

涓嬮潰杩欒妭鏉ヨ嚜鏈洰褰曠殑 EXPLAIN_14_deep_runtime_code_chain.md銆傚畠鎶婄簿璁?14 浠庘€滄枃浠跺瑙堚€濈户缁帹杩涘埌鈥滆緭鍏ャ€佸鐞嗐€佽緭鍑恒€佹晠闅滆矾鐢卞拰澶嶇幇璇佹嵁閾锯€濓細涓轰粈涔?runner.py 瑕佸欢杩熷鍏?Isaac 鐩稿叧妯″潡锛?code>episode.py 鎬庢牱澶勭悊 active/frozen env锛?code>InferenceClient 涓轰粈涔堟寜 env_id 缂撳瓨 action chunk锛孭i05 client 濡備綍鎶?RoboLab 瑙傛祴杞垚 OpenPI/Pi05 璇锋眰锛?code>WorldState/EventTracker 濡備綍鏀拺璋撹瘝涓庡け璐ヤ簨浠讹紝HDF5銆乪vent log銆?code>episode_results.jsonl 鍜?dashboard 鍒嗗埆鎵挎媴浠€涔堣瘉鎹鑹层€?/p>

精讲 14-补充：核心运行时代码深挖，policy rollout 如何变成证据¶

[缁胯壊 鏍稿績缁撹]锛歊oboLab 鐨勬牳蹇冧唬鐮佷笉鏄竴涓€滆窇妯″瀷鈥濈殑鑴氭湰锛岃€屾槸涓€鏉″彲瀹¤鐨勮瘎娴嬫祦姘寸嚎銆?code>runner.py 璐熻矗閫夋嫨浠诲姟鍜岀粍缁囧疄楠岋紝episode.py 璐熻矗鎶婄瓥鐣ユ斁杩涗豢鐪熼棴鐜紝InferenceClient 鍜?Pi05 client 璐熻矗鎶婅娴嬭浆鎴愭ā鍨嬭姹傦紝WorldState 鍜?EventTracker 璐熻矗瑙ｉ噴鍦烘櫙涓彂鐢熶簡浠€涔堬紝RecorderManager銆?code>summarize.py銆?code>results.py 鍜?dashboard 璐熻矗鎶婅繃绋嬭惤鎴?HDF5銆丣SONL銆佷簨浠舵棩蹇椼€佽棰戝拰缁熻琛ㄣ€?/p>

[钃濊壊 婧愮爜璺緞]锛氭湰鑺傚熀浜庡畼鏂?RoboLab GitHub 涓诲共婧愮爜璁茶В锛岄噸鐐瑰搴?robolab/eval/runner.py銆?code>robolab/eval/episode.py銆?code>robolab/eval/base_client.py銆?code>policies/pi0_family/client.py銆?code>robolab/core/world/world_state.py銆?code>robolab/core/task/event_tracker.py銆?code>robolab/eval/summarize.py銆?code>robolab/core/logging/results.py銆?code>robolab/core/logging/recorder_manager.py銆?code>dashboard/loaders/local.py銆?/p>

[姗欒壊 鏄撻敊鐐筣锛氫笉瑕佹妸鈥滄湁瑙嗛鈥濊璁や负鈥滃鐜版垚鍔熲€濄€傝棰戝彧鏄娴嬭瘉鎹箣涓€銆傜湡姝ｇ殑璇勬祴缁撴灉瑕佺湅 episode_results.jsonl銆佹瘡涓?env 鐨勪簨浠舵棩蹇椼€丠DF5 閲岀殑 subtask score銆佹垚鍔熸爣蹇椼€佸け璐ュ師鍥犲拰缁熻缃俊鍖洪棿銆?/p>

0. 为什么原来的精讲 14 还不够¶

鍘熸潵鐨勭簿璁?14 宸茬粡鎶婁富鏂囦欢鍒楀嚭鏉ヤ簡锛屼絾杩樺仠鐣欏湪鈥滆繖涓枃浠惰礋璐ｄ粈涔堚€濈殑灞傞潰銆傚疄闄呭鐜版椂锛岄棶棰橀€氬父涓嶄細闂緱杩欎箞鎶借薄锛岃€屾槸浼氬彉鎴愯繖浜涘叿浣撻棶棰橈細

  • 涓轰粈涔堟垜鐪嬪埌鏈烘鑷傚姩浜嗭紝浣嗘槸 success=false锛?/li>
  • 涓轰粈涔?Pi05 server 鏄庢槑鍦ㄨ窇锛屼絾 RoboLab 涓€鐩寸瓑寰呮垨鍔ㄤ綔涓嶅锛?/li>
  • 涓轰粈涔堝 env 骞惰鏃朵竴涓?env 鎴愬姛浜嗭紝鍙︿竴涓?env 鐨勮棰戝拰鏃ュ織鍍忔槸涓蹭簡锛?/li>
  • 涓轰粈涔?dashboard 閲屾病鏈夎棰戯紝鎴栬€呮湁瑙嗛鍗存病鏈?score锛?/li>
  • 涓轰粈涔堝悓涓€涓换鍔¤窇杩囦竴娆″悗锛屽啀璺戜細琚烦杩囷紵
  • 4090 鏄惧瓨涓嶅鏃讹紝鍒板簳璇ラ檷 num_envs 杩樻槸闄嶄换鍔℃暟閲忥紵

杩欎簺闂閮借娌跨潃杩愯鏃朵唬鐮侀摼鍘绘煡銆備笅闈㈡寜鈥滆緭鍏ャ€佸鐞嗐€佽緭鍑恒€佸父瑙佹晠闅溾€濈殑鏂瑰紡鎷嗐€?/p>

1. 总体心智模型：三层闭环¶

mermaid
flowchart TD
    A["璋冨害灞?lt;br/>run.py + runner.py"] --> B["闂幆灞?lt;br/>episode.py + InferenceClient + env.step"]
    B --> C["璇箟鍒ゅ畾灞?lt;br/>WorldState + conditionals + EventTracker"]
    C --> D["璇佹嵁灞?lt;br/>RecorderManager + HDF5 + event log + summarize.py"]
    D --> E["鍒嗘瀽灞?lt;br/>results.py + dashboard"]

璇翠汉璇濓細

  • 璋冨害灞傚喅瀹氣€滆€冨摢鍑犻亾棰樸€佽窇鍑犻亶銆佺粨鏋滄斁鍝€濄€?/li>
  • 闂幆灞傚喅瀹氣€滄瘡涓€涓豢鐪?step 閲岋紝妯″瀷鐪嬩粈涔堛€佽緭鍑轰粈涔堝姩浣溿€佺幆澧冩€庝箞鏇存柊鈥濄€?/li>
  • 璇箟鍒ゅ畾灞傚喅瀹氣€滆嫻鏋滄槸鍚︾湡鐨勮繘纰椼€佹槸鍚︽姄閿欑墿浣撱€佹槸鍚︽挒妗屻€佹槸鍚︽妸鏃犲叧鐗╀綋鎾為鈥濄€?/li>
  • 璇佹嵁灞傚喅瀹氣€滆繖浜涜繃绋嬭瘉鎹€庝箞淇濆瓨锛屾渶缁堟垚鍔熺巼銆乻core 鍜屽け璐ュ師鍥犳€庝箞鐢熸垚鈥濄€?/li>
  • 鍒嗘瀽灞傚喅瀹氣€滃鐜版姤鍛娿€乨ashboard銆佽〃鏍笺€佸姣斿浘鎬庝箞璇昏繖浜涚粨鏋溾€濄€?/li>

鍏抽敭鏄細RoboLab 鐨勮瘎娴嬩笉鏄彧淇濆瓨鏈€鍚庝竴甯э紝鑰屾槸鎶婁竴鏉?episode 鐨勫姩浣溿€佽娴嬨€佸瓙浠诲姟鐘舵€併€佸け璐ヤ簨浠跺拰缁熻缁撴灉閮芥媶寮€淇濆瓨銆?/p>

2. runner.py：考试组织者，不直接控制机械臂¶

2.1 输入是什么¶

runner.py 鎺ユ敹鐨勪笉鏄紶鎰熷櫒瑙傛祴锛岃€屾槸璇勬祴鍙傛暟锛?/p>

鍙傛暟 浣滅敤 澶嶇幇鏃剁殑鍒ゆ柇
--task 鎸囧畾涓€涓垨澶氫釜浠诲姟鍚?/td> 鏈€閫傚悎鍗曚换鍔¤皟璇?/td>
--tag 鎸夎兘鍔涙爣绛剧瓫浠诲姟 閫傚悎瑙嗚銆佸叧绯汇€佺▼搴忚兘鍔涘瓙闆嗚瘎娴?/td>
--num-envs 骞惰鐜鏁?/td> 4090 涓婇€氬父鍏堜粠 1 寮€濮?/td>
--num-runs 姣忎釜 task 椤哄簭璺戝嚑鎵?/td> 姣忔壒鍖呭惈 num_envs 涓?episode
--instruction-type 榛樿銆佹ā绯娿€佸叿浣撶瓑鎸囦护鍙樹綋 鐢ㄦ潵娴嬭瑷€椴佹鎬?/td>
--video-mode 淇濆瓨 sensor銆乿iewport銆乤ll 鎴?none 璋冭瘯闃舵寤鸿 all锛屾壒閲忚瘎娴嬪彲鍏宠棰?/td>
--output-folder-name 鎸囧悜宸叉湁杈撳嚭鐩綍 鐢ㄤ簬缁窇鎴栧鏌ユ棫缁撴灉
--num-episodes-adaptive 鑷€傚簲閲囨牱涓婇檺 鐢ㄦ垚鍔熺巼缃俊鍖洪棿鎺у埗鏍锋湰閲?/td>

2.2 它为什么要延迟导入 Isaac 相关模块¶

婧愮爜閲屾湁涓€涓緢瀹為檯鐨勮璁★細鍏叡鍙傛暟瑙ｆ瀽蹇呴』鍦?Isaac AppLauncher 鍚姩鍓嶅畬鎴愶紝浣嗗緢澶?Isaac Lab銆乪nvironment銆乪pisode 鐩稿叧妯″潡鍙兘鍦ㄤ豢鐪?app 鍒濆鍖栧悗瀹夊叏瀵煎叆銆傛墍浠?add_common_eval_args() 寰堣交锛?code>run_evaluation() 閲岄潰鎵嶅鍏ラ噸妯″潡銆?/p>

[缁胯壊 鏍稿績缁撹]锛氳繖瑙ｉ噴浜嗕负浠€涔?runner.py 鐪嬭捣鏉ュ儚鏅€?Python 鑴氭湰锛屼絾涓嶈兘鍍忔櫘閫氬簱涓€鏍烽殢渚垮鍏ュ叏閮ㄤ緷璧栥€侷saac Sim 鐨勭敓鍛藉懆鏈熶細褰卞搷 import 椤哄簭銆?/p>

2.3 它的主要处理流程¶

绠€鍖栨垚浼唬鐮侊細

output_dir = make_output_dir(timestamp, policy, instruction_type)
task_envs = get_envs(task=args.task or tag=args.tag or all)
episode_results = init_or_load_episode_results(output_dir)

for task_env in task_envs:
    if task_already_complete(task_env):
        continue
    env, env_cfg = create_env(task_env, policy=policy, num_envs=args.num_envs)
    client = client_factory(args)
    for run_idx in runs_or_adaptive_loop:
        if run_already_complete(task_env, run_idx):
            continue
        env_results, events, timing = run_episode(env, env_cfg, run_idx, client)
        episode_results = summarize_run(...)
        env.reset_eval_state()
    env.close()
summarize_experiment_results(episode_results)

2.4 输出是什么¶

runner.py 鏈韩涓嶄骇鍑哄姩浣滐紝瀹冧骇鍑轰竴涓疄楠岀洰褰曠粨鏋勶細

output/<timestamp>_<policy>[_instruction_type]/
  episode_results.jsonl
  <TaskName>/
    run_0.hdf5
    log_0_env0.json
    <instruction>_0.mp4
    <instruction>_0_viewport.mp4
    env_cfg.json

2.5 常见问题怎么定位¶

鐜拌薄 浼樺厛鏌?/th>
浠诲姟娌℃湁璺?/td> --task 鍚嶇О銆?code>--tag 杩囨护銆佷换鍔℃敞鍐屾槸鍚﹀瓨鍦?/td>
鐩存帴鏄剧ず skipped episode_results.jsonl 閲屽彲鑳藉凡鏈夊悓 task/episode 璁板綍
杈撳嚭鐩綍涓嶆槸棰勬湡鐩綍 --output-folder-name銆乸olicy 鍚嶃€乮nstruction type
4090 OOM 鍏堟妸 --num-envs 闄嶅埌 1锛屼笉瑕佸厛鐩茬洰鏀规ā鍨?/td>
鎵归噺璇勬祴澶參 鍏宠棰戙€佺缉灏?task 瀛愰泦銆佸彧璺戠洰鏍囪兘鍔涜酱

3. episode.py：真正的 step 闭环在这里¶

episode.py::run_episode() 鏄渶鏍稿績鐨勫姩鎬佹墽琛屽嚱鏁般€傚畠鎶?policy銆乪nv銆乺ecorder銆乿ideo writer 涓茶捣鏉ャ€?/p>

3.1 输入是什么¶

杈撳叆 鍚箟
env RoboLab/Isaac Lab 鐜锛岄噷闈㈡湁鏈哄櫒浜恒€佺墿浣撱€佺浉鏈恒€乤ction space
env_cfg 浠诲姟閰嶇疆锛屽寘鍚?instruction銆乻im dt銆乺ender interval銆乨ecimation 绛?/td>
episode run index锛岀敤鏉ュ懡鍚?run_<idx>.hdf5
client 涓€涓?InferenceClient 瀛愮被锛屾瘮濡?Pi05 client
headless 鏄惁鏄剧ず绐楀彛
save_videos 鍜?video_mode 鏄惁淇濆瓨 sensor/viewport 瑙嗛

3.2 单步循环到底做了什么¶

reset env
璁剧疆 run_<idx>.hdf5
璁剧疆姣忎釜 env 鐨?demo_<env_id>
璁剧疆瑙嗛 writer

for step in max_steps:
    绛?Isaac timeline 鎾斁
    缁?active env 璇锋眰鍔ㄤ綔
    鎷兼垚 actions tensor
    env.step(actions)
    璇诲彇 subtask info
    鍐欒棰戝抚
    濡傛灉鎵€鏈?env 閮界粨鏉燂紝break

閲婃斁瑙嗛 writer
client.reset()
return env_results, subtask_status, timing

3.3 为什么 action 要先建全零 tensor¶

澶?env 骞惰鏃讹紝涓嶆槸姣忎釜 env 閮借繕娲荤潃銆傚凡缁忕粨鏉熺殑 env 浼?frozen銆?code>episode.py 鍏堝缓涓€涓舰鐘朵负 (num_envs, action_dim) 鐨勯浂 action tensor锛屽彧缁?env.active_env_ids 濉ā鍨嬪姩浣溿€?/p>

杩欐湁涓や釜濂藉锛?/p>

  • 宸茬粨鏉熺殑 env 涓嶅啀缁х画姹℃煋杞ㄨ抗銆?/li>
  • env.step(actions) 浠嶇劧鑳芥嬁鍒板浐瀹氬舰鐘剁殑 batched action銆?/li>

[姗欒壊 鏄撻敊鐐筣锛氬鏋滀綘鐪嬪埌涓€涓?env 鎴愬姛鍚庤棰戝仠姝㈡洿鏂帮紝杩欐槸姝ｅ父鐨?frozen 琛屼负銆備笉瑕佹妸鈥滄煇涓?env 涓嶅啀鍐欒棰戝抚鈥濊鍒ゆ垚 video writer 宕╀簡銆?/p>

3.4 action_dim 为什么从 action manager 取¶

Isaac Lab 鐜閲?action space 鍙兘缁忚繃 action manager 绠＄悊锛屾渶缁堟帶鍒剁淮搴︿笉涓€瀹氬彧鐪?Gym action space銆備唬鐮佷紭鍏堣 env.action_manager.total_action_dim锛屾病鏈夋墠 fallback 鍒?env.action_space.shape[-1]銆?/p>

杩欏鎺ユ柊绛栫暐寰堥噸瑕侊細

  • 濡傛灉绛栫暐杈撳嚭缁村害灏戜簡锛?code>actions[env_id] = ... 浼氭姤 shape 閿欍€?/li>
  • 濡傛灉绛栫暐杈撳嚭缁村害澶氫簡锛屽彲鑳借鎴柇鍓嶅氨澶辫触銆?/li>
  • 濡傛灉 gripper 缁村害绾﹀畾涓嶄竴鑷达紝鏈烘鑷備細鍑虹幇鈥滆建杩瑰浣嗗す鐖弽鈥濈殑鐜拌薄銆?/li>

3.5 client.reset() 为什么必须在 finally 里¶

Pi05 杩欑被绛栫暐閫氬父杩斿洖 action chunk锛屼緥濡備竴娆¤繑鍥?15 姝ャ€?code>InferenceClient 浼氱紦瀛?chunk 骞堕€愭娑堣垂銆傚鏋?episode 缁撴潫鍚庝笉 reset锛屼笅涓€涓?episode 鍙兘浠庢棫 chunk 涓户缁嬁鍔ㄤ綔銆?/p>

[缁胯壊 鏍稿績缁撹]锛歟pisode 杈圭晫涓嶄粎鏄豢鐪熺幆澧?reset锛屼篃鏄?policy client 鐨勭姸鎬佽竟鐣屻€?/p>

4. InferenceClient：所有策略接入的最小合同¶

InferenceClient 鏄?RoboLab policy adapter 鐨勫叧閿娊璞°€傚畠涓嶆槸妯″瀷鏈綋锛岃€屾槸鈥滀豢鐪熻娴嬪拰绛栫暐鏈嶅姟涔嬮棿鐨勫悎鍚屸€濄€?/p>

4.1 必须实现的四个 hook¶

hook 杈撳叆 杈撳嚭 璐熻矗浠€涔?/th>
_extract_observation(raw_obs, env_id) RoboLab 鍘熷 batched obs 鍗?env flat dict 浠庝豢鐪熻娴嬮噷鎷垮浘鍍忋€佸叧鑺傘€佸す鐖瓑
_pack_request(extracted_obs, instruction) flat obs 鍜岃瑷€鎸囦护 server request 杞垚妯″瀷鏈嶅姟瑕佹眰鐨?wire format
_query_server(request) request raw response 璐熻矗 websocket銆丠TTP 鎴栨湰鍦版帹鐞嗚皟鐢?/td>
_unpack_response(response) raw response action chunk 浠庢ā鍨嬪搷搴旈噷鎷垮姩浣滄暟缁?/td>

4.2 可选 hook¶

hook 浣滅敤
_postprocess_chunk(chunk) gripper 浜屽€煎寲銆佺淮搴?padding銆佸潗鏍囩鍙蜂慨姝?/td>
_build_visualization(extracted_obs) 鎷兼帴璋冭瘯鍥惧儚锛岀粰瑙嗛鎴栫獥鍙ｆ樉绀?/td>
reset() 娓?chunk cache锛屼篃鍙墿灞曚负閫氱煡 server 娓?session
close() 鍏抽棴 websocket 鎴栭噴鏀捐祫婧?/td>

4.3 action chunk 机制¶

榛樿 infer() 鐨勯€昏緫鏄細

extracted = _extract_observation(obs, env_id)
if chunk_cache_empty_or_used_up(env_id):
    request = _pack_request(extracted, instruction)
    response = _query_server(request)
    chunk = _postprocess_chunk(_unpack_response(response))
    cache[env_id] = chunk
action = next_action(cache[env_id])
return {"action": action, "viz": visualization}

杩欒鏄庝袱浠朵簨锛?/p>

  • 浠跨湡姣忎竴姝ラ兘浼氳皟鐢?infer()銆?/li>
  • 浣嗕笉鏄瘡涓€姝ラ兘浼氳闂ā鍨?server銆傚彧鏈夊綋鍓?env 鐨?chunk 鐢ㄥ畬锛屾墠浼氶噸鏂?query銆?/li>

4.4 为什么 cache 必须按 env_id 分开¶

澶?env 骞惰鏃讹紝姣忎釜 env 鐨勫浘鍍忋€佺姸鎬併€佷换鍔¤繘搴﹂兘涓嶅悓銆傚嵆浣垮叡鐢ㄥ悓涓€涓?websocket client锛屼篃涓嶈兘鍏辩敤鍚屼竴涓?action chunk銆?code>InferenceClient 鐢?_chunks[env_id] 鍜?_counters[env_id] 闅旂鐘舵€併€?/p>

[姗欒壊 鏄撻敊鐐筣锛氬鏋滆嚜瀹氫箟 client 鎶?chunk cache 鍐欐垚鍗曚釜鍙橀噺锛屽 env 鏃朵細鍑虹幇鈥渆nv0 鐨勫姩浣滆 env1 娑堣垂鈥濈殑闂銆傝棰戠湅璧锋潵浼氬緢璇″紓锛屾棩蹇椾篃浼氶毦浠ヨВ閲娿€?/p>

5. Pi0DroidJointposClient：Pi05 在 RoboLab 里的接口层¶

Pi05 client 鍋氱殑鏄€淩oboLab 瑙傛祴 schema 鍒?OpenPI/Pi05 server schema鈥濈殑杞崲銆?/p>

5.1 输入观测一般包含什么¶

Pi05/DROID joint-position 椋庢牸鐨勮緭鍏ラ€氬父鍖呮嫭锛?/p>

  • over-shoulder camera 鍥惧儚銆?/li>
  • wrist camera 鍥惧儚銆?/li>
  • robot arm joint positions銆?/li>
  • gripper position銆?/li>
  • language instruction prompt銆?/li>

杩欎簺浼氳杞垚 Pi server 鏈熸湜鐨?request key锛屼緥濡傚閮ㄨ瑙掑浘鍍忋€佽厱閮ㄥ浘鍍忋€佸叧鑺備綅缃€佸す鐖綅缃拰 prompt銆?/p>

5.2 输出动作是什么¶

server 杩斿洖鐨勬槸 action chunk锛屽舰鐘跺ぇ鑷存槸锛?/p> 

(open_loop_horizon, action_dim)

鍏朵腑 open_loop_horizon 鐢辩瓥鐣ュ彉浣撳喅瀹氥€侾i0 绯诲垪鍜?Pi05 绯诲垪鐨勯粯璁?horizon 涓嶅畬鍏ㄤ竴鏍凤紝Pi05 甯歌榛樿鍊兼槸 15銆?/p>

5.3 为什么 gripper 要后处理¶

寰堝 VLA policy 杈撳嚭鐨?gripper 鍊兼槸杩炵画鏁帮紝浣嗕豢鐪熸帶鍒跺櫒鍙兘甯屾湜瀹冩帴杩戝紑/鍏充簩鍊煎姩浣溿€侾i05 client 浼氬鏈€鍚庝竴缁?gripper action 鍋氶槇鍊煎寲銆?/p>

杩欒В閲婁簡涓€涓父瑙佺幇璞★細杞ㄨ抗鐪嬩笂鍘诲锛屼絾鎶撳彇澶辫触銆傚彲鑳戒笉鏄瑙夎瘑鍒敊锛岃€屾槸 gripper 鍚庡鐞嗐€佸姩浣滅淮搴︽垨鎺у埗绾﹀畾娌″榻愩€?/p>

5.4 4090 上最常见的 Pi05 接入故障¶

鐜拌薄 鍙兘鍘熷洜 浼樺厛妫€鏌?/th>
RoboLab 涓€鐩寸瓑寰呭姩浣?/td> Pi05 server 娌″惎鍔ㄦ垨绔彛涓嶅 websocket URL銆乻erver 鏃ュ織
鍥惧儚鑳戒繚瀛樹絾妯″瀷鍔ㄤ綔涔?/td> camera key 鎴栧浘鍍?resize 涓嶅尮閰?/td> _extract_observation 鍜?_pack_request
鍔ㄤ綔缁村害鎶ラ敊 action_dim 涓?env 鎺у埗鍣ㄤ笉涓€鑷?/td> env action manager銆乧lient 杈撳嚭 shape
姣忛殧鑻ュ共姝ュ崱涓€涓?/td> action chunk 鐢ㄥ畬鍚庨噸鏂拌姹?server 杩欐槸姝ｅ父鎺ㄧ悊鑺傚锛岄櫎闈炲欢杩熻繃澶?/td>
涓嬩竴鏉?episode 涓€寮€濮嬪姩浣滃紓甯?/td> client cache 娌?reset 鎴?server session 鏈竻 client.reset() / server reset

6. WorldState：谓词和事件的统一读模型¶

RoboLab 涓嶆槸鐢ㄥ儚绱犵洿鎺ュ垽鏂垚鍔燂紝鑰屾槸閫氳繃浠跨湡涓栫晫鐘舵€佸垽鏂璞″叧绯汇€?code>WorldState 鎻愪緵缁熶竴鏌ヨ锛?/p>

  • body 鍜?articulation 鏌ヨ銆?/li>
  • 鐗╀綋 pose銆乿elocity銆乫rame pose銆?/li>
  • AABB銆丱BB銆乧entroid銆乨imensions銆?/li>
  • robot joint positions銆?/li>
  • contact銆乻upport銆乬ripper/object 鎺ヨЕ銆?/li>
  • batched env 鏌ヨ銆?/li>

6.1 env_id=None 和 env_id=int 的区别¶

WorldState 寰堝 getter 鏀寔涓ょ妯″紡锛?/p>

妯″紡 杈撳嚭 鐢ㄩ€?/th>
env_id=None 杩斿洖鎵€鏈?env 鐨?batched tensor EventTracker 鎵归噺鍒ゆ柇
env_id=0 杩斿洖鍗曚釜 env 鐨勭粨鏋?/td> 鍗曚换鍔¤皟璇曘€佸彲瑙嗗寲銆佸吋瀹规棫浠ｇ爜

杩欏氨鏄?RoboLab 鑳芥妸澶氫釜 parallel env 涓€璧疯瘎浼扮殑鍩虹銆?/p>

6.2 local geometry cache 为什么重要¶

鐗╀綋鐨勬湰鍦板嚑浣曞昂瀵稿拰灞€閮?bounding box 閫氬父涓嶉殢 env 鍜?timestep 鏀瑰彉銆?code>WorldState 浼氱紦瀛?local geometry锛岄伩鍏嶆瘡姝ラ兘浠?USD prim 閲嶆柊绠椼€?/p>

[缁胯壊 鏍稿績缁撹]锛歊oboLab 鐨?success 鍒ゆ柇渚濊禆鍑犱綍鍜屾帴瑙︼紝涓嶅彧鏄瑷€鍜屽浘鍍忋€傚嚑浣曠紦瀛樻槸璁╄皳璇嶆鏌ュ彲鎵╁睍鐨勫伐绋嬬粏鑺傘€?/p>

6.3 predicate state reset 为什么重要¶

鏌愪簺璋撹瘝涓嶆槸鍗曞抚鍒ゆ柇锛岃€屾槸甯﹀巻鍙茬姸鎬併€備緥濡傗€滃璞℃浘缁忚鎶撹捣鍚庡張鎺夎惤鈥濄€?code>WorldState 涓鸿繖浜?stateful predicate 鎻愪緵瀛樺偍锛屽苟鍦?env reset 鏃舵竻鐞嗗搴?env 鐨勭姸鎬併€?/p>

濡傛灉 reset 涓嶅共鍑€锛屼細鍑虹幇锛?/p>

  • 鏂?episode 缁ф壙鏃?episode 鐨勨€滃凡缁忔姄杩団€濈姸鎬併€?/li>
  • frozen env 鐨勭姸鎬佽璇竻锛屽鑷寸粨鏉熷悗缁撴灉婕傜Щ銆?/li>
  • 澶?env 涓煇涓?env 鐨勫巻鍙茬姸鎬佹薄鏌撳彟涓€涓?env銆?/li>

7. EventTracker：把连续仿真变成可读失败事件¶

EventTracker 涓嶆槸鎴愬姛璋撹瘝鏈韩锛屽畠鏇村儚鈥滀簨鏁呰褰曞櫒鈥濄€傚畠瑙傚療涓€绯诲垪寮傚父浜嬩欢锛?/p>

浜嬩欢绫诲瀷 璇存槑
wrong object grabbed 鎶撲簡闈炵洰鏍囩墿浣?/td>
wrong object detached 鎶撻敊鐗╀綋鍚庢潵鍙堣劚绂?/td>
gripper hit table 澶圭埅鎾炴
gripper fully closed 澶圭埅闂悎鐘舵€佸彉鍖?/td>
object bumped/moved 闈炵洰鏍囩墿浣撹杞荤鎴栨槑鏄剧Щ鍔?/td>
object out of scene 鐗╀綋绂诲紑 workspace
object tipped over 瑕佹眰鐩寸珛鐨勭墿浣撳€惧€?/td>
target object dropped 鐩爣杩愯緭涓帀钀?/td>
gripper hit object 澶圭埅纰板埌闈炵洰鏍囩墿浣?/td>
multiple objects grabbed 鍚屾椂鎶撲綇澶氫釜鐗╀綋

7.1 为什么它要区分 active 和 frozen env¶

宸茬粡缁堟鐨?env 涓嶅簲璇ョ户缁骇鐢熷け璐ヤ簨浠躲€傚惁鍒欎竴涓?episode 鎴愬姛鍚庯紝鐗╀綋鍥犱负鐗╃悊娈嬩綑鏅冨姩浜х敓浜嬩欢锛屽彲鑳芥薄鏌撴渶缁?reason銆?/p>

鎵€浠?EventTracker 浣跨敤 active/frozen mask锛屽彧瀵规椿璺?env 缁х画璁板綍浜嬩欢銆?/p>

7.2 事件不是逐帧大日志，而是稀疏变化¶

鏂扮増 event log 鏇村儚锛?/p> 

{
  "schema_version": 2,
  "task": "SomeTask",
  "env_id": 0,
  "run": 0,
  "success": false,
  "final_step": 142,
  "events": [
    {"code": 201, "info": "Wrong object grabbed: 'mug_0'", "step": 37}
  ]
}

杩欐瘮姣忎竴姝ラ兘鍐欏畬鏁寸姸鎬佹洿杞伙紝涔熸洿閫傚悎鍋氬け璐ョ粺璁°€?/p>

8. RecorderManager 和 HDF5：真正的轨迹证据¶

瑙嗛閫傚悎浜虹湅锛屼絾鏈哄櫒鍒嗘瀽闇€瑕佺粨鏋勫寲鏁版嵁銆俁oboLab 鐢?HDF5 淇濆瓨姣忎釜 run 鐨勮建杩广€?/p>

鍏稿瀷缁撴瀯鍙互鐞嗚В涓猴細

run_0.hdf5
  data/
    demo_0/
      obs/
      actions/
      states/
      subtask/
        score
    demo_1/
      ...

8.1 为什么一个 run 一个 HDF5¶

run_idx 鏄『搴忔壒娆★紝env_id 鏄苟琛岀幆澧冪紪鍙枫€傛墍浠ワ細

  • run_0.hdf5 鍖呭惈杩欎竴鎵规墍鏈夊苟琛?env銆?/li>
  • demo_0 瀵瑰簲 env0銆?/li>
  • demo_1 瀵瑰簲 env1銆?/li>

鏈€缁?episode id 閫氬父鎸夎繖涓叕寮忕敓鎴愶細

episode_id = run_idx * num_envs + env_id

8.2 HDF5 和 JSONL 谁更权威¶

涓よ€呯敤閫斾笉鍚岋細

  • HDF5 鏄建杩瑰拰 subtask score 鐨勫簳灞傝瘉鎹€?/li>
  • episode_results.jsonl 鏄瘡涓?episode 鐨勬眹鎬荤储寮曘€?/li>
  • log_<run>_env<id>.json 鏄け璐ュ拰浜嬩欢瑙ｉ噴銆?/li>
  • mp4 鏄汉宸ユ鏌ョ敾闈€?/li>

[缁胯壊 鏍稿績缁撹]锛氳澶嶆煡涓€鏉＄粨鏋滐紝搴旇鍏堢敤 episode_results.jsonl 瀹氫綅 episode锛屽啀鎵撳紑瀵瑰簲 HDF5銆乪vent log 鍜岃棰戯紝鑰屼笉鏄彧鐪嬭棰戞枃浠跺悕銆?/p>

9. summarize.py：把原始输出折叠成 episode 记录¶

summarize_run() 娑堣垂鐨勬槸 run_episode() 鐨勮繑鍥烇細

env_results, subtask_status, timing

鐒跺悗瀹冨仛杩欎簺浜嬶細

  1. 浠?recorder 鍙栨瘡涓?env 鐨勪簨浠跺垪琛ㄣ€?/li>
  2. 鍐?log_<run_idx>_env<eid>.json銆?/li>
  3. 璇诲彇 run_<run_idx>.hdf5 涓?demo_<env_id> 鐨勮建杩广€?/li>
  4. 璁＄畻杞ㄨ抗 metrics銆?/li>
  5. 浠?HDF5 鐨?subtask/score 璇诲彇鏈€缁?score銆?/li>
  6. 缁勮 run_summary銆?/li>
  7. append 鍒?episode_results.jsonl銆?/li>

9.1 score 为什么优先从 HDF5 读¶

婧愮爜閲屾妸 HDF5 鐨?final-step subtask score 褰撲綔 canonical score銆備簨浠舵棩蹇楅噷涔熷彲鑳藉甫 score锛屼絾 summary 浼樺厛鐢?HDF5 璇诲埌鐨?final score銆?/p>

杩欒兘閬垮厤涓€涓棶棰橈細event log 鏄█鐤忎簨浠舵祦锛屾渶鍚庝竴涓?event 涓嶄竴瀹氱瓑浜庢渶缁堢姸鎬併€?/p>

9.2 reason 怎么来¶

澶辫触鏃讹紝reason 浼氫紭鍏堟潵鑷渶缁?subtask info 鎴栦簨浠舵祦涓殑鏈€鍚庡叧閿簨浠躲€傛垚鍔熸椂锛宻ummary 浼氬敖閲忓洖婧埌鎴愬姛鐩稿叧浜嬩欢锛岃€屼笉鏄鎴愬姛鍚庣煭鏆傜墿鐞嗘紓绉绘薄鏌撱€?/p>

[姗欒壊 鏄撻敊鐐筣锛氬鏋滅湅鍒?success=false 浣嗚棰戞渶鍚庡儚鎴愬姛浜嗭紝瑕佹煡 final score銆佺粓姝㈣皳璇嶅拰鏈€鍚?reason銆傚彲鑳芥槸鏀剧疆浣嶇疆娌¤繃闃堝€笺€佺洰鏍囨帴瑙﹀叧绯绘病绋冲畾銆佹垨浠诲姟瑕佹眰鐨勫悗缁瓙浠诲姟娌″畬鎴愩€?/p>

10. results.py：统计、续跑和失败聚合¶

results.py 鏄瘎娴嬬粨鏋滅殑宸ュ叿绠便€傚畠涓嶆槸 step loop锛屼絾瀵瑰鐜板疄楠屽緢鍏抽敭銆?/p>

10.1 它做什么¶

鑳藉姏 鐢ㄩ€?/th>
load episode results 璇诲彇 JSONL 鎴栨棫 JSON
check run complete 缁窇鏃跺垽鏂槸鍚﹁烦杩?/td>
update experiment results 杩藉姞涓€鏉?episode summary
beta confidence interval 鑷€傚簲閲囨牱鍜岀粺璁＄疆淇″尯闂?/td>
summarize error reasons 鑱氬悎澶辫触鍘熷洜
wrong object stats 缁熻甯告姄閿欑殑鐗╀綋
filter results 鎸?task銆乼ag銆乸olicy銆乤ttribute 鍒嗘瀽

10.2 Beta credible interval 的意义¶

璇勬祴鎴愬姛鐜囦笉鏄彧鏈変竴涓偣浼拌銆傛瘮濡?2/3 鎴愬姛鍜?20/30 鎴愬姛閮芥槸 66.7%锛屼絾鍙俊搴﹀畬鍏ㄤ笉鍚屻€俁oboLab 閲岀敤 Beta 鍒嗗竷浼拌浜岄」鎴愬姛鐜囧尯闂达紝缁欒嚜閫傚簲閲囨牱鍜?dashboard 鏇寸ǔ鐨勭粺璁′緷鎹€?/p>

璇翠汉璇濓細鏍锋湰灏戞椂锛屾垚鍔熺巼鏁板瓧涓嶈澶綋鐪燂紱鏍锋湰鍙樺锛屽尯闂村彉绐勶紝缁撹鎵嶆洿绋冲畾銆?/p>

11. dashboard loader：它是结果视图，不是结果来源¶

Dashboard 璇诲彇鏈湴杈撳嚭鐩綍锛屾壘鍒帮細

  • episode_results.jsonl
  • 姣忎釜 task 鐨?HDF5銆?/li>
  • per-env event log銆?/li>
  • sensor/viewport 瑙嗛銆?/li>
  • 缁熻缂撳瓨鍜岀疆淇″尯闂淬€?/li>

瀹冭礋璐ｅ睍绀猴紝涓嶈礋璐ｉ噸鏂板垽瀹氭垚鍔熴€?/p>

[姗欒壊 鏄撻敊鐐筣锛歞ashboard 閲岀湅涓嶅埌瑙嗛锛屼笉涓€瀹氭槸瀹為獙娌¤窇銆傚彲鑳芥槸 video-mode=none銆佹枃浠跺悕鍖归厤澶辫触銆佽矾寰勬病鍚屾銆佹垨鍙繚瀛樹簡 sensor 娌′繚瀛?viewport銆傚厛鏌ヨ緭鍑虹洰褰曪紝鍐嶆煡 dashboard loader銆?/p>

12. 从“一条复现”看完整数据流¶

mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant R as runner.py
    participant E as episode.py
    participant C as Pi05 client
    participant S as Pi05 server
    participant Env as RoboLab env
    participant W as WorldState/EventTracker
    participant H as HDF5/log/video
    participant Sum as summarize.py/results.py

    R->>Env: create_env(task, num_envs, policy)
    R->>C: client_factory(args)
    R->>E: run_episode(env, cfg, run_idx, client)
    E->>Env: reset()
    E->>H: set run_idx HDF5 and video writers
    loop each sim step
        E->>C: infer(obs, instruction, env_id)
        C->>S: query only when chunk refresh is needed
        S-->>C: action chunk
        C-->>E: next action
        E->>Env: env.step(actions)
        Env->>W: update/query world predicates and events
        Env->>H: record obs/action/state/subtask score
        E->>H: write video frame
    end
    E-->>R: env_results, events, timing
    R->>Sum: summarize_run(...)
    Sum->>H: read HDF5, write event logs
    Sum->>Sum: build run_summary
    Sum->>H: append episode_results.jsonl

13. 新接一个 policy 应该改哪里¶

濡傛灉浠ュ悗瑕佹妸 RoboChallenge 鐨?Pi銆丷eKep銆丱penVLA 鎴栬嚜鐮旂瓥鐣ユ帴杩?RoboLab锛屼笉瑕佷竴涓婃潵鏀?episode.py銆備紭鍏堟寜杩欎釜椤哄簭锛?/p>

  1. 鏂板缓鎴栧鐢ㄤ竴涓?InferenceClient 瀛愮被銆?/li>
  2. 瀹炵幇 _extract_observation()锛岀‘璁ょ浉鏈恒€佸叧鑺傘€佸す鐖粠 RoboLab obs 涓彇瀵广€?/li>
  3. 瀹炵幇 _pack_request()锛岀‘璁ゆ湇鍔＄闇€瑕佺殑 key銆佸浘鍍忓ぇ灏忋€乨type銆佽寖鍥淬€?/li>
  4. 瀹炵幇 _query_server()锛岀‘璁?websocket/HTTP/鏈湴鍑芥暟璋冪敤銆?/li>
  5. 瀹炵幇 _unpack_response()锛岀‘璁よ緭鍑?shape 鏄?(horizon, action_dim)銆?/li>
  6. 鍦?_postprocess_chunk() 閲屽鐞?gripper銆佸崟浣嶃€佸潗鏍囩郴鍜?padding銆?/li>
  7. 鍐欎竴涓?policies/<policy>/run.py锛屽彧璐熻矗瑙ｆ瀽绛栫暐鐗规湁鍙傛暟鍜屼紶 client_factory銆?/li>
  8. 鍏?num_envs=1 璺戝崟涓畝鍗曚换鍔★紝鍐嶈窇澶嶆潅浠诲姟鍜屽 env銆?/li>

[缁胯壊 鏍稿績缁撹]锛歊oboLab 甯屾湜浣犳妸绛栫暐宸紓灏佽鍦?client 閲岋紝鑰屼笉鏄妸姣忎釜绛栫暐鐨勭壒娈婇€昏緫濉炶繘閫氱敤 episode loop銆?/p>

14. 新接一个 robot 或 action space 应该查哪里¶

濡傛灉鎹㈡満鍣ㄤ汉鎴栨帶鍒跺櫒锛岄闄╀富瑕佸湪 action schema锛?/p>

妫€鏌ョ偣 涓轰粈涔堥噸瑕?/th>
action manager 鐨?total_action_dim 鍐冲畾 actions tensor 瀹藉害
env action term 鍐冲畾 action 姣忎竴缁存€庝箞瑙ｉ噴
gripper convention 寮€/鍏虫柟鍚戙€佽繛缁?绂绘暎銆侀槇鍊?/td>
joint order 妯″瀷杈撳嚭椤哄簭蹇呴』鍜屾満鍣ㄤ汉鎺у埗椤哄簭涓€鑷?/td>
camera preset 妯″瀷璁粌鏃剁殑瑙嗚鍜岃瘎娴嬭瑙掕灏介噺瀵归綈
observation normalization 鍥惧儚鑼冨洿銆佸叧鑺傚崟浣嶃€佸す鐖崟浣?/td>

濡傛灉鍙崲 robot锛屼笉澶勭悊杩欎簺绾﹀畾锛屽緢瀹规槗鍑虹幇鈥滄ā鍨嬭兘鐪嬪埌鐩爣锛屼絾鍔ㄤ綔瀹屽叏涓嶅悎鐞嗏€濄€?/p>

15. 复现时的故障路由表¶

鐜拌薄 鏈€鍙兘灞?/th> 鍏堢湅鏂囦欢
娌℃湁鐢熸垚杈撳嚭鐩綍 璋冨害灞?/td> runner.py銆佸惎鍔ㄥ懡浠?/td>
浠诲姟鐩存帴璺宠繃 璋冨害灞?缁撴灉灞?/td> episode_results.jsonl銆?code>check_run_complete
Isaac 鑳藉惎鍔ㄤ絾娌℃湁鍔ㄤ綔 client 灞?/td> Pi05 server 鏃ュ織銆?code>base_client.py銆丳i05 client
鏈夊姩浣滀絾鎶撲笉鍒?/td> action schema action_dim銆乬ripper 鍚庡鐞嗐€乯oint order
瑙嗛鏄剧ず鎴愬姛浣嗙粨鏋滃け璐?/td> 璋撹瘝/summary 灞?/td> event log銆丠DF5 score銆乼ermination predicate
缁撴灉閲屾病鏈?score recorder/summary 灞?/td> run_<idx>.hdf5銆?code>subtask/score
dashboard 涓嶆樉绀鸿棰?/td> 灞曠ず灞?/td> 鏂囦欢璺緞銆乿ideo mode銆乨ashboard loader
澶?env 缁撴灉涓叉壈 episode/client 灞?/td> env_id cache銆乤ctive env銆乨emo index
4090 OOM runtime 閰嶇疆 --num-envs銆佽棰戙€佸苟琛屼换鍔℃暟閲?/td>

16. 这节和论文能力评估的关系¶

璁烘枃璁茶瑙夈€佺▼搴忋€佸叧绯昏兘鍔涳紝琛ㄩ潰鐪嬫槸 benchmark 璁捐锛涙簮鐮佽惤鍦版椂瀵瑰簲杩欎簺 runtime 鐐癸細

  • 瑙嗚鑳藉姏澶辫触锛屽父钀藉湪瑙傛祴鍥惧儚銆乧amera key銆佺墿浣撹涔夈€侀鑹?澶у皬璇嗗埆鍜?wrong object event銆?/li>
  • 绋嬪簭鑳藉姏澶辫触锛屽父钀藉湪澶氬瓙浠诲姟椤哄簭銆佹姄鍙栭噴鏀俱€侀噸瀹氬悜銆佸爢鍙犵ǔ瀹氭€у拰 subtask score銆?/li>
  • 鍏崇郴鑳藉姏澶辫触锛屽父钀藉湪 WorldState 鐨勭┖闂磋皳璇嶃€佸璞￠泦鍚堛€佽鏁般€佽繛鎺ヨ瘝瑙ｆ瀽鍜?termination condition銆?/li>

鎵€浠ョ湅缁撴灉鏃朵笉瑕佸彧璇粹€滄ā鍨嬩笉琛屸€濄€傝闂畠澶辫触鍦ㄥ摢涓眰锛?/p> 

鎰熺煡閿欎簡锛?
璇█鐩爣缁戝畾閿欎簡锛?
鍔ㄤ綔 chunk 鎵ц閿欎簡锛?
鐗╃悊鎺ヨЕ娌＄ǔ瀹氾紵
缁堟璋撹瘝娌℃弧瓒筹紵
璁板綍鍜屾眹鎬昏閿欎簡锛?

杩欐墠鏄?RoboLab 浣滀负璇勬祴妗嗘灦鐨勪环鍊笺€?/p>

17. 最小可复现检查清单¶

涓€鏉″畬鏁村鐜拌嚦灏戣鑳藉洖绛旓細

  • 鐢ㄧ殑鏄摢涓?policy銆佸摢涓?task銆佸摢涓?instruction type锛?/li>
  • num_envs銆?code>num_runs銆?code>video-mode 鏄粈涔堬紵
  • Pi05/OpenPI server 鏄惁鏈夊搴旀棩蹇楋紵
  • 杈撳嚭鐩綍鍦ㄥ摢閲岋紵
  • 鏄惁鏈?run_0.hdf5锛?/li>
  • 鏄惁鏈?log_0_env0.json锛?/li>
  • episode_results.jsonl 閲?success銆乻core銆乺eason 鏄粈涔堬紵
  • 瑙嗛鍜?HDF5 鐨?episode 鏄惁鑳界敤 run_idx/env_id 瀵归綈锛?/li>
  • 濡傛灉澶辫触锛屽け璐ュ師鍥犳槸鍚︽潵鑷簨浠舵棩蹇楁垨 final subtask info锛?/li>
  • 濡傛灉鍋氬姣旓紝鏄惁浣跨敤鍚屼竴 task銆佸悓涓€鍒濆鎵板姩銆佸悓涓€瑙嗛/score 閲囬泦瑙勫垯锛?/li>

18. 本节来源记录¶

  • RoboLab paper: https://arxiv.org/html/2604.09860
  • RoboLab project page: https://research.nvidia.com/labs/srl/projects/robolab/
  • RoboLab GitHub: https://github.com/NVlabs/RoboLab
