下一步建议¶

濡傛灉缁х画鍋氳鏂囩骇瀵规瘮锛屼笅涓€姝ヤ笉瑕佺洿鎺ヨ窇瀹屾暣 120 涓换鍔°€傚缓璁厛鎸夎兘鍔涜酱鍚勬娊 5-10 涓换鍔★紝寤虹珛 pi05銆丷oboChallenge 鐨?pi銆丷eKep 涓夊鏂规硶鐨勫悓涓€浠诲姟瀛愰泦瀵规瘮琛ㄣ€傜瓑纭姣忕被浠诲姟璧勪骇閮藉畬鏁淬€佷笉浼氬崱鍦ㄥ垵濮嬪寲閿欒鍚庯紝鍐嶆墿澶у埌 RoboLab-120銆?/p>

1. 阶段一：4090 机器前置检查¶

鐩爣涓嶆槸涓€娆℃€ц瘉鏄庤兘璺戝畬鏁?benchmark锛岃€屾槸鍏堢‘璁ょ郴缁熺鍚?RoboLab 褰撳墠 README 鐨勫熀纭€鏉′欢銆?/p>

璁板綍鐐癸細

  • Ubuntu 鐗堟湰銆佸唴鏍搞€丳ython銆丆UDA driver銆?/li>
  • RTX 4090 鏄惁琚?nvidia-smi 璇嗗埆锛岀┖闂叉樉瀛樻槸澶氬皯銆?/li>
  • 纾佺洏绌洪棿銆傚畼鏂硅祫浜х害 7GB锛屼絾瑙嗛銆丠DF5銆佺紦瀛樺拰妯″瀷鏉冮噸浼氬揩閫熷闀匡紱寤鸿浠嶉鐣?100GB+锛屽畬鏁村疄楠屾渶濂?300GB 绾у埆銆?/li>
  • uv銆?code>ffmpeg銆?code>git-lfs銆?code>gcc-11 / g++-11 鏄惁鍙敤銆?/li>
In [ ]:
# ===== 1. 瀹氫箟鍓嶇疆妫€鏌ュ懡浠?=====
# 姣忎釜 tuple 鐨勭 1 椤规槸鏃ュ織鏍囩锛岀 2 椤规槸鐪熸鎵ц鐨?shell 鍛戒护銆?/span>
preflight_commands = [
    ("os_release", "cat /etc/os-release"),  # 鏌ョ湅 Ubuntu 鐗堟湰锛孯oboLab 瑕佹眰 Ubuntu 22.04+銆?/span>
    ("kernel", "uname -a"),  # 璁板綍鍐呮牳鐗堟湰锛屾柟渚挎帓鏌ラ┍鍔?Isaac 鍏煎鎬ч棶棰樸€?/span>
    ("disk", "df -h ."),  # 鏌ョ湅褰撳墠纾佺洏鍓╀綑绌洪棿锛岃祫浜у拰妯″瀷鏉冮噸浼氬崰鐢ㄥぇ閲忕┖闂淬€?/span>
    ("gpu", "nvidia-smi"),  # 鏌ョ湅 GPU銆侀┍鍔ㄣ€佹樉瀛樺崰鐢ㄥ拰宸叉湁杩涚▼銆?/span>
    ("driver_query", "nvidia-smi --query-gpu=name,driver_version,memory.total,memory.free --format=csv"),  # 鎻愬彇鍏抽敭 GPU 瀛楁锛屼究浜庡啓鍏ユ姤鍛娿€?/span>
    ("python", "python3 --version"),  # RoboLab 褰撳墠瑕佹眰 Python 3.11銆?/span>
    ("uv", "uv --version"),  # uv 鏄畼鏂规帹鑽愮殑渚濊禆鍚屾宸ュ叿銆?/span>
    ("ffmpeg", "ffmpeg -version | head -n 2"),  # ffmpeg 鐢ㄤ簬瑙嗛/娓叉煋杈撳嚭鐩稿叧娴佺▼銆?/span>
    ("git_lfs", "git lfs version"),  # RoboLab 澶ч噺璧勪骇璧?Git LFS銆?/span>
    ("gcc", "gcc-11 --version | head -n 1"),  # 璁板綍 gcc-11锛屼究浜庢帓鏌ョ紪璇戝瀷渚濊禆銆?/span>
    ("gpp", "g++-11 --version | head -n 1"),  # 璁板綍 g++-11锛屼究浜庢帓鏌?C++ 鎵╁睍缂栬瘧闂銆?/span>
]

# ===== 2. 閫愭潯鎵ц鎴?dry-run 鍓嶇疆妫€鏌?=====
preflight_results = []
for label, cmd in preflight_commands:
    preflight_results.append(
        run(cmd, execute=EXECUTE_PREFLIGHT, timeout=60, label=f"preflight:{label}")
    )

# ===== 3. 鍐欏嚭 preflight 鐘舵€佹枃浠?=====
# 鍗充娇鍛戒护鏄?dry-run锛屼篃浼氳褰曗€滆鍒掓鏌ュ摢浜涢」鐩€濓紝鏂逛究澶嶇幇娴佺▼瀹¤銆?/span>
write_status(
    "preflight_status",
    {
        "execute_preflight": EXECUTE_PREFLIGHT,
        "is_linux": IS_LINUX,
        "commands": [{"label": label, "cmd": cmd} for label, cmd in preflight_commands],
    },
)

2. 阶段二：安装 RoboLab¶

褰撳墠鎺ㄨ崘璺嚎锛?/p> 

sudo apt install ffmpeg
git clone https://github.com/NVlabs/RoboLab
cd RoboLab
uv venv --python 3.11
source .venv/bin/activate
uv sync
uv run pytest tests/

娉ㄦ剰锛?/p>

  • uv sync 浼氳嚜鍔ㄥ鐞?Isaac Sim 5.0 + Isaac Lab 2.2.0銆?/li>
  • 棣栨杩愯闈炴祴璇曞叆鍙ｆ椂璁剧疆 OMNI_KIT_ACCEPT_EULA=Y锛岄伩鍏?GUI/EULA 鎻愮ず鍗′綇銆?/li>
  • 4090 鍙湁 24GB VRAM锛屼笉瑕佺洿鎺ョ収瀹樻柟绀轰緥浠?--num-envs 10 璧锋锛涘厛 1锛岀‘璁よ緭鍑哄畬鏁村悗鍐嶈瘯 2/4銆?/li>
In [ ]:
# 鎶婂畨瑁呮楠ら泦涓湪涓€涓垪琛ㄩ噷锛屼繚璇?dry-run 灞曠ず鍜岀湡瀹炴墽琛屼娇鐢ㄥ悓涓€濂楀懡浠ゃ€?/span>
install_steps = [
    ("make_work_root", f"mkdir -p {shlex.quote(str(WORK_ROOT))}"),  # 鍒涘缓 RoboLab 宸ヤ綔鍖虹埗鐩綍銆?/span>
    ("clone_robolab", "git clone https://github.com/NVlabs/RoboLab"),  # 鎷夊彇 RoboLab 瀹樻柟浠撳簱銆?/span>
    ("git_lfs_install", "git lfs install"),  # 鍚敤 Git LFS 鏀寔銆?/span>
    ("git_lfs_pull", "git lfs pull"),  # 鎷夊彇 USD 鍦烘櫙銆佸璞°€佹満鍣ㄤ汉绛夊ぇ璧勪骇銆?/span>
    ("uv_venv", "uv venv --python 3.11"),  # 鍒涘缓 Python 3.11 铏氭嫙鐜銆?/span>
    ("uv_sync", "uv sync"),  # 鎸?pyproject/lock 鍚屾渚濊禆锛屽寘鎷?Isaac Sim/Lab銆?/span>
    ("freeze", "uv pip freeze"),  # 瀵煎嚭瀹為檯瀹夎鐗堟湰锛屼綔涓哄鐜拌瘉鎹€?/span>
]

if EXECUTE_INSTALL:
    # 鐪熷疄瀹夎璺緞锛歝lone/鏇存柊浠撳簱 -> 鎷?LFS 璧勪骇 -> 鐢?uv 瀹夎 Isaac/RoboLab 渚濊禆銆?/span>
    WORK_ROOT.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    if not ROBOLAB_DIR.exists():
        run("git clone https://github.com/NVlabs/RoboLab", cwd=WORK_ROOT, execute=True, check=True, timeout=1800)
    else:
        # 宸插瓨鍦ㄧ殑浠撳簱鍙仛 fast-forward 鏇存柊锛岄伩鍏嶆倓鎮勮鐩栨湰鍦颁慨鏀广€?/span>
        run("git rev-parse HEAD", cwd=ROBOLAB_DIR, execute=True, timeout=60, label="repo:current_head")
        run("git pull --ff-only", cwd=ROBOLAB_DIR, execute=True, check=False, timeout=600, label="repo:pull")
    run("git lfs install", cwd=ROBOLAB_DIR, execute=True, timeout=120, label="install:git_lfs_install")
    run("git lfs pull", cwd=ROBOLAB_DIR, execute=True, timeout=1800, label="install:git_lfs_pull")
    run("uv venv --python 3.11", cwd=ROBOLAB_DIR, execute=True, check=True, timeout=600, label="install:uv_venv")
    run("uv sync", cwd=ROBOLAB_DIR, env=OMNI_ENV, execute=True, check=True, timeout=7200, label="install:uv_sync")
    freeze = run("uv pip freeze", cwd=ROBOLAB_DIR, execute=True, timeout=300, label="install:freeze")
    (ARTIFACT_DIR / "uv_freeze.txt").write_text(freeze.get("stdout", ""), encoding="utf-8")
else:
    # dry-run 璺緞鍙褰曞懡浠わ紝涓嶄慨鏀规湰鏈烘枃浠跺拰鐜銆?/span>
    for label, cmd in install_steps:
        target = WORK_ROOT if label in {"make_work_root", "clone_robolab"} else ROBOLAB_DIR
        run(cmd, cwd=target, execute=False, label=f"install:{label}")

write_status(
    "install_plan",
    {
        "execute_install": EXECUTE_INSTALL,
        "robolab_dir": str(ROBOLAB_DIR),
        "notes": [
            "Main path uses uv sync; do not build Isaac Sim from source unless debugging or developing Isaac Sim itself.",
            "Record uv sync duration and uv_freeze.txt after a real run.",
        ],
    },
)

3. 阶段三：安装验证¶

楠岃瘉鐩爣锛?/p>

  • Isaac Lab 鍙互 import銆?/li>
  • 浠诲姟瀹氫箟鏈夋晥銆?/li>
  • env factory 鍙敤銆?/li>
  • 鑷冲皯涓€涓畬鏁?episode 鍙互 headless 璺戝畬銆?/li>

閫氳繃鏍囧噯锛?code>uv run pytest tests/ 杩斿洖 0锛屽苟鎶婂畬鏁?stdout/stderr 鍐欏叆 command_log.jsonl銆?/p>

In [ ]:
# 娴嬭瘯榛樿鍏抽棴锛屽洜涓哄鍏?Isaac/Kit 寰堟參涓斾緷璧?GPU/椹卞姩鐜銆?/span>
run(
    "uv run pytest tests/",
    cwd=ROBOLAB_DIR,
    env=OMNI_ENV,
    execute=EXECUTE_TESTS,
    check=EXECUTE_TESTS,
    timeout=7200,
    label="verify:pytest",
)

4. 阶段四：无策略 smoke run¶

鍦ㄦ帴鍏?VLA / Pi0.5 / 鑷畾涔夌瓥鐣ヤ箣鍓嶏紝鍏堣窇涓嶄緷璧栫瓥鐣ユ湇鍔＄鐨?sanity check銆?/p>

璁板綍鐐癸細

  • 鏄惁鑳?headless 鍚姩銆?/li>
  • 鏄惁鐢熸垚 output/ 鐩綍銆丠DF5銆乻ubtask log銆佽棰戙€?/li>
  • GPU 鏄惧瓨宄板€煎拰姣忕杩唬鏁般€?/li>
In [ ]:
# 杩欎簺绀轰緥鍏堥獙璇佷豢鐪熴€佷换鍔℃敞鍐屻€佹棩蹇楀鍑洪摼璺紝涓嶆秹鍙?VLA 绛栫暐銆?/span>
no_policy_commands = [
    ("empty_episode", "python examples/run_empty.py --headless"),  # 鏈€鍩虹鐨勭幆澧冨垵濮嬪寲鍜岀┖鍔ㄤ綔 episode銆?/span>
    ("recorded_playback", "python examples/run_recorded.py --headless"),  # 妫€鏌ュ綍鍒惰建杩瑰洖鏀惧叆鍙ｃ€?/span>
    ("gripper_toggle", f"python examples/run_gripper_toggle.py --task {SMOKE_TASK} --headless"),  # 妫€鏌ユ寚瀹氫换鍔″拰澶圭埅鍔ㄤ綔鍏ュ彛銆?/span>
]

for label, cmd in no_policy_commands:
    # check=False 琛ㄧず鍗充娇鏌愭潯 smoke 澶辫触锛屼篃淇濈暀鏃ュ織骞剁户缁湅鍏跺畠鎺㈤拡缁撴灉銆?/span>
    run(
        cmd,
        cwd=ROBOLAB_DIR,
        env=OMNI_ENV,
        execute=EXECUTE_NO_POLICY_SMOKE,
        check=False,
        timeout=3600,
        label=f"smoke_no_policy:{label}",
    )

5. 阶段五：接入策略并运行单任务¶

RoboLab 浣跨敤 server-client 鏋舵瀯锛氭ā鍨?绛栫暐浣滀负鐙珛鏈嶅姟杩愯锛孯oboLab 閫氳繃杞婚噺 inference client 璋冪敤瀹冦€?/p>

瀹樻柟 quick run 绀轰緥浣跨敤 --num-envs 10銆傚湪 RTX 4090 涓婂厛鐢?--num-envs 1锛?/p>

  • 鍏堢‘璁ょ瓥鐣ユ湇鍔＄鑳藉惎鍔ㄣ€?/li>
  • 鍐嶇‘璁?RoboLab client 鑳芥嬁鍒板姩浣溿€?/li>
  • 鏈€鍚庡啀閫愭澧炲姞 num_envs銆?/li>

寤鸿绗竴浠诲姟锛?code>BananaInBowlTask銆傚畠鍦ㄥ畼鏂?VRAM guide 涓睘浜庤緝浣庡帇鍔涗换鍔★紝閫傚悎浣滀负 4090 鐨勭涓€鏉￠棴鐜獙璇併€?/p>

In [ ]:
# RoboLab 杩欓噷鏄?client锛汸i0/Pi05 妯″瀷鏈綋闇€瑕佸崟鐙殑 OpenPI server銆?/span>
policy_smoke_cmd = (
    f"uv run python policies/pi0_family/run.py "  # 浣跨敤 RoboLab 鑷甫鐨?Pi0/Pi05 family runner銆?/span>
    f"--policy {POLICY_NAME} "  # 閫夋嫨绛栫暐鍚嶏紝渚嬪 pi05銆?/span>
    f"--task {SMOKE_TASK} "  # 鎸囧畾绗竴鏉?smoke 浠诲姟銆?/span>
    f"--num-envs {NUM_ENVS_4090_SMOKE} "  # 4090 棣栬疆鍙紑 1 涓苟琛岀幆澧冿紝闄嶄綆 OOM 椋庨櫓銆?/span>
    f"--num-runs {NUM_RUNS} "  # 姣忎釜浠诲姟鍏堣窇 1 娆★紝楠岃瘉閾捐矾鑰屼笉鏄仛缁熻銆?/span>
    f"--enable-subtask "  # 寮€鍚?subtask 杩涘害璁板綍锛屼究浜庡垎鏋愬け璐ュ彂鐢熷湪鍝竴姝ャ€?/span>
    f"--headless"  # 鏃?GUI 杩愯锛岄€傚悎杩滅鏈嶅姟鍣ㄣ€?/span>
)

# 鍦?OpenPI 鏉冮噸涓嬭浇瀹屾垚銆?000 绔彛 ready 鍓嶏紝杩欎竴姝ヤ繚鎸佸叧闂€?/span>
run(
    policy_smoke_cmd,
    cwd=ROBOLAB_DIR,
    env=OMNI_ENV,
    execute=EXECUTE_POLICY_SMOKE,
    check=False,
    timeout=7200,
    label="policy_smoke:single_task",
)

6. 阶段六：4090 小子集评测计划¶

涓嶈鎶婂畬鏁?RoboLab-120 褰撴垚绗竴澶╃洰鏍囥€傚缓璁厛鍋?5 涓换鍔★紝瑕嗙洊涓変釜鑳藉姏杞达細

浠诲姟 涓昏瑙傚療鐐?/th> 涓轰粈涔堟斁鍏ョ涓€鎵?/th>
BananaInBowlTask 璇箟璇嗗埆 + pick/place 浣庡帇鍔?smoke task
RubiksCubeAndBananaTask conjunction / 澶氱洰鏍?/td> 妫€鏌ヨ瑷€缁勫悎鏄惁绋冲畾
RubiksCubeLeftOfBowlTask spatial relation 瑙傚療宸﹀彸绌洪棿鍏崇郴鎺ㄧ悊
ReorientWhiteMugsTask procedural / reorientation 妫€鏌ラ噸瀹氬悜鎿嶄綔
Stack3RubiksCubeTask stacking / 澶氭楠?/td> 妫€鏌ラ暱 horizon 涓庡け璐ユā寮?/td>

璇勬祴椤哄簭锛?/p>

  1. num_envs=1锛屾瘡涓换鍔?1 run锛岀‘璁や笉 OOM銆佽緭鍑哄畬鏁淬€?/li>
  2. 浠嶆槸 num_envs=1锛屾瘡涓换鍔?3-5 runs锛岃瀵熸柟宸€?/li>
  3. 鎸夋樉瀛樹綑閲忓皾璇?num_envs=2/4銆?/li>
  4. 鎵╁睍鍒?visual / procedural / relational 鍚?10 涓换鍔°€?/li>
In [ ]:
# RoboLab 鐨?--task 鎺ユ敹澶氫釜浠诲姟鍚嶏紱杩欓噷鎷兼垚鍛戒护琛屽弬鏁般€?/span>
subset_task_args = " ".join(SUBSET_TASKS)
subset_cmd = (
    f"uv run python policies/pi0_family/run.py "  # 浣跨敤鍚屼竴涓瓥鐣?runner锛屼究浜庡拰鍗曚换鍔?smoke 瀵规瘮銆?/span>
    f"--policy {POLICY_NAME} "  # 浣跨敤鍚屼竴涓?policy锛岄伩鍏嶇瓥鐣ュ樊寮傚奖鍝嶈瀵熴€?/span>
    f"--task {subset_task_args} "  # 涓€娆′紶鍏ュ涓换鍔″悕锛屽舰鎴愬皬瀛愰泦璇勬祴銆?/span>
    f"--num-envs {NUM_ENVS_4090_CAUTIOUS} "  # 灏忓瓙闆嗗彲灏濊瘯 2 涓苟琛岀幆澧冿紝浣嗕粛淇濇寔淇濆畧銆?/span>
    f"--num-runs {NUM_RUNS} "  # 鍏堟瘡涓换鍔?1 run锛岀‘璁ょǔ瀹氬悗鍐嶆彁楂?run 鏁般€?/span>
    f"--enable-subtask "  # 淇濆瓨瀛愪换鍔¤繘搴︼紝鏂逛究鐪?score 鍜屽け璐ラ樁娈点€?/span>
    f"--headless"  # 杩滅鏃犳闈?鑺傜渷璧勬簮鏃朵娇鐢?headless銆?/span>
)

print("Subset command:")
print(subset_cmd)
# 棣栨鍔犺浇 Isaac銆佽祫浜у拰妯″瀷鍙兘寰堜箙锛屾墍浠?timeout 鐣欏緱姣旇緝闀裤€?/span>
run(
    subset_cmd,
    cwd=ROBOLAB_DIR,
    env=OMNI_ENV,
    execute=EXECUTE_SUBSET_EVAL,
    check=False,
    timeout=24 * 3600,
    label="eval:subset_4090",
)

7. 结果读取与可视化¶

RoboLab 涓昏缁撴灉鏂囦欢鏄?episode_results.jsonl銆傛瘡琛屽搴斾竴涓?episode锛屽寘鍚换鍔°€佺瓥鐣ャ€乮nstruction銆佹垚鍔熺姸鎬併€乻core銆佽€楁椂銆佽建杩规寚鏍囧拰浜嬩欢璁℃暟銆?/p>

涓嬮潰鐨?cell 浼氾細

  • 鎼滅储 ROBOLAB_DIR/output/**/episode_results.jsonl銆?/li>
  • 娌℃湁鐪熷疄缁撴灉鏃朵娇鐢ㄦ牱渚嬫暟鎹紝纭繚 notebook 鐨勫浘琛ㄦ祦绋嬪彲妫€鏌ャ€?/li>
  • 姹囨€讳换鍔℃垚鍔熺巼銆佽兘鍔涜酱/灞炴€с€侀毦搴︺€佸け璐ヤ簨浠躲€?/li>
In [ ]:
def find_episode_results(root: Path):
    # RoboLab 鍙兘鎶婄粨鏋滃啓鍒颁笉鍚?output 瀛愮洰褰曪紝鎵€浠ラ€掑綊鏌ユ壘銆?/span>
    if not root.exists():
        return []
    return sorted(root.glob("output/**/episode_results.jsonl"))

def load_jsonl(path: Path):
    # 鍚堝苟澶氫釜缁撴灉鏂囦欢鏃朵繚鐣欐潵婧愯矾寰勶紝鏂逛究杩芥函姣忔潯璁板綍鏉ヨ嚜鍝噷銆?/span>
    rows = []
    with path.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        for line in f:
            line = line.strip()
            if not line:
                continue
            row = json.loads(line)
            row["_source_file"] = str(path)
            rows.append(row)
    return rows

result_files = find_episode_results(ROBOLAB_DIR)
rows = []
for path in result_files:
    rows.extend(load_jsonl(path))

if not rows:
    # 娌℃湁鐪熷疄 policy 缁撴灉鏃讹紝鐢ㄦ牱渚嬫暟鎹繚璇佽〃鏍?缁樺浘 cell 鍙墽琛屻€?/span>
    # 娉ㄦ剰锛氳繖浜涙牱渚嬪彧楠岃瘉 notebook 鏁版嵁娴侊紝涓嶄唬琛ㄧ湡瀹?RoboLab 鎴愮哗銆?/span>
    print("No real RoboLab results found yet. Using sample rows for visualization checks.")
    rows = [
        {
            "task_name": "BananaInBowlTask",
            "env_name": "BananaInBowlTask",
            "policy": POLICY_NAME,
            "instruction_type": "default",
            "attributes": ["visual", "semantics", "simple"],
            "success": True,
            "score": 1.0,
            "duration": 14.8,
            "episode_step": 222,
            "metrics": {"ee_sparc": -5.2, "ee_path_length": 1.1, "ee_speed_mean": 0.08},
            "events": {},
        },
        {
            "task_name": "RubiksCubeLeftOfBowlTask",
            "env_name": "RubiksCubeLeftOfBowlTask",
            "policy": POLICY_NAME,
            "instruction_type": "default",
            "attributes": ["relational", "spatial", "moderate"],
            "success": False,
            "score": 0.4,
            "duration": 50.0,
            "episode_step": 750,
            "metrics": {"ee_sparc": -8.9, "ee_path_length": 2.3, "ee_speed_mean": 0.05},
            "events": {"WRONG_OBJECT_GRABBED": 1},
        },
        {
            "task_name": "ReorientWhiteMugsTask",
            "env_name": "ReorientWhiteMugsTask",
            "policy": POLICY_NAME,
            "instruction_type": "specific",
            "attributes": ["procedural", "reorientation", "complex"],
            "success": False,
            "score": 0.2,
            "duration": 60.0,
            "episode_step": 900,
            "metrics": {"ee_sparc": -9.4, "ee_path_length": 3.0, "ee_speed_mean": 0.04},
            "events": {"TARGET_OBJECT_DROPPED": 2},
        },
    ]

def normalize_rows(rows):
    # 鎶婂祵濂楃殑 metrics/events 鎷夊钩鎴愭櫘閫氬垪锛屼究浜?pandas 鍒嗙粍鍜岀粯鍥俱€?/span>
    flat = []
    for row in rows:
        metrics = row.get("metrics") or {}
        events = row.get("events") or {}
        attrs = row.get("attributes") or []
        flat.append(
            {
                "task_name": row.get("task_name") or row.get("env_name"),  # 浠诲姟鍚嶏紝鐢ㄤ簬鎸変换鍔¤仛鍚堟垚鍔熺巼銆?/span>
                "env_name": row.get("env_name"),  # RoboLab 娉ㄥ唽鐜鍚嶏紝閫氬父鍜屼换鍔″悕涓€鑷淬€?/span>
                "policy": row.get("policy"),  # 鏈疆浣跨敤鐨勭瓥鐣ュ悕锛屼緥濡?pi05銆?/span>
                "instruction_type": row.get("instruction_type"),  # 鎸囦护绫诲瀷锛歞efault/vague/specific 绛夈€?/span>
                "attributes": ",".join(attrs) if isinstance(attrs, list) else str(attrs),  # 浠诲姟灞炴€э紝濡?spatial/color/stacking銆?/span>
                "difficulty": next((x for x in attrs if x in {"simple", "moderate", "complex"}), "unknown") if isinstance(attrs, list) else "unknown",  # 浠庡睘鎬ч噷鎶藉彇闅惧害鏍囩銆?/span>
                "success": bool(row.get("success")),  # episode 鏄惁鏁翠綋鎴愬姛銆?/span>
                "score": row.get("score"),  # 瀛愪换鍔℃垨杩涘害鍒嗘暟锛屽け璐ユ椂涔熻兘鍙嶆槧閮ㄥ垎瀹屾垚搴︺€?/span>
                "duration": row.get("duration"),  # episode 鑰楁椂銆?/span>
                "episode_step": row.get("episode_step"),  # episode 瀹為檯姝ユ暟銆?/span>
                "ee_sparc": metrics.get("ee_sparc"),  # 鏈鎵ц鍣ㄨ建杩瑰钩婊戝害鎸囨爣銆?/span>
                "ee_path_length": metrics.get("ee_path_length"),  # 鏈鎵ц鍣ㄨ建杩归暱搴︺€?/span>
                "ee_speed_mean": metrics.get("ee_speed_mean"),  # 鏈鎵ц鍣ㄥ钩鍧囬€熷害銆?/span>
                "wrong_object_grabbed": events.get("WRONG_OBJECT_GRABBED", 0),  # 鎶撻敊鐗╀綋娆℃暟銆?/span>
                "target_object_dropped": events.get("TARGET_OBJECT_DROPPED", 0),  # 鐩爣鐗╀綋鎺夎惤娆℃暟銆?/span>
            }
        )
    return flat

flat_rows = normalize_rows(rows)
if pd is None:
    print(json.dumps(flat_rows[:5], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
else:
    df = pd.DataFrame(flat_rows)
    display(df.head())
    # 鍏堟寜浠诲姟鑱氬悎锛涘悗缁彲浠ュ啀鎸夊睘鎬с€侀毦搴︽垨鑳藉姏杞寸户缁仛鍚堛€?/span>
    summary = (
        df.groupby("task_name", dropna=False)
        .agg(
            episodes=("success", "size"),  # 姣忎釜浠诲姟绱 episode 鏁般€?/span>
            success_rate=("success", "mean"),  # bool 鍧囧€煎氨鏄垚鍔熺巼銆?/span>
            mean_score=("score", "mean"),  # 骞冲潎杩涘害/瀛愪换鍔″垎鏁般€?/span>
            mean_duration_s=("duration", "mean"),  # 骞冲潎鑰楁椂銆?/span>
            wrong_grabs=("wrong_object_grabbed", "sum"),  # 鎶撻敊鐗╀綋鎬绘鏁般€?/span>
            dropped=("target_object_dropped", "sum"),  # 鎺夎惤鎬绘鏁般€?/span>
        )
        .reset_index()
        .sort_values("success_rate")
    )
    display(summary)
    summary.to_csv(ARTIFACT_DIR / "task_summary.csv", index=False)
    print("wrote", ARTIFACT_DIR / "task_summary.csv")
In [ ]:
if pd is not None and plt is not None:
    # 妯悜鏌辩姸鍥惧湪浠诲姟鏁颁粠鍑犱釜鎵╁睍鍒板嚑鍗佷釜鏃朵粛鐒舵瘮杈冨彲璇汇€?/span>
    plot_df = summary.copy()
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(9, max(3, 0.45 * len(plot_df))))
    ax.barh(plot_df["task_name"], plot_df["success_rate"] * 100)
    ax.set_xlabel("Success rate (%)")
    ax.set_xlim(0, 100)
    ax.set_title("RoboLab subset success rate")
    for i, value in enumerate(plot_df["success_rate"] * 100):
        ax.text(min(value + 1, 98), i, f"{value:.1f}%", va="center")
    fig.tight_layout()
    out = ARTIFACT_DIR / "success_rate_by_task.png"
    fig.savefig(out, dpi=160)
    print("wrote", out)
else:
    # 娌¤缁樺浘搴撴椂璺宠繃缁樺浘锛屼繚璇?notebook 浠嶈兘鎵ц瀹屻€?/span>
    print("Install pandas and matplotlib to render plots in this notebook.")

8. 与论文结果对照¶

瀵圭収鏃朵笉瑕佸彧鐪嬩竴涓€绘垚鍔熺巼銆傚缓璁嚦灏戞媶鎴愬洓灞傦細

  • overall锛氭暣浣撴垚鍔熺巼銆佸钩鍧?score銆?/li>
  • ability axis锛歷isual / procedural / relational銆?/li>
  • difficulty锛歴imple / moderate / complex銆?/li>
  • failure mode锛歸rong object銆乨rop銆乼able hit銆乷bject out of scene銆乼imeout銆?/li>

璁烘枃琛ㄦ牸缁欑殑鏄ぇ瑙勬ā鍩哄噯涓婄殑鏁翠綋瓒嬪娍銆備綘鐨?4090 灏忓瓙闆嗗彧鏄?smoke/subset锛屼笉搴旂洿鎺ュ绉板鐜颁簡瀹屾暣璁烘枃缁撹锛涘彧鏈夊畬鏁翠换鍔¤鐩栥€佽冻澶?episodes銆佺浉鍚?绛変环绛栫暐閰嶇疆鍚庯紝鎵嶅仛涓ユ牸瀵规瘮銆?/p>

In [ ]:
# 鎶婅鏂囦腑鐨勬暟鍊间繚瀛樹负鍙傜収閿氱偣锛涘皬瑙勬ā smoke 涓嶈兘鐩存帴瀵规爣瀹屾暣 RoboLab-120銆?/span>
paper_reference = [
    {
        "source": "arXiv 2604.09860v3 Table I",
        "label": "best reported policy row in table",
        "overall_success_pct": 28.0,
        "overall_score": 0.43,
        "note": "Use as a coarse orientation only; verify exact model identity and setup before formal comparison.",
    },
    {
        "source": "arXiv 2604.09860v3 Table I",
        "label": "GR00T N1.6",
        "overall_success_pct": 7.2,
        "overall_score": 0.17,
        "note": "Paper-scale baseline, not a target for a 5-task smoke subset.",
    },
]
ref_path = ARTIFACT_DIR / "paper_reference_orientation.json"
ref_path.write_text(json.dumps(paper_reference, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
print("wrote", ref_path)

if pd is not None and "summary" in globals():
    # 杩欓噷鐨勫姞鏉冩垚鍔熺巼鍙鐩栧綋鍓嶅姞杞藉埌鐨勫瓙闆嗭紝涓嶄唬琛ㄥ畬鏁?benchmark銆?/span>
    observed = {
        "subset_tasks": int(summary.shape[0]),
        "subset_episodes": int(summary["episodes"].sum()),
        "subset_success_pct": float(summary.eval("success_rate * episodes").sum() / summary["episodes"].sum() * 100),
        "warning": "This is a subset/smoke metric, not full RoboLab-120 reproduction.",
    }
    write_status("observed_vs_paper_orientation", observed)
    observed

9. 每日学习记录模板¶

姣忔鎵ц鍚庯紝鎶婄湡瀹炲懡浠ゃ€佹姤閿欍€佹埅鍥俱€佹寚鏍囧啓涓嬫潵銆傚鐜扮被浠诲姟鐨勫叧閿笉鏄€滆窇杩団€濓紝鑰屾槸鑳藉洖鏀捐瘉鎹摼銆?/p>

In [ ]:
def append_learning_log(
    stage: str,
    goals=None,
    commands=None,
    problems=None,
    outputs=None,
    insights=None,
):
    # 姣忓ぉ/姣忛樁娈佃拷鍔犱竴娈靛涔犺褰曪紱marker 闃叉閲嶅鎵ц notebook 鏃堕噸澶嶅啓鍏ャ€?/span>
    goals = goals or []
    commands = commands or []
    problems = problems or []
    outputs = outputs or []
    insights = insights or []
    date = _dt.datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    path = ARTIFACT_DIR / "learning_log.md"
    marker = f"## {date} - {stage}"
    if path.exists() and marker in path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"):
        print("learning log already contains", marker)
        return path
    block = []
    # 鍥哄畾鏃ュ織鏍煎紡锛屽悗缁彲浠ョ洿鎺ョ矘璐村埌澶嶇幇鎶ュ憡鎴栧仛闃舵瀵规瘮銆?/span>
    block.append(f"\n{marker}\n")
    block.append("### 浠婃棩鐩爣\n")
    block.extend([f"- [ ] {x}\n" for x in goals] or ["- [ ] \n"])
    block.append("\n### 鎵ц璁板綍\n")
    if commands:
        block.append("```bash\n" + "\n".join(commands) + "\n```\n")
    else:
        block.append("```bash\n# command here\n```\n")
    block.append("\n### 閬囧埌鐨勯棶棰樺強瑙ｅ喅鏂规\n")
    block.append("| 闂 | 瑙ｅ喅鏂规 |\n|---|---|\n")
    block.extend([f"| {p.get('problem', '')} | {p.get('solution', '')} |\n" for p in problems] or ["|  |  |\n"])
    block.append("\n### 鍏抽敭杈撳嚭/鎴浘\n")
    block.extend([f"- {x}\n" for x in outputs] or ["- \n"])
    block.append("\n### 瀛︿範蹇冨緱\n")
    block.extend([f"- {x}\n" for x in insights] or ["- \n"])
    path.open("a", encoding="utf-8").write("".join(block))
    print("appended", path)
    return path

append_learning_log(
    "鐜閰嶇疆鍑嗗",
    goals=["纭 Ubuntu / 椹卞姩 / 4090 / Python 3.11 / uv / ffmpeg / git-lfs", "璁板綍 RoboLab 褰撳墠 commit 涓庝緷璧栫増鏈?],
    commands=["nvidia-smi", "uv venv --python 3.11", "uv sync", "uv run pytest tests/"],
    insights=["4090 绗竴杞彧璺?num_envs=1锛涘畬鏁?RoboLab-120 涓嶄綔涓哄畨瑁呭綋澶╃洰鏍囥€?],
)

10. 常见问题预案¶

闂 鍒ゆ柇鏂瑰紡 澶勭悊
uv sync 澶辫触 鐪?command_log.jsonl 閲岀殑 stderr 纭 Python 3.11銆佺綉缁溿€佺鐩樸€?code>uv 鐗堟湰锛涢噸璇曞墠淇濈暀鏃ュ織
棣栨鍚姩鍗′綇 娌℃湁鏂版棩蹇椼€丟PU 鏈夊崰鐢?/td> 璁剧疆 OMNI_KIT_ACCEPT_EULA=Y锛岄娆¤祫浜у姞杞借€愬績绛夊緟
OOM nvidia-smi 鏄惧瓨鎺ヨ繎 24GB锛屾棩蹇楀嚭鐜?CUDA/Vulkan OOM --num-envs 1锛屽叧闂闈㈤噸璐熻浇锛屽噺灏戣棰?鍥惧儚璁板綍
娓叉煋绌虹櫧 HDF5 鏈夋暟鎹絾瑙嗛绌虹櫧 妫€鏌ラ┍鍔ㄣ€乭eadless/EGL銆両saac Sim Vulkan 鏃ュ織
浠诲姟澶辫触鐜囧緢楂?/td> success 浣庝絾 score 鏈夎繘灞?/td> 鎷嗙湅 subtask銆亀rong object銆乨rop銆乼imeout锛屼笉鍙湅浜屽厓鎴愬姛
灏忓瓙闆嗙粨鏋滅湅浼间紭浜庤鏂?/td> 浠诲姟澶皯鎴栦换鍔″亸绠€鍗?/td> 鏍囨敞涓?subset smoke锛屼笉鍜岃鏂囧畬鏁?benchmark 鐩存帴姣旇緝
In [ ]:
# 鏈€缁?gate 鍚屾椂妫€鏌ユ湰鍦?artifact 鍜岃繙绔?4090 璇佹嵁銆?/span>
# 鍒ゆ柇鏍囧噯鏁呮剰淇濆畧锛氬彧鏈夋枃浠跺瓨鍦ㄤ笉绠楅€氳繃锛岃繕瑕佺湅杩斿洖鐮併€乼raceback 鍜屽鍑虹粨鏋溿€?/span>
remote_summary_for_status = {}
if REMOTE_SUMMARY_PATH.exists():
    remote_summary_for_status = json.loads(REMOTE_SUMMARY_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
remote_install_ok = remote_summary_for_status.get("installation", {}).get("uv_sync_status") == "ok"
remote_smoke = remote_summary_for_status.get("smoke", {})
remote_smoke_ok = bool(
    # 鏃犵瓥鐣?smoke 鍙湁鍦ㄧ幆澧?setup銆乪pisode 瀵煎嚭閮藉畬鎴愪笖娌℃湁 traceback 鏃舵墠绠楅€氳繃銆?/span>
    remote_smoke.get("completed_setup")
    and remote_smoke.get("exported_episode")
    and not remote_smoke.get("traceback_present")
)
remote_subset3_summary_for_status = {}
if REMOTE_SUBSET3_SUMMARY_PATH.exists():
    remote_subset3_summary_for_status = json.loads(REMOTE_SUBSET3_SUMMARY_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
remote_subset3_ok = bool(
    # subset3 瑕佹眰杩涚▼杩斿洖鐮佸共鍑€锛屽苟鑷冲皯瀵煎嚭 3 鏉?episode 璁板綍銆?/span>
    remote_subset3_summary_for_status.get("status_file_rc") == "0"
    and not remote_subset3_summary_for_status.get("traceback_present")
    and remote_subset3_summary_for_status.get("episodes_exported_count", 0) >= 3
)
remote_policy_summary_for_status = {}
if REMOTE_POLICY_SUMMARY_PATH.exists():
    remote_policy_summary_for_status = json.loads(REMOTE_POLICY_SUMMARY_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
remote_no_policy = remote_policy_summary_for_status.get("no_policy_smoke", {})
remote_openpi = remote_policy_summary_for_status.get("openpi_policy_readiness", {})
remote_subset21_ok = bool(
    # subset21 鐨?summary 鏄疮璁℃枃浠讹紝搴旇鍖呭惈鏃╁厛 Banana/subset3/subset10/subset19 鐨勮褰曘€?/span>
    remote_no_policy.get("subset10_status") == "0"
    and remote_no_policy.get("subset_more_status") == "0"
    and remote_no_policy.get("num_records_cumulative", 0) >= 21
    and {"PickDrillTask", "Stack3RubiksCubeTask"}.issubset(
        set(remote_no_policy.get("candidate_probe_successful_tasks", []))
    )
)
remote_openpi_env_ok = bool(
    # 杩欎釜 gate 鍙〃绀?OpenPI 鐜銆佸鍏ュ拰 CLI 鍙敤锛屼笉琛ㄧず绛栫暐宸茬粡璺戣繃銆?/span>
    remote_openpi.get("openpi_client_install_status") == "0"
    and remote_openpi.get("openpi_uv_sync_status") == "0"
    and remote_openpi.get("openpi_verify_status") == "0"
)
pi05_policy_smoke_summary_for_status = {}
if (ARTIFACT_DIR / "pi05_policy_smoke_summary.json").exists():
    pi05_policy_smoke_summary_for_status = json.loads(
        (ARTIFACT_DIR / "pi05_policy_smoke_summary.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
    )
# 鍜?G9 鍒嗗紑锛氱幆澧冭濂藉悗锛孭i05 checkpoint 涓嬭浇/鍔犺浇浠嶅彲鑳介渶瑕佸緢澶氬皬鏃躲€?/span>
pi05_server_ready = bool(
    remote_openpi.get("server_port_8000_ready")
    or pi05_policy_smoke_summary_for_status.get("server_ready")
)
pi05_policy_smoke_ok = bool(
    pi05_policy_smoke_summary_for_status.get("checkpoint_verify_ok")
    and pi05_policy_smoke_summary_for_status.get("checkpoint_restored")
    and pi05_policy_smoke_summary_for_status.get("server_ready")
    and pi05_policy_smoke_summary_for_status.get("smoke_status") == "0"
    and any(row.get("success") is True for row in pi05_policy_smoke_summary_for_status.get("episode_records", []))
)

final_checklist = {
    # 鏈湴 notebook 鍜岃褰曟枃浠?gate銆?/span>
    "G0_preflight_saved": (ARTIFACT_DIR / "preflight_status.json").exists(),
    "G1_command_log_exists": COMMAND_LOG.exists(),
    "G2_local_install_freeze_saved_after_real_run": (ARTIFACT_DIR / "uv_freeze.txt").exists(),
    # 鏉ヨ嚜杩滅 RTX 4090 璇佹嵁鍖呯殑杩愯 gate銆?/span>
    "G2_remote_4090_install_verified": remote_install_ok,
    "G3_task_summary_exists": (ARTIFACT_DIR / "task_summary.csv").exists(),
    "G4_learning_log_exists": (ARTIFACT_DIR / "learning_log.md").exists(),
    "G5_paper_reference_saved": (ARTIFACT_DIR / "paper_reference_orientation.json").exists(),
    "G6_remote_4090_no_policy_smoke_completed": remote_smoke_ok,
    "G7_remote_4090_subset3_no_policy_smoke_completed": remote_subset3_ok,
    "G8_remote_4090_subset21_no_policy_smoke_completed": remote_subset21_ok,
    # 绛栫暐鍑嗗 gate锛涘彧鏈?8000 绔彛鐪熷疄鐩戝惉鍚庯紝G10 鎵嶈兘鍙樹负 true銆?/span>
    "G9_openpi_environment_verified": remote_openpi_env_ok,
    "G10_pi05_policy_server_ready": pi05_server_ready,
    "G11_core_code_explanation_saved": (ARTIFACT_DIR / "core_code_reading_map.json").exists(),
    "G12_remote_4090_pi05_policy_smoke_success": pi05_policy_smoke_ok,
    "G13_real_to_sim_explain_saved": (NOTEBOOK_ROOT / "EXPLAIN_01_real_to_sim_eval.md").exists(),
    "G14_complete_pi05_banana_report_saved": (NOTEBOOK_ROOT / "COMPLETE_REPRO_pi05_banana_20260620.md").exists(),
    "G15_complex_task_report_saved": (NOTEBOOK_ROOT / "COMPLEX_TASKS_pi05_20260620.md").exists(),
    "G16_scene_task_env_explain_saved": (NOTEBOOK_ROOT / "EXPLAIN_02_scene_task_env_generation.md").exists(),
    "G17_task_generation_validation_explain_saved": (NOTEBOOK_ROOT / "EXPLAIN_03_task_generation_validation.md").exists(),
    "G18_taskgen_lightweight_tests_passed": (
        ARTIFACT_DIR / "taskgen_lightweight_validation_tests.json"
    ).exists(),
    "G19_competency_axes_difficulty_explain_saved": (
        NOTEBOOK_ROOT / "EXPLAIN_04_competency_axes_difficulty.md"
    ).exists(),
    "G20_competency_difficulty_tests_passed": (
        ARTIFACT_DIR / "competency_difficulty_lightweight_tests.json"
    ).exists(),
    "G21_sparc_explain_saved": (

    ).exists(),
    "G22_sparc_lightweight_tests_passed": (
        ARTIFACT_DIR / "sparc_lightweight_tests.json"
    ).exists(),
    "G23_mnpe_explain_saved": (

final_checklist
